      • 翻身（ch37-08.mp3）
      • 坐（ch37-09.mp3）
      • 爬行（ch37-10.mp3）
        • Tip: Tummy Time
      • 长牙齿的时候（ch37-11.mp3）

      • 喂辅食（ch37-13.mp3）

      • 作业/准备物品/提醒单（ch41-05.mp3）

      • 迟到/早退/缺席（ch41-07.mp3）

    • Chapter 42: 交到朋友了
      • 同班同学（ch42-01.mp3）
      • 介绍朋友（ch42-02.mp3）
      • 朋友的问题（ch42-03.mp3）
      • 集体霸凌（ch42-04.mp3）
      • 去朋友家玩（ch42-05.mp3）
      • 在朋友家睡（ch42-06.mp3）
    • Chapter 43: 学校课业
      • 学习（ch43-01.mp3）
      • 考试（ch43-02.mp3）

  • Part 9: 和外籍老师的沟通
    • Chapter 45: 英文幼稚园/补习班
      • 经常使用的教室英文（ch45-01.mp3）
        • 老师经常使用的表达
        • 学生们常用的表达
      • 英文名字（ch45-02.mp3）
      • 年龄（ch45-03.mp3）
      • 老师指示行动（ch45-04.mp3）
    • Chapter 46: 和外籍老师相谈
      • 老师（ch46-01.mp3）
        • 夸奖学生的优点
        • 指出学生的缺点

        • 询问上课态度
        • 询问成绩
        • 询问交友状况
        • 询问准备物品
      • 感谢信（ch46-03.mp3）
        • 妈妈的信
        • 小孩的信
      • 信件用语（ch46-04.mp3）
      • 祝贺信（ch46-05.mp3）
        • 教师节
        • 圣诞节/新年
        • 道歉信
      • 英语系国家经常使用的单位
        • 温度 Temperature
        • 长度 Length
        • 容积 Volume
        • 面积 Area
      • 美国生活中经常使用的单位
        • 鞋子的尺寸 Shoe Size
          • 男生
          • 女生
        • 衣服的大小 Clothing Size
          • 男生
          • 女生
          • T恤
          • 小孩的衣服

爸妈最常使用的50句英文

Time to wake up! 该起床了！
Good morning!  
Did you sleep well? 睡得好吗？
Come and eat your breakfast. 快来吃早餐。
Don't be picky about your food. 不要挑食。
Wash your face and brush your teeth. 洗脸刷牙。
Daddy is leaving. Say goodbye. 爸爸要出门了，说再见。
Let's get dressed. 来穿衣服吧。
What do you want to wear today? 今天你想穿什么？
Let me comb your hair. 我来帮你梳头。
Did you put some lotion on your face? 脸上擦乳液了吗？
Hurry up, Honey! You'll be late. 快点，要迟到了。
Here's the elevator. Let's get in. 电梯来了，我们进去吧。
Push button one. 按一楼。
Let's get out. 我们出去吧。
Have a nice day.  
Watch out for cars. 小心汽车。
How was school today? 今天学校如何？
Are you hungry?  
Go wash your hands. 去洗手。
Let's have a snack. 我们吃点心吧。
Do you want some more? 还想多吃点吗？
Recess is over. 休息时间结束了。
It's time to study! 该学习了。
Sit properly. 坐好。
Do you have any home work?  
Are you done with your homework? 你作业都做完了吗？
Did you do well on your test? 考试考的好吗？
What score did you get on the test? 考了多少分？
Good job! 你做得很好！
Move back from the TV. 从电视那里后退。
Turn off the TV now. 现在关掉电视。
Who made such a mess? 谁弄得这么脏？
Put your toys away. 把玩具收拾好。
Are you sick? 你不舒服吗？
Do you want to pee / poop?  
Do you want a piggy-back ride? 要我背你吗？
Do you want me to hold you? 要我抱你吗？
Give me a kiss! 亲一下。
Don't fight with your little brother / sister. 不要跟弟弟妹妹打架。
Don't hit your brother / sister. 不要打弟弟妹妹。
Don't bother your sister. 不要打扰你的姐姐。
Play nicely with your friends. 和朋友好好玩。
Stop whining. 不要再哭哭唧唧了。
Don't talk back! 不要顶嘴！
I'm sorry. Let's make up. 对不起，我们和好吧。
Let me read you a story. 我来念个故事给你听。
It's time to go to bed. 该睡觉了。
Good night! Sweet dreams! 晚安！祝你做个好梦！
Don't forget that I love you. 不要忘记我爱你。

孩子最常使用的50句英文

Good morning, Mom and Dad!  
I'm awake. 我醒了（爸爸妈妈叫起床时回答）
Have a nice day, Dad!  
I want to wear this shirt.  
I can do it by myself.  
Mom, I'm all grown up now. 我现在都长大了。
Do I look good, Mom?  
Tie my hair, please. 请帮我绑头发。
Goodbye! I'm leaving. 再见，我要出门了。
I'm home, Mom. 我回来了。
Can you get me the scissors, Mom? 可以给我剪刀吗？
Look at this, Mom. 看这个。
Mom, I'm bored. 我很无聊。
Play with me, Mom. 跟我玩。
Draw me a car.  
Can I watch TV?  
Please play Cailou.  
After this TV show.  
Can I play computer games for a little bit? 我可以玩一会儿电脑游戏吗？
Can I go play outside? 我可以去外面玩吗？
Can I go play at Jina's house? 我可以去Jina家玩吗？
I want to try it, Mom! 我想试试看。
Minji hit me.  
It was not my fault. 不是我的错。
He started it. 是他先开始的。
Don't get angry. 不要生气。
I'm sorry. It won't happen again. 对不起。我不会再这样了。
I'm really angry. 我真的生气了。
I'm not talking back. 我不是在顶嘴。
I'm glad you praised me.  
Can you get me milk, please? 可以把牛奶拿给我吗？拜托啦。
Can I have some more? 我可以再要一些吗？
Can I have some ice cream?  
I hate mushrooms. 我讨厌蘑菇。
I don't feel like eating. 不没心情吃饭。
I need to pee.  
I need to poop.  
I'm done, Mom. 我好了。
I'm tired.  
I'm sleepy / I'm tired. 我困了。
I'm hungry / I'm starving. 我饿了。
My legs hurt. 我腿疼。
Hold me (tight). / Give me a (big) hug. 给我一个（大大的）拥抱。
Give me a piggy-back ride. 背我。
Can I take a break? 我可以休息一下吗？
Wait for me, Mom.  
Dad, when are you coming? 爸爸你什么时候回来？
Can you read me a story, Mom? 可以读个故事给我听吗？
Who do you love more, me or Minji? 你爱谁多一点，我还是Minji？
I love you the most in the world. 在这个世界上，我最爱你了。

Part 1: 我们家的一天

Chapter 01: 忙碌的一天

起床（ch01-01.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
Mom Time to wake up! It's time to …
  Wake up, you sleepyhead! sleepyhead: 贪睡鬼
  Rise and shine! 太阳都晒屁股了!
  Get up, please! Time to go to school. school 此处指幼儿园
  Still dreaming? Are you still dreaming?
  I'll tickle you if you don't wake up.  
  You should go to bed early to get up early.  
  Want to sleep more?  
Daughter Can I sleep some more?  
  I'm so tired that I can't get up.  
  Mom, I can't keep my eyes open?  
Mom Just five more minutes.  
  I'll count to three. Come on!  
  Hurry up, or you will be late,  
Daughter I'm awake.  
  You don't have to wake me up. I'm already up.  
Mom Wow! Did you get up by yourself?  
  Did you not hear the alarm?  
  Don't doze off. Sit right up.  
  Let's see who gets up first.  
  You're still sound asleep. sound: 睡得很沉
  Stretch your body.  
  I'm not going to wake you up any more.  

早晨打招呼（ch01-02.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
Daughter Good morning, Mom and Dad!  
Mom Did you sleep well?  
  Hey! Did you get a good night's sleep?  
  Did you sleep tight, my sweetie?  
  You slept in. sleep in: 睡懒觉
  Was it not chilly at night?  
  You're already awake? Why so early?  
  Whoa! I've never seen this before!  
Daughter My eyes just opened. 我刚睁开眼睛。
Mom Seems like you're in a good mood. It …
  You look happy after a good night's sleep.  
  Why do you look grumpy this morning? grumpy: 脾气古怪，性情坏
Daughter I'm still sleepy.  
Mom You should say hello first thing in the morning.  
  You should say, "Good morning!"  
  Let's kiss and say, "Good morning!"  
  Did you have sweet dreams?  
Daughter Mom, want to hear about my dreams?  
Mom Can you wake up your brother?  

洗脸（ch01-03.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Get up to wash your face. Or: Get up and wash your face.
  Wash your face and brush your teeth.  
  Wash your neck, too.  
  Who wants to wash up first?  
  Want Mom to help you? Do you …
D Can you help me, Mom?  
  If I do it by myself, I will get my clothes wet. get sth. wet: 把。。。弄湿
  I don't want to clean my face!  
  I'll wash myself after I eat.  
M Are you done? be done: 结束，完成
D I'm working, Mommy. 我正在洗，妈妈。
M Get a clean towel.  
D Mom, there's no towel.  
  Mom, can you get me a towel? get A B: 拿B给A
M You look pretty after cleaning.  
  Watch out for the slippery floor. slippery: 滑的

刷牙（ch01-04.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M You should brush your teeth three times a day  
  Brush your teeth properly.  
  Brush up and down.  
  Don't forget to brush deep inside. deep inside: 里面的深处
  Clean your teeth and gums thoroughly.  
  Don't forget to brush your tongue.  
  Gargle and spit. gargle: 漱口
  Put only a little toothpaste on your toothbrush.  
D Mom, squeeze the toothpaste for me.  
  We're out of toothpaste.  
M Brush for three minutes.  
D Has it been three minutes yet?  
M Don't leave the water running. leave A -ing: 保持。。。状态
D I hate brushing my teeth. hate -ing: 讨厌做。。。
  Brush my teeth for me, Mom.  
M Brush your teeth well, or they will turn black.  
  If you don't take care of your teeth, you'll get cavities. cavity: 蛀洞
  If you don't brush well, you'll have bad breath. have bad breath: 有口臭
  Don't brush your teeth the wrong way.  

吃早餐（ch01-05.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M It's time for breakfast.  
  Come and eat your breakfast.  
  Sit at the table.  
D Dad, come and eat with us.  
M Can you call your brother, too?  
  Who wants to help me set the table? help sb. do sth.
  Can you put your spoons on the table?  
  Let's say grace before we eat. say grace: 吃饭前说感恩的话
  Let's have breakfast.  
  How is it? Isn't it good?  
  Don't you like it? 此句比 taste bad（不好吃）更常用
  Don't you feel like eating? feel like doing sth.: 想做…
  Why aren't you eating?  
D I don't feel like eating much. 我不怎么想吃。
  I can't eat in the morning. 我早上不要吃东西。
M Eating breakfast makes you strong.  
  Just take one more bite.  
  Just try and see if it's good. see if …: 看看是否…
  You'll be late. Hurry up and eat.  
  Let's drink some water.  
  Don't spill the milk. spill: 使流出
D I can't reach the dish. 我夹不到菜。 reach: 碰到
  There is too much rice.  
M I'll feed you. 我来喂你。
D It's too hot.  
M Blow on your food to cool it off. cool off: 使变冷
  Are you finished? 都吃完了吗？
  Stop eating now. 不要再吃了。
D I can't eat anymore. 我再也吃不下了。
  I'm full. 我饱了。
  Can't I leave some? 不可以剩一点吗？
  Is it okay if I don't finish all? 可以不要全部吃完吗？
  I'm almost done eating. 我差不多吃完了。
  Looks good. Thank you. 看起来好好吃。谢谢。
  Thank you for the nice meal.  
  The food was fabulous. Thanks. fabulous: 惊人的，难以置信的

用餐习惯和礼节（ch01-06.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Don't be picky with your food. 不要挑食。picky: 挑剔的
  Don't walk around while you eat.  
  Don't leave your food uneaten.  
  You should eat by yourself.  
  Be careful not to drop your food.  
  Oops! You dropped your food.  
  It's okay. I'll clean it.  
  Eat slowly and don't rush. rush: 急
  Chew well. 好好咀嚼。
  Use your chopsticks right.  
  Don't spit out the food. spit out: 吐出来。
  Sit down and eat at the table. 要坐在餐桌吃饭。
  Sit properly at the table.  
  Don't talk with your mouth full. with one's mouth full: 嘴巴里塞满食物
  Put your bowl in the sink.  
  Help me clean the table.  

上厕所（ch01-07.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
Son I have to pee.  
  I have to poop.  
  I'm about to poop. 我快要大出来了。 be about to do sth.: 正要做
M Take off your pants first.  
  Don't forget to flush.  
  Don't use too much toilet paper.  
  Phew! It stinks! 好臭啊
  Tell me if you have to pee.  
  Is it not coming out? 尿不出来吗？
  Don't hold it. Go pee. 不要忍。去尿尿吧。
  It's not good to hold your pee. it's not good to do sth.: … 是不好的
S I don't want to sit on the toilet. 我讨厌坐马桶。
M Can you pee by yourself?  
  Wash your hands after you poop.  
  Flush the toilet only once.  
  Call me when you're done. 好了叫我哦。
S I'm done, Mom. 妈，我好了。
  Can you wipe my bottom? bottom: 屁股，臀部
  I keep farting. Hold your nose. 我一直放屁。捏住你的鼻子。
M Ugh, who cut the cheese? cut the cheese: 放屁
  Fart in my face, and I'll get you! 放屁在我脸上的话，我会抓住你（惩罚）
  Did you pee in your pants?  
  It looks like your were in a rush. 看起来你很急。in a rush: 急
  Does your tummy ache?  
  Don't hold it till you have to pee in your pants next time. 下次，不要忍到尿在裤子上。

爸爸去上班（ch01-08.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Daddy is going to work. 爸爸要去上班了。
  Daddy is leaving. Say goodbye.  
  Say bye-bye, Sweetie.  
D Have a good day, Dad!  
  Good luck, Dad!  
M Give Daddy a kiss.  
  Honey, want to polish Dad's shoes? polish one's shoes: 擦皮鞋
D Let me get your shoes ready, Dad. get sth. ready: 把…准备好
M Call us if you're going to be late.  
  Are you eating out with your coworkers? eat out: 在外用餐
D Come home early. 早点回来。
  Don't be too late, Dad.  
  When are you coming back?  
  I want to go with you, Dad!  
  Come home early to play with me.  
  Don't drink and come home early.  
  See you later, Dad!  
  Bring me some goodies when you get back. goodies: 好吃的东西
  Dad, you look great!  
Dad Have fun all day, Sweetie. 今天也要玩得开心。
  Dad will go to work.  
  I'll miss you while I work.  
  Dad will call you at lunch hour.  
  Shall I bring you something good? 我可以买什么好东西给你呢？
  Have fun with Mommy.  
  I'll come back from work as fast as I can.  

挑衣服（ch01-09.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M What do you want to wear?  
  Choose what you want to wear.  
D I want to wear a skirt today.  
M What do you need to wear today?  
  Today, you need to wear your school uniform.  
  Today, you need to wear your PE clothes. PE: physical education; 美国小学没有体育服
D Get me my gym clothes. Gym clothes: 运动服
M Shorts are not good for this weather.  
  It's chilly, so you should wear a jacket.  
D I don't want to wear those clothes.  
  I don't want to wear this shirt. Give me another one.  
  I will wear this coat tomorrow, too.  
  When did you buy these pants?  
  This jacket is too girlish/ boyish. ~ish: 像…的
  I don't feel comfy in this shirt. comfy: 舒服（comfortable 的儿童用语）
M This is too thin.  
  It's very chilly out there. 外面非常冷。
  The pants don't match the shirt.  
  We need to wash this shirt. Get another one.  
  It's not fully dry yet. Wear it tomorrow.  
  That dress looks perfect on my princess!  

穿衣服（ch01-10.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Let's get changed. 让我们来换衣服吧。
  Can you get dressed by yourself? 你可以自己穿衣服吗？
  Do you want Mom to help you?  
  Fold your sleeves.  
  Put on your hat.  
  Your socks don't match.  
  Where is your other sock?  
  Let's zip up your pants. 拉上裤子的拉链。
  Let's button your shirt.  
  You buttoned your shirt wrong. 你的纽扣扣错了。
  You put on your shirt inside out.  
  Take off your underclothes. 脱掉你的内衣。
  Let's change into some new underwear. 我们换新的内衣吧。
D Can you help me put this on?  
  Can you unbutton my shirt?  
  Can you unzip me?  
  This is too small / large.  
M These pants are too small now.  
  You have outgrown these clothes. outgrow: 长大后衣服不能穿
D Do I look good, Mom?  
Tip: 衣服的种类
shirt  
T-shirt  
jacket 外套，夹克
sweatshirt 运动衫
pullover 套衫
tank top 无袖上衣
hoodie 卫衣
pants  
jeans  
slacks 休闲裤
shorts 短裤
overalls 工作裤
skirt  
dress 连衣裙
coat 外套
trench coat 军用雨衣
gym clothe 运动服
pajamas 睡衣
underwear 内衣
uniform 支付

穿衣服（ch01-11.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Change your clothes.  
D What should I wear.  
M Look in your closet. closet: 壁橱
  Change into some comfortable clothes.  
  Change into some clean clothes.  
  Wear what you want to wear.  
  Change into what you wear at home.  
D Can I wear this?  
M Isn't that too hot? Wear something else.  
D I'll just stay in these clothes.  
M That's dirty. Change now.  
  Put your dirty clothes in the laundry basket. 把脏衣服放进洗衣篮。
  Change your underwear, too.  
  Put on the clothes that are ready. 换上准备好的衣服。
D Mom, where are the clothes ready to wear? 我要穿的衣服在哪儿？
M What are you doing not getting dressed? 你不穿衣服，还在做什么？
  You got dressed by yourself. Now you're a big boy / girl.  

梳头发（ch01-12.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Let's comb your hair.  
  I will tie your hair pretty.  
  Do you want it tied in a ponytail or pigtails? 马尾，辫子
  Let me part your hair. 把头发分开
  Don't move.  
  Your hair has grown a lot. 你的头发长很多了。
  Your haif is fluffy. fluffy: 蓬松
  You need a haircut at a beauty shop. beauty shop: 理发室
  Do you want a hairpin? hairpin: 发夹
  Do you want a hairband? hairband: 发带
  Which hairband do you want?  
  Your hair is tangled up, so I can't comb it. tangled up: 打结
D Brush my hair softly. brush: 用梳子梳头
  Mom, that hurts!  
M Want me to braid your hair? braid: 绑辫子
  Let me put your hair up. 我来把你的头发梳起来。
  Can you hand me the hairpin?  
  Please bring me the comb.  
D Can you tie my hair?  
  Can you cut my bangs? My hair is poking me in my eyes. bangs: 刘海；poke: 戳
  Can you tie my hair like you did yesterday?  
  I don't like this hairstyle.  
  Can you tie it again, please?  
  I want to untie my hair today. untie: 解开
  Tie my hair in a ponytail.  
  Tie my hair in pigtails.  
  Don't tie it too hard. 请不要绑得太紧。
M Do you want your bangs to grows? 你要把刘海留长吗？

准备学校用品（ch01-13.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M What are your supplies for school today? supplies: school supplies
  Did you pack your bag? 你整理好书包了吗？
  Did you get your books? 教科书放进去了吗？
  Do you have your lunchbox and water bottle? 便当和水瓶
  Do you have your indoor shoes? 美国学校不使用室内拖鞋
S Oops, I forgot. oops: 啊，咦
  I can't remember what I should bring.  
  I should bring some art supplies. 美术用具
  I need to get this paper signed. 这份考卷需要签名。
  I got everything ready. 我都准备好了。
M What did your teacher ask you to bring?  
  Do you have art class today? 美术课
  You should have your supplies prepared in advance. have sth. prepared
  Starting tomorrow, have it ready beforehand.  
  Are you ready?  
  Make sure you have everything.  
  I forgot to pack your lunchbox.  
  Do you need anything else?  
  Wow, you got it ready. Good job!  
S I have no homework / supplies today.  
  I don't know what to bring to school.  
  My teacher never told us anything.  
  Where are my supplies, Mom?  
M I thought I put them in your backpack. backpack: 书包，bookbag
  It's your job to get your supplies.  
  You should go to stationery store on your way to school. stationery store: 文具店
Tip: 美国小学的学校用品

在美国，学期初的时候就会分发需要的学校用品目录，并且可以把学校用品放在个人的储藏柜内，因此在学期在中就不需要每天带学校用品来上学。特别活动时，如果需要特别用品的话，老师会用信件通知父母要让小孩子带什么来学校。

催促（ch01-14.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Hurry up, Honey!  
  Mom's waiting.  
  You'll be late.  
D We still have time, Mommy.  
M You'll be late for school if you don't hurry.  
  The day will be over soon. 一天都要结束了。
  Oh, no! It's too late.  
  You're going to miss the school bus.  
D Can you give me a ride? give a ride: 开车接送
M Look at the clock.  
  Can't you tell the time? 判读时钟显示的时间
  Do you know how late you are?  
  Finish in five minutes.  
D What time is it now?  
  I'm doing my best.  
  I'm sorry. I'll speed up. speed up: 加速
M I'm not waiting for you any longer.  
  I'm leaving before you.  
  If you keep on being late, it will be a hard habit to break. 这个坏习惯将很难改掉. keep on doing sth.
  I'll be outside waiting for you.  
  Finish before I count to three.  
  We need to leave now.  
  You don't have enough time. 你的时间已经不够了
  Time is ticking away. 时间飞快过去了。tick away: 时间飞快流逝
  Why should this happen every morning?  
D Sorry, it won't happen again.  

穿鞋子（ch01-15.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Put on your shoes.  
  Get your bag and put on your shoes. 背好背包，穿好鞋子。
  Change your shoes to sneakers. sneakers: 帆布鞋，运动鞋
  Your shoes are on the wrong feet. 你的鞋子穿错边了。
  Switch shoes. 交换穿一下。
  Don't step on the back of your shoes. 不要踩鞋后跟。
  You need your sneakers if you want to run.  
  Your shoes are old now.  
  These shoes are old and torn. torn: 破的
S I still love these shoes. Don't throw them away. throw away: 丢掉
  My shoelaces are untied, Mom. 鞋带开了
  My shoelaces won't stay tied.  
  Can you tie my shoes?  
  I like Velcro shoes. Velcro: 尼龙扣
M Those shoes don't match your clothes.  
  Put your shoes in the right place.  
  Put your shoes on the shoe rack.  
  They must be on the shoe rack.  
  Your shoe size is 130mm.  
  Do the shoes fit?  
  Are they not too big / small?  
  You've outgrown your shoes.  
  Let me buy you a new pair.  
S These new shoes hurt my feet.  
  I want to wear my dress shoes.  
  What shoes should I wear, Mom?  
M They are very dirty. They need to be washed.  
Tip: 鞋子的种类
dress shoes 皮鞋
sneakers, sports shoes 运动鞋
sandals 凉鞋
slippers, flip-flops 拖鞋
boots 马靴
pumps 有跟的女鞋

上学前的打招呼（ch01-16.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Have a good day.  
  Have a good time.  
  Have fun with your friends.  
  Be happy all day long. 一整天都要快乐哦。
  Bow your head politely, Honey. bow one's head: 低头，鞠躬
  You should say goodbye.  
  Shouldn't you say bye to your Dad?  
  Give me a kiss, Honey.  
  Didn't you forget something?  
S Goodbye! I'm leaving.  
M Study hard at school. 在学校好好用功。
  Be good at school. Behave! 好好呆在学校，要听话！
  Call after school. / Call me after you're done. 放学后打电话给我。
  I'll see you later in the afternoon. 等一下下午见。
  Come home right after school. 放学后立即回家。
  I'll be waiting with a tasty snack ready. snack: 点心
S Will you be home when I come back?  
  Come pick me up later. pick up: 开车去接
M I'll go pick you up.  

妈妈的叮咛（ch01-17.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Watch out for cars. watch out: 小心
  Don't walk on the road. 不要走到车道。
  Always cross at crosswalks. crosswalk: 斑马线
  Be careful when you cross the street.  
  Look sideways while your are walking. 走路时要注意看旁边。
  Watch for the traffic lights. 要看红绿灯。
  Make sure you walk when the light is green. 确定是绿灯时才走。
  Raise your hand when you cross the street. raise one's hand: 举手
  Don't play with your cell phone on the street.  
  Don't run. Walk slowly. 慢慢走。
  Don't rush. 不要赶。
  Go stright to school. 直接去学校。
  Don't ever follow strangers. 绝对不可以跟陌生人走。
  Go along the broad street. 要走大路。
  Don't go down the narrow back street. back street: 小路
  Listen to your teacher. 要听老师的话。
  Ask your teacher if you want to go to the bathroom. 如果要去厕所，。。。
  Be nice to your friends. 要和朋友好好相处。
  Turn off your cell phone at school. 在学校要关手机。
  Eat plenty for lunch. 午饭要吃饱。
  Don't stop at the game machine. Just pass by it. pass by: 经过
  What should you do when there is a bully? bully: 恶霸
  If you meet a bully, tell me at once.  

使用电梯/楼梯（ch01-18.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Go and call the elevator. 去按一下电梯。call：等电梯的过程
S The elevator is going up / down.  
  Let me push the button.  
  The elevator is here. 电梯来了。
M Hold the elevator. 按钮让电梯停一下。
  Let's get on the elevator. 进电梯吧。
  Wait until everyone gets off. 等所有人都出来。
  Can you press the first floor? 你能按一下一楼吗？
  What floor should we press? 我们要按哪一楼呢？
  Press the open / close button.  
  Be calm inside here. 在里面请安静。
  Don't lean on the elevator door.  
  Don't goof around in the elevator. 不要在电梯里捣蛋
  Don't jump inside the elevator.  
  Be careful! You might get stuck in the door. 你会被门夹住的。
S This elevator moves too slowly.  
  Wow, it's moving fast.  
  What floor are you going to? 你去几楼？
M Let's get out. 我们出去吧。也常用 get off
  Get off when the elevator is completely open.  
  Be careful when you get off.  
  Always look at what floor you're leaving. 看一下是几楼。
  Let's take the stairs. 我们走楼梯吧。
S Let's have a race to the first floor. 我们比赛谁先到一楼吧。
M Don't ever run on the stairs.  
  Don't hang on the handrail. 不要握住栏杆不放。
  Go down a step at a time. 一次走一级台阶。
  Don't goof around on the steps. You might get hurt.  

搭校车（ch01-19.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M It's about time for the bus. 公车来的时间到了。
  Your school bus will be here very soon. Let's hurry.  
D I like riding on the school bus.  
M Go line up nicely for the bus. 去好好排队等公车。
  We're early. No one's here yet. 我们来早了，没人。
  There are a lot of kids already waiting in line. 已经有很多孩子排队了。
  Let's hurry up the next time. 下次我们快点吧。
  The bus is early / late today.  
  Let's wait a little longer.  
  It will be here soon. 马上就会来了。
  The bus came on time. 公车准时来了。
  Oh, the bus is already here.  
D I'll be the first in line. 我会排在第一个。
  There's the bus. / I see the cus coming. 公车来了。
M Wait until the bus has stopped.  
  Say hello to the teacher.  
  Okay, let's get on the bus now. get on: 上（车）
  Get on the bus one after another / one by one.  
  Be careful when you get on and off the bus. 上下车都要小心。
  Don't cut in line. 不要插队。
  Don't push. Get on slowly. 不要推挤。
  Mommy will take you to school today. 今天妈妈送你上学。
  Fasten your seatbelt.  
  Get ready to get off. 准备下车了。

Chapter 02: 做家事

用吸尘器（ch02-01.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M It's time to clean up. 该是打扫的时间了。
  Can you help Mommy?  
  Will you try to use the vacuum?  
  Try it. It's fun.  
S I want to try. Mommy!  
  I'll help you clean all the time. all the time: 一直
M Open the window and let the fresh air in. let sth. in: 使…进来
  Be careful when you open the window.  
  Can you move a little bit? 你能动一动吗？
  Can you move your toys so I can vacuum?  
  You need to move the stuff on the floor.  
  Let's tidy up the shoes. tidy up = organize
  I just want to get the dust off. 我只是要拍掉灰尘。
  Isn't the vacuum heavy? Give it to Mommy.  
S I want to clean up my room.  
  Look! Lots of hair.  
  Ew, gross! 咦，好恶心！
M Want to take a little break?  
  It's clean after we clean up.  
  We finish early because of you, my darling.  
  You're all grown up helping Mommy clean the house.  
  Aren't you tired?  

擦地/擦地板（ch02-02.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Let's wipe the floor. wipe: 用布擦拭
  I'm going to sweep the floor today. sweep: 用扫把扫
  We're going to wipe the room with a rag. rag: 抹布
  I wipe after sweeping.  
  We need to use the cacuum before we wipe the floor.  
  Can you help me clean the room?  
  Can you get me the rag?  
  Turn it over and clean the floor. 把抹布翻过来，然后清洁地板。
  Ugh, the rag's too dirty. 哎呀，这抹布好脏。
  We need to wash the rag.  
  Clean everywhere and make everything clean and neat. nice and neat: 干净整洁
  Clean with all your strength. 用全力去擦。
  It looks like you're cleaning carelessly. carelessly: 漫不经心
D Mom, this isn't all clean yet. 妈妈，这边还没有打扫。
M I think Daddy should do it.  
  Clean quickly and get me the rag. 快点擦，把抹布给我。
  Wiping the floor is tiring, isn't it? 擦地很辛苦，对吧？
D My knees hurt after kneeling down. kneel down: 跪下
  Use the mop instead of a rag. 用拖把代替抹布吧。

整理玩具（ch02-03.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M The toys on the floor are a mess.  
  Who made such a mess?  
  Why is there such a mess?  
  You should clean up after you play. 玩好之后，你应该整理。
  What should you do with your toys when you finish playing with them? finish doing sth.: 完成
  Go put away your toys so Mommy can clean the room. 去整理你的玩具，妈妈要打扫房间
S I was just about to clean that up. be about to: 正打算做…
  Can I play a bit longer? 我可以再玩一会儿吗？
  I'll clean up after a little while.  
  I don't want to clean it up. Just leave it there, please.  
M Can you clean up by yourself?  
  Pick up the blocks and the other toys. blocks: 积木；pick up: 收起，收拾
  Please pick up your toys from the floor. 请把地上的玩具收拾一下。
  You should put the books back on the shelves. shelp -> shelves
  Put it in the boy box.  
  Put it back where it was. 把它放回原位。
  Where should these toys go? 这些玩具应该放哪里呢？
  You should put away your own toys.  
  Wow! You cleaned up so nicely. 哇，你收拾得好好哦。
  You deserve a stikcer for cleaning up. deserve: 应该得到…
  Mommy feels so happy because you're helping me.  
  The toys want to go back to their home.  
  Can I get rid of this since it's still on the floor? 地板上的这个玩具我可以丢掉吗？
  Ugh, when are we going to clean up all of this? 哦，我们什么时候把这些都收拾干净？
  Should we give away the toys to other babies now?  
S Don't give them away. I'll clean them up.  

打扫房间及整理书桌（ch02-04.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Please clean up your room.  
  Please clear off your desk. 请把书桌清干净。
  The bookshelves are all messed up. 书架已经乱得不像样了。
  Please empty the trash can.  
  Your bed is so messy. 你的床太脏乱了。
D I want to clean my desk by myself.  
  Please clean up my room for me, Mom.  
  I'm sorry. I'll clean it up right away.  
  It is so messy that I can't clean it by myself.  
  I won't mess it up the next time. 下次我不会弄得这么脏乱了。mess up: 弄脏乱

洗碗（ch02-05.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Mommy is doing the dishes.  
  We should do the dishes.  
  There are a lot of dishes today.  
  Can you clear the table?  
  Can you wipe the table?  
  Put the dishes in the sink.  
  Please put away the dishes you used. 请把自己用的碗拿走。
  Can you help me do the dishes?  
  Who will do the dishes today?  
D Can I do the dishes today?  
  I want to try doing the dishes. try doing sth.
  Where is the sponge / liquid soap? liquid soap: 洗洁精
  Let me do the dishes from now on?  
M You're a big / girl helping me do the dishes. 你能帮我洗碗，真的是长大了
  You can do that when you are older.  
  Put on the rubber gloves and put some liquid soap on the sponge.  
  Wash the dishes carefully so they won't break. break: 打破
  Wash them carefully so there is no food left.  
  They are sparkling clean. sparkling: 闪闪发光的
  Turn off the water. 关上水龙头。
  There is still some soap on it. It's splippery.  
  Oily residue is hard to get off. 油垢很难洗掉。 residue: 残留物，残渣
  Use hot water to wash off the grease. wash off: 洗掉；grease: 油垢
  Place the dripping bowls upside down on the rack. dripping: 湿淋淋的
  Dry the plates with a dish towel.  
  We've got a lot to clean, so let's use the dishwasher. dishwasher: 洗碗机
  Load the dishes in the dishwasher.  
  There detergent should go in there. detergent: 洗碗机用的洗洁剂；liquid soap: 厨房洗碗的洗洁精
  Okay, close the door and push the button.  

洗衣服（ch02-06.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M I'm going to use the washing machine.  
  I'm going to do the laundry.  
  Let's put the laundry in the machine. laundry: 要洗的衣服
  Get the socks all together. get sth. together: 把…放在一起
  Put the colored clothes here and the whites over there. 把有颜色的衣服放这里，白色的衣服放那里
S Should these pants be washed?  
  Gosh! Dad's socks smell bad! Gosh: （感叹词）啊，糟了
  Mom, can you wash this shirt?  
M There are stains on the shirt. stain: 汗渍
  We're going to boil the whites and towels. boil: 水煮，烫东西
S There is a lot of laundry to do.  
M Put in the detergent. 放洗衣粉。
  I'll hand-wash this. 这个我用手洗。
  Don't put those clothes in the machine.  
  We have to dry-clean those clothes.  
  The laundry is done. 衣服洗好了。
  Laundry's done. 洗衣服结束！

晾衣服（ch02-07.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Let's hang the clothes on the rack. (drying) rack: 晾衣架
  Will you help me hang the clothes?  
  Try hanging your clothes by yourself.  
D I want to hang the socks.  
M Put it on the drying rack.  
  Whose sock is this?  
  Can you hang the socks?  
  Shake each item and put it on the rack. 一件件抖开，…
  Shape the clothes before you hang them. shape: 使成型
D These are my briefs. briefs: 内裤
  Wow, Dad's trunks are super big! trunks: 四角内裤
  Your bra is pretty, Mom.  
M Make sure the clothes don't hit the ground. 确认衣服没有碰到地。
  Put the shirt on the hanger.  
  We will need some clothespins. clothespin: 衣夹
D Here's a clothsspin.  
M The stain's not completely out.  
  It will be all dry tomorrow.  
  There's no room anymore.  
  The weather should be nice.  
  The laundry's going to dry well because it's sunny.  
  A sunny day is a good laundry day.  
  If it rains, the laundry won't dry well.  

叠衣服（ch02-08.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M The laundry is all dry.  
  The laundry's not completely dry yet.  
S The clothes are well dried.  
  We should get the dry clothes. 我们应该收衣服。
M Let's take the clothes off the rack.  
  Can you help me get the clothes off?  
  Can you help me fold the clothes?  
  Let's fold these clothes neatly. neatly: 好好地，整齐地
  Try to fold it neatly.  
  Fold it in half like this. 对半叠。
  Put the socks in the sock bin. sock bin: 袜子箱
  Can you put the clothes back in the right places? 放回原处
  You should fold your own clothes.  
S Let me fold mine by myself.  
M That's Daddy's.  
S Where is the other sock?  
M Can you find the other pair?  
  Whose is this?  
  Get Daddy's clothes in one place. 把爸爸的衣服放在一起。
  Put them in the drawer.  
  Hang the shirts on the coat hanger. coat hanger: 衣架
  This is how you fold clothes.  
S Mom, this is too big for me to fold.  
  Did I do a good job folding those clothes? 我叠得好吗？

烫衣服（ch02-09.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M We need to iron Dad's shirt.  
  The shirt's all wrinkled. wrinkled: 皱的
  Want to see Mommy ironing?  
S The iron looks like a boat.  
M The iron's too hot. It's dangerous.  
  Don't touch it.  
  You shouldn't iron by yourself.  
  Don't come near it since it's hot. since: 因为
  Go sit over there while I'm ironing.  
S Watch out, Mom. 妈，小心。
M We need to spray it with water first.  
  Will you get me the spray bottle? spray bottle: 喷水器
  We need to straighten out the wrinkles by ironing. straighten out: 使平整
  Look, it's straightening out. 看，变平了！
S The wrinkles are gone. That's cool!  
M This is a steam iron. steam iron: 蒸汽熨斗
  Wait! You should wear your pants after we iron them. 烫完再穿
  We should iron Mommy's apron.  
  Pleated skirts are hard to iron. pleated skirt: 百褶裙
  We need to iron it so there are no wrinkles.  
  We need to make the lines neat.  
  The collar's stright now. 领子很挺了。
  Isn't it neat after ironing?  
  It's warm since we just ironed it.  
S Let me spray water on the shirt for you.  
M It's still hot after we pull the cord out. pull out: 拔掉；cord: 电线

照顾花草（ch02-10.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Let's put some water in the flower pots. flower pot: 花盆
  Let's water the flowers.  
  The soil is all dry.  
  The flower's withered. withered: 枯萎
  Seems like the flowers are thristy. It seems like
  Let's give them some water so the flowers won't wither.  
D I'll water this flower.  
  I want to give it some water now.  
  How much should I pour? pour: 灌注
M Tilt the watering can more. tile: 倾斜；watering can: 浇水壶
  Slowly pour the water in the watering can on the flower.  
  If the weather's hot, we need to give it more water.  
  Giving to much water might make the plant die.  
  Make sure the water doesn't actually touch the flower. 确认水没有直接碰到花。
  By pouring water, the dust and bugs are washed away.  
  What flower is this? 这是什么花？
  This flower has a strong scent. Smell it. scent: 香气
  Flower gardens make the air in the house cleaner. flowwer garden: 花园
  The flowers are in full blossom. in full blossom: 盛开
  The tree bears fruit. 这棵树结果实了。
  The sprouts have come up. 发芽了。
  This plant has no flowers growing. 这植物是不开花的。
  Can you take care of the flowers?  
  Clean the dust on the leaves.  
D Oh my! Will this tree die?  
  Let me take care of these plants now.  
  This is going to be my tree.  

修东西（ch02-11.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Looks like it's broken. broken: 故障
S Mom, it's not working.  
  Mom, can you fix this?  
  I broke it by accident.  
  Can it be used again?  
M I'll try.  
  Looks like I can handle it. handle: 操作，处理
  I'll fix it tomorrow.  
  When you come back, it will be working.  
  I'll fix it so that it will be like it's brand new.  
  It doesn't work because it is broken.  
  What if it gets worse?  
  This looks like I can't fix it.  
  It won't be as good as it used to be even if we fix it.  
  Sorry. We're going to have to wait till Dad gets here.  
  Ask Daddy to fix this.  
S Daddy can fix anything.  
  Can we throw it away and get a new one?  
M We shouldn't just get rid of it. Let's try to fix it.  
S I'm so sad that it's broken.  
  Thank you for fixing it.  

吃午餐（ch02-12.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
S Mom, I'm hungry.  
  I'm starving (to death). starving to death: 饿死了
M Wait a second. I'll have lunch ready soon.  
S What is for lunch? 午餐是什么？
M What about sandwich? 三明治怎么样？
  Want to eat at home or out? eat out: 到外面吃
  Want to order something for lunch? 午餐要不要叫外卖？
S Can I eat ramen? ramen: 拉面
  I want some pizza.  
M If you eat candy, lunch won't taste good.  
  I'll get the fishbones out. 我来去掉鱼刺。
  Is it too big? Let me cut it off. 太大了吗？我来切一下。
  Eat just a little bit even though you don't feel like eating. 即使不想吃，也要吃一点。
  Fast food isn't good for you. 速食对身体不好。
  You finished an entire plate very quickly.  
  Did you eat eanough, Sweethart?  
  Eat a lot and get strong. 多吃一点，变壮一点。
  I'll get lunch ready and then leave. 我会做好午餐再出门。

Chapter 03: 下课后孩子回家

小孩回家（ch03-01.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
S I'm home.  
M You're home, Honey.  
  You're home early. 你回来得很早。
  How was your day? 今天过的如何？
  How was school today? 今天在学校过得如何？
S It was fun. 很好玩。
  It was all right. 还好。
M You're a little late. Did something happen? 你今天有点晚，有什么事吗？
S I played with my friend after school.  
M I was worried about you, Sweetie. 我很担心你。
  Next time, come stright home. 下次要直接回家。
  You seem to have fun. 你好像玩得很开心。
  You look tired.  
D Is Sister here? 姐姐回来了吗？
M Not yet. She'll be home soon. 还没，她快回来了。
  Of course. She is waiting for you.  
  She's sleeping, so be quiet.  
  Wasn't it hot? 不热吗？
D Mom, it's so hot! Can I have some water? 可以喝点水吗？
  Brrr! It's cold today. brrr: 发抖的声音，簌簌
M Do you get along with your friends all the time? 你跟朋友相处得好吗？
  What did you do / learn at school? 你在学校做/学了什么？
  What did you have for lunch? 午餐你吃了什么？

接小孩（ch03-02.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Sweetheart, I'm here!  
D Why did you come to pick me up, Mom?  
M Because I wanted to see you sooner. 因为我想快一点看到你。
  Why are you so late? I've been waiting for you.  
D I had lunch late. 我午餐吃晚了。
M If Mommy were late, we could have missed each other. 如果妈妈晚到，我们可能就错过彼此了。could have + 过去分词：也有可能
  Give me your bookbag. I'll carry it for you.  
  When it's raining, wait for me to bring an umbrella.  
  The bus is late today.  
  Are you happy that Mommy came?  
D I'm really happy that you came for me.  
M Mommy feels happy to come here, too.  
D Can you pick me up again tomorrow?  
M I'll be waiting here tomorrow.  
  Sorry I was a little late.  
  I'll come and pick you up every Monday.  
  Were you waiting for me for a while?  
  Even if Mommy's late, wait here.  

洗手（ch03-03.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Look at your hands! They're dirty.  
  Go wash your hands. Quickly! go wash = go and wash
  When you come home, you should wash your hands.  
  Scrub your hands with soap. scrub: 擦洗
S It won't come off, Mommy. 妈妈，洗不掉。
  Can you roll up my sleeves?  
M Wash off all the soap. 把肥皂都洗掉。
  There's still foam on your hands. 你的手上还有泡沫。
  There are a lot of germs on your hands.  
S I can't see the germs.  
M You can't see germs.  
  Can you wash yourself alone? alone: 自己
S No. Can you help me?  
M Don't be careless. Wash them thoroughly. 不要这样随便。
  Scrub between your fingers. 手指间也要擦洗。
  Wash your wrist, too. wrist: 手腕
  Don't leave the water on. 不要让水一直流。
  Wash until your hands are visibly clean. visibly clean: 明显很干净
S I washed them before you told me to.  
  I'm done washing! 我洗好了！

肚子饿的时候（ch03-04.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
D I'm hungry. Please get me a snack. snack: 点心
M Wait a little bit. It's almost ready.  
  You must be hungry.  
  I'll give you a snack. 我拿点心给你。
  Didn't you finish your lunch at school? Why are you hungry?  
D The food today was bad, so I didn't eat it all.  
M Are you thirsty?  
  Want something to drink?  
  Want something to eat?  
  You're hungry because you had little breakfast.  
D I haven't eaten anything today.  
  Is it time for dinner yet? 到吃饭时间了吗？
M Are you hungry again?  
  Eat something.  
  Get something from the fridge. 去冰箱找找看。
  What do you want to eat?  
  Want Mommy to make you something tasty? tasty: 好吃的
  Wait a little bit. I'll make you something good.  
D I'm hungry because I played for a while.  

吃点心（ch03-05.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Let's have a snack.  
  Come and have a snack, Honey.  
  What do you want for a snack? 你想吃什么点心？
S Bread and milk, please.  
  What's my snack, Mom?  
M It's your favorite. Waffles. waffles: 松饼
S Is there anything else? 有其他的吗？
M What do you want to eat?  
  Share it with your brother.  
  Leave some for your brother. 留一些给你弟弟。
  Want more peanuts? Do you want more?  
S No, I'm fine. I'm full. I've had enought. …我吃很多了。
M Want more milk or juice?  
  Does it taste good?  
S Yeah, it's delicous.  
  Mom, can I have some more?  
M Try not to eat too much.  
  If you eat too many cookies, you can't have dinner.  
  If you eat too many sweets, your teeth will rot! rot: 烂
  That's bad for you.  
  Caramel is not a healthy snack. / Caramel is not good for your health. caramel: 焦糖
S Can I have some ice cream?  
M Eating too much cold food will make you sick.  
  If you get too much fried food, you will gain weight. gain weight: 变胖
  Too much spicy food can hurt your stomach. spicy: 辣的
  You'll get in trouble if you drink too much soda. get in trouble: 有问题; soda: 碳酸饮料
  Hamburgers are a kind of junk food. junk food: 垃圾食品
  The barbecued chicken sold on the street is not properly cooked.  
  Stop eating too much pizza.  
Tip: 西方小孩经常吃的点心
macaroni and cheese 干酪通心粉（美国小孩最喜欢的点心）
cookie 小饼干
grilled chees 烤乳酪三明治（在土司上放上芝士后烤成）
chps 洋芋片
pretzel 椒盐脆饼
candy 糖果
popsicle 冰棒（经常叫做 hard）
ice cream  

聊幼稚园/学校生活（ch03-06.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Was school fun? 学校有趣吗？
S Yeah, it was fun.  
M What was the most fun? 什么最有趣？
S Playing outside was the best. 在户外玩最有趣了。
  Something bad happened to me. 我发生了不好的事情。
M What do you mean? What happened?  
  Did you get in trouble with your teacher? 你跟老师起争执了吗？
S I got in trouble because I ran during recess. recess: 休息时间
  Don't ask. I don't want to talk about it.  
  Mom, Jinhong didn't come because he was sick.  
M Oh, I hope he gets well soon.  
  Tell me what you learned in school.  
  What did you play in school?  
  What songs did you learn in school?  
  Can you sing the song you learned?  
  Did you listen to your teacher today? 今天你听老师的话吗？
  What questions did your teacher ask?  
S The teacher praised me today.  
M Did you have a good time with your friends? 你跟朋友好好玩儿了吗？
  Who did you sit with today? 今天你和谁一起坐？
S My seatmates is Minji. seatmate: 同桌
  We changed seats today. 今天我们换座位了。
  Hmm… I can't remember her name.  

做作业（ch03-07.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Do you have any homework?  
D Yes, I do. / No, I don't.  
M Do you have a lot of homework?  
  What's your homework?  
  Show me your assignment notebook. 给我看你的作业簿。
  Play after you do your homework.  
  Did you get your homework done?  
  Do your homework first?  
D I'll do it after playing for a little bit.  
  After a little while.  
  After this TV show.  
M Don't put it off until later. put sth. off: 拖延
  If you keep putting it off, you won't want to do it.  
  Want Mommy to help you?  
D No, I can do it by myself.  
M Did you finish your homework? Are you done with your homework? 作业都做完了吗？
D No, I'm still doing it. / No, I'm still working on it. 不，还在做。
  Yes, I'm done. 是的，我都做完了。
  Mom, can you help me?  
  How do I do this? 这个要怎么做？
M You should do your homework by yourself.  
  If you need help, call me out.  
D Mom, this is too hard.  
M You should do your homework right after you come back. 回家后应该立即做作业。
  When is this homework due?  
  When should you get this done? get sth. done: 完成
  If you're done with your homework, put it in the bag. …放进书包。
D I have trouble working on this craft homework. have trouble doing sth.: 做…有困难；craft: 手工
  My teacher gave us some difficult math homework.  
  This is a group project. 这是小组作业。
  Today's homework is making a family newspaper.  
  I have to read my textbook three times. textbook: 教科书，教材
  This week's homework is to visit a museum.  
  I have to turn in a book report by tomorrow. turn in sth.: 交出；book report: 读书报告

整理书包（ch03-08.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Pack your bookbag for tomorrow. 把明天的书包整理好。
  Play after you pack your bag.  
  Pack your bag after you come back from school.  
  Pack your bag before you go to sleep. 睡觉前先整理书包。
  Do you have anything you need for tomorrow?  
S Mom, where is my weekly schedule? 我每周行程表在哪里？
M Look on your desk. 在书桌上找找看。
  Did you pack your bagpack?  
S I need to buy some supplies. supplies: 文具
  I finished packing my bag. 我整理好书包了。
M Check if you have everything. 确认一下有没有都带了。
  Sharpen your pencils.  
  You don't have your math book.  
S I put my social studies book in my locker. social studies: 社会课本；locker: 置物柜
M Take everything out that you don't need. take out: 拿出来
  Don't take any toys to school.  
  Let me check if everything's okay.  
  Do you have all of your homework?  
  Why is your homework out in the living room? living room: 客厅
  Your bag's too heavy.  
  Put the color pencils in your locker. color pencil: 彩色铅笔
S Can you check if everything's ready, Mom?  

跑腿（ch03-09.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Can you do me a favor?  
D I'm sorry. I have something to do. 抱歉，我现在有事。
  I'll do it after I'm done with this.  
  Why do I always have to do it? 为什么老是我去做？
  Ask Enji to do it.  
M Who wants to do an errand for me? do an errand: 跑腿
  Mom's busy. Please do me a favor.  
  Whoever does it for me will get 5 dollars.  
D Will you give me a reward for that? reward: 奖赏
  Then give me some money for a reward.  
M Yes, I will.  
D Okay, what errand? 好，什么差事？
M Go buy some milk at the supermarket.  
  Here's 100 dollars. 这里有100元。
  Don't forget to get the change. change: 零钱
  Always be careful outside. 出门要小心。
D Don't worry.  
  Mom! I'm back. Here's the milk.  
M Running an errand, you're all grown up now. run an errand: 跑腿
  Good job. 做得好！
  Thank you. Did you get the change?  
D Yeah, here's the money. 这里是找回来的钱。
M Keep the change.  
D Thanks. I'll do it again next time.  
  Mom, I did a good job, didn't I?  

在外面玩（ch03-10.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
S Mo, can I go play outside? 我可以去外面玩吗？
  I'm going to the playground. playground: 游乐场，运动场
  Mom, can I ride my bike? ride a bike
M Go and play outside.  
  Come back in an hour.  
  Come back before dinner.  
  Just stay around the house. 只能在房子附近玩。
  Don't go out of the apartment area. 不要走到公寓社区外。out of sth.: …的外面
  Don't go too far. 不要走太远。
  I'll see if you stay in the playground. 我会去看你是否在游乐场。
  Take your brother / sister. 带弟弟/妹妹去。
  Let's go with mommy.  
  It's going to rain. Don't go out today.  
  It's too hot today. Play inside. 在家里玩。
  You've already been outside. 你已经粗去玩过了。
  Don't go out again.  
  Where are you going to go? 你要去哪里？
  How come you always want to go out? how come: 为什么 = why

去才艺班（ch03-11.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M It's time for the after-school club, Sweetie. after-school club: 才艺班
  Go to the after-school club.  
  Don't forget to go to the after-school club.  
  Get your bag ready. 整理好你的书包。
  Hurry up. The bus is leaving. 快点，公车要走了。
D Mom, I don't want to go today.  
M You missed it yesterday. You need to go today.  
  Monday is art class. art class: 艺术课
D I really don't want to go to art class.  
  Can I stop going to art class, please?  
M You asked for it. Let's see for a little longer. 是你说要去的。我们再上一段时间看看。
  Is the after-school club not fun?  
  When the after-school club is over, I will come pick you up.  
  Arrive at the after-school club 5 minutes early. 要提早五分钟到才艺班。
  Come straight home after the after-school club.  
  What did you learn in the club? 你在才艺班学了什么
  Why did the after-school club end so late? 为什么这么晚结束？
  You had a long day today. 你今天过得很辛苦。have a long day: 辛苦的一天
D Friday is my busiest day.  

接待家教老师（ch03-12.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M The teacher's going to come. 老师要来了。
S Mom, can't you ask the teacher to come a little late? 你可以叫老师晚点来吗？
M No. You set up the time with the teacher. 你跟老师约好时间了。set up: 约定，设定
  Get your books / desk ready. 整理好你的书/书桌。
  Did you finish your homework? 你的作业都完成了吗？
  Finish practicing? 练习好了吗？
S Wait, Mom! I'll do it after I'm done with this. 我完成这个后再做。
M Don't get distracted. Listen to your teacher. get distracted: 散漫，想其他事情
  Seems like the teacher's going to be late today.  
  I'll get the snacks ready. 我来准备点心。
  Concentrate in class. 上课要专心。
  Don't ask weired questions. 不要问奇怪的问题。
  The teacher's here. 老师来了。
  Hope you have a good time. * 省掉了第一人称的 I
  Don't miss the daily work. 不要漏掉每天的功课。
  You'll fall behind. fall behind: 落后
  Make sure you do your daily work.  
S Can't I stop doing the daily worksheets? 每天的功课表我可以不做吗？
  I've collected a lot of stickers, so I got a present from the teacher.  

休息时间（ch03-13.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
D Mom, I'm tired. I want to rest. 我累了，我要休息。
M Okay. Rest for a little. 好的，休息一下。
  Rest for a long time. 好好休息吧。
D Mom, I need to take a rest. take a rest: 休息
M What did you do?  
  Take a break for an hour. 休息一个小时。take a break: 休息
  You'll be all right after resting. 休息之后你会没事的。
  Don't think about anything. Just rest. 不要想什么，好好休息吧。
  Rest time is over now. 休息时间结束了。
  The test period is beginning next week. 下周开始是考试时间。
D I haven't rested that long. 我没怎么休息到。
  Can I read some comit books? comic books: 漫画书
  I want to take a nap. 我想小睡一下。take a nap: 打盹
M Playing computer games isn't resting. 玩电脑游戏不是休息。

独自在家（ch03-14.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M I'm going out, but I'll be right back.  
S Where are you going?  
M I'm going to the grocery store. grocery store: 杂货店
S Are you saying I need to be alone? 你是说我必须单独在家吗？
M Can't you be by yourself? 你不能自己单独在家吗？
  Why are you scared? It's only for a while. 你为什么害怕呢？只是一会儿而已。
S Be back soon. 快点回来。
M I might be a little late. 我可能会有点晚。
  Don't open the door for strangers. 不要给陌生人开门。
  Don't go outside until Mommy comes back. 妈妈回来之前，不可以出去。
  Watch over your brother / sister. watch over sb.: 照顾，照看
  Listen to your brother / sister. 要听哥哥/姐姐的话。
  Call Mommy if there's anything you need. 如果你有需要的话，打电话给妈妈。
  You know Mommy's number, right? 你知道妈妈的电话，对吗。
S Don't worry.  
M Thanks. I'll be back soon. 谢谢。我会很快回来。
  Mommy's back. 妈妈回来了。
S Why are you so late?  
M Was everything okay? 一切都还好吧？
S I was scared, but I tried not to be. 我好害怕，但是我有忍住。
  Eh? You're back already? 喔？你已经回来了？
M Being home alone, you're a big boy now. 一个人看家，现在你是个大孩子了。

Chapter 04: 从傍晚到晚上

爸爸要下班了（ch04-01.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
D When is Daddy coming home? 爸爸什么时候回家？
M I don't know. Want to call him?  
  Do you remember Daddy's number?  
D Yes, I'll dial it. dial: 打电话
  The line is busy.  
  Daddy's not answering. 爸爸没有接电话。
  Dad, when are you coming? 爸爸，你什么时候回来？
Dad I'm on my way! / I'm coming. 我在回家的路上。
  I'll be right there in a minute. 我快到了。
D I miss you, Daddy.  
  Don't drink, Dad.  
  Come home early, Dad. 早点回来。
  Come early to play with me, Daddy.  
  Dad, get me some ice cream when you're back. 回来的时候给我买冰激凌。
  He's almost home. 他快到家了。
M I wonder if Dad's here. 我想知道是不是爸爸回来了。
Dad It's Daddy.  
M Go greet your daddy, kids. greet: 打招呼
D Did you have a good day? 你今天过得好吗？
  Dad, good to see you again!  
M Go wash up, Honey. 去洗一洗吧。
  Did you have a long day? 你很累了吧？
  Go change, please. 去换衣服吧。
  Honey, you must be hungry.  
D Why were you late today?  
  Did you get me the ice cream?  
  Can you play with me, Dad?  
Dad Daddy's a little tired. 爸爸有点累。
M Honey, the kids really waited for you. 孩子们等你很久了。
D Are you tired, Dad?  
Dad Sweetie, Daddy missed you a lot. 爸爸好想你哦。

吃晚餐（ch04-02.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M What do you want for dinner? 晚餐你想吃什么？
S I want pasta. 我想吃意大利面。
M It's time for dinner.  
  Dinner's ready. 晚餐好了。
  Come and have dinner. 来吃晚餐吧。
  Wash your hands before dinner.  
  Honey, tell Dad to come and eat. 叫爸爸来吃晚餐。
  Can you tell Dad that dinner's ready?  
S Mom, I'll help you set the table. 我帮你准备餐桌。
M Thank you. Can you get the spoons? 你能把汤匙拿来吗？
Dad Wow, it looks delicious!  
  Hmm, that smells so good. 味道很香。
S Mom, thank you for the food. 感谢你准备晚餐。
M Okay, help yourself. help oneself: 尽情享用
  You're eating well, my baby. 你很能吃哦。
S Mom, what's for dinner? 今天的晚餐是什么？
M I made some bulgogi. bulgogi: 韩式烤肉
S Wow! That's my favorite.  
M Is it good? 好吃吗？
S The bulgogi tastes good.  
  Mommy's food is the best.  
M Don't just eat the meat. Eat some vegetables, too.  
S Mom, can I eat some more? 我可以多吃一点吗？
M Aren't you full already? 你不会太饱吗？
  Don't eat too much.  
  You're finished. Good job! 你都吃完了。好棒！
S Mom, I'm done. 我都吃完了。
  I can't eat anymore because I'm stuffed. be stuffed: 被充满
  I'll help you do the dishes. 我帮你洗碗。
M You eat like a bird. eat like a bird: 吃太少
  You're eating too fast. 你吃太快了。
  You take forever to eat. 你吃饭太久了。

看电视（ch04-03.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M What program should we watch tonight?  
D I'm going to watch Star King today.  
M Mom wants to watch it, too.  
  Come here. It's going to start. 快来，要开始了。
  Wow, it's really fun! 好好笑哦。
D It's my favorite show. show: 电视节目。
M Hey, it's your favorite song.  
  Back off a little. Your eyes will get bad. back off: 往后退
  Sit straight while watching. sit straight: 坐正，坐直
  Sit properly, Sweetie. 坐好。
  Will you turn down the volume? turn down: （声音等）变低
  I'll turn it off after it's finished. turn off: 关掉（电源）
  It's finished. Turn off the TV now. 结束了。…
D Mom, can I watch a little more TV? 我可以多看一会儿电视吗？
M You've watched TV for an hour. Stop watching. …。不要再看了。
  You've been watching TV for over an hour. have been doing: 持续做
  No more TV today. 今天不能再看电视了。
  It's not good to watch too much TV.  
  Stop watching. Go and play. 不要看了。去玩吧。
  Turn it off and go to sleep now. 关掉电视去睡觉。
  That show's not for children. 那不是小孩子看的节目。
  It's for adults. 那是给大人看的。
  If you can't keep your promises, you can't watch TV anymore! keep one's promises: 遵守约定
D Mom, it's not over yet. 还没有结束。
  You always watch dramas, Mom. 你一直看电视剧。
M Soap opera time! The TV's mine now. 是连续剧时间。现在电视是妈妈的了。soap opera: 连续剧，电视剧
电视节目的英文？

电视节目叫做 program，大体上可以叫做 show。

drama、children、talk、comedy、music、reality、sports 等后面也可以加上 show，也可以只叫做 show。除此之外，还有 documentary、news、report、interview 等。

吃宵夜（ch04-04.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
S Mom, can you fix me a snack? fix: 做
  Mom, I can't sleep because I'm hungry.  
  Mom, can you give me some fruit?  
M You ate that much dinner, but you're still hungry?  
  You had dinner just a while ago. 你刚吃了晚餐。
  You're hungry because you ate a little.  
  Want some sweet potatoes?  
S Is there anything else besides sweet potatoes?  
  Isn't there any leftover bulgogi? leftover: 剩饭菜
M Don't eat too much.  
  You eat like a horse, Honey.  
  It's not good to eat at night.  
  It's not good for your tummy to eat before going to sleep. tummy: （儿语）肚子，胃（stomach）
  You even eat more than Mommy.  
  You're going to get fat if you eat before you go to sleep.  
  Slow down. 慢点。
  Drink some milk if you can't sleep.  
  You can't eat ramen.  
  Do you want me to make a sandwich?  
S Let me get you some, Mommy. Say "Ah". 我来喂你。说『啊』。
M Give Daddy some first. 先给爸爸。

跟爸爸玩（ch04-05.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
D Please play with me, Dad.  
  Get up and play, Dad.  
  Dad, let's play soccer at the park. at the park
  Dad, stop watching TV. Play with me.  
Dad Okay, what should we play?  
D I want to play horse. 我要玩骑马。
  Let's play hide and seek. hide and seek
  You're it, Dad. 你来当鬼。
  Dad, you should hide now.  
  Catch me, Dad!  
Dad Daddy will be the horse.  
  Dad's busy. Could you wait?  
D You say that every day, but you don't ever play with me. ever 用在否定句表示『一次也，一直』
M Dad's tired, so play with Mommy.  
S No. I want to play with Daddy.  
  Playing with Daddy is the most fun. 跟爸爸玩最有趣了。
Dad Playing with you is fun for me, too.  
  Want to go to the playground with me? 要跟我去游乐场吗？
S Can you teach me how to ride a bike?  
Dad I'll throw the ball. Try to catch it!  
S Why are you so good at this, Dad? be good at sth.
Dad Follow what Daddy does. / Just do as I do. 跟着爸爸做。

洗澡（ch04-06.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M It's time to take a bath. take a bath: 洗澡
  Go to sleep after your bath. 洗完澡睡觉。
  Take off your clothes.  
  Want to wash your hair first.  
D I don't want to wash my hair.  
  I just want to take a shower. take a shower: 淋浴
M First, wash your hands with soap.  
D Mom, I want to take a bath by myself.  
M The tub is filled now. 浴缸的水满了。
  Want to get into the tub now? get into the tub
  Is the water warm?  
S Mom, the water's warm. / cold.  
M Let's add some more warm / cold water. 加些热水/冷水。
S Bring my toys to me. 拿玩具给我。
  This is floating like a boat.  
M Don't fool around. Wash yourself. 别捣蛋了。
  Let's take a quick shower. 赶快淋浴吧。
  Rub the soap and make some foam. 打一下肥皂，搓出泡泡。
  Let's me wash you well. 让我帮你好好洗洗。
  Wash your body thoroughly. 彻底洗净身体。
  Get some body cleanser on the sponge. cleanser: 沐浴乳
  Rub the sponge and make some foam. rub: 搓
  Clean yourself well using the soap foam.  
S The soap got into my eyes. 肥皂进我的眼睛了。
M Let's rub the dirt off your body. 把老泥搓掉。
  Your neck is so dirty.  
S Look! I've got soap bubbles. soap bubble: 肥皂泡
  Mom, it hurts!  
  Ouch! My eyes sting. sting: 刺痛，难受
M Let's wash off the soap now. 把肥皂洗掉吧。
  Give yourself a final rinse. 最后再冲一下水。
  It's done. Let's dry you with a towel. 好了，用毛巾擦干。
  Don't you feel fresh since you bathed. feel fresh: 觉得清爽
S Yes, I feel fresh.  
  Can I play in the tub a little longer? 我可以在浴缸里多玩一会儿吗？
M Be careful because the floor's slippery. slippery: 滑
  Don't splash water on Mom. splash: 泼溅

洗头（ch04-07.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
D My head is itchy. 我的头好痒。
M Let's wash your hair.  
D My hairband won't come off. Help me. come off: 拿下，去除
  I washed it yesterday, but I have to do it again?  
M You need to wash your hair every day.  
  Your hair smells. Let's wash it.  
  Let's make some foam with the shampoo.  
D The shampoo got in my eye, and it stings.  
M Mommy will wash you. 妈妈帮你洗。
  Close your eyes.  
  Let's rinse your hair. 把头发冲干净吧。
  The hair conditioner will make your hair softer. hair conditioner: 润发乳
  It's hard to wash your hair because it's too long.  
  Let's dry your hair with a towel.  
  I'll dry your hair with a blow dryer. blow dryer: 吹风机
  If you sleep with your hair wet, it will smell bad.  
  Comb your hair.  
  You look very clean now. 你现在看起来很干净。
  Your hair smells so good.  

擦乳液（ch04-08.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Let's put on some lotion.  
  Smell the scent. scent: 香味，味道
S I can put it on by myself.  
  Can you put some on my hand, Mom?  
M Spread it out well and rub it well. spread sth. out: 推开
  How does it feel? 感觉如何？
S It's slippery and soft.  
M Put the lotion on your body and face.  
S I don't want to put on any lotion.  
  It easily gets into my eyes. 乳液很容易入眼。
M Try to avoid the area around your eyes.  
  Be careful not to get any lotion in your eyes.  
  Don't squeeze out too much. 不要挤太多。
  Make sure you put the cap back on. 确认把盖子盖回去。
  You need to put on some lotion so your skin won't get dry.  
  The lotion makes your skin moist and soft, Honey. moist: 水嫩
  You look pretty now because you put on some lotion.  
  You look fabulous. fabulous: 棒极了

穿睡衣（ch04-09.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Put on your pajamas.  
  Change into your pajamas. change into sth.: 换上衣服
  Here are your pajamas. Put them on.  
  There are the pajamas. 睡衣已经拿出来了。
D I'm too tired. I can't change into my pajamas.  
M It's comfortable to wear pajamas when sleeping.  
D Mom, where are my blue pajamas?  
M They are not dry yet. Wear something else.  
D I'll just go to sleep with this on. with sth. on: 穿着…
  Mom, help me put on my pajamas.  
M You look cute in your sleepwear. sleepwear: 睡衣

写日记（ch04-10.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Write in your diary. 写你的日记。write in: 写在，写入
  Did you write in your diary? 你写日记了吗？
  Where is your diary?  
S I'll write in it tomorrow.  
  Can I not write today?  
M You should keep a diary every day. keep a diary: 写日记
  Make it a rule to write in your diary every day. make it a rule to do sth.: 成为习惯
S Mom, there's nothing to write about. 没什么好写的。
  What should I write in my diary?  
M Think about what happened today.  
  Think about what you did today.  
  What can you remember?  
  Write about your seatmate in school.  
  Will you make a title? 你要写标题吗？
  Draw if you don't want to write. 讨厌写，就画吧。
  You can write about your thoughts and feelings.  
  Let's write in English.  
D What is today's date? 今天的日期是什么？
  What was the weather like today? 今天天气如何？
  What day is today? 今天是星期几？
  When did I get up today?  
  I'm done writing in my diary.  
M You forgot the date.  
  Nice job! 很好！
  Your handwriting is not that good. 你的笔迹不是太好。
D Don't look at my diary. 不要看我的日记。

睡前讲故事（ch04-11.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Do you want me to read a story for you?  
  Let me read you a story.  
  Mommy will read to you until you fall asleep. 一直讲故事直到你睡着。
  What story would be good? 你喜欢哪种故事？
  Choose a book you want to read.  
S I'll choose. 我来选。
M You picked a good one.  
  You chose too many.  
S What are you going to read to me today?  
M I'll read "Good Night, Moon".  
  Listen carefully.  
S I'm sleepy, Mom.  
M You can sleep if you feel sleepy.  
  Listen with your eyes closed. 闭上眼睛听吧。
S Read me one more, Mom.  
M You're still awake? I'll read to you just one more.  
D Mom, I'm not sleepy. 妈妈，我睡不着。
M Mom's throat hurts, too. Let's stop now. 妈妈的喉咙也疼了，到此为止吧。
D Will you read me the book again tomorrow?  
  I really want to know the next story.  
M Where did we read to yesterday? 我们昨天读到哪儿了？
  You're not listening. 你根本没在听。
  Stop reading and go to bed now.  
  How about going to sleep now? how about: 如何？
  I'll read to you tomorrow again.  
D Can you read the rest tomorrow?  
M Mommy's too tired today. Let's just stop reading fow now.  
  Do you want me to read a story for you?  
  Let me read you a story.  
  Mommy will read to you until you fall asleep. 一直讲故事直到你睡着。
  What story would be good? 你喜欢哪种故事？
  Choose a book you want to read.  
S I'll choose. 我来选。
M You picked a good one.  
  You chose too many.  
S What are you going to read to me today?  
M I'll read "Good Night, Moon".  
  Listen carefully.  
S I'm sleepy, Mom.  
M You can sleep if you feel sleepy.  
  Listen with your eyes closed. 闭上眼睛听吧。
S Read me one more, Mom.  
M You're still awake? I'll read to you just one more.  
D Mom, I'm not sleepy. 妈妈，我睡不着。
M Mom's throat hurts, too. Let's stop now. 妈妈的喉咙也疼了，到此为止吧。
D Will you read me the book again tomorrow?  
  I really want to know the next story.  
M Where did we read to yesterday? 我们昨天读到哪儿了？
  You're not listening. 你根本没在听。
  Stop reading and go to bed now.  
  How about going to sleep now? how about: 如何？
  I'll read to you tomorrow again.  
D Can you read the rest tomorrow?  
M Mommy's too tired today. Let's just stop reading nofow now.  

各自睡（ch04-12.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Go to sleep in your room. 去你的房间睡吧。
  Now that you're grown up, go to sleep in your room. Now that: 既然…
  Now that you're in elementary school, go to sleep in your room. elementary school: 小学
D Mom, will you stay with me until I go to sleep? 可以呆到我去睡觉吗？
  Mom, I'm scared. I want to sleep with you.  
  Mom, I want to sleep with you for the last time today. for the last time: 最后一次
M Want me to sing you to sleep? 要我唱歌哄你睡吗？
D Mom, don't turn off the light.  
  Mom, I can't go to sleep by myself.  
M Don't worry. Mommy will be with you. 妈妈会和你在一起。
  This doll will be with you.  
  I'll leave the door open so you can hear me.  
  I'll check if you're asleep. Don't worry.  
  Can you sleep by yourself?  
D I can sleep by myself. 我可以自己睡。
  Mom, I'm all grown up now.  

睡前打招呼（ch04-13.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M It's time to go to bed.  
  It's dark outside. It's time to go to sleep.  
S Mom, I'm not tired yet. tired: 要表达『困』，比起 sleepy 更常使用的是 tired
M It's past 10 o'clock. Go to bed. 已经过10点了，上床睡觉。
  Go to the bathroom before you go to sleep.  
S I don't have to pee. I already went. 我不用尿尿，我已经去过了。
M Mommy will kiss you. Good night!  
  Give Mommy a goodnight kiss.  
  Good night! Sweet dreams!  
  Let me tuck you in. tuck in: （躺在床上）盖被子
D Mom, wake me up early tomorrow.  
  Mom, wake me up at 7.  
M You have to get right up when I wake you up. 我叫醒你之后，你要立刻起床。
D Mom, I can't sleep. I want to go to sleep later.  
M You need to go to sleep early to wake up early. 你要早睡早起。
  Don't go to bed too late.  
  Stop taling in bed. 不要躺在床上说话。
  Be quiet now. 安静点。
D Good night, Mom and Dad!  
  See you tomorrow, Mom!  

睡觉中醒来（ch04-14.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Why did you wake up?  
  What's wrong, Honey? 宝贝，你怎么了？
S Mom, I had a nightmare.  
  I woke up because I needed some water. 我想喝水所以醒了。
  I want to go to the bathroom. 我想上厕所。
  I woke up because I want to pee.  
  Mom, I wet my bed.  
M I think you wet the bed.  
  Eeek! You wet the bed, Honey.  
  Get changed and go back to sleep. 换好衣服会去睡觉。
S I woke up in the dark, and I was scared.  
  Isn't it the morning right now? 现在不是早晨吗？
M No, sleep some more. 不是。再多睡一会儿。
S The mosquitoes are annoying me. 蚊子一直打扰我。
M I'll get the repellent. repellent: 防蚊液，驱虫剂
S I had a dream I was getting chased by a monster. get chased by sth.: 被某物追赶
M My sweetie must have been scared. 我的宝贝一定被吓坏了。must have 过去分词： 一定…
  You're okay now. Mommy's right here. 现在没关系了，妈妈就在这里。
  My baby must have had a nightmare.  
  That wasn't real. It was just a dream.  
  Sleep with your favorite bear in your arms. 抱着你最喜欢的熊宝宝睡觉吧。
  You can go back to sleep now, right?  
S I want to sleep next to you. 我要睡在你旁边。
M I'll put you to bed. 妈妈帮你入睡。put sb. to bed: 使…入睡
  I'll sing you a song. / I'll sing you a lullaby. lullaby: 摇篮曲
  Don't be scared. 不要觉得害怕。
  It will be all right if I hold you.  
  Sleep with me tonight.  
  Try to go back to sleep now. 现在试着回去睡觉。
  I'll tuck you in again. 妈妈再帮你盖被子。

Tip: 称呼『妈妈』的时候

美国的妈妈听到小孩叫 Mommy 时，如何回答？– Yes, Honey! What?

美国小孩喜欢的节目

复活节 Easter

纪念耶稣复活的宗教节日，同时也是迎接春天的庆典。

最能代表复活节的就是复活节菜单 Easter egg 和复活节兔子 Easter Bunny。传说中复活节的兔子会送复活节篮子给好孩子，所以对于小孩子来说，复活节兔子就像圣诞老公公。复活节篮子里放满了巧克力、糖果和玩具等。

复活节活动中的捡复活节彩蛋 Easter egg hunt 是最具代表性的：大人们会把复活节彩蛋（或是塑胶蛋内放糖果和果冻等等）藏在各个地方，然后小孩子各自提着复活节篮子去把菜单找出来。

常用的会话句子
Sentence Notes
Let's decorate the Easter eggs. 我们来彩绘鸡蛋吧。
I've hidden the eggs somewhere. Let's start the Easter egg hunt now!  
What will in the basket? 要放什么在篮子内呢？
There's the Easter Bunny over there. Let's say hello to the bunny. 那边有复活节兔子耶，跟他打个招呼吧。
万圣节前夕 Halloween

万圣节前夕是每年的 10 月 31 日，也是小孩子特别喜欢的节日。遮天，小孩子们都会穿上魔女、幽灵、精灵、黑猫等流行卡通人物的奇特服装（costume），然后去社区内的家家户户叫喊 Trick or treat! （不给糖就捣蛋）。邻居就会把准备好的糖果、零食、巧克力等拿出来分享。还有把南瓜挖空，凿出眼睛、鼻子还有嘴巴后，放入灯泡或蜡烛的 jack-o'-lantern 也是一大乐趣。在市内，不只是小孩子，连大人们都穿上万圣节的服装参加游行。

常用的会话句子
Sentence Notes
Let's make a jack-o'-lantern together. 杰克灯
Cut a circle around the stem and lift it off. 在茎的周围用刀划一圈，然后拿起来。
Scoop out the seeds and sticky interior by using a big spoon. 用大汤匙把籽和粘稠的内容物都挖出来
Draw the features on the pumpkin by using a pen. 用笔在南瓜上画脸。
Cut the face. Use the knife carefully. 用刀子小心地挖出脸。
Clear away the rough edges inside the pumpkin. 把南瓜内侧粗糙的边角整理一下。
Put a lit candle in and close the lid. 放入点亮的蜡烛后，盖上盖子。
The lantern looks really scary. 杰克灯看起来很可怕哦。

Part 2: 每天用的称赞和唠叨

Chapter 05: 表达称赞

亲密的称呼（ch05-01.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M I love you, my darling.  
  You cutie. 小可爱。
  Oh, my sweetie.  
Dad You're such an amazing baby. amazing: 让人惊讶的
  My little sweethart.  
  You pretty thing. 我的美人儿。
  Come here, my princess.  

说我爱你（ch05-02.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
D How much do you love me, Mommy?  
M My love for you is as big as the universe.  
  You are my treasure.  
  You know how much I love you, right?  
  Mommy loves you the most in the entire world.  
  Thanks so much for being my son / daughter.  
  I'll give you a kiss.  
  I love you more than words can say. 我对你的爱无法用言语表达。
  I can't live without you, Darling.  
  How could I live without my loving son / daughter?  
  I love you just the way your are. 我就爱这样的你。
  I'm so happy because of you. 因为你，我很幸福。
  You are my joy. 你是我欢乐的源泉。
D Who do you love more, me or Daddy?  
M Of course I love you more.  
  I love you both the same.  

称赞外貌（ch05-03.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
D How do I look, Mommy?  
  Do I look good, Mommy?  
M Wow, you look fabulous! fabulous: 棒极了
  You look so great!  
  You look like a prince / princess.  
  You're so pretty. Whose daughter is this pretty?  
  Amazing! Your friends will be surprised to see you. amazing: （达到令人惊叹的程度）令人惊讶的
  You're perfect!  
  You look prettier today! 今天你看起来更美了。
  I don't even recognize you. 我快认不出你了。
  Who do you look like, you pretty thing? 你看起来像谁呢？
D I'm pretty because I look like you.  
  I heard you and I look alike. look alike: 看起来相像的

称赞（ch05-04.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Great! / Terrific! 好厉害！了不起！
  You did so well.  
  Nice work so far. 到现在为止你都做得很好。
  Your hard work pays off, right? pay off: 取得成果
S Did I do well, Mommy?  
M Two thumbs up!  
  Good job. Can you do this well the next time, too?  
  Wow, you're a nice boy. Even Mommy should learn from you.  
  Super! Just fantastic! 太棒了！了不起！
  Mommy's happy to see you behave like that. 看到你那样的表现…。behave: 行为举止
  Don't you feel proud of yourself? 你也为自己感到自豪吧？
S Did you think I wouldn't do well? 你认为我会做不好吗？
  Did you think I wouldn't make it? 你认为我会做不来吗？
M This was better than I had expected.  
  I guess your efforts were rewarded. 我猜你的努力得到回报了。
S I'm going to try harder next time.  
M You're all grown up, Honey.  
  How did you get the idea? 你怎么想出那个方法的？
  You're very creative. 你好有创意。
  You're really modest. 你真的很谦虚。
  I'm so proud you did it all by yourself.  
  It should be an example for others. 这应该可以称为别人的榜样。

恭喜（ch05-05.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Congratulations!  
  Congratulations! You won first place. 你得到第一名。
  Congratulations on your award! 恭喜你得奖了。
  Congratulations on your improvement! 恭喜你进步了。
  Congratulations on your good grades! 恭喜你得到好成绩。
  I'm so proud of you.  
  Yay! Here's the winner!  
  Hooray! You made it! 万岁！你成功了！
  You are the champ today! champ: champion 的简称
  I knew you could do it. 我知道你一定行的。
  Aren't you happy? Mommy feels happy, too.  
  Let's call Daddy and tell him the good news.  
  What should Mommy do as a gift for you?  
  Come here. I'll give you a hug.  
D I feel great.  
M Let's give a round of applause! 大家拍手鼓掌！applause: 拍手
  I'll treat you to a wonderful dinner as a reward. 妈妈请你吃好吃的晚餐作为奖励。
  Let's have a party to celebrate this.  
  Your aunt wants to congratulate you. 你的阿姨想要恭喜你。

认同（ch05-06.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M I think you're right.  
  Absolutely! / Certainly! 一点也没错！当然！
  You can say that again. 完全正确。
  Tell me about it! 就是说嘛！（注意此句非字面意思）
  Yeah… I guess you're right. 嗯…我想你是对的。
  I understand your feelings.  
  I know how you feel.  
  So what you're saying is this, right? 所以这就是你要说的，对吗？
  You're right. You should think like that.  
S What about my idea? 我的想法怎么样？
M That's a great idea!  
S Do you agree with me, Mommy?  
M Of course.  
  I agree with you. 我也是这么想。
  That could happen. 也有可能会那样。
  From your point of view, that could be. 站在你的立场，那是有可能的。
  That has happened to me, too.  
  I've felt that way before. 我以前也是那样觉得。

纾解压力（ch05-07.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
D Mom, I think I'm a scaredy pants. scaredy pants: 胆小鬼的可爱表达方式
  Can I not do this? 我可以不做吗？
  I'm so nervous.  
M Are you scared?  
  Want me to hold your hand?  
  Be brave.  
  Don't be afraid.  
  You don't have to be scared. 你不需要感到害怕。
  Take a deep breath. 深呼吸。
  I'll be next to you. 我会在你的旁边。
  It's okay if you make a mistake. Try your best.  
  You will do fine. 你会做得很好的。
  What are you afraid of? 你在害怕什么？
  Mommy was just like you when I was your age.  
  I'll be watching over you. 我会看着你的。
  I'm here for you, Honey.  
  You're not a coward. 你不是个胆小鬼。
  Be a man. 做个男子汉。
  Make up your own mind. It's up to you. make up one's own mind: 下决心

鼓励（ch05-08.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Good luck!  
  Cheer up. 打起精神。
  Is there anything wrong? 有什么不顺的事情吗？
S I didn't make it again. / I messed up again. 我又搞砸了。
M I'm sure you feel bad.  
  Why are you so down? down: 情绪低落
  You don't have to be so down.  
  You can do it. I trust in you. trust in sb.: 相信
  Go for it! I'm always on your side. go for it: 去做吧
S I feel bad I couldn't win the award. 我没拿到奖，所以很伤心。
  I am such a fool to have made the same mistake.  
M It will be better next time. 下次会更好的。
S I'm not going to try that again.  
  I feel ashamed. ashamed: 羞愧的，难为情
  It's a shame I could not make it through. make it through: 完成
M Don't give up.  
  I'll cheer you up. 我会让你振作起来。
  Do as you please. 做你想做的。
  Do you feel better now?  
  If you eat something, you'll feel better.  
  It could've been worse. Just wait and see. 不会更糟了，等着看看吧。could've been worse: 有可能更糟糕

Chapter 06: 偶尔也会挨骂

和朋友吵架（ch06-01.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Did something happen with your friend? 你跟朋友发生了什么事吗？
S I really don't like Jisu.  
  I'm never going to talk to him again.  
  I don't want to play with him anymore.  
  Jisu hit me.  
M Friends shouldn't fight. 朋友之间不可以打架。
  Friends shouldn't curse at each other. 朋友之间不可以互相骂对方。
  Friends should get along well. get along well: 愉快相处
  If you keep fighting, I won't let you hang out together. hang out: 朋友一起消磨时间
  Apologize to your friend.  
  Did you say sorry?  
  Your friend is probably regretting it, too. 你的朋友可能也后悔了。
  Your friend made you upset. upset: 生气，心烦
  Why did he do that?  
  But you shouldn't hate your friend.  
  How about talking to your friend about your feelings? 跟你的朋友说说你的感受，怎么样？
  Why don't you try talking to him first? 为什么你不试着先跟他说话呢？
  Put yourself in his / her shoes. put oneself in one's shoes: 站在…的立场想一想

兄弟姐妹吵架（ch06-02.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M What are you two doing?  
  Are you fighting?  
D He started it. 他先开始的。
M It doesn't matter who started it. 谁先开始的不是重点。
  Apologize to each other.  
  If you guys argue, Mommy feels hurt. 妈妈会很心痛。
  You shouldn't hit your sister.  
  I told you that you should not hit your sister. 我不是告诉过你…
  You should be nice to your sister.  
  You should look after your sister.  
  You are older, so let your brother do it. 你比较大，应该让你的弟弟。
  Don't be rude to your brother and talk like that. 不可以对你的哥哥无礼。
  Don't spit. 不要吐口水。
  You'll get a timeout if you spit again. timeout: 面壁思过
  Mommy is really mad. 妈妈真的很生气。
  Shake hands with your sister.  
  Give him a hug.  
  You both want to get punished. get punished: 受罚
  You both are grounded now. You can't watch TV. grounded: 被处罚不能外出或游戏（禁足）
  Won't you stop right this minute? right this minute: 马上
  Who just screamed?  
  Are you going to do it again?  
  Does it seem right to argue with your older sister? argue with: 和…吵架
  You shouldn't demand but ask. 不可以命令，你要用请求的。
  You are a big brother. Please act mature. 你是哥哥，要有哥哥的样子。
  You are not responsible as a big sister. 你作为姐姐，怎么没有责任感。
  Didn't you promise you wouldn't fight? 你们不是说好再也不吵架了吗？
  You know you might get a timeout, huh? 你知道你们可能被处罚，知道吧？
D I won't ever fight again. 我不会再打架了。
M You two both were wrong. 你们两个都有错。
  Brothers / Sisters should be friend. 兄弟姐妹间应该友好相处。
经常出现的 Tip：受罚

timeout 是处罚（punishment）的一种，指的是制止某些行为，在角落暂时反省的时间，类似中文的『面壁思过』。

受罚的其他表达还有 get grounded，指的是不可以外出或者玩游戏等等。

英美国家禁止父母体罚小孩，但是可以教养（discipline）为由打几下屁股（spanking），当然不可以打得太过分。

吵着要买东西（ch06-03.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
S I want this, Mom.  
  Can you buy me this? Please!  
M Mommy can't afford it. 妈妈买不起。
  I didn't bring any money. 我没有带钱出来。
  You should not be demanding. demanding: 要求很多
  It's too expensive.  
  It's too much for an elementary school student. 这对一个小学生来说太过分了。
  Why are you so demanding? 为什么你的要求这么多？
  You have the same thing at home. 家里有一样的东西。
  Don't be silly! 不要说傻话！
  I know you want it, but not now. 我知道你想要，但现在不行。
  No means no! 说不行就是不行。
S When can I get it? 什么时候买给我？
M Let's get it next time.  
S Mom, you always say next time.  
  Mommy, you buy everything you want.  
  You always buy things for my brother but not for me.  
  Only this time. This is the last time. I promise. 就这一次，这是最后一次，我发誓。
M Mommy doesn't get everything. 妈妈也没有什么都买。
  Why don't you buy it with your allowance? allowance: 零用钱
  These aren't for kids. 这不是小孩子用的东西。
  This food isn't good for you.  
  We didn't come here for this today. 我们今天不是为了这个来的。
  Let's think if it's actually that necessary. 我们想想是不是真的需要。
  Well, we don't have enough money for that right now.  
  People are staring at us. Stop! 大家都在看我们呢。停止！
  Stop looking at it. Let's leave now.  
  The amount will be taken out of your allowance after I buy you this. Okay? 金额将从你的零用钱中扣除。amount: 金额
  You can get this when you collect 30 good job stickers.  

不专心（ch06-04.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M What are you thinking about? 你在想什么？
  What are you doing?  
  Pay attention.  
  What are you looking at?  
  Go ahead, Honey. 快点做，宝贝。
  Speed up! / Hurry up! 快点做！
  Are you getting distracted?  
  Why do you care? It's not your business. 为什么你那么在意呢？那不关你的事。
  I think you are lost. 我想你不知道你在做什么吧？
  Why are you so distracted? 你为什么这么散漫呢？
  What were we doing, Honey? 宝贝，我们在做什么呢？
  Stop! Look at me. 停下来，看着我。
  Don't move around. Sit here and listen. 坐下来听我说。
  How many times should I tell you? 你要我说几次呢？
  Let's focus and finish this. 集中精神完成它。
  Stay on that for at least 10 minutes. 至少专心10分钟。
  Do you know what you're doing? 你知道你在做什么吗？
  What's bothering you? 什么事烦你了？
  Don't play with your hands. 不要玩你的手。
  Sit up straight! 坐好！
  Is this what you should be doing? 这是你现在要做的事吗？
  Do you not want to do this? Do you want to do it next time? 你不想做这个吗？你要下次再做吗？
S I know I have to, but it doesn't work out well. 我知道我要做，但结果不是很好。
  I can't stop thinking about other things. 我一直想到其他事情。
  Can I do it later after finishing this comic book?  
  I am trying really hard.  
  It's too difficult to stay focused. 集中注意力真的太难了。
  One hour is too long for me.  

说谎（ch06-05.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M That's a lie.  
  Why did you lie?  
  I wonder why you lied? 我想知道你为什么说谎。
  I won't scold you, so tell me the truth. scold: 责备；tell the truth: 说实话
D I'm sorry that I lied.  
  I accidentally told a lie. 我是无意中说谎的。
  I lied because I was afraid I would get in trouble. 我害怕被责骂所以才说了谎。
M Are you going to lie again? 你还会说谎吗？
  Mommy trusts you. You won't do it again, right?  
D I won't do it again.  
M Thanks for telling the truth. 谢谢你告诉我实话。
  A small lie becomes a big lie.  
  Mommy's upset because you lied.  
  You don't want to be a liar, do you?  
  It's brave to tell the truth.  
  I hope you won't ever lie to me. 我希望你不会再对我说谎。
  Look what you did. 看看你做了什么。
  It was wrong to do that. 那样做是不对的。
  It was not appropriate. 那是不正确的。
  You could be lying without knowing it.  
  It's important to repent. 反省是很重要的。repent: 反省，悔改
  If you tell a lie, don't you feel ashamed of yourself? ashamed of sb.: 觉得羞愧
  I can tell you are lying. 我知道你在说谎。
  I really hate when people lie to me.  
  Lying is the worst thing in the world.  
  Nobody wants to be with a liar.  

拖拖拉拉（ch06-06.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Time's already up? 时间都已经到了吧？
  It's almost time. 时间几乎快到了。
S I'm doing it. 我正在做。
  Not yet. 还没好。
M Can I leave without you? 我可以撇下你先走吗？
S Wait for me.  
M I'll give you ten minutes. 我再给你10分钟。
  Why do you do this all the time?  
  I've told you to hurry up for a thousand times.  
  I'm sick of it! / I'm tired of it! 我已经厌烦了。
  Everyone's waiting for you.  
  Gosh, you're as slow as a snail!  
S I'm almost done.  
  It's okay. I can make it on time.  
M Can you make it on time? 你能准时完成吗？

顽皮捣蛋（ch06-07.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Hey, hey… Calm down. 喂喂，镇定一下。
  Stop. You could get hurt. 停下来，你会受伤的。
  Your friend doesn't like it.  
  That's too much. You should stop. 太过分了。你必须停止。
  Think about others. 替别人想一想。
S It's too fun to stop. 这太有趣了，所以停不下来。
M I'm going to punish you.  
  Your brother might cry soon. 你的弟弟快哭了。
  Don't get into trouble. get into trouble: 使自己或他人困扰
  You're disrupting the other people. 你妨碍到其他人了。disrupt: 妨碍

吵闹（ch06-08.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M It's too loud! 太吵了！
  Don't be so loud.  
  Be quiet, you guys!  
  That's too loud. Play quietly.  
  You need to settle down. 你需要镇定一下。
  Be quiet and listen to me. 安静点，听我说。
  Can you be quiet?  
  Can't you quiet down a bit? 你就不能安静一点吗？
  Stop talking too loud.  
  Sit down and play. 坐着好好玩。
  Use your inside voice. 小声说话。inside voice: 轻声细语
  Could you be quiet since I'm on the phone? 我在讲电话，你能安静一点吗？
  I can't hear the other person. 我都听不到对方的声音了。
  Can you play quietly because Mommy's sick?  
  Who's talking so loudly?  
  It's distracting. 真的让人很烦。
  My ears are hurting. 我耳朵都疼了。
  How many times do I have to tell you to be quiet?  

顶嘴（ch06-09.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M What did you just say? 你刚才说了什么？
  Don't talk back to Mom. 不要跟妈妈顶嘴。
  Stop talking back.  
  You're doing it again! 你又这样了。
  Don't start with me. 不要招惹我。
  You should control your mouth. 你应该管好自己的嘴巴。
  Do you think you should talk like that? 你觉得你一定要那样说吗？
  You keep talking back. 你还继续顶嘴。
S Mom, you don't understand.  
  Why shouldn't I tell you what I want? 为什么我不能跟你说我想说的？
  You should have warned me. 你应该跟我说要小心。
M Where did you learn that attitude? 你从哪儿学到那种态度的？
S I'm not talking back.  
M Can I finish? 能让我把话讲完吗？
  You're making me mad. 你让我很生气。
  I'm not going to hold back if you say one more word. hold back: 忍耐，耐着性子

没礼貌（ch06-10.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M What did you just do? 刚刚你做了什么？
  That's not polite.  
  That's very rude. 真的是非常无礼。
  Don't be rude.  
  Mom's not your friend. 妈妈可不是你的朋友。
  Please behave. 要有礼貌。behave: 行为举止有礼貌
  How could you do such a thing? 你怎么可以做那样的事呢？
  You should know better than that. 你应该要更懂事。
  What's the right way to do that? 要怎么做才是对的？
  Did your teach teach you like that?  
  Did Mommy teach you that way? 妈妈教你那样的吗？
  I don't want you to grow up like that. 我可不想你长大像那样。
  Do you know what you did wrong? 你知道你哪里做错了吗？
  Now get it right. 现在给我好好做。
  You don't want to be a rude child, right?  
  Apologize for your behavior.  
  Don't use that word in front of adults. 在大人面前不可以那样说话。
  Would you be happy if you were him / her? 如果你是他，你会开心吗？

闹别扭（ch06-11.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Why are you annoyed? 你为什么不开心？annoyed: 生气的，也常用 feel upset, feel bad
  Is there something wrong? 有什么不好的事情吗？
  Stop it. It's really bugging me. 停止，这真的让我很烦。
  What's the problem? 有什么问题吗？
  What's troubling you? 你在烦什么？
  Stop whining. whine: 嘀嘀咕咕，发牢骚
  I don't want to hear you whine. 我不想听到你发牢骚。
  It's no use whining. 发牢骚是没有用的。It's no use doing sth.: …没有用
  I told you not to get upset so easily. 我跟你说过不要那么容易生气。
  Why are you getting angry at Mommy? get angry at sb.: 生某人的气
  Please speak calmly. 请平静地说。
  I'm going to listen if you speak properly. 你好好说的话，我会听的。
  Tell me if there's something wrong. 告诉我你有什么不满。
D Nobody pays attention to me. 没有人关心我。
  I'm just annoyed. / I just don't feel well. 我只是不开心。
  I don't know why I feel annoyed. 我也不是道为什么不开心。
M When you're angry, you look ugly.  
  If you feel bad, nothing goes right. 如果你感觉不好，没有事会顺利。
  That's not something you felt bad about. 那不是你要生气的事情。

处罚（ch06-12.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M I can't stand it! 我再也忍不下去了。
  You should be grounded. 你一定要挨罚。
  You deserve punishment, don't you. 你应该被罚…
  Tell me what you did wrong. 告诉我你做错了什么。
S It was not my fault. 这不是我的错。
M Timeout! Sit in the Thinking Chair. 这是处罚！坐到反省的椅子上。
  You know what you did wrong, right?  
  Mommy doesn't want to punish you.
