  But you should be responsbile for your actions. 但是你应该对你的行为负责。
S Mom, I'm sorry.  
  Please forgive me.  
  I won't ever do it again. 我不会再这么做了。
M You can't watch TV because of your wrongdoing. wrongdoing: 错误
  You're grounded and can't use the computer because of what you did today. be grounded: 被禁止做某事作为处罚
  Don't just say sorry.  
  Go write an apology letter. apology letter: 道歉信
  It's all for your own good. 这都是为了你好。

道歉（ch06-13.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Say sorry to each other.  
  Who wants to apologize first?  
S I'm sorry.  
  I mean it. 我是诚心的。
  I'll be careful next time. 我下次会小心的。
M Shake hands with each other.  
  Look at each other in the eyes and say sorry. 看着对方的眼睛说对不起。
  Don't blame others for that. 不要因此指责别人。
  Say sorry sincerely. 诚心地说对不起。
  Let's make sure this never happens again. All right? 让我们确认这种事以后都不会发生，
S Let's get along. 我们和好吧。
  I didn't do it on purpose. 我不是故意那样的。
  I didn't mean it that way. 我不是那个意思。
  It was a mistake. I'm really sorry.  
  You owe me a big apology. 你欠我一个正式的道歉。

和解（ch06-14.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M I'm so sorry for that.  
  Were you really upset? 你真的很伤心吧？
  Think for yourself. It was your fault. 想一想，这是你的错。
  Did you hate me because I scolded you?  
  Mommy was really upset, too. 妈妈也很不开心。
  Why did you let out a huge sigh? let out: 发出（呻吟等）
  Is it very disappoiting? 这很令人失望吗？
  You must have been devastated. 你一定很受伤吧？devastated: 受很大的刺激
  I want you to grow up to be a wonderful person.  
  Can I hug you now?  
  Come here. I'll give you a kiss.  
  You know how Mommy feels, right?  
  Don't be upset anymore. 不要再不开心了。
  Can I trust you now?  
  Mommy trusts you. 妈妈相信你。
  Want to eat something delicious?  
  Want to go for a walk? go for a walk: 散步
D I was scared when you were mad, Mommy.  
M I didn't do it because I hated you. 我不是因为讨厌你才那么做。
  Mommy was to mean. I'm sorry. mean: 脾气暴躁的
  But you are still my loving baby. 但你还是我的心爱宝贝。

Chapter 07: 劝告

指出错误（ch07-01.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Wait.  
  That's not the right thing to do. 那不是正确的行为。
  Is that what you should be doing? 那是你应该做的吗？
  Do what you are supposed to do. 做你应该做的事情。
  That's what I'm not pleased with. 那是我不喜欢的行为。
  This is not what should happen. 这是不该发生的事。
  I told you to stop.  
D Why do you always think I'm wrong?  
  What did I do wrong? 我做错了什么？
M It seems like you shouldn't do that. 那样做好像是不行的。
D Then what should I do? 那么我应该怎么做呢？
M Think of something else. 想想其他办法。
  I hope you won't do it. 我希望你不要那样做。
  That's not necessary. 没有那个必要。
  Tell me what you did wrong.  
  Why do you keep doing that? 为什么你还继续那样做。
  Do you think you did the right thing? 你认为自己做对了吗？
  That's not a good idea.  

发脾气时的教训（ch07-02.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Don't shout. 不要大叫。
  Stop being angry. 不要发脾气。
  Stop taking out your anger. take out one's anger: 发脾气
  Don't lose your temper so quickly. That's not good. 不要突然发脾气。
  Don't take out your anger on others.  
  That's a bad word. Don't say that!  
  If you can't control yourself, I'm going to punish you. control oneself: 自我克制
  Be patient! 忍一下！
  The one who controls his anger wins. 谁能忍住脾气，谁就赢了。
  You need to get your anger under control.  
  Why are you taking out your anger?  
  Don't frown. Smile.  
S I'm just so mad I don't know what to do. 我太生气了，不知道该做什么。
  I don't want to talk to you.  
  Why do you care? 你干嘛在意？
M Then I'm going to get mad at you, too. get mad at sb.

告诫不要在户外乱跑（ch07-03.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Don't run. You could trip and fall. 不要跑，你会跌倒的。trip: 绊倒
  There are a lot of cars. 车子很多。
  It's dangerous. There's a car coming. 车子来了。
  Be extra careful on a curve. 在拐弯处要特别小心。
  Look around to see if there are any cars. 四周都看看是否有车子来。
  Walk on the inner side of the sidewalk. 走在人行道内侧。
  Hold my hand. 牵我的手。
  Walk with me, Honey.  
  The road's dangerous. Don't run.  
  Look straight ahead and walk. 好好看着前面走。
  Be careful! There's someone in your way. 小心！前面有人！
  Don't run where there are a lot of people. 不要在人多的地方跑来跑去。
  Wait! It's telling you to stop. 等一下，那儿不是写着禁止吗？
  You fell down doing that the last time. 你上次也是那样才跌倒的。
  How come you ran ahead of us? 你怎么跑到我们前面去了？
S Come on, Mommy! Hurry up!  
  I was shocked because I thought I had lost you. 我以为跟你走散了，吓了一跳。
  I almost fell down like you warned me.  
  Oh, gosh! It was a close call. 哦，差一点 / 千钧一发。

告诫不要在室内乱跑（ch07-04.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M The floor is shaking. 地板在震动了。
  Go outside and run. 去外面跑。
  You walk in the house. 在屋里要用走的。
  Walk on your tiptoes. 踮起脚尖走路。
  Who's running in the house.  
S I didn't run much. 我没有乱跑。
M Your brother's running because you're running.  
  No. Don't jump like that.  
  Don't jump off the couch.  
  Don't jump on the couch.  
  There's dust everywhere.  
  The janitor is going to come up. 管理员要上来了。
  You should never run at night! 你绝对不可以在晚上跑。
  The neighbors are sleeping now.  
  The people downstairs are going to say it's loud. 楼下的人会抗议太吵了。
  Do you like it if you hear stomping from the upstairs neighbor. stomp: 用脚重踏

阻止危险的行动（ch07-05.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M No! It's dangerous!  
  Move far away. 走开，离远一点。
  Step back! / Move back! 往后退。
  You could bleed. 你会流血的。
  Don't come near. 不要靠近。
D What happends if I touch this?  
M If you touch it, you'll get in trouble. 碰到的话，你会有麻烦哦
  I don't want you to touch it.  
  Don't touch it because it's dangerous.  
  Don't let your brother touch it.  
D Why can't I touch it?  
M You could get hurt. 你可能会受伤。
  It's hot / sharp.  
  Not yet. You can touch it when you grow up. 还不行，等你长大以后才可以碰。
  Let me put this out of your reach. 我把它放到你拿不到的地方。
  If you get hurt, Mommy will be sad. 如果你受伤了，妈妈会难过的。
  Let's promise never to touch it. 答应我绝对不可以碰。
  You should've asked Mommy first. 你那时应该先问问妈妈。
  That could have been dangerous. 那也有可能很危险。

不要碰哥哥姐姐的东西（ch07-06.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M You'd better not touch it. had better not: 最好不做…(强烈警告)
  Don't touch it because it's your brother's.  
  Your sister is not going to like it if you touch it.  
  Your sister really cares about that. 你姐姐真的很珍惜那个东西。
S I just want to look at it. 我只是想看看而已。
  I'll leave it right after I see it. 我看完后就把它放回原位。
M Do you like when someone touches your stuff? 你会喜欢别人碰你的东西吗？
  Did your sister allow you to touch it?  
  Ask first and then play with it. 先去问，然后再跟它玩。
  I won't help you if your sister gets mad. get mad: 生气
  Handle it carefully and then put it back. 小心地拿，然后放回原位。
S Mom, can you keep it a secret? 妈妈，你能保密吗？
  Please don't tell her I played with this.  
M What if it broke? 万一坏了怎么办？what if: 万一…怎么办
  Your sister will get mad for sure. for sure: 当然
S She touched mine, too. 姐姐也会拿我的东西。
M Can't you let your little sister play with it for a while? 你能让你的妹妹玩下这个吗？

劝告不要涂鸦（ch07-07.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M What's this? Who did this?  
  Who scribbled all over the wall? 是谁把墙壁涂得乱七八糟。scribble: 涂鸦
  Why did you draw here?  
  Drawing should be done on paper.  
D I want to draw.  
  I'll erase it later.  
M This won't come off. 这是擦不掉的。
  You should have asked Mommy for paper.  
  Ask for paper next time. Okay?  
  Since you drew it, you should erase it.  
  Are you happy now since it's so dirty?  
  You shouldn't just be scribbling everywhere. 你不可以在任何地方涂鸦。
  Mommy's upset because the floor is so dirty.  
  Draw on this.  

小心陌生人（ch07-08.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Don't talk to strangers.  
  Don't follow anyone even if they ask.  
  Don't tell a stranger your name or number.  
  Tell your teacher or mom if something weired happens.  
  Ask for help when a stranger comes. 有奇怪的人出现时，要请求帮忙。
  Don't go near a stranger's car. 不要靠近陌生人的车子。
  Don't get in a stranger's car. 不可以坐陌生人的车。
  Just say no firmly. 要坚决地说不。
  Only walk on busy streets. 要走大路。busy: 繁华，热闹的
  Walk where people can see you. 要走人们能够看到你的地方。
  Just run if something feels wrong. 觉得不对劲时，赶紧跑开。

身体很脏时（ch07-09.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M It's so dirty. 太脏了。
  What's on your body?  
  Look at the mirror. 照照镜子。
  You smell bad.  
  Shouldn't you wash up? 你不应该洗一下吗？
S I'm not that dirty. 我没有那么脏。
M Go to the bathroom. 去浴室。
  There's dirt on you. Want me to wash it off. 有脏东西在你身上，要我把它洗掉吗？
  You would look better if you were cleaner.  
  Go change. 去换衣服。
  Where did you get so dirty? 你在哪儿弄得这么脏？
  What happened to your new shirt?  
  Germs will love to live in you.  
  You could get sick if you're so dirty.  

房间脏乱时（ch07-10.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Can you clean your room? 你能整理一下房间吗？
  Clear up the desk. 整理一下书桌吧。
  Your room's too dirty.  
D I just cleaned up. 我刚整理好。
M You should clean your own room.  
  I can't even walk by. 我连走都走不过去。
  There's no room to walk.  
  Where should this go? 这个应该放在哪里？
  How can a person live in here? 这是人住的地方吗？
  Junk is all over the place. 到处都是垃圾。
  It's hard to find things now.  
  Your messy room drives me crazy.  
  I'll come by in 10 minutes. 我10分钟后再来。
  I want it to be clean by then. 我希望到时候它被整理好了。
D My brother did it, too. Why should I clean it alone?  
  I didn't make this mess.  
M Help your brother clean up.  
  Want to have a match to see who can clean up faster? have a match: 比赛
  Your teacher's coming soon, so let's clean it.  
  Call Mommy whey you're done cleaning. 整理好了叫妈妈一下。
  What do you do when you're done playing? 当你不玩时，应该做什么？
D I need to clean up. 我需要整理一下。
M Let's organize them by color. 让我们按照颜色整理。
  Place them according to their size. 按照大小放好。
S Mom, where does this toy go? 这个玩具要放哪儿？

打人时（ch07-11.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M It's bad to hit others. 打人是不好的。
  Never hit others.  
  You shouldn't hurt other people.  
  Hold it even if you want to hit him. hold: 忍耐
S I hate hime so badly that I don't know what to do.  
  He hit me first.  
M Don't hit him. Talk to him.  
  You will do the wrong thing, too if you hit him back. 你打回去的话，你也是不对的。
  Your friend's going to hurt if you hit him.  
  I told you never to do that!  
  You need to get in trouble. 你需要被处罚。
  Want me to call the cops?  
  You must not hit girls. 你不可以打女孩。
  Your friend's not going to want to play with you now. Are you find with it? 现在你的朋友不想跟你玩，这样你也可以吗？

Chapter 08: 习惯养成

正确坐姿（ch08-01.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Sit properly. 坐好。
  Sit comfortably. 坐舒服点。
  Sit crisscross. 盘腿坐。Sit with your legs crisscrossed 的简单说法。
  Strighten your back. / Keep your back straight. 腰挺直。
  Sit on your bottom. 屁股贴着椅子。
  Sit all the way down. 整个坐下去。
  Don't just perch on the chair. 不要跨坐。
D This desk / chair is uncomfortable.  
  The chair is too high / low.  
  Mom, the desk / chair is too wobbly. wobbly: 晃动的，不稳的
M Stop shaking the desk.  
  Don't put your head on your desk. 不要趴在书桌上。
  Don't put your hand under your chin. 不要托着下巴。
  Sit in a chair with your back up. 把腰挺直坐好。
  Lean against the back of the chair. 背要靠着椅背。
  Why do you keep getting out of the chair? 为什么你一直要从椅子上起来？
  Mommy will push the chair in for you. 妈妈把椅子推到你屁股下坐。
  Don't stand on the swivel chair. swivel chair: 旋转椅
  Don't spin on the chair. 不要转动椅子。
  Don't sit on your knees. 不要跪坐。
  Don't lie down. 不要躺着。
  Don't shake your legs. 不要抖脚。
D It's more comfortable to sit like this.  
M Your back might be bent later. bent: 弯曲
  If you sit like that, your waist will be bent. 你的腰会弯的。
  Make sure not to bend too much at your waist. 确保你的腰不会太弯。
  I'm afraid you'll have a swayback. swayback: 脊柱弯曲
  I don't want you to get bent over like an old lady. 我不希望你的腰像老太太一样弯。

拿铅笔（ch08-02.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Hold your pencil right. 拿好铅笔。
  Don't hold on it too hard. 不要握得太用力。
  Hold it like Mommy.  
  You hold your pencil too short / long. 你铅笔拿得太短/长了。
  Write with you right hand. 用右手写字。
D I use my left hand better. 我左手用得更好。
M Your pencil's broken. 你的铅笔断了。
D Mom, will you sharpen my pencil?  

写字（ch08-03.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M The letters are too small / large.  
  You want them bigger. 你的字要写大一些。
  Try to write along the line. 试着沿着线写。
  Your handwriting is sloppy. sloppy: 潦草，随便
  Make your letters the same size. 把字母写得一样大。
  Don't write too hard. 不要写得太用力。
  Erase it with an eraser.  
  Try to write again.  
  Get it right, Honey. 要写正确。
  Write slowly. 慢慢写。
S Should I write like this, Mom?  
  How do you write this? 这个要怎么写？
M You have to space the words. 写字要留间隙。
  The ending sound is misspelled. 尾音拼错了。
  It's a capital K / a lower case k. 大写 K / 小写 k。
  Go to the next line. 下一行。
  Put a space between the words. 单词之间要留间隔。
  I think you got the punctuation wrong. 我想你用错标点符号了。
  You spelled the word wrong. 你拼错字了。
  Check your spelling. 检查你的拼写。
  I like your handwriting.  
  Sit properly when writing. 写字时要坐端正。
S Mom, my fingers hurt.  
  It's hard to write on unlined paper. 没有印线的纸张很难写。unlined = unruled

看电视（ch08-04.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Back off from the TV.  
  Back off a little more.  
  Don't watch TV while lying down.  
  You're watching too close. 你离电视太近了。
  Turn off the TV.  
  Be sure to turn it off after watching it.  
  It's not good for your eyes to watch it like that.  
  Are you sitting properly?  
  You're lying down again.  
  I'll turn off the TV if you sit like that.  
  I'll turn off the TV if you don't move back.  
  You promised to watch for 30 minutes.  
  This will be the last thing you watch.  
  Make sure you turn it off after this.  
  Lean on the cushion behind you.  
S Mom, the sofa's uncomfortable.  
  Mom, will you get me a cushion?  
  Mom, will you get me something to lean on?  
M Don't press the remote on and on.  
  Watch TV after finishing your homework.  
  Finish what you need to do first. 先完成你要做的事情。
  Stop watching TV and do your homework.  
  You keep flipping through the channels. 你一直在换频道。flip through: 快速转换
  I think you're obsessed with TV. be obsessed with: 着迷，执着

把东西放回原位（ch08-05.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M There are lots of things on the floor.  
  Put it in the drawer.  
  Put them in the shelf.  
  Organize your things well. 好好整理你的东西。
  You should clear up your things. clear up: 收拾
  Where was this before? 这东西之前放在哪里？
  This doesn't belong here. 这个东西不应该放在这里。
  Put this where it is supposed to be. 把这个放在它应该在的地方。
  Put it where it belongs. 把它物归原位。
  Put the used things back into their place. 把用过的东西放回原处。
  Put the things where they belong so you can find them easily.  
  You should have put them in the right place. 你当时就应该把它们放在正确的地方。
D Mom, where should I put this? 这个我要放在哪儿？
  Mom, I'll put this here. 我把这个放在这里。
  I'm going to use this now.  
M Where did Mommy tell you to put this?  
  Isn't it easy to find things since you cleaned up? 整理好之后，不是很容易找到吗？

整理衣服（ch08-06.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Hang your jacket on the hanger.  
  Put it in the closet. closet: 衣橱
D Mom, there's nowhere to put this. 妈妈，没有地方可以放了。
  Mom, this is too small now.  
M Take out what you're not going to wear. 把你不穿的衣服拿出来。
D There's a hole here.  
M I'll sew this for you.  
  Put your dirty socks in the laundry. 把脏袜子放进洗衣篮里。
  Why are these socks here?  
  I told you not to turn the socks inside out. 我告诉过你不要把袜子翻过来。
  The drawers are full.  
  Let's organize our sping / summer / fall / winter clothes.  
  These clothes are out of season, so let's put them back. 这些衣服已经过季了。
  Let's put the clothes you don't wear in the box.  
  How about donating the clothes that you don't wear?  
  Let's give away the old clothes to your cousin. give away: 赠送出去
Tip: 有关收纳用品的表达
drawer 抽屉
closet 壁橱
clothes hanger 衣架
shelf 架子
peg 挂衣服的衣夹或木钉
coat hanger 大衣衣架
storage container 保管箱
hamper 洗衣篮

吃饭礼仪（ch08-07.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Do you wash your hands before eating?  
  Wash your hands well before eating.  
  Start eating once the adult starts. 大人们先开动，你才能吃。
  Don't hold the spoon and chopsticks together. 不要同时拿起筷子和汤匙。
  Use your chopsticks right.  
  Hold your chopsticks like this. 像这样拿筷子。
  Don't talk with food in your mouth.  
  Don't talk with your mouth full.  
  Don't leave any food uneaten.  
  Don't leave any food on your plate.  
  Don't smack your lips when you eat. 吃饭时不要吧嗒嘴。smash one's lips: 用嘴发出啧啧声
  Turn your head when coughing. 咳嗽时要转过头去。
  Don't spit it out everywhere! 不要把它吐的到处都是。
  Do not leave the table while you're eating. 吃饭时不要离开位子。
  Be careful not to drop the food.  
  Don't spill your soup. spill: 洒
  Sit properly when eating.  
  Don't make noises when you eat soup.  
  Don't pick at the food with your hand. 不可以用手抓食物。
  Do not use your hands to pick at the food. 不可以用手抓食物。
  Don't watch TV while eating.  
  Chew with your mouth closed.  
  Don't move around while eating. 吃饭的时候不要跑来跑去。
  Don't lick your fingers. Use a napkin. napkin: 纸巾
  Don't blow on your food too hard to cool it off.  
  Keep your legs still under the table. 把你的双脚好好放在桌子下面。
  Don't ever burp at the table. 不要在饭桌上打嗝。
D Yuck. You burped, Daddy. 噁，爸爸，你打嗝了。
M Don't talk about dirty things while eating.  
  It's not polite to blow your nose at the table. blow one's nose: 擤鼻涕

Chapter 09: 孩子们常用的表达

找东西（ch09-01.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
S Mom, where is my ruler?  
  I can't find it, Mom.  
M Look for it carefully. look for: 寻找
  Try to think where you left it.  
S I'm sure I put it here.  
  Mom, can you find my notebook?  
  I thought I left it here. 我以为把它放在这儿了。
  I've looked all over for it, but I can't see it.  
  Did you throw it away, Mom?  
M Did you look over there? 那边你也看了吗？
  It's over there. 它在那边。
S Here it is! 在这里。
  I found it. 我找到了。
  Why is it there? 为什么会在那里呢？
  I didn't leave it there. 我没有把它放在那里。
  Mom, I lost my pencil case. pencil case: 铅笔盒
  Minji took it. 他把它拿走了。
M Where did you see it last? 你上次是在哪里看到的？
  When was the last time you used it? 你上次用是什么时候？
  Didn't you leave it at school? 你没有把它放在学校吗？
  I told you to put your things in their places. 我告诉过你要把东西放在原位。

要东西（ch09-02.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
D Get me some water, Mom.  
  It isn't enough. 这不够。
  I want more.  
  This is enough. 这样就够了。
  I'm hungry! Can I have dinner?  
S Will you hand me the book? 你能把书拿给我吗？
  Will you pass me the toys? 你能把玩具给我吗？
  I can't reach that high. 我够不到那么高。
  Can you get me that over there? 你能把那边的东西递给我吗？
  Will you get me the remote?  
M You have hands. Take it yourself. 你有手，自己拿。
  How come you keep asking? 怎么一直要这要那。
  That's not Mommy's job. Do it yourself.  
  Can't you do it on your own? 你不能自己做吗？
D I forgot my shoe bag.  
  Mom, I forgot to bring my supplies. 我忘记带学校用品了。
  Will you take my supplies to school? 你能把学校用品带来学校吗？
M It's done! 好的。
  Mom's busy. Do it by yourself. 妈妈很忙，你自己做。
  I'm doing this for you now, but do it yourself next time. 这次我帮你做，下次要自己做。

做事拖拉时（ch09-03.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
D Can I do it tomorrow?  
  I'll do it in 5 minutes.  
  Don't push me. 不要催我。
  I'm almost done. Wait a little. 我快做好了。请再等一下。
  I'm tired.  
  I'm all tired out. tired out: 累垮了
  I have a headache.  
  Can I do it after I get some rest? 我可以休息一下再做吗？
S I'll do it after I do this.  
  I have no more strength to do it. 我已经没有力气去做了。
  Mom, I need some rest. 我需要休息。
  Okay, okay. I'll definitely get it done later. 我待会儿一定把它完成。
  There's still a lot of time left.  
  You don't have to rush. rush: 急着做
  I'll do it. Promise! 我发誓。
  Why do you never let me rest, Mom?  
M You always say later. 你总是说等一下。
  Finish it right this minute! 现在就完成。
  Do what you have to do.  
  It's been pushed back a week. push back: 拖
  There's no time. Stop pushing it back. 没有时间了，不要再拖。

要求再多玩一会（ch09-04.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
D Can't I play a little more?  
  I want to play for 30 more minutes.  
  I'm not done playing. 我还没玩完。
  I'm not done yet.  
  I didn't play well enough. 我没有好好玩够。
  We haven't even gotten started. 我们甚至还没有开始玩。
  I just started. 我刚开始。
  Why does time fly? 为什么时间过的这么快？
  It's already that late? 已经那么晚了吗？
S It's starting to get fun. 刚开始觉得有趣。
  Allow me to play a little more. 让我再多玩一会儿。
  I'll study hard if you let me play more.  
  I finished my work. So can I play more?  
  There's not enough time to play.  
  I wish I could play more. 我希望我能多玩一会儿。
  It's been only 5 minutes since I started the game. 我刚开始玩5分钟而已。
  Promise you'll let me play longer next time.  
M I know how you feel, but you can't play all the time. all the time: 总是
  You had enough fun, I guess. 我想你已经玩得差不多了。
  Play time is over. Get ready to go to bed. 玩耍时间结束，去准备睡觉。

表示讨厌（ch09-05.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
D I'm tired.  
  That's not fun. 那不好玩。
  I hate it because it's too childish. 那个太幼稚了，我不喜欢。
  It's a childlike thing. 那是小孩子的玩意。
  It's not something for my age. 这不符合我的年龄。
  I just don't want to do it. 我只是不喜欢做。
  There's no time. 没有时间。
  I don't know how to do it. 我不知道怎么做。
  That's too hard.  
  That's not somethign I can do. 那不是我能做到的事情。
S Can I not do it?  
  Should I do this? 我一定要做这个吗？
  Can I stop it? 我能把它停止吗？
  Can't my brother do it? 弟弟不能做吗？
  Do it again? 又要做吗？
  Other kids don't even do that. 其他小孩也没有做那个啊。
  Mom always makes me do work! 妈妈总是叫我做事。
  Mom and Dad don't even do it. 爸爸妈妈不是也没做。
  My friends will make fun of me. make fun of sb.: 取笑
  Don't make me do what I don't want to do.  
  I'm not feeling good today.  
  I don't feel like doing it. feel like doing: 想做…
M It's your job, though. though: 即使如此，但是
  How comes you always say no? 为什么你一直说不要？
  You need to be doing this, and you know it. 这是你一定要做的事，你也知道的。
  I am sorry. Nobody can do that for you.  

生气（ch09-06.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
D Go away! 走开。
  Why do you do that to me? 为什么你那样对我？
  Stop bothering me. 不要再惹我。
  Don't say a word. 再给我说话试试看。
  Don't talk like that. 不要那样说。
  You're always like that! 你一直都是那样。
  It's mine. Don't touch it.  
  Who told you to touch it? 谁让你碰的？
  I'm going to get you if you do it again. get you: 打你
S Gosh, nobody's listening to me.  
  I don't want to talk to you, Mom!  
  Don't you know what I'm saying? 你不知道我在说什么吗？
  You're always like that, Mom! 你总是那样。
  Then try it by yourself, Mom!  
  You always do it your way, Dad! 你总是照自己的意思去做。
  I'm not going to listen to Mommy now. 我现在再也不听妈妈的话了。
  I'm going to do it my way. 我要找我自己的方式去做。
  Don't talk to me.  
M It's not polite to say that.  
  What made you this angry? 是什么让你这么生气呢？
  It's no use getting angry. be no use doing sth.: 做…没有用
  What good is it to stay angry? 一直生气有什么好处呢？

表示不公平（ch09-07.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
D Mom always blames me. 妈妈总是指责我。
  You always nag me. nag: 唠叨
  Why do you only scold me? 为什么你总是骂我？
  It's not fair.  
  His is bigger. 他的更大。
  Hers is better than mine.  
  She said it first. 她先说的。
  He did it.  
  You favor Jina over me. favor A over B: 比起B更偏袒A
  Why do you like Jina more than me?  
S Buy me something, too. 也给我买点东西。
  I don't want hand-me-downs. hand-me-down: 别人不要的衣服
  Don't compare me with her. compare A with B: 比较A和B
  Am I not your son?  
  Why does Jisu always get the good one?  
  I need it more than her. 我比她更需要那个。
  You always think of her first. 你总是先想到她。
M That's not true. 不是那样的。
  I love you both the same.  
  I don't like the way you talk.  
  If something bothers you, tell me. Don't hold back. hold back: 犹豫，忍住

Chapter 10: 爸爸正在讲理由

说晚回家/很忙（ch10-01.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
S Whey are you coming, Dad? 你什么时候回家？
Dad I think I'll be late because I have a meeting.  
  There's traffic. I think I'm running a little late. traffic: 交通堵塞
  I might be late. Go to sleep, Honey.  
  Don't wait for me.  
  I have a guest. 有客户要来。
  I suddenly have something to do. 我突然有事要做。
  I have to eat dinner with my coworkers.  
  I have to finish something. 我必须把事情处理掉。
  I'm working.  
  Dad is still at work. 爸爸还在工作。
  I'm busy keeping my deadline. 我忙着在期限内完成工作。be busing doing; keep one's deadline
  I'm really busy.  
  I have to meet my friend. 我必须去见朋友。
  I'll come home after eating dinner.  
  I have no time to talk. 我没有时间跟你聊了。
  I'll call later. 我晚一点再打给你。
M Are you going to be late again?  
  The kids are waiting for you.  
D Dad, I miss you.  
  Come home early. 早点回家。
Dad I'll come right home when it is over. 一结束我就立刻回家。
  I'll try to go in as early as I can. 我和尽可能早点回去。

妈妈的唠叨（ch10-02.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Why did you come home now? 为什么你现在才回来？
  Take off your clothes and go to sleep. 脱下衣服去睡吧。
  Will you put your laundry in the laundry bin? laundry bin: 洗衣筐
  Don't just leave your clothes everywhere! 不要把衣服到处乱放。
  How come I should pick up after you? 为什么我要跟在你后面帮你捡。
  Can't you stop watching TV?  
  Do you always have to eat dinner out? 你晚餐一定要在外面吃吗？
  Stop drinking too much. 不要喝太多酒。
  You need to get some exercise. 你需要组做些运动。
  You should get rid of your love handles. love handles: 腰间赘肉
  Think about your health. 注意你的健康。
  Stop smoking.  
  Will you help me clean the house? 你能帮我打扫房间吗？
  Did you forget the promise we made before we got married? 你忘了我们结婚前的约定了吗？get married: 结婚
  Will you do the dishes, Darling? 你要洗碗吗？
  Don't lie down when the kids are around. 不要在孩子面前躺着。
  Will you do it for me, Darling? 你能帮我做吗？
  Play with the kids, please. 请和孩子们玩。

爸爸的周末约定（ch10-03.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
Dad Wait for the weekend! 好好期待周末吧。
  You can take my work for it. 你可以相信我的话。take one's word: 相信…的话
  I'll keep my promise this weekend. keep one's promise: 遵守约定
  What do you want to do this weekend?  
  Want to watch a movie this weeken?  
  I'll take you on a drive. take A on a drive: 开车带A去兜风
  I'll try to make it work for you this time. make it work: 把事做成
  Plan on something for the weekend. plan on sth.: 计划某事
  Let's study with Daddy this weekend.  
  Let's play soccer together this Sunday. play soccer: 踢足球
  I'll play with you this weekend.  
  Sorry! I'll do it this weekend.  
  Sorry! I'll do it during this week.  
  Let's go to eat something delicious. 我们去吃些好吃的吧。
  We only have time on weekends. 我们只有周末有时间。
  I have no time on weekdays. 我平日没有时间。
  Let's go on a trip during the long holiday. go on a trip: 旅行; long holiday: 连续假期
  I'll tuck you into bed on Saturdays and Sundays. 周六和周日我会哄你入睡。tuck A into bed: 哄A睡觉
  I'll help you clean up the house this weekend. clean up sth.: 打扫，收拾干净
  I'll do the dishes this weekend.  
  I'll take care of the kids, so get some rest. 我来照顾孩子，你休息一下吧。
  You don't have to do a thing this weekend, Honey. 这个周末你什么也不需要做。
  I'll do everything today. 今天事情都由我来做。

爸爸的解释（ch10-04.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
Dad Sorry that I forgot.  
  I wasn't trying to do that. 我不是要那样做的。
  Something kept me busy. 我一直有事要忙？
  Will you understand? 你能理解吗？
  You know what I mean? 你知道我的意思吗？
  I wanted to go, too. 我也是很想去。
  I wanted to do it for you. 我本来想要帮你做的。
  I'll make sure I do it next time. 我确定下次我一定会做。
  I was trying to make it up to you. 我本来打算补偿你的。make it up to sb.: 补偿，挽回
  I'm also sad it didn't work out well. 结果变成这样，我页很难受。
  I was trying to keep my word this time. 这次我真的想要履行约定的。
  It didn't work as planned. 它并没有按计划进行。as planned: 按已计划好的
  I won't do it next time. 我下次不会这么做了。
  This won't happen again. 这种事不会再发生了。
  Let's do it next time.  

安慰疲惫的爸爸（ch10-05.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M You must be tired, Honey.  
  You know our family loves you, right?  
D I love you, Dad!  
  Cheer up, Dad! 提起精神来。
  I'll give you a massage, Dad.  
  I'll give you a kiss.  
S Dad, we're always behind you. 我们一直支持你。
M Don't let yourself down. 不要灰心。let oneself down: 灰心，失望
  Straighten your shoulders. straighten: 挺直，舒展
S See? Daddy's the best! 看吧，爸爸是最厉害的。
  I'll take good care of you when I grow up. 我长大后会照顾你的。
M Do it after resting a little. 休息一下再做吧。
  I hope you slow down for your health. slow down: 慢下来
  I made a lot of good food, so you can cheer up.  
  You know we really need you, right?  

Praise: 赞美单字怎么说

多多赞美自己的孩子吧！

表达对孩子的爱和开心可以这么说
Sentence Notes
I love you.  
You are the best.  
You are special!  
You are my boy / girl.  
Good boy. / Good girl.  
You're such a good boy (girl).  
You're being so good. 你做得很好！

孩子要记得跟爸爸妈妈说 『Thanks, Mom.』或者『Thanks, Dad.』

我们不太了解的美国节日

宽扎节 Kwanzaa

来自非洲，从1966年开始，从12月26日到1月1日，跟家人和邻居彼此分享爱，并且点亮有七个蜡烛的烛台，一体度过享受华服和美食的时间。

常用的会话句子:

Sentence Notes
Do you know what Kwanzaa is?  
I've never heard of it. What is it?  
It si a festival that lasts for a week from December 26 to January 1. It is a festival for African-Americans living in America.  
What do people do during Kwanzaa?  
They have a candlelight ceremony and exchange gifts.  
光明节 Hanukkah

犹太人的冬天节日，根据犹太历有时是11月底，有时是12月。作为旧约历史的重要日子，从光明节的第一天开始将持续八天。这些天吃特定的食物，还有玩游戏，并且每一天都在叫做 menorah 的烛台上点上一根蜡烛来纪念。

常用的会话句子:

Sentence Notes
Hanukkah is another winter holiday in America.  
It's a Jewish festival that lasts for eight days.  
Hanukkah is also known as the "festival of lights".  
For the eight days of Hanukkah candles are lit one by one.  
They use a special candle stick called Menorah.  

Part 3: 和妈妈一起玩 Let's Play!

Chapter 11: 孩子们喜欢的基本游戏

要求一起玩的时候（ch11-01.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
S Mom, I'm bored.  
  It's play time!  
  Mom, can you play with me?  
  I wonder what's fun to play. 我想知道有什么好玩的。
  Do you have anything fun? 你有什么有趣的吗？
  I'll stop reading now.  
  I don't want to watch TV anymore.  
  I hate to play alone.  
  I need friends to play together with. 我需要跟朋友一起玩。
M Want to have some fun? 要玩点又去的吗？have some fun: 尝试有趣的事情
  Are you ready to have fun?  
  Let's find something fun.  
S Yay! Sounds great! sounds = It sounds: 听起来像…
M Okay. My baby must have been bored. must have been: 一定…
  Sure. What do you want to do with me, sweetheart?  
  What should we play?  
  Do whatever you want to do.  
S Let's do anything. 我们随便玩吧。
  Mom, let's solve puzzle. solve puzzle: 拼图
M Mommy's feeling good today. I can play with you all day long. 妈妈今天的状况很好，我可以跟你玩一整天。
  Playing with my baby is the most fun.  
S I love it when Mommy plays games with me. 我最喜欢妈妈跟我玩游戏了。

下次和你玩（ch11-02.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Let's play next time.  
  Can't you see Mom's very busy? 你没有看到妈妈在忙吗？
  Sorry. Mommy's too busy.  
  I'll play with you after I do the dishes.  
  I'm working, so I'll play with you later.  
  I can play with you in a minute after work. 一会儿工作结束后我就跟你玩。
  Can you wait? Thanks.  
  Wait! Let's play a little later.  
  Wait for five minutes. 等我五分钟。
D Can you play with me in 5 minutes?  
  I want to play right now.  
  Play with me right away.  
M Not now. 现在不行。
  There's no time today. / I have no time today.  
  It's too late. Let's play a lot tomorrow.  
  There's too much to do right now.  
  Mommy also wants to play with you, but I can't right now.  
  Ask Daddy to play with you.  
D Dad always says he's busy.  
  If I wait, you have to play with me some more. 你一定要跟我多玩一会儿。
  Then when can you find time? / When are you free then? 那么你什么时候有时间呢？
  You can do it later after playing with me.  

约定玩的时间（ch11-03.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M How long should we play?  
  Let's set up a time to play. 我们来定个时间吧。set up: 设立
  I'll set the timer for 30 minutes. 我把定时器设定为30分钟。
  When the timer goes off, we'll stop. 定时器一响，我们就停止。
  Let's play with blocks for 40 minutes starting now. 现在开始，我们玩40分钟积木。
  Let's play at the playground for an hour. play at the playground: 在游乐场玩
S I want to play for 2 hours.  
M 2 hours is too long. Let's play for only 1 hour.  
  Let's promise to play for 20 minutes. 我们约定好就玩20分钟。
S 20 minutes is too short.  
  I need more time to play. 我要玩更久。
  Just one more round, please. 请让我再多玩一回。round: （比赛等）一回
M Only for 5 more minutes.  
  Next time, you should keep your word.  
  Let's finish after 3 more rounds. 再玩三次，我们就结束吧。
  We only have 5 minutes left. 我们只剩5分钟了。
  Time's up! Done! 时间到了！结束！
  The alarm went off! 闹钟响了！
S I want to play more.  
  When I play, an hour feels like a second.  
M You promised to play for an hour, right?  
  You should tell playtime from worktime. tell A from B: 区分A和B
S As a kid, all I do is play. 作为小孩，我所要做的就是玩。
  Mom, I'll play on the playground till 6:00.  
  I'll clean up after I finish this game.  

躲猫猫（ch11-04.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Peek-a-boo! （藏起来突然出现时）出现了！peek-a-boo: 躲猫猫游戏
  Honey, where's Mommy?  
S There you are, Mommy! 你在这里啊，妈妈。
  I got you, Mommy! 我抓到你了，妈妈。
M You can't see me, can you?  
  Where's my little baby?  
  I can hear you.  
  I can't see my baby.  
  Where did he / she go?  
  Should I open the door?  
  Hide under the covers. 躲在被子里面。covers: 被子
  Huh? Who's talking?  
  There you are! 你在这里耶！
  Ta-da! 嗒哒，看到你了。ta-da: 两手张开秀出东西的效果声
  You were here. Were you surprised?  
  Isn't peek-a-boo fun? 躲猫猫好玩吗？
  Want to do it again? 要再来一次吗？
S That was fun. Can you do it again?  

剪刀石头布（ch11-05.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Let's play rock, paper, scissors. 我们来玩剪刀石头布吧。
  Rock, paper, scissors, go!  
  I'll tell you the rules.  
  You make a fist for rock like this. 石头只要这样握住拳头就可以。
  Doesn't rock actually look like a stone?  
  You put two fingers out, and that's scissors. 伸出两根手指，…
  It really looks like a pair of scissors cutting paper, right?  
  Paper is stretching out your hand. 布只要张开手就好了。
  Paper looks like a piece of paper, doesn't it?  
  Rock beats scissors. 石头赢剪刀。
  Scissors beats paper.  
  Paper beats rock.  
  Rock can smash scissors. 石头可以打碎剪刀。
  Scissors can cut paper.  
  Paper can wrap rock.  
  If you both make the same thing, it's a draw. draw: 平手，无胜负
  We both have the same thing. Let's try again. 我们出一样的了，再来一次。
  You have to make it at the same time. 你们必须要同时出。
  If you change after throwing one, that's cheating. 如果出了之后又换的话，就是犯规。cheating: 作弊
  It's cheating if you make it late. 出太晚也是作弊。
  The winner goes first. 赢的人可以优先。
S I always win at rock, pater, scissors. 我钉钢锤总是赢。
  He lost but kept saying he won.  
  You made it late. 你晚出了。
  I won! I'll go first. 我赢了，我先。
  You lost.  

捉迷藏（ch11-06.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
D Let's play hide and seek. 我们来玩捉迷藏吧。
  Want to play hide and seek? Come here!  
M I'll be "it", so you hide.  
  Hide yourself safely.  
  Okay, I'll count to ten. 我要开始数到十。
D Count to ten slowly.  
  Count to ten and look for the hidden people.  
  You shouldn't peek. / No peeking. 不可以偷看。
  Mom's "it". Let's hide quicly.  
S Where should we hide?  
M Don't hide in a dangerous place.  
  Whew, I can't find you.  
  Ready or not, here I come! 准备好了没？我来了！（做 it 的人开始找人前说的话）
  I can see your shirt.  
  I can see where you hid.  
  Did you hide behind the chair?  
  You're not here! Where are you, Sweetie?  
  I'll find you. Just wait! 你等着。
  I heard a sound over there.  
  I know you're hiding under the covers.  
  There you are! Comeout. 你在这里！出来吧。
  Mommy is a hider now. 轮到妈妈藏起来了。hider: 藏起来的人
D You found me too soon! 你太快找到我了。
  Daddy, you are the seeker, and we're the hiders.  
Dad You'll be "it" this time.  
  Find a good hiding spot. spot: 场所，地方
S I'll go under the desk.  
  I'll be behind the curtain.  
Dad Don't move.  
  Duck your head. I can see you. 低下你的头，我能看到你。duck: （头或身体）低下，垂下
  Hush. Be quiet! The seeker can hear you. 嘘，安静！
  Let's hide here together.  
  You're a great hide-and-seeker player. 你真是玩捉迷藏的高手。
  Ollie, ollie oxen free! 找不到，放牛吃草。（It 找不到人时说的话）

捉人游戏（ch11-07.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Who wants to play tag? 有人要玩捉人游戏吗？play tag: 玩捉人游戏
  Let's pick the tagger. / Let's pick "it". 我们来选捉人者。tagger: 捉人者，常用 it 代替
  Who wants to be "it"?  
  Let's pick by playing rock, paper, scissors.  
  You're the tagger. / You're "it".  
D I don't want to be "it".  
  I'll be the tagger.  
  Come and catch me, Mom!  
M You're really rast. Mom can't catch you.  
  You're "it" this time.  
  I got him first. 我先抓到他了。
S Let me get you, please! 请让我抓到你！
  It's hard to breathe! / Phew, I'm out of breath. / Eeee, I'm exhausted! 哎呀，好喘哦。
M Stop there! 站在那里！
  Mommy's coming. Run away. 妈妈来了，快跑哦。
S No! Don't catch me!  
M I'm getting close. I'm almost there. 我越来越近了。我快到了。
  ReacH home first. Then, you will win against the tagger. 先到家，这样你就会赢抓人的鬼。

扮家家酒（ch11-08.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
D I want to play house. play house: 玩扮家家酒
  Let's have a tea party. tea party: 家家酒游戏
M I'll play the role of the baby. You be Dad. 我来当小孩，你当爸爸。
D I'll play Mom. 我来当妈妈。
M Let's use this for a table. 我们用这个当餐桌。
D I'll make salad for you, Mom. 我来给你做沙拉。
  I'll cut the tomato in half and cook it. 我来把番茄切两半然后煮。
  I put the egg in the pan.  
M Mom, I'm hungry.  
D Mom will cook for you, my baby.  
  It's time for milk, Sweetie.  
M Emm… Mommy, it's yummy.  
D There's no milk. Let's go to the market. / We're out of milk. Let's go to the grocery store. be out of: 没有
  Which plate do you want it on? 你想用哪个盘子装？
M I want it on the yellow plate. 我想用黄色的盘子装。
D Okay. Here it goes. 好，在这里。
  There you go. 你的在那里。
  Mommy will cut it for you. 妈妈帮你切。
  Darling, it's time for dinner.  
  Oh, my baby already finished it. 我的宝贝已经吃完了。
  Oh, done already, huh? 哦，已经吃完了呀？
  We should do the dishes. 我们要洗碗。
  Mommy will make more delicious food for you.  
  Here are the spoon and the fork. 汤匙和叉子在这里。
  I'll wash the orange. 我来洗柳橙。
  Wait a minute. The food's almost done. 在等一下，饭快好了。
  Would you like a cup of tea? / Would you care for some tea? 你要喝杯茶吗？care for sth.: 想要…
  What kind of tea do you want to drink? Is green tea fine?  

医生游戏（ch11-09.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Let's play doctor. / Let's play hospital. 我们来玩医生游戏。
S Mom, I want to be the doctor.  
M Okay, I'll be the patient. 我来做病人。
S How can I help you? / What's troubling you? 你哪里不舒服？
M My head / stomach hurts.  
  My ears / eyes / legs hurt.  
  I have a fever and a stomachache. 我发烧了，也胃疼
S Where exactly do you feel pain? 确切地说，是哪一个部位疼呢？
M It itches because of my rash. 因为疹子所以很痒。
  I felt itchy. 我觉得很痒。
S Open your mouth wide. Say "Ah…". 张大你的嘴巴，说『啊…』
  I'm going to take your temperature. 我来帮你量体温。
  You have a high fever. 你发高烧了。
  Nurse, can you give me my stethoscope. stethoscope: 听诊器
  Take a deep breath in and out. 深吸气，然后吐气。
  We need to do surgery. do surgery: 动手术
  I'll write you a prescription. 我给你开处方。
  I'm going to give you a shot. give sb. a shot: 打针
M Can you give me a shot that won't hurt? 你能让我打针时不疼吗？
S It will sting a little bit. 会有一点点刺痛。
  Good job. 很好。
  The next patient, Teddy Bear! Come in.  
M Doctor, my baby's really sick. 医生，我的孩子很不舒服。
S Lie on the bed, please. 请躺在床上。
  I'll put on some ointment. 我会涂些药膏。
  You need to stay in the hospital. 你需要住院。
  Nurse, can you take this patient to the treatment room? treatment room: 诊疗室
  It hurts a lot, doesn't it? 很疼，不是吗？
  Don't worry. You will be fine soon. 不用担心，你很快就能好起来。
  Was I a good doctor?  
  Did I do a good job? 我做的好吗？

Chapter 12: 美术游戏

画画（ch12-01.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
S Mom, can you draw me a car?  
M You can draw it by yourself.  
  Try drawing the wheels by yourself.  
  I'll draw the car. Will you color it? 你要上色吗？
S I'm not that good. 我不太会。
  I'm not good at drawing. 我不太会画画。
  Look, Mom! Here's my circle.  
  Look what I draw. / Look at my picture.  
  I drew this.  
  Isn't this cool? 这不是很酷吗？
D Mom, I want to draw.  
M What do you want to draw? 你想画什么呢？
D I want to draw the sea.  
M About the sea, what can you think of? 说到海，你想到什么？
  What can we see in the sea? 在海里，我们能看到什么？
D I can think of fish, mermaids, waves, ships, and clams. 我想到鱼，人鱼，海浪，船，贝壳。clam: 贝壳
M What do you want to draw first?  
  Draw whatever you want. 画你想画的。
  What do you want to draw with? 你想用什么画呢？
D With crayons / paints / pastels / color pencils. 用蜡笔/颜料/粉蜡笔/色铅笔话。
M Let's open the sketchbook. sketchbook: 写生簿
  Get out the drawing paper. 把图画纸拿出来吧。
  Let's make a sketch. 我们来画草图。
  What did you draw here. 你在这里画了什么？
  You forgot to draw the ears.  
  Now color the picture. 现在来上色吧。
D Mom, how do you draw dinosaurs? 妈妈，恐龙要怎么画？
  Look at my drawing. Didn't I draw it well? 看我的画，我不是画得很好吗？
M You drew the tree too small / large. 你把树画得太小/大了。
  There's no room to draw the house. 没有画房子的空间。
  Want to add some facial expressions on it? 你要添上脸部表情吗？facial expression: 脸部表情
D I'll erase it with an eraser.  
M You drew it very well. 你画得很好。
  You are such a great painter! / We have a great artist here!  
  Wow! It really looks like a bunny running.  
  You made it look real. 你让他看起来像真的。
  This part is especially expressive. 这部分表现得特别好。
  Let's display the picture here. display: 展出
  Do you want me to put it on the wall so that Daddy can see it?  
  Let's show this to Daddy when he comes.  

上色（ch12-02.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Now let's color the sketch.  
  Will you paint / color your sketch?  
  Get out the crayons / color pencils.  
  Want to use paint and a brush?  
  Wear this smock when you're drawing. smock: 工作服，罩衫
  What color do you need?  
S I'm going to paint this part yellow.  
  The crayon is broken. 蜡笔断了。
M Try to color inside this line. 试着在线内上色。
  Color it carefully. Don't leave any blank part. 不要留下任何空白。
  Do you want to learn how to paint? 你想学怎样上色吗？
  Put the paint you need on the pallette. / Squeeze out the paint on the pallete.  
  Let's mix some more water. 我们再调多些水吧。
  What color do you want to paint the flower? / What color would you paint the flower?  
S I'm going to paint it purple.  
  Mom, there's no green.  
M Let's use by mixing colors. 把颜色混合起来用。by doing: 通过
  Want to mix yellow and blue?  
  Wow! It's turning green. 变成绿色了。
  The color of the sea looks nice. 大海的颜色看起来好美。
  It looks nice since we colored it orange.  
S Mom, my arm hurts. Can you help me color it?  
M Clean the brush well. 把画笔好好洗净。
S I got paint all over my hands. 我的手上沾满了颜料。

美术时间（ch12-03.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Now, it's time for art class. 来上美术课了。
  We'll paint a picture today. 我们今天来画图。
  Prepare the watercolors, brushes, the palette, and the water reservoir. water reservoir: 水桶
  What do you want to draw?  
  Today, we will draw the playground.  
D I'm going to draw with crayons.  
  It is hard to sketch lightly. 轻轻画真的很难。
  Let's make a human figure with clay. 我们用粘土来做个人形吧。
M Put some glue on the back side. 在背面涂上一些胶水。
  Cut out the shape / figure with scissors. 用剪刀剪出模样。
  Wow, your sketch looks great!  
  Color the sketch carefully.  
  Think of what materials you are going to use for your picture.  
  Can you explain your drawing to your friends? 你能为你的朋友解释你的画吗？
  The expression on the face of this person is so real. 这个人的表情很逼真。
  If you put more colors on it, the picture will look much nicer.  
  Wait till the picture dries up. 要等画都干了。
  Let's take a look at your friend's drawing.  
  Let's talk about the good points of the drawing. 说说画画的好处吧。good points: 好处
  Does anyone know who painted this picture?  
  The picture that you are looking at is called The Gleaners. 你现在看的作品叫做《拾穗l》。
  Take a look at Van Gogh's Sunflowers and talk about it. 欣赏一下梵高的《向日葵》，并说说感想。
  Name the paiting as you want. 照你的意思给这张画命名吧。
D I love this picture.  
  This picture is fantastic.  
经常出现的 Tip：美术道具及用语
color pencil 彩色笔
crayon 蜡笔
pastel 粉蜡笔
watercolor paint 水彩颜料
oil paint 油画颜料
sketchbook 速写簿
drawing pencil 美术笔
easel 画架
paintbrush 画笔
palette 调色盘
draw 画画
color 上色
paint 涂颜料

贴纸游戏（ch12-04.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
D I want to play with some stickers. 我想玩贴纸游戏。
M Want to decorate this with stickers?  
  Can you get out the sticker book? 你能拿出贴纸簿吗？
  Take off the stickers first. take off: 撕下
  Where are you going to put it on? 你要贴在哪里？
  Put the apple stiker on.  
D Mom, is it right to put it on here? 贴在这里对吗？
  Mom, the sticker won't come off. 这张贴纸撕不下来。come off
  I put it on wrong, Mom. 我贴错了。
  I accidentally tore the sticker. 我不小心把贴纸撕破了。
  Can you take it off, Mom?  
M It's hard to get it off if you put it in the wrong place. 如果贴错地方，很难撕下来。
  It looks cool with stickers.  
  Look at the picture and put the stickers in the right place.  
D Will you buy me a new one when I use this up? use up: 用完
  Can I use it again after taking it off? 这个撕下来后还能再用吗？
M It's okay if it's a little bit out of place. 有点歪掉也没关系。out of place: 不在正确位置
  Want to take it off and put it on again? 想撕下来重贴吗？
  Docorate however you want. 照你的意思装饰。
D It's not sticky enough. 不够粘。
  It got stuck together by itself. stuck together: 沾在一起；by itself: 自己
M If it get on your hair, it won't come off well. 粘在头发上的话就不容易弄掉了。
  There's nothing to use later if you use it all today. 今天都用完的话，之后就没得用了。

折纸（ch12-05.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Let's do some paper folding. folding: 折; origami: 折纸
  It's important to follow the directions. 跟着说明来很重要。directions: 说明，指示
  You need to fold it like the directions say.  
  Fold it in half. 对折。
  Fold it again.  
  Fold it diagonally. You've got a triangle, right?  
  Prepare some double-sided colored paper. 准备双面的彩纸。
D I'm using two-sided colored paper. 我要用双面的彩纸。
M Want to fold a frog? 想要折个青蛙吗？
  Let the corners meet exactly. 要把角对好。
  Fold a corner exactly to the middle point. 把一个角对准中间点折好。
  Fold the other way. 反过来折。
  The dotted lines mean to fold. 虚线就是要折的意思。
  The lines mean to cut it. 实线就是要剪掉的意思。
  Fold it inside / outside. 往里/外折。
  Unfold it. 摊开。unfold: 把折好的东西摊开
  Turn it over and fold it the same way. turn it over: 倒过来
  You have to do stair folding. 你必须做个阶梯折叠。
  Fold it in the same direction. 往同一方向折。
  Press it firmly to make a good crease. 用力按下去，做出清楚的折痕。crease: 折痕
  Fold it up / down.  
D Mom, it doesn't fold well. 妈妈，这不好折。
  Mom, it's not that easy / I can't do it well. 妈妈，还是不行。
  I can't seem to get it right. 我好像还是做不好。
M You folded it the wrong way. 你折错方向了。
  Fold it on the center line. 要对准中间线折。
  You got it exactly. 你做得很好。
  Draw eyes with a marker. 用马克笔画出眼睛。
  Ta-da! The frog is done. 青蛙完成了。

使用剪子/刀子/胶水（ch12-06.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Let's cut it using scissors. / Let's cut it with scissors. 我们用剪刀剪吧。
  How many pairs of scissors do you have?  
  Put your thumb here and your index finger here.  
  Try opening and closing it. 试着打开，再合起来。
  You're cutting well. 你剪得很好。
  Cut along the lines. 沿着线剪。
S I happended to cut it wrong. 我不小心剪错了。happen to: 意外地
  I accidentally cut this wrong.  
M Cut out the pictures from the magazine.  
  Want to cut it with the zigzag scissors? 你要用波浪形剪刀吗？
  Cut the colored paper and put it on the sketchbook.  
  When you're done with cutting, throw the shavings away. shaving: 剩余的纸屑
  Be careful! Your finger might get stuck between the scissors. 小心，你的手指可能会被剪刀夹住。
  Be careful when you're using a craft knife. craft knife: 美工刀
  Use the rule as a guide to cut that line. 沿着尺子来切这条线。
  Do you want to use a glue stick or liquid glue? glue stick <-> liquid glue
  Put the glue on the back. 把胶水涂在背面。
  It goes on well if you glue it evenly. 如果你涂得均匀，会很好贴上去。
  Oops! There is too much glue on here. 这里我涂的太多了。
S Eeek, the glue's sticky. 这浇水好粘啊。
  It keeps coming off. 它一直掉下来。
M Where do you want to put it on? 你想把它贴在哪儿？
  Roll the paper like this and paste it. 把纸卷起来后，在粘起来。
  Put the lid on tightly. 把盖子紧紧盖好。
  Make sure you put the lid back on the glue.  

粘土游戏（ch12-07.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Let's play with clay.  
  Get out the colored clay.  
  Rub it for a while, so it will mix well. 揉一段时间，以便让它混合得更好。
  Which shape do you want to make? / What do you want to make?  
D I am going to make a person.  
  The leg keeps coming off / bending. 腿一直掉下来/弯掉。
M Press it firmly with your hands. firmly: 紧紧地，确实地
  It's good to use a carving knife for this. carving knife: 雕刻刀
  The clay lump is too big. 这块粘土太大了。lump: 块
  Let's make it into a round shape. 我们来把它捏成圆形。
  Put a lump between your palms and roll it. 放一块在手掌，然后揉它。
  Try stretching it out. stretch sth. out: 伸长，展开
  Make the eyes, nose, and mouth and attach them on the face. attach: 贴
  You can use the molds to have different shapes. mold: 模子
  Don't press it too hard.  
  Your hands are all muddy. 你满手都是泥。
  Be careful not to get the mud on your clothes.  
  It got hardened already. 已经变硬了。
  We need to store the leftovers in an airtight bag. 我们必须把剩余的装进密封袋。

积木游戏（ch12-08.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Let's play with the blocks. 我们来玩积木吧。
  Get the blocks out. 把积木拿出来吧。
  Wow, all different shapes and colors!  
S Mom, I need a blue piece. 我需要一块蓝色的。
M Get the blue blocks together. get together: 放在一起
  Can you get me a square piece? 能给我一块正方形的吗？
  What do you want to make with the blocks?  
  Want to make a train?  
D This won't go in. These won't fit together. 这个放不进去。这些不合。
M Try to match them well. They lock together. 试着对起来看看，让他们彼此吻合。
  Put the blue block on top of the yellow one.  
  How many blocks can we stack? 我们可以叠几块积木？
  Want to see who can stack them higher?  
  You built a house! How nice!  
  Let's place them in one long line. 把积木配成一长列吧。
  Want to play dominos with the blocks? 想要用积木来玩多米诺骨牌吗？
  Don't throw the blocks even though it doesn't go your way. go one's way: 按照某人的想法
  Be patient and try it again.  
S Oops, it fell.  
  The wheel-shaped block is gone. wheel-shaped: 车轮形状的
  Mom, my tower is tilted. tilted: 倾斜的
  Do you want me to build something for you?  
  Can you leave it just the way it is now? 你可以把它像现在这样放着吗？

Chapter 13: 户外活动

游乐场（ch13-01.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
S I want to go to the playground.  
  Mom, I want to play on the playground.  
M Okay! Let's go out together.  
  Today is too cold to go out.  
  Shouldn't you do your homework first?  
S My friends are playing there.  
  Let's go down the slide.  
  I want to slide down the slide. 我想去滑滑梯。
  Can you hold me, Mom? 你能抓住我吗？
  I can slide down by myself.  
M You should not walk up the slide. 你不能从滑梯爬上去。
  Don't climb up too high.  
  Let's get on the seesaw. 我们去坐跷跷板吧。
  Mommy will get on the seesaw with you.  
  Do you want to swing? 你想荡秋千吗？
  Be careful when you pass around a moving swing. 当你经过摆动的秋千时要小心。
  Wheeeee! My honey's coming down. 哇哇，我的宝贝爬下来了。
S Push me harder / slower. 用力/轻轻推我。
M Hold on! It's going higher. 抓紧了！要更高了喔。
S Mom, you don't have to push me.  
  Can you stop the swing? I want to get off. 你可以帮我停住秋千吗？我想下来了。
  Look at me. I'm flying this high. 看，我飞得这么高。
  I feel like flying in the sky. feel like doing: 感觉像…
M My baby's going up to the sky! 我的宝贝飞到天上去了。
  It's dangerous to jump off the swing. 从秋千啥概念跳下来很危险。
S Mom, I'm scared to go up the top of the jungle gym. 妈，我害怕爬到攀爬架的顶端上。
M Want to see who can hang on the bar longer? 想要看谁能在单杠上吊更久吗？hang: 吊；bar: 单杠
  Mommy will sit on the bench.  
S You need to be looking at me. 你一定要看着我哦。
M Now let's go back to the house. 现在我们要回家了。
S Let's play a little bit more. 我们再多玩一会儿吧。
M Look around, Honey. Nobody's here anymore. 宝贝，你看看周围，已经没有人了。
  The other children must go back home already. 其他小孩一定已经回家了。

玩沙（ch13-02.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Let's go and play in the sandbox. 我们去沙池玩沙吧。
  Let's roll up our sleeves first. 我们先把袖子卷起来吧。
  Let's take off our shoes in the sand. 我们把鞋子脱掉吧。
  What do you want to do with the sand?  
D I'll put some sand in a bucket with a shovel.  
  Mom, draw a person in the sand. 在沙子上画人。
M Want to use a frame? Ta-da~ It's a star. 要用模型吗？嗒哒，这是星星。
  Let's build a sandcastle. sandcastle: 沙堡
  Wow, we made a nice castle.  
  Want to put some sand on your hands?  
  The sand is softly slipping through the fingers. 沙子轻轻地从指缝中滑落。
  How do you feel? Isn't it tickling your toes? 觉得如何？沙子是不是让你的脚趾痒痒的？
  Wow! Your feet are in the sand. 你的脚被沙子埋起来了。
D I made a cupcake with wet sand. cupcake: 杯子蛋糕
  Look! I made a sand cake.  
M Put your left hand in the sand. 把左手放进沙子里。
  Put some sand over your left hand and pat it with your right hand. 用沙子盖住你的左手，并用右手轻拍。
D I got sand in my eyes. 我眼睛进沙子了。
  A lot of sand got in my shoes. 我鞋子里进了很多沙子。
M Don't rub your eyes with a sandy hand. 不要用沾上沙子的手揉眼睛。
  Don't throw sand in other people's faces. 不要把沙子丢到别人脸上。
  No eating sand, Honey! 不要吃沙子。
  You got sand all over your face. 你脸上都是沙子。
  Shake off the sand on your shirt, hands, and feet. shake off: 抖掉
  Shake your shoes, too. 鞋子也要抖一抖。
  Let's clean off the sand at home. 我们回家把沙子洗掉吧。

玩球（ch13-03.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
S Let's play ball, Mommy.  
M Okay. I will throw the ball. 我来扔球。
  Catch the ball, Sweetie. 接住球。
  Here it goes! / Here we go! 好，去了。
  Throw it hard to Mom. 用力丢给妈妈。
S Ooops, I missed it. 我没接到。
  I happened to drop it. 我不小心掉了。
M The ball's rolling. 球滚走了。
  Mommy will get the ball. 妈妈来捡球。
  Go and get the ball. 去把球捡回来。
  Catch the ball with two hands. 用两只手接球。
  Put the ball between your legs. 把球夹在两腿之间。
  Throw the ball up high. 把球丢高。
  Hit the ball with your hand. 用手打球。
  Bounce the ball like this. 像这样拍球。
  Catch the ball from Daddy and throw it to Mommy. 从爸爸那儿接到球后丢给妈妈。
  Don't throw the ball. Roll it. 不要丢球了，来滚球吧。
Dad Wow! You can catch the ball very well.  
  It's my turn to throw the ball. 轮到我丢球了。
  Throw the ball far. 投远一点。
S Throw the ball to me.  
  Pass it to me. 把球传给我。
  Throw it back. 把球丢回来。
  Now it's my turn. 现在轮到我了。
  Don't throw it too far / hard, Dad.  
  I throw the ball this well. 我掷球掷得很好。
  See? I'm this good. 看！我很厉害吧。
Dad Look at where you're throwing the ball. 看着你要掷球的方向掷。
  Throw it harder. 掷得用力一点。

棒球（ch13-04.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
Dad Let's play baseball.  
  The pitcher throws the ball. 投手投球。
  The catcher catches the ball. 捕手接球。
  The hitter hits the ball. 打击手击球。
  Don't throw the ball at a person. 不可以把球往人身上丢。throw at: 瞄准…丢
  We need a glove to play baseball.  
S I want to be the batter. batter: 打击手 (= hitter)
  Daddy, you throw the ball.  
  Mommy, you catch the ball.  
  Throw it slowly. 丢慢一些。
M I'm be the umpire. umpire: 裁判
  Strike! / Ball! / Out! 好球 / 坏球 / 出局
  2 balls, 1 strike. 一个好球，两个坏球。
S It's a foul. 出界了。
Dad Three strikes and you're out. 三个好球，你出局了。
S Wow! It's a hit. 安打。
Dad Run to first base. 跑向一垒。
  The catcher missed the ball. 捕手没有接到球。
  Come to home plate. 回到本垒。
S We scored on run. 我们得一分。
  I was safe! It was not out. 我安全上垒了，不是出局。safe: 安全上垒
  I made it home before I got tagged. 在被触杀之前，我先回垒了。get tagged: 被触杀
  I stepped on home plate. I'm safe. 我踏上本垒了，我安全上垒了。
Dad Three to zero. 三比零。
  If the ball cross this line, let's say it's a homerun. 如果球超过这条线，我们就说这是全垒打。
  It's dangerous to swing the bat toward people. 把球棒挥向别人是很危险的。
  Stop the game when someone passes by. 有人经过时停止游戏。
  Hold the bat tightly. 握紧球棒。
  Look the ball carefully and hit it. 看好球再打。
  Wait until the last minute and swing the bat. 等到最后再挥棒。
  Don't close your eyes when the ball comes. 当球来的时候，不要闭眼。

足球（ch13-05.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
Dad Does anybody want to play soccer?  
  Let's say this is the goal. 把这个当做球门吧。
  Who wants to be the goalie? You be the goalie. 你当守门员吧。goalie = goalkeeper
S I'll be the striker. 我来当前锋。
  My back number is 11. 我的球衣号码是11.
  Pass to me. / Pass it to me. 传给我。
  Daddy's attacking. Go get him. 爸爸在进攻了，去阻止他。
Dad Kick the ball hard. 用力踢球。
  Dribble the ball. It's like kicking while running. 盘球。dribble: 盘球
  You can win by playing good defense. defense: 防守，防御
  That was close! That almost went in. 好可惜！几乎要进球了。
  We almost made it. 我们差点得分了。
  Try to get the ball from Daddy. 试着从爸爸那里截球。
  Let's make a plan.  
  We need to change players. 我们要交换选手。
  You can't catch the ball with your hands in soccer.  
  Only the goalie can use his hands.  
  It's a faul if you grab someone's shirt. foul: 犯规，违规
  If you push someone from behind, you'll be given a yellow card.  
  Wow! You can kick like Park Jisung.  
S I fell because I got tackled. 我因为被截球而摔倒了。
Dad Why are you a ball hog? You should pass the ball. ball hog: 不传球而独自踢球的人
  It's a tie. We are going to a shootout. shootout: 点球决胜
  Goal! Celebrate! 得分！来庆祝一下！

跳绳（ch13-06.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Let's play jump rope. / Let's jump rope. 来跳绳！
  Don't jump rope inside the house.  
  Will you go outside and jump rope?  
D I'll try to jump ten times.  
  Can you count how many jumps I can do?  
M One, two, three, oops! You got caught on the rope. 你被绳子绊住了。
D It keeps getting caught on my foot. get caught on sth.: 绊到，缠住
M The line's too long. I'll adjust the length. 绳子太长了，我来调整一下。
  Yesterday you jumped 3 times, and today you did 5 times.  
  You shouldn't wear slippers when you're jumpign rope.  
  Let's try jumping on one foot. 试着用单脚跳。
  Jump to the beat. 跟着拍子跳。to the beat: 跟拍子
  Let's jump rope to the rhythm. 跟着节奏跳。to the rhythm
M Use your wrists instead of arms to twirl the rope. 用手腕代替手臂来转绳子。
D Jumping crisscross is very difficult. 交叉跳真的很难。
M When the rope is above you, cross your arms. 当绳子在你上面时，把手臂交叉。
  Can you jump rope backward? 你可以往后跳吗？
D I can jump rope while running.  
  My stomach hurts after jumping rope.  
  The rope broke. 绳子断了。
  I don't think I can pass the jump rope test.  
  There's someone in our class who can do a double jump. double jump: 双跳
  The rope keep getting tangled. 绳子一直卷起来。
  My legs keep shaking. 我的腿一直发抖。
M Mom and Dad will turn the rope. You two go in and jump. 爸爸妈妈来甩绳子，你们两个进去跳。

骑脚踏车（ch13-07.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Do you want to ride a bike?  
  Let's learn how to ride a bike with two wheels.  
  Let's take off the training wheels. training wheels: 辅助轮
S Can you hold the bike so that I won't fall?  
  Promise you won't let go of it. let go of sth.: 放开…
  Don't let go of my bike, Mommy.  
  The bike keeps falling. 脚踏车一直倒掉。
M Don't be nervous.  
  Grab the handbars tightly. 抓紧把手。handbar: 把手，= handle
  Make sure you put on your helmet.  
  Turn the handle toward the left / right.  
  Step on the pedal hard. 用力踩踏板。
  Turn the pedal backward a little and then step forward. 把脚踏板往后转一点点，然后往前踩。
  Keep an eye on the road ahead. 看着前面的路。keep an eye on sth.: 持续看
  Watch out for cars coming. 小心车子。watch out for sth.: 小心…
  Be careful going downhill. downhill: 下坡
  Hold the brakes. 抓住刹车。
  Don't ride your bike on the road. 不要在车道上骑脚踏车。
  It's too fast. Hold down the brake lever slightly. hold down the brake lever: 捏刹车
  Don't grab the brake levers suddenly while riding fast. You could fall. grab the brake levers: 捏刹车
S See how fast I'm going. 看我骑的多快。
M Here we have a great bike rider! / Wow, you are a great rider.  
  Don't forget to put the lock on. 不要忘记上锁。

玩直排轮（ch13-08.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
D Mom, let's go inline skating.  
M You need to have your protection on. protection: 保护装备
  A helmet is a must. must: 必需品
  Wear your kneepads. 带上护膝。kneepad: 护膝
  Let's try walking. 我们试着走走看。
  Right foot, left foot! There you go. Good job!  
  Will you learn how to stop?  
  Raise your toes to put down the brake pad on the skate. 抬起脚趾，把直排轮的刹车皮触碰地板。
  Slowly come to a stop. 慢慢地停下来。
  The lower you sit, the more quickly you will stop. 坐得更低，你可以更快地停下来。
  Lower your body a little more.  
  Don't stand up straight. You'll lose your balance. 不要站太直，你会失去平衡。
  Don't be afraid to fall down. 不要害怕摔倒。
  Turn to your right. 转向右边。
  Do the skates fit well on your feet? 单排轮合脚吗？
  Your feet should be in a "V" formation. 双脚要成V字形。
D Mom, I'm scrared.  
  I feel like I'm going to fall. 我好像要摔倒了。
  Please hold me now. 请抓住我。
  Can I not put on m helmet? It's stuffy. 可以不戴安全帽吗？很闷。stuffy: 闷热的
M This is how to make a turn. 这样转圈。
  Lean your body in the direction that you want to turn. 身体倾向你转弯的方向。
  Take small steps with your inside skate at the same time. 同时内侧溜冰鞋要小步地迈出去。
  Push off with your outside skate. See? I just turned. 外侧溜冰鞋要推一下。
  Move your arms to help keep your balance. 摆动双手帮助保持平衡。
  You practiced hard today, too. 今天你努力练习了。
  Don't go riding off too far. 不要滑太远。
  You're doing great, Sweetie. 你做得很好。

做体操（ch13-09.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Take a deep breath and let it out slowly. 深呼吸，慢慢吐气。
  Breathe in. Breathe out. 吸气，吐气。
  Raise your arms up high. 双手举高。
  Shake your arms back and forth. 双手前后摆动。
  Roll your wrists. 转动手腕。
  Roll your neck counterclockwise. 逆时针转动你的脖子。
  Straighten your back. / Keep your back straight. 腰要挺直。
  Drop / Raise your head. / Put your head down / up. 低头/抬头。
  Bend your knees. 膝盖弯曲。
  Lower your chest and touch your ankle. 上半身下弯，触碰脚踝。
  Keep your hips back. 屁股往后翘。
  Stand with your feet shoulder length apart. 双脚与肩膀同宽。
  Relax your body. 身体放松。
  Touch your toes. 碰到你的脚趾。
  Sit down and put your legs together. 坐下，双脚并拢。
  Put your hands on the ground. 双手放在地上。
  Jog lightly. 轻轻地跑。
  Jog lightly in place. 原地轻轻跑。
  Follow me to the rhythm. 跟着妈妈的拍子。
  Look at me and do as I do. as I do: 根据我做的
  Doesn't your calf hurt? calf: 小腿 [kæf]
  Spin around. 转转看。
  Run while standing still. 保持上身直立原地跑。

Chapter 14: 其他游戏

唱歌（ch14-01.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M What song shall we sing?  
  What song would you like to sing?  
S Mom, will you sing me the ABC Song?  
  Mom, can you sing it again?  
  Can you sing me something else?  
M Want me to sing Three Bears to you?  
  Let's sing together. 我们一起唱。
  Sing out loud. out loud: 大声地
  Sing slowly / fast.  
  Let's practice well and sing in front of Daddy. 我们好好练习，去爸爸面前唱。
S Mom, listen to me sing. 听我唱歌。
M My baby may be the greatest singer in the world.  
  You can sing really well. 你真的很会唱歌。
  What's your favorite song, Sweetheart?  
  Want to change the words? 要不要改一下歌词？
  Mom will sing the first verse. You sing the second. verse: 节
  Sing to the beat. 跟着拍子唱。[ME: to the rhythm]
  You don't sing in the interlude. 间奏时不用唱。interlude: 间奏
  Gosh, you're out of tune. 你跑调了。out of tune: 跑调
  You can sing without missing a word. 你把歌词都唱对了。
  Ugh, you're tone deaf. tone deaf: 音盲的
S I forgot the words. 我忘词了。
  I don't know the lyrics.  
  Can you write me the lyrics?  
M You look like an angel when you sing.  
  You memorized that? Wow, that's amazing. memorize: 背; amazing: 厉害，棒
  I'm sorry. Mommy doesn't know that song.  

听CD（ch14-02.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Bring a CD that you want to listen to.  
  Mommy will turn on the power.  
  Put in / Take out the CD. 放进/拿出CD。
  What track should we listen to? 要听第几首？
  The volume is too low.  
  The sound's too loud. Turn it down.  
  That's just right. 刚刚好。
D Mom, the sound's too low.  
M Mommy can hear it well. 妈妈可以听得清楚。
  Want to listen to it with headphones? 要用耳机听吗？
  It's your favorite song, Sweetheart.  
  Press the start / stop button.  
  Want to stop and listen later?  
  Want to listen to it again?  
  Let's listen to it from the beginning. 从头开始听吧。
  Hold the CD like this. 像这样拿住 CD。
  Put your finger through the hole. 把手指穿进洞里。
  Gently hold the outer edge with your thumb. 用大拇指轻轻抓住外侧。
  Be careful not to scratch the CD. 小心不要刮到CD。
  Put the CD in the case.  
  Want to dance to the music? 要跟着音乐跳舞吗？[ME: to the beat/rhythm]
D Can you play another CD?  
  Can you play the song again?  
M Mommy loves this song.  

看电视（ch14-03.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
S Can I watch TV, Mom?  
  Pororo's going to start. Pororo 要开始了。
  Can you turn on the TV?  
M Press the green button on the remote.  
S Oops! It's already started. 已经开始了。
M Let's lower the volume. / Please turn it down. 音量调小一些。
S I can't hear. Turn it up, please. 调大声一点。
  It's too loud. Please turn down the volume.  
M Want Mommy to watch it, too?  
  Crong is really funny, isn't it?  
  Pororo was really fun today, wasn't it? 真好看。
  Is Pororo that fun, Honey? 那么有趣吗？
  Let's watch Pororo and then turn off the TV. 看完 Pororo 就关电视。
  It's over now. 现在结束了。
  Let's stop watching. 不要看了吧。
  It's not good to watch too much TV.  
S Mom, I want to watch Arthur.  
M Didn't you promise not to watch TV? 你不是答应我不看电视了吗？
  Let's watch only for 30 minutes.  
  You shouldn't whine just to watch more. whine: 发牢骚，嘀咕
S How much TV is too much TV? 看多久电视算很久呢？
M What program are you watching?  
  That drama isn't for kids.  
  Now turn it off. You can watch it again tomorrow.  
  I was worried because you watch too much TV. 我好担心。
  The TV seems to be broken. 电视好像坏掉了。

玩电脑游戏（ch14-04.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
S I'll play a few computer games.  
  Can't I play it a little bit more? 我不可以再玩一会儿吗？
M Play after you do your homework.  
  You have to do your homework after playing games.  
S I'll play for just 1 hour.  
M Click the left button on the mouse.  
  You control with the direction pad. 用方向键来控制。
  Can you turn down the speakers?  
  Stop playing now. 现在不要玩了。
  Your eyesight will get bad. eyesight: 视力
  When did you start playing?  
  You're grounded from playing games. be grounded from doing sth: 禁止做某事（作为处罚）
  You can't play computer games today.  
  Didn't you promise not to play any games?  
  Let's make it a rule to play only on weekends. make it a rule to do sth: 订规定
S I'm doing better than my friend. 我玩得比我的朋友好。
  I need to win this round. 我必须赢这一局。
M Playing too many games isn't good for you. 玩太多游戏对你不好。
  We should beware of the electromagnetic waves from the computer. beware of sth: 注意
S Mom, this game isn't fun. 这个游戏不好玩。
  I can't stop thinking of playing games. can't stop doing sth: 忍不住做某事

玩棋/牌/拼图（ch14-05.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Let's play board games / cards / puzzles. 我们来玩棋/牌/拼图。
  Let's divide teams. 我们来分组。
D We're a team. 我们是同一组。
M Let's decide by throwing the dice. 我们掷骰子决定。
  I'll be the black horse. You be the white horse. 我是黑棋，你是白棋。
  You need to obey the rules. 你一定要遵守规则。
  Let's choose the punishments. 我们来选择惩罚方式。
  You need to go one more block.  
  Please look and think. 看着，好好思考。
  You need to be punished because I won. be punished: 受罚
D Then what's the reward? 那么奖品是什么？
  I'm going to win next time. 下次我一定要赢。
  One more! Yay! I got the bonus. 我拿到积分了。
  You cheated! 你作弊！
  Don't peek at my cards. peek: 窥视
  One more round, please. 再来一局。
M I'm not going to let you win this time.  
  Don't be mad because you lost. 不要因为输了就发脾气。
  You can try hard and win next time.  
  Quickly. I can't wait all day. 我可不能等一整天。
  Don't urge me. I'm thinking. urge: 催
  It's your turn now. 现在轮到你了。
  Let's put these pieces together. 我们把拼图拼在一起吧。
  Start with this piece of the puzzle. 从这一块拼图开始。
  This could go there. / Look like this fits here. 这个好像跟这里相合。
  Wow, you're a puzzle king! / You're very good at solving puzzles.  

玩吹泡泡（ch14-06.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Will you play with bubbles?  
  Lightly blow into the straw. 轻轻吹吸管。
  Be careful not to spill the soap water. spill: 溅出，溢出
  Don't breathe in. 不要吸进去。
  Don't drink the soap water!  
  Look at the small bubbles.  
  Look! The bubble is a rainbow color. 这泡泡有彩虹的颜色。
  Wow, it's a huge bubble.  
  Want to pop it with your finger? pop: 使爆开
  Let me blow it for you. 我来帮你吹。
  The two got stuck together. 有两个粘在一起了。
  Make it go up by flapping your hands. 用手把它扇上去。flap: 拍动，用手扇
D The bubble's flying off high. 泡泡飞得好高。
  Mom, I want to blow it.  
M Wow! It's on top of my baby's head. 泡泡在宝贝的头上了。
  Catch this bubble. 抓住这个泡泡。
  Blow it inside the bathroom.  
  Want to blow it outside? 要到外面吹吗？
  Isn't it fun? 不是很好玩吗？
  You blow really well.  
  The floor is slippery. Be careful!  

『老师说』游戏（ch14-07.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Do you know how to play Simon says?  
S I forgot how to play.  
M Mommy will tell you again. Listen to it. 听好。
  It's simple. Just do what Simon says.  
  When Simon says, "Close your eyes," you do it.  
  But when I just say, don't listen to me. 但是当只是我说的话，就不用听。
  Let's start. Listen carefully.  
  Simon syas, "Clap your hands." 老师说：拍手。
  Good job.  
  Let's start again. "Raise your right leg." 『抬起你的右脚。』
  Oops, the order didn't start with "Simon says." 命令没有用『老师说』开始。
  Then you will lose. 那么，你输了。
  The loser should do the hip roll dance. 输的人要摇屁股跳舞。hip roll dance: 摇屁股跳舞
  Simon says, "Turn around!"  
  Simon says, "Touch your ears!"  
  Simon says, "Open your mouth!"  
  Simon says, "Put your left hand up!" 『举起左手』
  Simon says, "Shake your hips!" 『摇屁股』
S Oh, I got mixed up. get mixed up: 弄混
  Again, again, I can do well this time. 这次我可以做好。
M Pay attention and act. 想好再行动。
  Now you're it. 这次轮到你来当老师。
  Simon says, "Clap your hands!"  
  Did you think Mommy would get tricked? 你以为妈妈会被骗吗？get tricked: 被骗
  Oops, Mommy lost. 妈妈输了。
  I have to do the hip dance.  
S Mom, you're funny. 你好好笑哦。
经常出现的 Tip：老师说游戏

用英文说出 Simon Says 后，用命令句让对方做那个动作的游戏。

只有说 Simon Says 的时候，才能动，如果没有说 Simon Says 还跟着做动作的话，就输了。

Part 4: 试着用英文表达

Chapter 15: 心情和情绪

高兴的时候（ch15-01.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M How do you feel today? 你觉得今天如何？
D I feel happy / fine / great / good.  
  Hurray! Yey!  
  I'm glad you praised me. / I'm glad you said good things about me. 我好高兴你赞美我。
  I'm happy I did a good job on the test. 我考得很好。
  I feel best when you hold me.  
M Mom's really happy when you eat a lot of my food.  
  Mommy's glad that you're happy.  
  It is said that smiling spreads to other people. 据说笑是可以传播给其他人的
  A smiling face makes other people feel good. 笑容可以使其他人心情好。
  If you're happy, you make other people happy.  
  You made my day, Honey! 宝贝，因为你我今天过得很棒！

期待的时候（ch15-02.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
S I can't wait for summer vacation. summer vacation: 暑假
  I can't wait for the trip.  
  I can't wait for Saturday to begin.  
  I can't wait for vacation to begin.  
  I can't wait for my birthday.  
  How many more nights are left? 还剩下多少天呢？
  I'm happy that Grandma will come soon.  
  I'm happy that vacation has started.  
  Are we there yet? I can't wait. 我们到了吗？我等不及了。
D I'm really excited about today.  
  It's so thrilling to wait. 等待让人好兴奋。
  What present do you want?  
  I wonder what present I will get.  
  I'm so excited that I can't even sleep.  

伤心的时候（ch15-03.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
S I'm so sad. 我好难过。
  I was so sad that I couldn't stop my tears. 我太难过了，无法止住眼泪。
  I was so sad that I cried a lot.  
M I'm so sad that Mommy made you sad.  
  You look sad. What happened at school? 在学校发生什么事了？
S I'm sad because my friend has moved to another school. 我的朋友转学了。
M When you two brothers fight, Mommy's very sad.  
  When my son is sick, Mom's heartbroken. heartbroken: 心碎
  When my girl cries, Mom feels so bad.  
  Don't be sad. 不要难过。
  Don't cry, Minsu.  
S When you scold me, I'm very sad. scold: 骂
  When you get angry, I'm sad.  
  This is a very sad movie.  
  You need to comfort your friend when he's / she's sad. comfort: 安慰

心烦/失望的时候（ch15-04.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
D I'm really upset. / I feel bad. upset: 苦恼的，心烦
  I'm sorry that my friend has to leave now.  
  Mom, why do you favor my brother over me? I feel bad. favor A over B: 与B比更偏爱A
  I'm really disappointed. / It's really disappointing.  
  I'm disappointed in you, Mom. / I feel bad because of you, Mom. 我真的对你很失望。
  I'm disappointed you forgot to bring any presents.  
M Are you disappointed very much? 你很失望吗？
  Talk to your friend when you're upset.  
  If you're upset because of Mommy, please tell me.  
  Don't feel so bad. You can do better next time.  
  Don't make me disappointed, please. 不要让我失望。
  You seem devastated because you were waiting for it all day long. 你等了一整天，看起来相当灰心。devastated: 受打击

生气的时候（ch15-05.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
S I'm really angry.  
  I'm getting angrier. 我越来越生气了。
  I'm so angry that I can't calm down. 我因为太生气而无法冷静下来。
M What's wrong? / What's the matter? 发生什么事了吗？
  What made you that angry?  
  Why are you mad, Honey?  
S Yonsuo keeps bugging me / making me mad. Yongsuo is driving me crazy. 他一直让我生气。
M If you keep doing it, I'm going to get angry. 如果你继续那样的话，我会生气的。
  Stop it! Mom will get angry. 停止！我要生气了。
  I'm really angry now. Okay? 现在我真的生气了，知道吗
S Mom, are you feeling really bad? 你真的生气了吗？
  I hope you feel fine now, Mom. 我希望你现在消气了。
  Don't get angry, Mom. 不要生气。
  I'm scared when you're angry. 你生气的时候我会害怕。
  It's really scary when my mom gets angry. 妈妈生气时真的很恐怖。
  I get annoyed by my friend. / One of my friends is really annoying. 我被朋友激怒了。
  I get angry because he doesn't understand me. 因为他听不懂我的话。
M You need to deal with your anger / temper. 你需要管理你的情绪。
  Calm down. / Get over it! 镇定下来。
  You're so short-tempered. 你很容易生气。
  Why do you get easily bothered? 为什么你很容易被激怒？
  Don't lose your temper like that. lose one's temper: 发脾气; temper: 性格，脾气
  Don't act like that even if you're angry. 就算生气也不能做出那样的举动。
  You shouldn't throw things when you're angry.  
  Getting angry won't solve anything. 生气不能解决任何问题。
  Once you are angered, it's not easy to get over it. get over: 解脱，克服
  Why do you get angry with me? 你为什么对我生气？
  You look ugly when you get angry. / You look ugly when you're upset.  
Tip: 表达情绪

中文的『依依不舍、伤心、闷』等等，很难用英文直译。但使用『I'm sorry』来表达还是说得过去。（sorry 在感到后悔，或是同情对方等时候使用）。比『sorry』更强烈一点的表达是 I'm upset, 或是 I feel bad。更加强烈的是 I feel devastated，意思是『灰心』。还有 I feel frustrated 也是更加强烈的意思，意思是『感到挫折』。I feel disappointed 的意思是『失望』，如 I'm disappointed in you 是直接表达对人的失望，也是很严重的表达，使用时要小心。

惊吓的时候（ch15-07.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
Dad Peek-a-boo! 哇！（突然出现大声吓人）
  Oh my gosh! / Oh my goodness! 天呀！
  Ta-da~! Surprise! 惊喜来了！
  Were you surprised? 你被吓到了吧？
  You scared me! / You surprised me! / You're freaking me out! Note: 关系亲密时才可以用 freaking me out
D You made me surprised, Dad. 你吓到我了。
  I am surprised that Dad came. 爸爸突然出来，我被吓到了。
  I was so surprised that I almost passed out. pass out: 昏倒
  Mom, how come you're not surprised? 为什么你没有被吓到？
M I'm surprised to hear you say such a thing. 你说出那样的话让我感到吃惊。

害怕的时候（ch15-07.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
D I'm scared.  
  I'm scared / afraid of the dark. 我很怕黑。scared: 恐惧的, afraid: 害怕的，担心的
  I'm afraid to go alone.  
  I'm afraid to be alone.  
  I'm afraid to sleep alone.  
  I'm afraid to get a shot. 我害怕打针。
  I'm afraid to go to the dentist. 我害怕看牙医。
  I'm trembling in fear. 我怕的直发抖。
  I'm getting goosebumps. 我起鸡皮疙瘩了。
  It's creepy. 令人毛骨悚然。
  I'm shivering. 我在发抖。
M Don't be scared, Honey.  
  You don't need to be afraid. / There is no need to be afraid. 你不需要害怕。
  Are you scared?  
S I'm not scared at all. 我一点也不害怕。
M You are very brave, my son!  
  What are you scared of / afraid of? 你在害怕什么？
S Ghosts and monsters are scary. 幽灵和怪物
M There are no ghosts in the world. 世界上没有幽灵。
  There are no such things as ghosts or monsters. 没有幽灵和怪物这种东西。
S Hold me so that I don't get scared.  
M Get brave! 拿出勇气！
  Be strong! 要坚强！
  You have a family behind you. 家人都在后面支持你。
  Mom and Dad will be beside you. 爸爸妈妈都会在你身边。
  Mom and Dad will protect you. 爸爸妈妈都会保护你。

担心/后悔（ch15-08.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
D I'm worried it might rain. / I'm afraid that it will rain. 我担心会下雨。
  I'm afraid to make mistakes. 我担心会犯错。
  I'm afraid Mom won't get better soon. 我担心妈妈不会很快好起来。
  I'm worried that I messed up the exam. 我担心考试考砸了。mess up sth.: 弄糟
  I'm worried because Minxi wouldn't talk to me. 我担心Minxi不再跟我说话。
M Don't worry too much. / Don't be too anxious. 不要担心太多。anxious: 不安，焦虑
  You don't need to worry. 你不需要担心。
D I should have studied hard. 我当时应该用功读书的。should have+过去分词: 应该…（对过去发生的事情悔恨）
  I should have listened to Mom.  
  I shouldn't have bought this toy.  
  I'm so sorry that I didn't listen to you, Mom.  
M It's no use being sorry now. 现在后悔也没用了。
  Study hard now, or you will feel sorry later. 现在要用功读书，不然你以后会后悔的。

疲劳/压力（ch15-09.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
S I'm tired. / I'm tired out. 我累了。
  I'm so tired that I want to take a rest.  
  I feel faint. / I feel like I'm going to collapse. 我好像要昏倒了。faint: 头昏; collapse: 累倒
  I'm stressed out. 我感觉到有压力。
  Don't stress me out. / Don't bother me. 不要给我压力。
  The homework is really stressful. 这个作业真的让我好有压力。
M Don't get stressed out. / Don't let things stress you. 不要觉得有压力。
  Let's do something to ease our stress. 我们做些什么来解除压力吧。
  We have to get rid of our tension instantly. 我们应该即时舒解压力。tension: 压力, 紧张

Chapter 16: 描述个性

性格好（ch16-01.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
S Suhong is nice / generous. / Suhong is a good person. 人很好。
  Suhong is kind. 他很亲切。
  Suhong is nice to everyone.  
  Suhong has good manner. 他很有礼貌。
  Suhong is caring / thoughtful. 他很为别人着想。
  Suhong is very understanding. 他很能理解他人。
  Suhong is very positive. 他很正向。
  Suhong is friendly. 他很友善。
  Suhong gets along well with his friends. 他跟朋友们相处得很好。
  Suhong is sincere. 他很诚实。
  Suhong is responsible. 他很有责任感。

性格不好（ch16-02.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
D Suji acts as if she knows everything.  
  Suji is just showing off. show off: 炫耀
  Suji is bragging all the time. brag: 吹牛
  Suji likes to stand out. Suji 喜欢引人注目。stand out: 引人注目
  Suji is arrogant. arrogant: 自大的
  Suji tries to control everything. / Suji likes to boss people around. boss around: 高傲地指挥
  Suji is very selfish.  
  Suji doesn't care about others. Suji不知道要替他人着想。
  Suji only thinks about herself. Suji只想到自己。
  Suji is picky about everything. Suji每件事都很挑剔。
  Suji is greedy.  
  Suji is ill-mannered. Suji很没礼貌。
  Suji uses bad words. Suji会说脏话。
  Suji bullies on others. / Suji picks on others. Suji会欺负别人。
  Suji blames others for her own faults. Suji会把自己的过错推给别人。blame sb. for sth.
  Suji is a copycat. Suji只会模仿别人。

性格内向（ch16-03.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
S My brother is very shy.  
  My brother is a bit introverted. 我弟弟有点内向。introverted: 内向的
  My brother is timmid. 胆小
  My brother is reserved. 沉默寡言
  My sister is kind of quiet. 我妹妹有点安静。
  My sister is gentle and quiet. 我妹妹很温和安静。
  My sister is a bit blunt. 我妹妹有点迟钝。
  My sister doesn't like to stand out. 我妹妹不喜欢引人注目。
  It's embarrassing. 真叫人难为情。
M Be more confident. 有自信一点。
  Don't hide behind my back.  
  Don't whisper. 不要窃窃私语。whisper: 耳语
  Say it louder. 大声说。
  You need to say what you want clearly. 你必须把你想要的东西清楚地说出来。
  You need to say "Hi" to adults clearly. 你应该好好地跟大人打招呼。

性格外向/活泼（ch16-04.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
D My brother is really active. 我哥哥很活泼。
  My brother is really sociable. 我哥哥很擅长交际。sociable: 擅长交际的
  My brother is an outgoing person. 我哥哥是很外向的人。outgoing: 外向的
  My brother is very active in everything. 我哥哥对每件事都很积极。
  My brother does everything with confidence. 我哥哥做每件事都很有自信。
  My brother always leads others. / My brother is a good leader.  
  I want to be active like my sister.  
  My sister is not afraid to speak her mind. 我姐姐一点也不害怕说出自己的想法。
  Sumin is popular among her friends. Sumin在朋友们中很受欢迎。
  Minsu talks a lot. / Minsu is very talkative. Minsu很健谈。talkative: 多话的
  Wushang always follows the rules. Wushang总是遵守规定。
  Wushang is not flexible in his way of thinking. Wushang的思考模式没有变通性。
  Wushang does not easily change the way he thinks. Wushang的思考模式没有变通性。
  Wushang gets strongly obsessed by some things. Wushang对某些事超级着迷。
  Stop being so stubborn. 不要那么不听话。
  Don't be too stubborn. 不要太倔强。
  I wonder who you're like by being so stubborn. 你到底是像谁才会这么倔强？

意志薄弱（ch16-05.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
D Minsu is not very active in everything. 对每件事都不是很积极。
  Minji is somewhat wishy washy. 有点优柔寡断。whishy washy: 优柔寡断的
  Minji can't decide anything. / Minji is indecisive. 无法自己做决定。
  Minji is very weak-minded. 意志不坚定。
  Minji is likely to do as she is told by others. 很容易被他人主导。
  Minji is easily led by others. 很容易被他人主导。

性格文静/急躁（ch16-06.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Minji is very calm. / Minji is careful. 很谨慎
  Minji is calm. / Minji is not hasty. 很镇定。
  Minji is very patient. 很有耐心。
  Minji is such an easygoing person. 很随和。
  Minji has a laid-back nature. 很随和。laid-back: 悠闲的
  Minji is slow in everything. 做什么都很慢。
Dad Minsu is impatient. / Minsu is hasty. 很急躁。
  Minsu is hot-tempered / short-tempered. 很容易生气。
  Minsu is kind of sensitive. 有些敏感。
  Minsu is easily distracted. 很容易注意力不集中。

性格固执（ch16-07.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Wushang is stubborn.  
  Wushang is as stubborn as a mule. 固执得很驴一样。
  Wushang is out of control if he does not get his way. 如果事情没有按照他的意思，他就会失去控制。get one's way: 按照某人的意思
  Wushang wants everything to go his way. 希望事情都要顺着自己的心意。

Tip: 表示性格的表达

active 活跃的，积极的，活泼的 <-> passive: 被动的
aggressive 进取的
arrogant 傲慢的，自大的，自负的
bad-tempered 易怒的，恶劣的
blunt 迟钝的
brave <-> cowardly: 胆小的
bossy 爱指使他人的
brutal 残酷的，恶毒的
calm 镇定的，冷静的
careless 草率的，不细心的
clever 聪明的，伶俐的，有才能的
cold-blooded 冷酷的 <-> warm-hearted
competitive 竞争欲强烈的
conservative 保守的 <-> liberal
considerable 深思熟虑的，关怀的 ~ thoughtful
courageous 有勇气的 ~ brave
creative 创造性的，有创意的
critical 批判的，刁难的
cruel 残忍的
cunning 狡猾的
diligent 勤劳的，勤奋的，尽心的 ~ industrious
dishonest 不诚实的 <-> honest
disorganized 没有规划的 <-> organized: 有系统的
easygoing 随和的，懒的，悠闲的 ~ lazy
foolish 笨的，傻瓜一样的
frank 真诚的，坦白的
funny 好笑的，滑稽的，奇异的
generous 宽大的，宽厚的，慷慨的
good-natured 温和的，温顺的
gentle 文雅的，温和的
greedy 贪心的，欲望很多的
hardworking 勤劳的
honest 正直的，诚实的，单纯的 <-> dishonest
hot-tempered 性急的，易怒的
humane 有人情味的，仁慈的
humorous 幽默的
impatient 不耐烦的 <-> impatient: 有耐心的
impolite 无礼的，粗鲁的 <-> polite
imprudent 鲁莽的 <-> prudent
jealous 嫉妒的，猜忌的
kind 亲切的，和蔼的 <-> unkind
lazy 懒惰的，慵懒的
mean 卑鄙的，吝啬的
merciful 慈悲的
modest 谦虚的，审慎的，端庄的
moody 情绪化的 ~ capricious: 变化无常的，任性的
naughty 无礼的，顽皮的，淘气的
negligent 随便的，粗心的
notorious 恶名昭彰的
outgoing 外向的，善交际的 ~ sociable
polite 恭敬的，客气的，有礼貌的
practical 实际的，踏实的
liberal 进步的 <-> conservative
prudent 慎重的
punctual 守时的
reliable 可信赖的 ~ dependable, trustworthy
reserved 寡言的，含蓄的
right 正确的，准确的，公正的
rude 无礼的，粗俗的 ~ impolite
ruthless 无情的，残忍的
selfish 自私的
sensible 明智的，通情理的
shy 羞怯的
silly 愚蠢的，糊涂的
simple 单纯的
sincere 真诚的 <-> insincere
socialble 善交际的 <-> unsociable
stingy （特别指钱的方面）小气的
strict 严格的
stubborn 顽固的，固执的，倔强的
stupid 愚蠢的，笨的
sweet 逗人喜爱的
sympathetic 富有同情心的
talented 有能力的 ~ able
talkative 健谈的
thoughtful 深思熟虑的，有同理心的
thougtless 欠考虑的，不顾他人的
timid 胆小的，没有勇气的
ungrateful 不知感恩的，忘恩负义的 <-> grateful: 感恩的
unkind 刻薄的，不亲切的 <-> kind
warm-blooded 热情的 ~ ardent
warm-hearted 有同情心的，热心的 <-> cold-blooded
wise 贤明的，有智慧的

Chapter 17: 喜欢的/讨厌的

喜欢/讨厌的食物（ch17-01.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M What's your favorite food?  
  What's your least favorite food? 你最不喜欢的食物是什么？
S I like bulgogi the best. / My favorite food is bulgogi.  
  I love Zhajiangmian the most.  
  I like Chinese food.  
  All of your food is delicious, Mommy. 你煮的菜都很好吃。
  I don't like Japanese food very much.  
  I don't like curry and rice very much. 我不太喜欢咖喱饭。
  I don't want to eat any vegetables.  
  I hate mushrooms. 我讨厌蘑菇。
  I've never tried duck. 我从没吃过鸭肉。
  I can't eat curry because it's too spicy. 我没办法吃咖哩，因为它太辣了。
  I can't eat spicy food very well yet. 我还不太能吃辣的食物。
M Mommy's happy when I watch you eat. 妈妈看着你吃就觉得很幸福。
  I'm happy since you ate well.  
D Will you order me a pizza? 你会帮我订披萨吗？
  I want to eat pork cutlet, Mom. Let's eat out. 去外面吃吧。pork cutlet: 日式炸猪排
  Can I have one more piece / spoonful? 我可以再多吃一块/一勺吗？
  It's very delicous.  
  It's sweet. 好甜。
