  This is my kind of food. 正合我的胃口。

喜欢/讨厌的衣服（ch17-02.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
D I want to wear a red dress. 我想穿红色洋装。
  I really like the dress. 我很喜欢这件洋装。
  This shirt is really pretty. 这件衬衫真的很美。
M The skirt and shirt match really well. 这件裙子和衬衫真的很搭。
  Wow! I like your hat!  
  It looks really good on you. looks really good on sb.: 真的很适合
  The color of the sweater looks good on you. 这件毛衣的颜色很适合你。
D I like stripes on clothes. 我喜欢有条纹的衣服。
  I want to wear socks with lace on them. 我要穿有蕾丝的袜子。
  I like skirts more than pants.  
  My friends say that this is pretty.  
  Princess dresses are popular. 公主洋装很受欢迎。
  Mom, will you buy me a princess dress?  
  Buy me a shirt with Winnie the Pooh on it. Winnie the Pooh: 小熊维尼
M Are you going to wear that every day? 你每天都要穿那件吗？
  Didn't you wear that yesterday? 你昨天不是穿了那件衣服吗？
  You really like those clothes, don't you?  
D I don't want to take this off. 我不要把这件脱下来。
  I like this the most. 我最喜欢这件。
  I don't like to wear skirts.  
  I hate these pants. They are not comfortable. 它穿起来不舒服。

喜欢/讨厌的人（ch17-03.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Who is your best friend in class? 班上谁是你最好的朋友？
S Jina is my best friend.  
  I want to be friends with Minsu. 我想和Minsu成为朋友。
  I like my partner / deskmate. 我喜欢我的同桌。
M Tell me about your best friend.  
S I like her because she's pretty and nice.  
  I like him because he's kind and handsome.  
  I like to marry Jina when I grow up.  
  We are perfect for each other. 我们非常适合彼此。
D Songjin understands my feelings. Songjin很了解我的感受。
  I'm proud of my friend. 我以我的朋友为荣。
  I liked her from the moment we met first. from the moment: 从…开始
  I want to write well like my friend. write well: 很会写字
  Can I invite her to my house? 我可以邀请她到我们家吗？
M Is your teacher nice to you? 你的老师对你好吗？
  Why do you like the teacher?  
  Who's your role model? role model: 榜样
D I respect Marie Curie. Marie Curie: 居里夫人
  I want to be a scientist like Marie Curie.  
S My favorite singer is Rain.  
  Shiny's dancing and singing is cool. Shiny的歌舞都很酷。
  I want to sing well like that singer. sing well: 很会唱歌
D I don't want to play with Suji.  
  I don't like the English teacher because she is very scary.  
  I don't like the teacher because he is too strict. 因为他太严厉了。
  I don't like anyone who nags me. 我讨厌任何人对我唠叨。
  I don't like the girl over there. She is mean to me. 他对我很不好。

讨厌做的事（ch17-04.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
D I don't feel like eating. feel like doing: 想做…
  Why should I bother to do that? bother to do sth.: 费心做…
  I don't want to do it because it's boring.  
  Can you do it for me, Mom?  
  Can't you let Jianmin do it instead of me? 你不能让Jianmin代替我去做吗？
S I don't want to brush my teeth.  
  Why do I have to brush my teeth?  
  Don't ask me to do this and that. 不要叫我做这做那的。
  I don't want to go. 我不想去。
  Can I not do my homework?  
  Can I not do what I don't want to do? 我可以不做我不想做的事吗？
  I still have to do it even if I don't want to? 即使我不想做，也一定要做吗？
  I'll do it later. 我等一下再做。
M Don't just say "No!"  
  You need to do it even if you don't want to. 即使不想做，你也一定要做。
  I hope you won't feel sorry for this. 我希望你不会因此而后悔。feel sorry: 后悔
  If you don't do this now, you'll be in a rush. 如果你现在不做这件事，你以后会手忙脚乱。

Chapter 18: 外貌

帅气/美丽的外表（ch18-01.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
S He is very handsome. / He is a good-looking boy. 他很帅。
  He is a beautiful boy. 他是美男子。
  He is a boy of noble appearance. 他长得像贵公子
D He is so cute. / He is such a cute-looking boy. 他好可爱。
  She is pretty. 她很美。
  He is a handsome boy. / She is a pretty girl. 俊男/美女
  He / She looks like a movie star. 长得像电影明星
  He / She is a very stylish person. 他是个很时尚的人。
M My son is more handsome than him. 我儿子比他帅。
  I think my daughter is prettier than her.  
  My girl is this pretty! Who do you look like? 你长得像谁呢？
D I just look like you, Mom. 我长得像你。

平凡的外表（ch18-02.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
D He is not really handsome. 他长得不是很帅。
  She is not really pretty. 她长得不是很漂亮。
  He / She just has a common look. 长得平凡
  He / She looks kind of ugly. 看起来算丑的。
  I have dark eyes. 黑眼睛
  I have black hair. 黑头发

身材（ch18-03.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
S My mom is slender. slender: 苗条
  Her face is round. 脸圆
  Her head is small. 头小
  He has a big head.  
  He has dark eyebrows. 深色的眉毛
  He has dimples. dimple: 酒窝
  Her face is white. 脸白
  Her skin is fair. 皮肤很白
  Her face is dark. 脸黑
  Her skin is very soft. 肤嫩
  Her skin is not healthy. / Her skin is not clean. 皮肤不好

有特色的外表（ch18-04.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
S He's got a pointed forehead. 他的额头突出。pointed: 突出的
  He has a long jaw. 他的下巴长。
  His ears are extremely long.  
  He has pimples. pimple: 青春痘
  He has freckles. freckle: 雀斑
  She has a dot next to her mouth. dot: 痣
  She has a sharp look. / She looks sharp. 她的外表很有型。
  She looks nice and warm. 她看起来人很好。
  My mother stays in good shape. 我妈妈的身材很好。
  My mom has a curvy shape. / My mom has an hourglass figure. 我妈妈有S曲线。curvy: 曲线美；hourglass: 沙漏
  My mom is overweight. / My mom is big. 我妈很胖。（千万不要使用 fat！）
  My mom is a bit plump. 我妈妈有点丰满。
  My dad looks jacked. / My dad is a muscleman. 我爸爸是肌肉男。
  My dad has a big belly. 我爸的肚子很大。
  My dad is too skinny. 我爸太瘦了。

脸部长相（ch18-05.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
D He has big / small eyes.  
  His eyes have creases. 他有双眼皮。crease: 皱褶
  She has a high nose. 她的鼻子很挺。
  She has a flat nose. 她有个塌鼻子。
  Her nose is a little flat.  
  His nose is big.  
  His mouth is small / big.  
  Her face is egg shaped. / She has an oval face. 她是鸭蛋脸。oval: 椭圆形的
  Her face is long.  
  She has an attractive smile. 她的微笑很吸引人。
  She looks sullen and unfriendly. 她的脸很臭，也不友善。sullen: 绷着脸的，满脸不开心的

发型（ch18-06.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
D My hair is curly / a little curly. 卷头发
  My hair is straight. 直发
  I have a lot of hair. 头发很多
  My hair is thin. 头发很少
  My hair is long / short.  
  My hair is stiff. 头发硬
  My hair is silky and smooth. 头发像丝绸般顺滑。silky: 丝绸般的
  I got my hair permed. 烫头发
  My hair is short in length. 短发
  I got my hair cut short. 把头发剪短
  I like my hair long and straight. 头发又长又直
  I like my hair short. 喜欢留短发
  My brother has a crew cut. crew cut: 平头
  My dad has a lot of gray hair. white hair 是全白的头发，gray hair 则是带灰色的白发
  My grandpa is bald. 秃头
  Can I pull out your gray hairs, Dad? 拔白头发

个头/身高（ch18-07.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
S He is tall / short.  
  He is 130cm tall. centimeters: 非缩写时要注意使用复数
  He's taller than 140cm. / He's over 140cm tall. 身高超过140公分
  She is shorter than 120cm. / She is not even 120cm tall. 身高不够120公分
  She is taller / shorter than her peers. 比同年纪的高/矮
  She's short and skinny. 又矮又瘦
M Let's see how tall your are. 看看你有多高
  You grew more in such a short time. in such a short time: 在很短的时间内
  You grew 1cm. 长高了1公分
  You're a little taller / shorter than Jina. 比Jina高一点/矮一点
S I want to be taller. 我想再高一点。
M Who's the tallest in your class?  
S Minsu is the tallest in your class.  
  I want to be tall like Dad. 我想长得和爸爸一样高。
  I wish I could be taller. 我希望我再高一点就好了。I wish 主语+过去式: 希望…就好了
  I'm jealous of tall people. 我嫉妒高的人。jealous of sb.: 嫉妒，吃醋
M Your height is perfect. 你的身高刚刚好。
  You'll grow more if you eat much. 如果你好好吃饭，会长得更快。
  You need to drink milk to grow taller. 多喝牛奶才能长的更高
  You need to go to sleep early to grow taller.  
  There are people who grow late. 也有人长得比较慢。
  Mom also began to get taller late. / Mom also had a late growth spurt. 妈妈也是后来才长高的。growth spurt: 快速长高的时期

体重/减肥（ch18-08.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
D I am overweight. 我很胖。
  I weigh 20kg. kg = kilograms
M Let's measure your weight. 量体重
  Step on the scale. scale: 体重计
  You've lost / gained weight. 体重增加/减少
  It looks that you've gained weight.  
  You weigh a lot / a little. 很重/不太重
  You look good because you're slim. 苗条
  You are pleasingly plump. 你丰满得好看。plump: 丰满
D I like to stay in good shape. 保持健康体态
  I want to lose weight. 减肥
M You are not overweight at all. 你一点都不胖。
  You should lose weight by exercising. 通过运动减肥
  You need some workouts to lose weight. 运动减肥。workout: 运动
  You should go on a diet. go on a diet: 减肥，节食？
  Try to eat less from now on.  
  Don't eat too many snacks now. 不要吃太多零食
  You need to gain weight. 应该增重
  You don't need to lose weight.  
  It's bad to starve to lose weight. 通过挨饿来减肥很不好。starve: 挨饿
D I can get fat even from drinking water. 我喝水也会胖。
  My friends call me a fatty. 朋友叫我胖子。fatty: 胖子
M It's bad to make fun of people for their looks. 取笑别人的外表不好。make fun of: 取笑
  Obesity is bad for your health. / Being overweight is bad for your health. 超重对健康有害。obesity: 过胖，超重

烦恼外表（ch18-09.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
D I want to be taller. 想要更高
  I want my skin to be whiter. 皮肤更白
  I want my hair to be longer. 头发更长
  I want to be prettier. 变得更美
  I wish my eyes were bigger. 眼睛更大
  Am I ugly, Mom?  
M You're pretty enough. 够美
  You're adorable the way you are. 你这样就很可爱。adorable: 可爱的
D I'm jealous of my pretty friends. jealous of sb.: 嫉妒
M What's inside you is more important than what's outside. 内在比外在更重要。
  Don't judge people by their looks. / Don't judge a book by its cover. 不要以貌取人
D It seems like I have Mom's and Dad's bad traits. 我好像遗传了爸妈的缺点。trait: 特征
M You have your own charm. 你有自己的魅力。
D I want to wear pretty clothes.  
M Clothes have to be clean. 衣服干净就可以了。

美国的重要纪念日

母亲节 Mother's Day

美国，五月第二个星期日是 Mother's Day。这一天，孩子们给妈妈准备卡片或礼物来表达感谢之情。跟台湾不同的是，美国的母亲节不只是跟自己的亲生妈妈表达感谢，对奶奶、阿姨、姑妈、叔父、朋友、朋友、邻居等等只要是妈妈的人们，都可以献上礼物、卡片、花来表达感谢。而六月的第三个星期日是 Father's Day，跟台湾取爸爸的谐音而定在八月八日的情况不同。

常用的会话句子
Happy Mother's Day!  
When is Mother's Day?  
It's on the second Sunday in May. 五月的第二个星期日
Mom, this is my gift for you.  
I wrote this card for you, Mom.  
阵亡将士纪念日 Memorial Day

这个节日相当于台湾的军人节，但更针对阵亡的美军官兵，此日是在五月最后一个星期日。这一天是为了追思为国家参加战争而失去生命的人们。在日常生活中也表示这天之后就是夏天的开始。美国的夏天有超过十周的暑假，也是家族旅行的时期。

常用的会话句子
Memorial Day is celebrated on the last Monday of May. 五月的最后一个星期天
Americans are thankful for the people who died for their nation on this day. 美国人在这一天向为国捐躯的人们表达感谢。
It marks the beginning of summer. 这节日意味着夏天的开始。
Summer vacation usually starts around Memorial Day. 暑假开始的日子通常跟阵亡将士纪念日很近。

Part 5: 不同情况的生活会话

Chapter 19: 打招呼/感谢/道歉

见面时的打招呼（ch19-01.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
S Hello, Minsu!  
  Hello!  
  Good morning! / Good afternoon! / Good evening! 早安/午安/晚安
  How are you? 你好吗？
  How's everything going? 一切顺利吗？
  Nice to meet you, Jina.  
  Long time no see!  
  Good to see you again.  
  Are your parents fine? 你父母好吗？
  Is your brother / sister well? 你兄弟/姐妹好吗？
M Nice to see you. 很高兴见到你。
  How do you do? 你好吗？
  I've heard a lot about you. 我听说了许多有关你的事情。
  Fancy meeting you here. 很高兴在这里见到你。
  What brings you here? 什么风把你吹来的？
  I didn't expect I would see you here. 我没想到在这里会遇到你。
  Let's shake hands.  
  It's been quite a while since we met. 离上次见面已经有一段时间了。
  I missed you. 我很想你。
  Why didn't you keep in touch? 为什么你没有保持联络？

分开时的打招呼（ch19-02.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
S Goodbye.  
  See you again. 下次见。
  See you later. 晚点见。
  Good night. See you in the morning. 晚安。明天早上见。
  Bye. See you then. 白白。到时见。
  See you on Monday. 周一见。
  Take care. 保重。
  Have a good weekend. 周末愉快。
D See you next week. 下周见。
  Have a good day. 祝你有美好的一天。
  I'm going to miss you. 我会想你的。
  Say hi to your Mom for me. 代我向你妈妈问好。
  Let's keep in touch.  
  Call me when you get home. 到家后打电话给我。
  Text me when you get home. / Give me a text message when you get home. 到家后发短信给我。
  Email me. / Write me.  
  I don't want to say goodbye. 不想说再见
  I've enjoyed your company. 我很开心有你的陪伴。
  I won't forget you. 我不会忘记你。

感谢的表达（ch19-03.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
S Thank you.  
  Thank you very much.  
  I'm so grateful for that. 我真的很感谢那件事。
  Thank you for the compliment. 谢谢你的称赞。compliment: 称赞，表扬
  Thank you. I'll pay you back. 我会回报你的。
M It's fine. 没关系。
  No problem. / It was not a big deal. 这没什么。
  You're welcome.  
D Thank you for helping me.  
  Mom, thank you for everything. 妈妈，谢谢你的一切。
  Thank you for everything you've done for me. 谢谢你为我做的一切。
M I'm the one who should say thanks. 我才是要说谢谢的人。
D I don't know how to thank you.  
  Here's a little present. 这里有个小礼物。
  I want to express my thanks. 我想表达我的感激之情。
  It's a thank-you note. 这是感谢信。
M It's a great present. 这礼物太棒了。
  Say thank you to your brother.  
  You should learn to say thanks. 你应该学习说谢谢。

道歉（ch19-04.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
S I'm sorry, Mom.  
  I'm really sorry.  
M It's okay. / No problem. 没关系。
  Don't worry. 别担心。
S I'm sorry I'm late.  
  I'm sorry. It was my fault. 是我的错。
M Never mind. 不用在意。
  Just forget it. 就忘记它吧。
D Mom, forgive me please. 请你原谅我。
  I'm sorry for the trouble I've caused. 我很抱歉造成这样的麻烦。
M That's not a problem. 那不是问题。
S I didn't mean to do that. 我不是故意的。
  It was a mistake. 这是个失误。
M I'll forgive me. 我会原谅你的。
  I'll pay for it. 我会赔的。
  Say sorry to your sister.  
  Appoligizing isn't something to be shy of. 道歉不是丢脸的行为。
  Just saying sorry isn't enough. 仅仅说道歉是不够的。
  Adults also make mistakes. make mistakes: 犯错

Chapter 20: 自我介绍/家族介绍

自我介绍（ch20-01.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
D Let me introduce myself. 我来自我介绍。
  My name is Jina.  
S Nice to meet you. I'm Minsu Lee.  
  Glad to meet you. I'm Matthew.  
M What school do you go to? / Where do you go to school? 你在哪所学校上学？
D I go to Taipei Elementary School. 我在台北国小读书。
M What grade are you in? 你几年级了？
D I'm in first grade. / I'm a first grader. 我一年级。
M How old are you?  
D I'm 8 years old.  
M What's your hobby? 你的兴趣是什么？
D I like playing the piano. 我喜欢弹钢琴。
M Where were you born? 你在哪里出生？
D I was born in Kaohsiung.  
M What country are you from? / Where are you from? 你从哪个国家来？
D I'm from Taiwan.  
  I'm a native of Taipei. 我是台北本地人。
M What do you like to do? 你喜欢做什么？
D I like to play with my friends.  
  I like to draw. 我喜欢画画。
M What do you want to be in the future? 你将来想当什么？
D I want to be a pianist. 我想当钢琴家。
  I want to be a pianist when I grow up.  

介绍家人（ch20-02.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M How many people are there in your family? / How many people do you have in your family?  
S There are four people in my family.  
  Four. My mom, dad, sister, and me.  
  My dad, mom, brother, and I are in my family.  
  I live with my mom, dad, and sister.  
  We are a small family.  
  We are a big family.  
  We have a lot of people in our family.  
M Do you have any siblings? 你有其他兄弟姐妹吗？
  Do you have any brothers or sisters?  
S Yes, I have two sisters.  
  I have a brother but not a sister.  
  No, I'm an only child. 我是独生子。
  I'm the youngest in the family. 我是老幺。
  I'm the oldest in the family. 我是家中最大的孩子。

介绍父母/祖父母（ch20-03.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M What does your father do?  
D He works in some company. 他在某家公司上班。
  He works for a computer company.  
  He works for ASUS.  
  He works for the government. 他为政府工作。
  My mom teaches at school. 我妈妈在学校教书。
  My mom is a homemaker. 家庭主妇
  My parents both work. 爸妈都工作。
  My dad is very strict. 很严厉
  Daddy's too busy to play with me often.  
  Daddy plays with us on weekends.  
  Daddy helps clean the house. 帮忙打扫房间
  My mom's a good cook. 很会做饭
  Mommy's busy because she has to take care of us.  
  I look a lot like my mom. 和妈妈很像
  My mom and dad are in a good relationship. 感情很好
  I respect my parents.  
  My parents got divorced. 离婚了
M How are your grandparents? 你祖父母好吗？
S They're both healthy. 都很健康
  My grandfather passed away. 过世了
  My grandmother died when I was young. 我奶奶在我很小的时候就去世了。
M How old is your grandfather?  
S He's 66 years old.  
  My grandfather lives with us. 和我们住在一起
  My grandmother isn't very healthy. 身体不是很好
  My grandparents really love me.  
  My grandparents are nice to me.  
  I love my grandparents the most. 最爱
Tip: 职业名称

表示职业的单词后面经常出现 -man 结尾。man 不止可以指男性（male），还有人类（human ）的意思。即『做…的人』。不过，最近因为 man 无法准确传达女性从事相同的职业，所以开始使用其他单词。

policeman police officer 警官
chairman chair person 议长
postman mail carrier 邮差
fireman firefighter 消防员
spokesman spokesperson 发言人
statesman politician 政治家

介绍兄弟姐妹（ch20-04.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M How old is your younger sister?  
S She's 5 years old.  
M How much older than your brother are you? 你比弟弟大几岁？
S We are 3 years apart. 我们差三岁。apart: 相隔
  My bother is 3 years younger than me.  
  My sister is 3 years older than me.  
M Are you and your brother nice to each other? 你们相处得好吗？
  Do you get along with your brother? 你们相处得好吗？
D I always get in fights with my brother. get in fights with sb.: 打架，争吵
  My brother and I have a lot in common. 我们有许多共同点。
  My brother and I are very different. 很不一样
  We are twins.  
  We are identical twins. 同卵双胞胎
  We are different-looking twins. 异卵双胞胎。也叫做 fraternal twins
S I miss my brother when he's not here. 弟弟不在时，我很想他。
  My brother is a little troublemaker. 小捣蛋鬼
  My brother is always monkeying around. monkey around: 到处胡闹
  My sister is in kindergarten. 上幼儿园
  My sister goes to kindergarten. 上幼儿园
  My sister is in college. 上大学
  My sister goes to college. 上大学
  My brother is very nice to me. 我哥哥对我很好。

介绍亲戚（ch20-05.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
S I have a lot of relatives. 有很多亲戚
  I don't have many relatives. 亲戚不多
  I have many aunts and uncles.  
  I have one aunt and one uncle.  
  My aunt lives in Seoul.  
  I go to my relative's house during school break. 学校放假的时候，我会去亲戚家。
  We all get together during holidays. 过节聚在一起
  I have a lot of cousins. 我有很多表兄妹
  I get along well with my cousins. 我和堂兄妹们相处得很好。
  My cousins and I are friends with each other. 我和堂兄妹们相处得很好。
  My cousins and I play at my grandparents' house.  
D I meet my aunts often.  
  My uncle sometimes comes to our house.  
  One of my uncles lives in America.  
Tip: 亲戚的称呼

中文表述亲戚关系时分的很细，英文就单纯多了。

uncle 伯父，叔父，舅舅，姨夫，姑父
aunt 伯母，叔母，姨妈，姑妈，舅妈
cousin 堂兄弟姐妹，表兄弟姐妹

介绍宠物（ch20-06.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
S I have a dog.  
  His name is happy.  
  He shakes his tails when I get back from school. get back from: 从…回来
  He is trained well. 训练得很好
  We've had him for 2 years. 养了两年
  He's 5 years old.  
  Happy doesn't like to take baths. take baths: 泡澡
  Happy always follows me around. 总是跟着我跑来跑去
  Happy is a member of our family. 是我们家的一员
  Happy lieks to take a walk with me. 跟我去散步
  Happy knows how to do some tricks. 做一些特技
  Happy can do some tricks. 做一些特技
  Happy can jump and roll.  
  He's jumpy when I give him treats. 给它吃东西时，它就会跳。
  Happy likes dog gum best. dog gum: 磨牙棒
  Happy is a female / male.  
D My mom doesn't like dogs because they have fur. 因为它们毛太多
  I feed the fish. 喂鱼
  You need to change the water in the fish tank. 给鱼缸换水
  You need to put water into the birdcage. 给鸟笼续水
  I hate cleaning up poo and pee. 我讨厌清理大小便。
  Lizards are weired pets. 很奇特的宠物
  The porcupine had a baby. porcupine: 豪猪，箭猪
  I got him / her a shot. get sb. a shot: 给…打针；give a shot: 打针

介绍玩具（ch20-07.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M What's your favorite toy? 你最喜欢的…
D I like this doll the most.  
  It was a present from my daddy. 爸爸送我的礼物
  I've had it since I was 3.  
M Where did you buy it? 在哪儿买的？
D I got it as a birthday gift.  
  I got it from Santa Claus. 圣诞老公公送我的礼物
  I take this doll whenever I go out. 我出门时一定会带着这个娃娃。
  I go to sleep with it, too. 和娃娃一起睡觉
  I can't sleep without it. 没有它我睡不着。
  It's my favorite toy.  
  This is how you play with it. 要这样玩。
M Let your friend use it once. 让你的朋友也玩一次。
S I don't want to. It's my favorite. 我不要。这是我最喜欢的。
  Its name is Nana. I named it. 我给它取的名字。
  I'm collecting this series. 我在收集这个系列。
  It transforms when I build it. 我组装的话，它就会变身。
  It's a wireless car. 无线遥控车
  You can buy it at the stationery store. 可以在文具店买到
  It won't move because it's broken.  

介绍住的地方（ch20-08.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
B Where do you live?  
G I live in Raibow Apartments. 我住彩虹公寓。
B Where is Rainbow Apartments?  
G It's next to Gamel Elementary School. next to sth.: 在…附近
  My house is on the 7th floor. 在7楼
B How far is it from here? 离这里有多远？
G It takes about 30 minutes by bus. 乘公交车需要30分钟。
B How long have you lived there? 住哪儿多久了？
G I've lived there for about 4 years. 我在那里住4年了。
  I've lived there since kindergarten.  
B What is your address? 你家地址是什么？
  What's your phone number? 你的电话号码是什么？
  What's your home phone number? 你家的电话号码？
  Do you know Mom's phone number?  
G It's 2022-1114. The city code is 02. city code: 区码
  It's 02-2022-1114.  
B Don't forget your phone number.  

Chapter 21: 天气

风和日丽（ch21-01.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
S What's the weather like today? 今天天气如何？
  How's the weather today? 今天天气如何？
M It's a bright, sunny day. 今天是个大晴天。
  It's beautiful. 天气很好。
  It's going to be fine. 天气会变晴。
  It's getting warmer and warmer. 天气会越来越暖。
  Put sunscreen on because the sun is hot. 太阳很大，要擦防晒霜。
  Your face will get sunburned if you don't put it on. 如果不擦，你的脸会被晒伤。
  Cover yourself from the sun with a sun cap. 戴上遮阳帽来遮太阳。
  Try to walk on the shady side. 尽可能走有阴影的地方。
  Walk with e under my parasol. 跟我一起撑阳伞走吧。

阴天（ch21-02.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
D It's cloudy. 阴天
  A lot of clouds are in the sky today.  
  It's a very cloudy day.  
  It's really foggy. 雾天
M There are a lot of dark clouds. 乌云
  It's dark and cloudy. 阴沉沉
  It's going to rain soon. 快要下雨了
  it's likely to rain soon. 好像快要下雨了。
  It's so foggy that I can barely see anything.  
  The weather's creepy. 阴森森
  It's partly cloudy and partly sunny. 半晴半阴
  It's too dark even during the day. 即使白天，天也很暗
  It's been sunny, but it is turning cloudy. 晴转阴
  Cloudy days seem to last longer. 阴天还要持续更久。
  No more cloudy days! / I wish we had no more cloudy days. 不要再阴天了。

下雨天（ch21-03.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M It's raining.  
  It's starting to raining. 开始下雨了。
  It's drizzling. 下毛毛雨。
  There is a heavy rain shower outside. 外面正下着大雨。
  It's pouring rain. 倾盆大雨
  The rain has stopped. 雨停了
  It's been raining since yesterday.  
  It's been raining off and on all day. 一整天雨都在下下停停。
  It's been raining the whole day today.  
  It's not going to rain that much. 雨不会下那么大。
  There are thunder and lightning. 打雷闪电。
  It's raining cats and dogs. 倾盆大雨
  I'm afraid it's going to flood. 我担心会发洪水。
  It's too humid because of the rain. 空气潮湿
  It's the rainy season. 雨季
  August is a rainy time of the year. 八月是雨季。
  Let's close the windows.  
  How about wearing a rain jacket? rain jacket: 雨衣
S I don't like rainy days. I can't play outside.  
M It's kind of muggy today. muggy: 闷热的
  We need to turn on the dehumidifier. dehumidifier: 除湿机
  The weather has cleared up. 天气放晴了。

下雪天（ch21-04.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M It's snowing outside. 外面下雪了。
  Wow, the first snow of the year. 今年的第一场雪。
  It's snowing a lot. 下了好多雪。
  It snowed 10cm. 下了10公分的雪。
  There's a lot of snow on the ground. 地上积了很多雪。
  It snowed all week.  
  The world is covered in snow. 世界被雪覆盖。
  The world is all white. 世界都变成白色。
  It's sleeting. sleet: 雨雪夹杂
  I wonder if a snowstorm is coming. 我想暴风雪要来了。
  The road is frozen. 道路结冰了。
  We can't even move because of all the snow.  
S Let's have a snow fight, Dad. 打雪仗
  I want to go sledding. go sledding: 滑雪橇
  I want to make a snowman. make a snowman: 堆雪人
  Let's go ice-skating. go ice-skating: 溜冰
  I don't want the snow to melt. 希望雪不要融化。
Dad Be careful not to slip. 小心不要滑倒。
  Let's get the snow off the car. get off: 去掉，扫掉

冷天（ch21-05.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M It's so cold today. 今天好冷。
  The weather's gotten cold. 天气变冷了。
  It's pretty cold. / It's freezing. pretty: 相当
  The temperature fell a lot today. 气温下降
  It's aweful weather. 好可怕的天气。
  There's storm coming. 暴风雨要来了。
S I thought I was going to freeze to death. 我还以为我要冻死了。
M I'm freezing to death.  
  It really feels like winter today.  
  I was chilled to the bone outside. be chilled to the bone: 冷到骨子里
S It's really windy. 风好大。
  It's hard to walk through the wind. 风大到走路都很困难。
  My hat's going to fly off. 我的帽子要飞掉了。
  My hands are freezing. 我的手被冻着了。
M It's chilly today. Wear a lot of clothes. chilly: 冷嗖嗖
  Put a scarf on. 带上围巾。
  Wear gloves. 带上手套。
  Your face is really cold.  

热天（ch21-06.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M It's hot today. 今天好热。
  It's really hot. 真的很热。
  It's extremely hot. 热极了。
  It's hot and humid. 又热又潮湿。
  It really feels like summer today.  
  There isn't any wind blowing today. 今天一点风都没有。
  It's been hot for the past few days. 过去几天都很热。
S I'm sweating like crazy. 发疯一样流汗
  My back keeps sweating. 我的背上一直流汗。
  My rash is itchy. rash: 疹子; itchy: 痒
  Can you turn on the air conditioner / fan? 能开一下冷气/风扇吗？
M You're sweating. You'd better shower. 你在流汗，最好冲个澡。
  It will be better if you shower. 冲个澡会比较好。
  Sit in the shade for a little while. 在阴凉处坐一下。
  I wish it would rain. 我希望能下雨就好了`。

沙尘暴（ch21-07.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M The yellow dust season has come. 沙尘暴季节要到了。yellow dust: 沙尘暴
  There's a yellow dust warning. 已经发出沙尘暴警报了。warning: 警报，预报
  The worst yellow dust storm hit the country. 最强沙尘暴袭击全国。
  Look at the yellow dust.  
  It's very dusty outside. 外面都是灰尘。
  We get sandy yellow dust in the spring. sandy yellow dust: 沙尘暴
S What is the yellow dust?  
M It's dust winds blowing. 沙尘随风吹来。
  Dust and sand from China fly over here. 灰尘和沙子从中国吹来这里。
  The car is yellow now.  
  Did you get your mask? 你带了口罩吗？
  Wear your mask today. 今天要戴口罩。
  Don't rub your eyes. 不要揉眼睛。
  We need to close the windows because of the yellow dust.  
  Just stay inside today. 今天就带呆在室内吧。
  Don't go outside since the yellow dust is blowing hard. 沙尘暴很严重，不要去外面。

Chapter 22: 健康的生活

表示健康（ch22-01.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
S I'm very healthy. 我很健康。
  I'm very healthy and strong. 我很健康。
  I'm doing great. 我很健康。
  I'm not sick at all. 我一点病也没有。
  I have no health problems. 我没有健康问题。
  I'm not tired at all.  
  I feel strong. / I feel energetic inside. 我觉得自己很强装。
  Mom, I can't stop eating. 我还想吃。
M I hope you are always healthy. 我希望你一直健康。

表示疼痛（ch22-02.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
D I am sick, Mom. 我生病了。
  I don't feel well. / I'm not feeling well. 我觉得不舒服
  I want to lie down all day. 我想一整天都躺着。
  I don't want to eat. 我不想吃。
  I've lost my appetite. 我没胃口。
M Are you sick?  
  Where do you feel bad? 你哪里不舒服？
D I can't stand the pain. 疼得受不了
  I feel dizzy. 头晕
  I feel like throwing up. 我觉得要吐了。throw up: 呕吐
  It hurts whenever I move. 一动就疼
  It feels like something's poking me. 觉得有什么东西在戳我。poke: 戳
  It feels sore here. 这里觉得疼。sore: 疼，痛
  It is kind of a squeezing pain. 挤压痛
  If you touch there, it hurts.  
  I feel my muscles cramping up. 肌肉抽筋。cramp up: 抽筋，抽搐
M Does it hurt a lot? 很痛吗？
  When did it start hurting? / When did your pain start? 什么时候开始痛的？
  Want Mommy to take a look? 要妈妈看一下吗？

累的时候（ch22-03.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
S I'm tired.  
  I feel weak. 觉得虚弱
  I keep getting tired. 越来越累
  I don't want to do anything.  
  I can't even wash myself. wash oneself: 洗澡
  I can't even move a finger. 连手指都动不了
  My eyes are getting drowsy. 眼皮都要耷拉下来了。drowsy: 困
M There are dark circles under your eyes. 你有黑眼圈。
  You have dark circles under y our eyes. 你有黑眼圈。
  Why do you look so down? 看起来没精神。down: 疲累，没精神
  You look exhausted. exhausted: 精疲力尽（比 tired 更强烈的表达）
  Want to take a nap? take a nap: 小睡

摔倒/撞倒的时候（ch22-04.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
D Mom, I fell down. 摔倒
  I slipped on the floor. 在地板上滑倒了
  I fell down while running. 跑的时候摔倒了
  I tripped over a rock. 被石头绊倒。trip over sth.: 被…绊倒
  I lost my balance and fell. 失去重心摔倒
M Are you okay? Did you get hurt? 你还好吗？有受伤吗？
  You got a hole in your pants. 裤子破了个洞。
  Your knee is bleeding. 膝盖流血
  You bruised your knees. 膝盖青了。bruise: 使瘀青
  Your palm got bruised. 手掌瘀青
  Get up quickly. 快站起来。
  Get it off. / Shake the dust off. 把灰尘拍掉。
  The steets are very bumpy. 路坑坑洼洼。bumpy: 坑坑洼洼
  Let's watch the ground carefully. 小心注意地面
  Wow! You're not crying like a baby.  
  It's okay. Don't cry. 没事了，不要哭。
D Bonk! 撞到头了。bonk: 对头部的打击，闷响
M Did you bump your head? 撞到头了吗？bump: 撞，碰
  Looks like you're going to get a black eye. 你的眼睛好像瘀青了。looks like = it looks like; black eye: 熊猫眼
  You should have looked ahead carefully. 看前面
  Let's hold hands and walk again. 手牵手继续走

割到/流血的时候（ch22-05.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
S I'm bleeding. 我流血了
  I got a cut. 我被割到了。
  I cut myself with a knife. 我被刀子割到了。
  I got a papper cut. 我被纸割到了。
  I got poked by a needle. 被针刺到
  I got cut by a piece of glass. 被一片玻璃割伤
  I'm scared because I'm bleeding.  
M It's fine. It's going to stop soon. 没关系，很快就会止血的。
  We need to clean the wound. 清洁伤口
  How did you get cut? 怎么被割到的？
  I told you to watch out for sharp things. 我告诉过你要当心尖锐的东西。watch out for sth.: 小心，当心
D Ouch! The sterilizer hurt. 哎吆，消毒药好痛。ouch: 痛苦是发出的声音，哎吆
M Let me put the ointment on. 涂药膏
  Let's cover the wound with a band-aid. 把ok绷贴在伤口上
  Keep the bandage on the wound for a while. 让绷带包住伤口一段时间。bandage: 绷带
  This helps prevent germs from getting inside. 它可以帮助防止病菌跑到里面去。get incide: 进去里面；germ: 病菌
  A scab will form to protect the wound. 为了保护伤口，这里将会结痂。scab: 痂
  Don't pick your scabs. 不要扣伤口上的痂。

流鼻血的时候（ch22-06.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
D My nose is bleeding, Mom.  
M Tilt your head down. 头往前倾。tilt: 倾斜
  Let's put a tissue on your nose first. 先用面纸盖住鼻子
  Let's put a cotton ball up your bloody nose. 用棉花球堵住流血的鼻子。bloody: 流血的
  Don't swallow the blood. 不要把血咽下去
  Breathe with your mouth. 用嘴巴呼吸。
D I have blood on my shirt.  
M It's okay. Don't worry about anything. 没关系。不用担心其他事情。

感冒的时候（ch22-07.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
S Mom, I cought a cold. 感冒了
  I feel cold and shaky, Mom. / Mom, I feel cold and am shivering. 冷到发抖
  I have a sore throat? 喉咙痛。sore throat: 喉咙痛，喉咙发炎
  I have a runny nose. 流鼻涕
  I have a stuffy nose. 鼻塞。stuffy: 塞住的
  My throat hurts when I swallow. 吞咽时喉咙痛
  I don't want to eat because my throat hurts.  
  I have a bad cough. / I am coughing a lot. 一直咳嗽
  I have some phlegm in my throat. 喉咙里有痰
M You're coughing too hard.  
  Your snot is yellow. 鼻涕黄
  I think you have a cold. / You seem to have caught a cold.  
  You seem to have caught the flu. 得了流感
  It is such a severe cold. 重感冒
  You might have caught a cold from Yongsuo. 从Yongsu那儿传染了感冒
  You need to see a doctor. / Let's go to see a doctor. 看医生
  Don't take a shower today. take a shower: 洗澡
  Don't go out in the cold air. 不要到外面吹冷风。
  The doctor told you not to eat cold things, right? 不要吃冷东西
  Let's put a towel around your neck. 脖子上围毛巾
  Don't talk too much since your throat hurts. 喉咙痛就不要多说话
  Blow your nose hard. 用力擤鼻涕。
  You need to spit out the phlegm and not swallow it. 把痰吐出来，不要咽下去。
  Try not to cough on people. 不要对着人咳嗽

发烧的时候（ch22-08.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
S Mom, I feel very hot. 觉得很热
  I have a fever, so my body feels really hot. 身体很烫
  I feel dizzy. 头晕
M Let me see if you have a fever.  
  Let's check your temperature. 量体温
  You have a fever.  
  You have a high fever. 发高烧
  Your forehead's really hot. 额头很烫
  Let's take a fever reducer. 吃点退烧药。fever reducer: 退烧药
  You need to drink a lot of water. 多喝水
  You need to take off your clothes. 脱掉衣服
  I'll cool you down with a wet towel. 用湿毛巾帮助降温
  Hold this ice pack. 抱住冰袋
  I guess your body's fighting the germs right now. 身体正在跟细菌战斗

头/肚子痛的时候（ch22-09.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
D I have a headache, Mom.  
  I have a terrible headache. 严重头痛
M Let me see. Can I touch your forehead? 摸摸额头
  Do you feel a lot of pain? 你很痛吗？
  Are you sick very much? 你很痛吗？
  I'll give you some medicine. Let's see. 拿药给你。试试看。
S I have a stomachache, Mom. 肚子痛
  I think I'm going to throw up. 我要吐了
  I have a diarrhea. 拉肚子
  My poop's coming out like water. 拉水便
M It looks like you got stomach upset. 闹肚子
  I'll give you sime digestive syrup. 助消化糖浆
  What did you eat before? 你之前吃了什么？
  Looks like you ate too much cold things. 你好像吃太多冰的东西了。
  Do you need to poop? 要去大便吗？
  You should lie down and rest. 躺下休息
  Let me rub your tommy. You'll be fine soon. 按摩肚子。很快就会好起来。
  Want to put a hot pack on your tummy? 放个热水袋在肚子上。hot pack: 热水袋

牙齿晃动/疼痛的时候（ch22-10.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
D I've got a loose tooth, Mom. 牙齿松动
  My inner tooth hurts. 牙痛。inner tooth: 里面的牙齿
  I can't chew it because my tooth hurts. 痛到不能咀嚼
M Open your mouth. Say 'Ah~." 张开嘴巴，说『啊』
  Which tooth hurts?  
  It looks that your tooth's going to fall off. 牙齿要掉。fall off: 脱落
  You need to see the dentist. 看牙医
  Let's go to see a dentist tomorrow to take the tooth out. 看牙医，拔牙。take the tooth out: 拔牙
  Mommy will pull it out with a thread. 用线拔牙
  Place your tooth underneath your pillow. 把牙齿放在枕头下面
  The tooth fairy will come while you sleep and take your tooth. (牙线会把牙齿拿走并留下钱)
  She will leave you a present / money in return. 放钱或礼物作为回报
D What present will the tooth fairy give me?  
M I don't know for sure. Go to sleep early so that the tooth fairy can come. 我不确定。早点睡觉。
  It looks like you have got a cavity. 牙齿有蛀洞
  It looks like you ate too much sweet stuff. 吃了太多甜食
  Chew with your teeth that don't hurt. 用不痛的牙齿咀嚼。
D I'm scared to go to the dentist. 我害怕去牙科。
M It's okay. The doctor will treat you gently. 不用担心。牙医会很温柔地给你治疗。
S Mom, the wiggly tooth fell out. 晃动的牙齿掉了。
  That's strange. It didn't hurt at all. 好奇怪。一点也不疼。
  My tooth fell out for the first time. 第一次掉牙齿。for the first time: 第一次
  I didn't know my tooth fell out. 我都不知道牙齿掉了。
  Jina still has not lost any teeth. Jina还没有掉牙齿。
  It's hard to chew because some of my teeth are missing. 因为一些牙齿掉了，嚼东西很困难。
M Wait for a while. Your new teeth will grow soon. 新牙很快就会长出来。
  Open your mouth. Let's see how many teeth have fallen out. 看看掉了几颗牙齿。fall out

得传染病的时候（ch22-11.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
S I think I broke something in my body. 我想我把自己的身体搞坏了。
  I broke out all over the body. 我全身突然长了什么。break out: （皮肤上）突然长出
M It seems like you have chicken box. 长水痘
  You shouldn't go to school today. 今天不可以去学校。
  Stay home today. 呆在家里。
  Your friends could also catch it from you. 被你传染。catch: 染上（病）
  Don't use the cup together with your brother. 不要共用杯子
  Let's use different towels and spoons. 分开用不同的毛巾和汤匙
  You don't want the entire family to get sick, do you? 全家人都被传染
  I hope you get well soon. 希望你快点好起来。
S Can't I play with my brother?  
M Wait a little and play when you get better. 好起来再玩
S When can I get better? 什么时候会好？
M Maybe in a week or so. 也许一个礼拜多一点。
S Why did you send my sister to Grandma's? 为什么把妹妹送去奶奶家？
M I was afraid that your sister might catch it, too. 我担心你妹妹也传染到。be afraid that: 担心

被虫咬/发痒的时候（ch22-12.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
S I think I got a bug bite here, Mom. 这里被虫咬了。bug bite: 被虫咬
  It's swollen and red. 红肿
  It's ticklish. / It's itchy. 痒
  I can't sleep because it itches. 痒得睡不着。
M I wonder what bit you. 你被什么咬了。
  Don't scratch it. 不要抓。
  It can get worse if you scratch it. 如果你抓它会更严重。
  If you scratch it, germs will get in. It'll get more itchy. 细菌会跑进去
S I can't hold it. / I can't stand it. 我忍不住了。
M This itch relief will help. itch relief: 止痒药
  I'll put on some bug bite remedy for you. 擦些治蚊虫叮咬的药。
  Put this ice pack on it. 敷冰袋
  It will get better if you don't scratch it. 不抓就会好
  Look. It's bleeding after you scratched it. 抓流血了

去医院（ch22-13.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Let's go to the hospital. / Let's go to see a doctor. 去医院/看医生
D Do I have to get a shot? get a shot: （被）打针
M No, you'll just check with the doctor. 让医生检查一下
  It is just a regular checkup. 定期体检. checkup: 体检
  Say hello to the doctor. 跟医生打招呼。
  Take a deep breath. 深呼吸。
  He's going to look at your ears and nose. 看耳朵和鼻子
  Let's measure your height and weight. 量身高和体重
  You are 135cm tall and weigh 25kg. 身高…体重…
  You need to get a flu shot. flu shot: 流感预防针
  It will sting a little. Don't be scared. 会有一点刺痛。不用害怕。
  Wow, you're doing well by not crying. 你没哭，表现的很好。
  Let's take the prescription and go. 我们拿了处方笺就可以走了。
  It's all over now. / Everything's done now. 现在都结束了。
  Let's go to the pharmacy. 我们去药房吧。

吃药（ch22-14.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Let's take some medicine. 吃药
S I don't want to take any medicine.  
M Then you won't get better. 好起来
  Can you take it? 你能吃吗？
  Take it 30 minutes after meal. 饭后30分钟服用。
  You need to take it twice a day. 一天两次。twice a day
  These are antibiotics, so you need to take them. antibiotics: 抗生素
  This is for your cough, and this is for your runny nose. 这是治咳嗽的，这是治流鼻涕的。
  You'll get better after taking this medicine.  
  Good job taking your medicine. good job: 做得好
  Drink all of it. 全喝掉。
  You need to take it again if you spit it out. 如果你吐掉，就必须再吃一次。
  Here's some water and candy.  
  Put the candy in your mouth right after taking this.  
S I want to take the medicine again.  
M No way! You should take your mecidine like you are told. like you are told: 照指示
S It's very bitter. 好苦。
  I feel sleepy since I took the medicine. 吃药后犯困。

吃对身体好的食物（ch22-15.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M You'll get taller if you drink milk. 喝牛奶会长更高
  This dry fish will help your bones get stronger. 鱼干让你的骨骼更强壮
  Seaweed makes your blood cleaner. 海带让你的血液更纯净
  Your skin will get smoother if you eat vegetables. 吃蔬菜让皮肤更光滑
  Let's eat spinash and be strong like Popeye. 吃菠菜变得跟大力水手一样强壮
  Mom cooked with love for you. 妈妈为你做了爱心料理。
  Multigrain rice is better than plain rice. multigrain: 杂粮；plain rice: 普通白米
  Beans make you stronger and give you muscles. 豆类让你更强壮，还能长肌肉。
  Eat happily so you'll digest your food better. 消化更好
  It's good for you even though it tastes bad. 即使不好吃，但它有益健康。
  Seasonal food is always fresh. 当季食物最新鲜。seasonal: 季节性的
  It's safe to cook it fully. 煮熟才安全
  It's important to eat everything. 均衡饮食很重要。
  Don't be so picky about food. 不要挑食。picky about food: 挑食
  Mom's eyesight is bad because I didn't eat carrots. 不吃胡萝卜所以视力不好
D I love to eat vegetables. 喜欢吃蔬菜

注意有害的食物（ch22-16.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Candy will make your teeth bad. 糖果让牙齿变坏
  Too much ice cream will give you a stomachache. 吃太多冰淇淋会肚子疼
  You shouldn't eat too much salty food. 太咸的食物
  Don't eat food that smells weired. 不要吃闻起来怪怪的食物。
  Instant food is bad for your health. 速食对你的健康不利。
  This drink is full of coloring. 都是色素
  Street food isn't clean. 路边小摊不干净。
  I'm afraid that street food is not safe.  
  You won't grow if you don't eat everything.  
  Your blood won't work well if you eat just meat but no vegetables. 只吃肉不吃蔬菜
  You'll get fat if you eat too much fatty food. 吃太多油腻食物会变胖
  If you eat too much spicy food, your stomach will hurt. 吃辣太多会胃疼
  If you don't clean the fruit, you are basically eating all the pesticides. 不把水果洗干净就会吃下农药
  The food has expired. Let's throw it away. 食物过期
  Nope! Don't eat it after you drop it on the ground. 掉在地上
S Don't drink too much coffee, Mom.  
  Don't drink too much beer, Dad.  

Chapter 23: 生理现象

尿尿（ch23-01.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Do you want to pee? / Do you want to go to the bathroom? 你要小便吗？
D I don't need to go. 我不用。
  I need to pee. 我要尿尿。
M Right now? 现在？
D I can't hold it. I need to pee really bad. 我忍不住了。我要尿出来了。
M Hold it! Hold it! 忍一下！忍住！
  Pee after holding the toilet seat up. 把马桶盖掀起来再尿尿。toilet seat: 马桶圈
  Use toilet paper after you pee. 尿完之后用卫生纸擦干净。toilet paper
  Hold your skirt up and pee. 把裙子拉起来再尿尿。
  Make sure the pee doesn't get on the seat. 确定尿不会溅到马桶圈上。
  Try to pee in the center of the toilet. 尽可能尿到马桶中间。
  Do you flush? 你冲水了吗？
  If you hold your pee too long, it's not good for you. 憋尿太久对身体不好
D I peed a little. 尿了一点
  Oops! I peed on my clothes. 尿在衣服上
  Sorry, I wet the bed, Mom. 尿床
M See? I told you to go to the bathroom. 看吧，我告诉你要上厕所的。
  Go to the bathroom before you leave. 出门前先去厕所
  Go to the bathroom before you go to sleep. 睡觉前先去厕所

大便（ch23-02.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
S I have to poop, Mom. 我要大便。
  My tummy aches. I have to poop. 肚子疼，要大便
M Close the door. It smells. 关上门，便便很臭。
  Call Mommy when you're done. 完事后告诉妈妈。
S My poop looks like a sweet potato. 便便看起来像番薯
M My baby's poop is like goat poop. 孩子的大便好像山羊大便。
  Did you clean your bottom well? 好好擦屁股了吗？
  Flush when you're done. 上完厕所要冲水
  Wash your hands. 洗手
S Will you wipe it, Mom? 帮我擦屁股
  I pooped a lot, Mom. 拉了好多
M Eeek! It stinks. 好臭
  Let's stop talking about pooping.  
S What happens if I don't poop? 如果不大便会怎样？what happens if: …的话会怎样？
  Is it unhealthy if you don't poop every day? unhealthy: 不健康的
M Then the poop sits here below your belly botton. 那么大便就会留在肚脐下面。belly button: 肚脐
S I pooped this morning. Why is it coming out again? 我今天早上大便了，为什么它又出来了。
M It looks like the food got digested well. 看起来食物被消化得很好。

便秘（ch23-03.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
D I can't poop, Mom.  
M Try to push. 用力点。
D My stomach hurts, but I can't poop. 肚子疼但拉不出来
M You should drink a lot of water. 应该多喝水
  The reason is that you haven't eaten any vegetables. 因为你不吃蔬菜才会这样。
  I think your're constipated. 便秘。constipated: 患便秘的
  Come out of the bathroom and try it later. 先从厕所出来，等一下再试试。
  Try again later. 等一下再试。
  Want me to rub your tummy? 揉一下肚子
  I'll give you some medicine if it's really bad. 如果很严重的话，我会给你一些药。
D I'll poop later. 我等一下再大便。
M Don't take your book into the bathroom. 不要带书进厕所。
  That's not a good bathroom habit. 那不是好的如厕习惯。

放屁（ch23-04.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Gosh, what's this smell? 什么味道？
  You farted, dude! 你放屁了，这家伙！dude: （对男性的俚语称呼）家伙
Dad I just farted, and it stinks really bad. 真的好臭
D I can't even breathe. 我都不能呼吸了。
S Dad's fart smells like poo. 闻起来像大便
  You're such a farty pants, Dad. 你是放屁精。
D Who farted? / Who cut the cheese? 谁放屁了？
S It wasn't me. Was it you? 不是我。是你吗？
D It wasn't me. Why do you keep looking at me? 不是我，为什么一直看我？
  Wow, you've got a loud sound. 你好大声。
S I can't stop farting, Mom.  
  It's terrible. How come you farted in my face? 这太糟了。你怎么可以在我脸上放屁？
M You're going to make a hole in the ground. 你要在地板上打洞了。
S Stop making fun of me. The smell's gone now. 不要再取笑我了。已经没有臭味了。make fun of: 取笑
M We need to open the window. 我们需要打开窗户。
  I need to get rid of the smell. get rid of: 去除，使…消失
Dad Quiet farts smell worse than loud ones. 臭屁不响。
  Ta-da! Dad's going to fart! Hold your nose! 爸爸要放屁了。捂住鼻子。

鼻屎（ch23-05.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
S I have the hiccups, Mom! 打嗝
  How can I stop hiccups? 停止打嗝
M Swallow your spit. 咽口水。spit: 口水
  Hold your breath and count to three. 屏住呼吸，数到三。
  Will you drink some warm water? 喝温水
S Scare me. It might cure the hiccups. 吓我一跳。或许可以治好打嗝。
M Peek-a-boo! Are you okay now? Peek-a-boo!: 呀！（吓人时发出的声音）
S Yeah, I seem fine now. 好一点了
  No, I still have them. 还是打嗝

打喷嚏（ch23-06.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
D I'm sneezing, Mom. 打喷嚏
  My nose is ticklish. 鼻子痒
M It's probably because of the pollen. 也许是因为花粉的关系。
  Cover your mouth with your hand. 用手捂住嘴
  Don't sneeze on other people. 不要对着人打喷嚏。
  Watch out! There's spit going everywhere. 小心！口水喷得到处都是。
D Achoo! Excuse me. 哈啾！抱歉！
Tip: 打喷嚏时的礼仪

在英美等国，看到有人打喷嚏时，我们会说 Bless you! 意思是『愿上帝保佑你不会感冒』。如果你打喷嚏时，有人跟你说 Bless you 的时候，只用说 Thank you 就可以。

打喷嚏（ch23-06.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
S I'm yawning, Mom. 打哈欠
M Are you tired? Want me to open the windows? 累了吗？要我打开窗户吗？
  Your yawn made others yawn, too.  
  I feel like yawning after you yawned. 我好像也要打哈欠了
  Yawning is contagious. 打哈欠会传染。
  Please try not to yawn during class. 请试着不要在课堂上打哈欠。

打饱嗝（ch23-07.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
S Minsu burped, Mom. Hehe. 打饱嗝
M That's impolite. 那样很没礼貌。impolite: 失礼的，没礼貌的
  It's not polite to burp at the table. 餐桌上打饱嗝是没礼貌的。
  Don't burp like that. It's embarassing. 不要像那样打饱嗝，很丢脸。
S Burping is fun. 打饱嗝很有趣。

剪手指甲/脚趾甲（ch23-08.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Oh my! Why are your fingernails this long? 天呀！你的手指甲怎么这么长？
  They're too long. You should trim your nails. 剪指甲
D Will you cut them? 你能帮我剪吗？
M Get the nail clippes. 把指甲剪拿来。nail clipper
  Don't move. You can get hurt. 不要动。你会受伤的。
  You can scratch someone with this. 你会用这个抓伤别人的。
  There's dirt under the fingernails. 指甲里有脏东西。dirt: 脏东西，烂泥，灰尘
  Don't bite your fingernails. 不要咬指甲。
  It's hard to grab a pencil if your fingernails are long. 指甲长会很难握住笔。
  Ask me to cut your fingernails if they are long. 剪指甲
  Now give me the other hand. 给我另一只手。
  Let's cut your toenails, too. 剪脚趾甲
  You can get a hole in your socks if your toenails are long. 如果你的脚趾甲长，你的袜子会被戳个洞。
D Can I cut them by myself? 自己剪
  It hurts because you cut them too short. 你剪的太短了，我很疼。

Chapter 24: 电话用语

接电话（ch24-01.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Hello! This is Jina's residence. 这里是 Jina 的家
  Who's calling, please? 请问是哪位？
  Who are you calling, please? 请问找谁？
  Sorry. You've got the wrong number. 打错电话
D It's for you, Mom. 这是找你的。
M Ask who's calling. 问问是谁打来的。
D Hold on, please. 请等一下。
  Okay, I'll get her. 好，我请她来接。
  Mom said she'll call you back. 回电话
  Will you leave your number? 留下电话号码
M The bell's ringing. 电话在响了。
  Will you pick up the phone for me? / Will you answer the phone for me? 帮我接一下电话
  Will you get the phone to me? 能把电话给我吗？
  Hang up the phone. / Put down the phone. 挂掉电话。
D I'll pick it up. / Let me answer it. / I'll get it. 我来接。
M Who is calling? 谁打来的？
  I don't know this number. 是我不知道的号码。
  Put me on the phone if it's a stranger. 如果是陌生人的话，让我来接。
  Goodbye. It was nice hearing from you. 很高兴听到你的消息
  Sorry. I have to put the phone down. 我要挂掉电话了。
  Can't you see I'm talking on the phone? 你没有看到我在讲电话吗？

打电话（ch24-02.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Want to call Dad?  
S I can call myself. 我可以自己打。
M You need to dial carefully. 拨号的时候要仔细。
  Can you remember Dad's number?  
S The phone got cut off. 电话被切断了。
  The line is busy. 占线。
  No one's picking up the phone. 没人接。
M Let's call later. 晚点再打。
S Hello. Is Minsu there? Minsu 在吗？
  This is Jinhong, Minsu's friend. Can I talk to Minsu? 我可以和某某通话吗？
  Will you put MInsu on the phone? 你可以叫…听电话吗？
  Can I leave a message for him? 我可以给他留言吗？
  I think I called the wrong number. I'm sorry. 打错电话了
  It says the number is not listed. 没有这个号码。listed: 在名单上的，登记的
M It looks like you dialed incorrectly. 你好像打错电话了。
S Can you tell me Jina's munber, Mom?  

使用手机（ch24-03.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Don't play with Mom's cell phone. 不要玩妈妈的手机。
  There is a monthly limit. Don't use it too much. 每个月有限额，不要打太多。
  Use the home phone at home. 在家的话打座机。
  Turn off your cell phone at school. 在学校要关手机。
  The battery's dead. 电池没电了。
  Recharge your cell phone. 给手机充电
D Can I have a new cell phone? 换新手机
M Kids shouldn't use expensive cell phones.  
  It's easy to break and easy to lose. 容易弄坏，容易弄丢。
  Save the number. 存号码
  Keep your cell phone away from water. keep sth. away from sth.: 远离，不要靠近
  Don't walk on the street while looking at your cell phone. 不要边走路边看手机。
  Leave you phone on vibrate in public places. 在公共场合是把手机设为振动。
  I hate people talking too loudly on their cell phones. 我讨厌人们用手机大声讲话。
D Don't use your cell phone while driving, Dad. 开车时不要使用手机

确认短信（ch24-04.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
S Here's a message. 有短信来了。
  Who sent the text message to you? 谁给你发短信？
M The message is from Dad.  
  It's spam. 垃圾短信
S I need to delete it. 删除短信
  I need to reply. 回复短信
M Please text me when you get there. 到的时候给我发短信。
  Send Mom a text message. 给妈妈发短信。
  It's better to use text message in public places. 在公共场合用短信比较好。
S Mom, you typed it wrong. 打错字
  I sent a reply, Mom. 回短信
  Did you check the text message, Mom? 确认短信
M What kind of language is this?  
S They are emoticons. 表情符号

Chapter 25: 料理

洗菜（ch25-01.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Let's wash the cucumbers.  
  You need to clean the vegetables well. 把菜洗干净
  Clean the lettuce leaves one by one. lettuce leaves: 莴苣叶，生菜叶
  There can be pesticides on it. 可能有农药残留在上面
  Want to use some detergent? 要用洗洁剂吗？
  There shouldn't be any detergent on it. 不可以有洗洁剂留在上面。
  Wash it several times. 多洗几次。
  It's better to clean it in flowing water. 用流动的水来洗比较好。
  Soak them in water and clean them later. 先泡一下，然后再洗
  Scrub it gently. 轻轻搓洗。scrub: 搓洗
  The nutrients will get washed away if you scrub it too hard. 太用力搓洗，营养成分会被洗掉。
  Vegetables stay fresh when you wash them with cold water. 用冷水洗，蔬菜会保持新鲜。
  Let's rinse these cooked vegetables with cold water. 把煮过的蔬菜用冷水冲一下。
  You need to wash vegetables before you cut them. 切菜之前先洗一洗。
  You need to wash fish before you cook it.  

剪/切（ch25-02.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M I need to dice this. 切成小方块。dice
  Let's chop the meat. 切片。chop
  Let me slice the ham for you. slice: 切薄片
  Let's shred this carrot. shred: 切丝
  Let's cut it into cubes 1cm long. 切成长度1厘米的小方块
  Let's cut it a little smaller / bigger. 切得更小/大一些
  Let's mince the garlic. mince: 切碎
  Let's peel the potatoes. peel: 削皮
  Let's cut it into the right size. 切成适当的大小
  So it will go into your mouth easily. 容易吃进嘴巴里
  You'd better cut it with scissors. 用剪刀剪
D Be careful with the knife, Mom. 小心用刀
  Watch out! You might hurt your hand. 小心！
  Can I cut it, Mom?  
M Want to cut the bread with a bread knife? bread knife: 面包刀
  It won't cook well if you cut it too thick. 切太厚的话会煮不熟
  Cut it by pressing with a fork. 用叉子压下去把它切断。
  Cut it into equal sizes. 切成同样大小
  The knife gets dull and has to be sharpened. 刀子钝了，需要磨快。
Tip: 切的表达
cut 切
mince 切碎
slice 切薄片
dice 切成小方块
chop 切片，切块
shred 切丝
peel 削皮

加热（ch25-03.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Let's boil some water. 烧水
  Let's heat up the soup. 热汤。heat up: 加热
D The lid is shaking. 盖子在震动了。
  There's steam coming up. 冒水蒸气了。steam: 热气，蒸汽
M Just look at it since it's hot. 很烫，看着就好。
  We need to boil it a little more. 还需要再滚一下
  Add the ingredients in order. 按顺序把材料放进去。
  Let's wait till it gets cooked. 等它煮熟吧。
  Stay away since the oil splatters. 站远一点，油会溅出来。splatter
D I smell something burned, Mom. 闻到烧焦的味道
M Is the heat too hot? 热度太高了吗？
  Reduce the heat to low and cook. 把火力转小来煮。
  Use high heat and cook for a short period of time. 用大火煮一会儿。
  Stir well so that it does not get stuck to the bottom. 好好搅拌，这样才不会糊底。
  Put gloves on because the grip is hot. 手柄很烫，戴上手套。grip: 把手
  Be careful since hot steam will come out if you open the top. 小心。如果你打开盖子，热气会跑出来。

涂抹（ch25-04.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M How do you like your toast? / What do you spread on your toast? 你要在吐司上涂什么？
  Do you want jam or butter? 涂果酱还是黄油
S I want some jam for my bread.  
M Spread it evenly. 均匀地涂。evenly
  Use different spoons for each one.  
S Let me spread it myself. 我要自己涂。
  Let me try. 我来试试看。
  It keeps coming out, Mom. 一直流出来
  It keeps dripping, Mom. 一直滴下来。drip
M That's too much. Use the right amount. 太多了，适量使用
  Be sure to close the top. 确定盖上盖子。
S Is this about right? 这样可以吗？

盛在盘子内（ch25-05.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Will you get a plate for me? 帮我拿盘子
  We need a bigger plate.  
  We need a hollow plate. 需要深盘子。hollow: 凹陷的
  Can you bring me the soup bowels? soup bowel: 汤碗
  Don't put too much in the bowel. 碗里不要盛太多东西。
  Let's put it in the middle. 盛在中间
  Will you put some more on the plate?  
D Put it in my own bowel, Mom. 放在碗里
  Put a lot on my plate, please.  
M Let's clean the rim of the plate. 把盘子边缘擦干净
  Let's take out a little bit. 拿出一些来。
D How many more plates do we need? 还需要几个盘子？
M Place these plates on the table. 把盘子摆在餐桌上。
  Watch out because the plate can break easily. 小心点，这些盘子很容易破。

美国感恩节的习俗

Thanksgiving

每年11月第四个星期四。为了感谢一年所有的收获，全家人聚在一起享受丰盛的晚餐。烤火鸡、马铃薯泥、各种佐料 蔓越莓酱、肉汁、南瓜派都是传统食物。感恩节的第二天就是 Black Friday，因此所有商家从凌晨开始就进行大规模的大特卖。人们这时为了买打折的衣服或是家电，开店前就站在门口等着抢购。因为有卖给邹早来的 early bird sales。

常用的会话句子
Thankgiving is when we harvest crops and give thanks to God for it. 感恩节是我们收获并因此感谢上帝的时候。
It is such an important holiday in the US. 在美国它是非常重要的节日。
What kind of food do they eat? 他们吃什么样的食物？
Roasted turkey, mashed potatoes, gravy, and pumpkin pie. 烤火鸡、马铃薯泥、肉汁和南瓜派。
On Thanksgiving, all the family members gather and eat dinner together. 在感恩节，所有的家人聚在一起享用晚餐。

美国小孩的特别日：去朋友家睡 Sleepover

小学生之间的 sleepover 是很特别的日子。因为那天可以好朋友的家里过一夜，还可以一直玩有趣的游戏玩到很晚。父母亲之间经过邀请、允许之后，小孩子就可以去邀请朋友到家里玩到第二天才回去。发出邀请的父母要把行程和是否招待晚餐等等告诉其他小孩的父母，并且不可以只把小孩子放在家里。因为可以穿睡衣玩和睡，所以也叫做 slumber 或 pajama party。

常用的会话句子
Mom, last time you told me that I could sleep over at Jina's house, right? 你上次说我可以在 Jina 家过夜对吗？
Yes, I did. So did you get her parents' permission? 没错。所以她妈妈允许你去了吗？
Yes. She said it's fine. 她说好。
Okay, then. Why don't you pack the things that you will need? Don't forget your toothbrush. 好，那么，你为什么不准备一下要带的东西呢？不要忘记牙刷。
Behave well at Jina's house. Don't be too noisy. Do not run around inside her house. Okay? 在 Jina 家的时候，一定要乖。不要太吵。不要在她家里乱跑。好吗。
Listen to Jina's parent. 要听 Jina 父母的话。
Sleep well without Mommy. Have a very nice and fun sleepover. 妈妈不在也要好好睡觉。祝你在朋友家有个美好有趣的夜晚。

Part 6: 周末和纪念日

Chapter 26: 享受周末假期

享受周末（ch26-01.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
D It's an exciting weekend. 令人期待的周末
  Holidays are fun. 假日太有趣了。
  I don't have to go to school this weekend. I love it.  
M It's going to be the weekend tomorrow. 明天开始就是周末了。
  Tomorrow's a No-School Saturday. 明天是不用上学的周六。
  Tomorrow's a School Saturday.  
  You don't have to go to school Saturdays and Sundays. 你周六周日都不用去上学。
  You spend the weekends with your family. 周末和家人一起度过
  Tell your friends to have a good weekend.  
D Have a good weekend!  
  I wish every day were like the weekend. 希望每天都跟周末一样。
  I don't have to go to school, do I?  
M You can't meet your friends if you don't go to school.  
D Are we going somewhere this weekend? 周末要去哪里？
  Mom, let's go to the amusement park this weekend. 去游乐园
  Can we go on a trip during the weekend? 去旅行
M You have a makeup lesson on the weekend. 有课要补上
  It's already Sunday.  
  The weekend is coming to an end. 周末要结束了
  A new week is going to start tomorrow. 明天就要开始新的一周
  The long holiday is going to start! 连休就要开始了。long holiday: 周末加上固定假日三天以上的连休
  The holiday falls on a weekend. 这次的假日刚好在周末。fall on: （日期）停留，落在
  I wasted my weekend doing nothing. 白白浪费了周末，什么都没干。

叫爸爸起床（ch26-02.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
S Get up, Dad! 起床了
  Open your eyes.  
Dad Daddy's too tired. 太累了
  I'm going to sleep a little more. 多睡一会儿
S You promised to go to the park. 去公园
Dad Give me a break, Sweetie. 饶了我吧
  Can't you go with Mom? 不能和妈妈去吗？
S No, I want to go with Daddy.  
  You need to play with me on weekends. 周末陪我玩
  He won't get up. 他不要起床。
  I'll wait until he gets up. 我会等到他起床。
M Can you wake Daddy up for lunch? 叫爸爸起床吃午餐
  Go tickle Dad till he wakes up. 挠痒痒到他起床
S Dad, wake up. Let's go to exercise. 去运动
  I wish I could play with Dad.  
  I'm jealous of the kids who play soccers with their dads. 我羡慕跟爸爸玩足球的小孩。jealous of sb.: 羡慕
  I want to be with Dad. Get up, and then let's play.  
M Daddy looks really tired.  
  Just leave him. Let him sleep more. 别吵他，让他多睡一会儿。
  Daddy's tired because he worked late last night. 昨天晚上工作到很晚
  It looks like Dad can't even open his eyes. 睁不开眼
S Dad always sleeps on weekends / holidays.  
  How come Dad got out of bed at midday? 为什么爸爸中午才起床？how come: 为什么…; midday: 正午

无所事事（ch26-03.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
Dad We'll rest and refresh ourselves this weekend. 好好休息一下重振精神。refresh: 使有精神，使清新
  I don't want to do anything. 不想做任何事
D Fine. Can I watch TV?  
  Don't bother me, Mom. 不要打扰我。
M Let's eat out for lunch. 去外面吃午餐
  Are you all lying down together doing nothing? 躺着什么都不干
  Are you just going to be lazy today? 懒懒地过
  Do whatever you want. 做任何想做的事
D It's kind of boring. 有点无聊。
  Time goes by so slowly. 时间过的好慢。
M It's already evening, and we haven't done anything. 什么都没做
  Being at home is best anyway. 总之在家最好。
  Let's stop being lazy. 不要无所事事
  Want to actually do something now? 真的要做点什么

订周末计划（ch26-04.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M What do you want to do this weekend?  
  Want to go to the water park this weekend? water park: 水上乐园
  Want to go to the zoo this weekend?  
  Want to go to the museum this weekend?  
  Want to go to watch a movie this weekend? watch a movie
D Please take me to movies. 带我去看电影。
  Let's go somewhere this weekend.  
  My friend went on a farm stay. 去农村体验
M We're going to Grandpa's whis weekend. 周末去爷爷家。
  It will be an exciting weekend.  
  Let's work out our vacation plan. 订假日计划。work out: 制订（计划等）
  What do you want to see the most? 最想看的是什么？
D I've always want to go there. 我一直很想去那里。

订休假计划（ch26-05.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Sommer break is coming up. 暑假来了。
S How long is this vacation? 假期有多久？
M It's 4 nights and 5 days.  
  I think we can spend this vacation well. 好好度过假期
  We're going to the beach this vacation. 去海边
  It will be nice to go to a historic event. 参加历史活动; historic: 历史的，有历史的

爸爸在休息日上班（ch26-06.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
D Did Dad go to work yet? 爸爸已经去上班了吗？
M He went to work because he had a lot to do. 有许多工作要做
  He'll be back in the afternoon. 下午回来
  Call and ask Daddy to come home soon. 快回家
D Where are you going, Dad? 你去哪儿了？
Dad I have to go to work. 去工作
D I thought you said you would play with me. 你好像说过要跟我玩。
Dad I'm sorry. Maybe next time. 下一次吧
  Dad's late for work. 上班迟到
  I need to go. 不得不去
D Can I go with you? 可以跟你去吗？
Dad No, you can't. Stay with Mommy and wait for me.  
  I promise to hurry back, though. 但我答应你会快点回来。hurry back: 赶快回来
D Why does Daddy have to go to work on weekends?  
M He's doing it for our family. 为了家人做

阳历假日（ch26-07.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M January 1 is a holiday.  
  January 1 is the day when we honor the founding of the Republic of China in 1912. honor: 纪念，追忆
  February 28 is Peace Memorial Day. 和平纪念日
  In the past, many people fought with each other because of misunderstandings and caused lots of tragedies.  
  Don't forget the sad history that we had before. 不要忘记曾经有过的悲惨历史
  April 1 is April Fools' Day. 愚人节
  Just some jokes are fine on April Fools' Day.  
  But making fun of others too much is a problem. 太过分取笑别人的话就是个问题。
  Tomb Sweeping Day is probably on a day of April 4, 5 or 6. 清明节
  A lot of Tainwanese sweep tombs on that day.  
  April 4 is Children's Day. 儿童节
  It's the happiest day for all of the children.  
  May 1 is Labor Day. 劳动节
  August 8 is Father's Day. 父亲节
  September 3 is Armed Forces Day. 军人节
  We should remember those soldiers' sacrifices for your nation. 牢记哪些为国家牺牲的军人
  September 28 is Teacher's Day. 教师节
  Give your teacher a little present and a thank-you note. thank-you note: 感谢卡，感谢信
  October 25 is Retrocession Day. 光复节
  We got out of control from Japanese rule on October 25, 1945. 摆脱日本的统治
  December 25 is Constitution Day. 行宪纪念日
  We celebrate our national laws that were founded in 1947. 纪念指定宪法的日子
  You don't have to go to school on some holidays.  
Tip: 阳历假日的英文名称
Founding Day 开国纪念日
April Fools' Day 愚人节
Arbor Day 植树节
Children's Day 儿童节
Mother's Day 母亲节
Teacher's Day 教师节
Father's Day 父亲节
Peace Memorial Day 和平纪念日
Constitution Day 行宪纪念日
Tomb Sweeping Day 清明节
Labor Day 劳动节
Armed Forces Day 军人节
National Celebration Day (Double Tenth Day) 国庆日
Youth Day 青年节

教会（ch26-08.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M We are Christians. 基督徒
  We go to church on Saturdays and Sundays. 周六周日上教堂
  Let's go to the service. 去做礼拜; service
  We're going to be late for the service. 做礼拜要迟到了
  Don't talk during the service.  
  Let's pray. 祈祷吧
  Let's say the Lord's prayer. 说主祈祷文
  Did you get the offering? 奉献的钱准备好了吗？offering: 奉献，捐款
  We should tithe. 我们应该奉献十分之一。tithe: 十一奉献
  Say hello to our pastor. pastor: 牧师
  Jesus was nailed to the cross and died. Jesus 被钉在十字架上而死去。nail: 钉牢
S I'll go to Sunday school. 去教会的周日学校。

教堂（ch26-09.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M We are Catholics. 我们是天主教。
  Let's go to the cathedral. 去大教堂
  Let's go to mass. 做弥撒; mass: 弥撒
  Don't be late for mass.  
  Wear your veil to mass. 戴上弥撒头巾。
  Be quiet! The priest is preaching. 教父在传道。
  Let's do the rosary. 念玫瑰经
  Our sisters are all very nice. 修女们人都很好
  Ask God for forgiveness for your wrongdoings. 请主原谅你的过错。
  Go to confession now. 现在去忏悔吧。
  May the Lord bless us. 主啊，请赐福给我们。

寺庙（ch26-10.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M We are Buddhists. 我们是佛教徒。
  Today is Buddha's Birthday. 今天是佛陀诞辰。
  Let's go to the temple with Mom. 和妈妈一起去寺庙。
  Greek the monks like this. 像这样跟僧人打招呼。
  Put your hands together and bow low. 双手合起来，深深地鞠躬。
  You need to be quiet in front of the Buddhist statue.  
  Don't run inside the temple. 不要在寺庙内乱跑。

Chapter 27: 今天是特别的日子

生日邀约（ch27-01.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Your birthday is coming up. 你的生日快到了。
  Let's invite some friends and have a party. 邀请朋友来家里开派对
  How many do you want to invite?  
  Invite as many as you want. 想邀请多少人就邀请多少人
S About 10. 大约10个人。
  I want to invite all of my classmates. 我想邀请全班同学。
M Let's make some invitations first. 先来制作邀请函
S I want to make an invitation.  
  What should I write on the invitation. 要在邀请函上写什么呢？
  What time should I tell them to come? 我要告诉他们几点来？
M Tell them to come right after school. 告诉他们放学后直接过来。
  Give your friends the invitations.  
  Ask your friends if they can come. 问问朋友是否能来。
S When should I give out the invitations? 什么时候把邀请函送出去？
  I will give them tomorrow when I go to school.  
  Where should I have my birthday party? 要在哪里办生日派对？
M Let's just have your friends over to our house. 就请你的朋友们来家里吧。
  I think it will be too crowded in the house. 在家里的话太挤了。
  I'll make a reservation at a restaurant. 订餐厅。make a reservation: 预订
  Mommy needs to plan your birthday party for you. 计划生日派对
  Write down the names of your friends you want to invite. 把想要邀请的朋友名字写下来
  What do you want for your birthday? 想要什么生日礼物？
S I want a toy car for my birthday.  

参加生日派对（ch27-02.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
D I got invited to my friend's birthday. get invited to: 收到邀请
  I got an invitation from my friend. 收到邀请函
  I'm going to Jina's birthday party after school. 放学后去参加生日派对
  Mom, Jina invited me to her birthday party.  
M Oh, that sounds good. 听起来很棒
D What should I give her for a present? 要送什么礼物
M Well, think of something that she likes. 想想她喜欢什么
  When is the party? 派对是什么时候？
D At 2 o'clock on this coming Saturday. 这周六下午两点
  Her birthday is actually on the 12nd, but she is celebrating it ahead of time. 提早庆祝
M Where is she going to have the party? 在哪里开派对
D At her house / a restaurant.  
M On Thursday? But you have a make up lession that day. 你那天有补课
D Can I just miss class on that day only? 只有那天不去可以吗？miss class: 不去上课
  I should go because she is my best friend.  
  Mom, I want to have a birthday party like her.  
M Don't forget to bring the present you bought before. 不要忘记带你预先买好的礼物。
  Call me when the party is over, I will pick you up. 我去接你

生日派对（ch27-03.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M I'll get ready for the party. 准备派对。get ready for: 准备…
  Your friends are here. 你的朋友们都到了。
  How many candles do we need?  
  Let's sing "Happy Birthday".  
  Make a wish. 许愿吧。
  Blow out the candles. 吹熄蜡烛。
  Will you cut the cake and give it to your friends? 切蛋糕分给朋友

送生日礼物（ch27-04.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
S Thanks for coming to my party. 谢谢你们来参加我的派对。
Boy Happy birthday!  
  Here's my present. / This is my present for you. 这是我送你的礼物。
  I brought this for you. 我给你带了这个。
M Open your presents. 打开礼物吧。
S Wow! I really wanted this. 我真得很想要这个。
  I really like the presents.  
M Have fun. / Have a good time. 好好玩哦。
Boy Wow, this toy car is awesome / fantastic. 这个玩具车真的很酷。
S I got this from my dad. 从爸爸那儿得到的礼物。
  My dad bought this for me. 爸爸买了这个给我。

长辈的生日（ch27-05.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Your grandpa's birthday is coming up this Wednesday. 这周三是爷爷的生日。
  Let's choose a gift for Grandpa. 为爷爷选礼物
D What gift would Grandpa like?  
  I'm going to write a card. 我来写卡片。
  The gift is something that I drew. 礼物是我画的画。
M Grandpa would like that.  
  I'll make Grandpa's favorite food.  
  Put on the same number of candles as Grandpa's age. 插上爷爷年龄一样数目的蜡烛。
D Happy birthday, Grandpa!  
Gp Thanks, Sweetheart!  
M Sing "Happy Birthday" for Grandpa.  
D Be healthy, Grandpa! 祝您健康长寿
  Open your gift, please. 打开礼物
  Grandpa, do you like your gift?  
  It took me days to choose your gift. 花了好几天挑选礼物
Gp Thank you, Sweetie! I like this very much.  

过年（ch27-06.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M January 1 is New Year's Day on the solar calendar. solar calendar: 阳历
  We have another New Year's Day on the lunar calendar. lunar calendar: 阴历
  The lunar January 1 is also the Chinese New Year. 中国农历新年
  We worship our ancestors. That is an improtant tradition. 祭拜祖先
  We eat a family reunion dinner on New Year's Day. 过年吃团圆饭。family reunion dinner
  You get one year older when you eat the family reunion dinner. 吃了团圆饭就长了一岁
  New Year's Day is an important Taiwanese holiday along with Moon Festival. Moon Festival: 中秋节
  We'll be visiting Grandpa's place in Tainan on Chinese New Year. 去爷爷家
  Let's go to Grandma's place with our new clothes on to give a big bow to her. 给奶奶拜年
  You look prettier with your new clothes on!  
  Time to give a big bow to the adults! 该给大人拜年了！
S Have a happy new year! 新年快乐！
Gp I wish you good luck this year! 希望你有幸运的一年。
  Here's your red envolop. / Here's your New Year's money. 新年红包
S Thanks, Grandpa!  
  I got 1,000 NT from the red envelop. 我收到1000元的红包。

中秋节（ch27-07.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Is it already Mid-Autumn Festival next week? 下周就是中秋节了吗？
  Mid-Autumn Festival is on August 15 on the lunar calendar. 中秋节是农历的8月15日。
  Mid-Autumn Festival, Dragon Boat Festival and Chinese New Year are the threee most important traditional holidays. 中秋节、端午节和农历新年
  The moon will be round on that day. 月亮会很圆
  Hope the weather will be fine at night. 希望晚上天气好。
  This pomelo is so big. pomelo: 文旦，柚子
D I can't wait to eat mooncakes. 我等不及要吃月饼了。can't wait to do sth.: 好想，等不及
M Let's go outside to have a barbecue party. 到外面去烤肉

情人节/白色情人节（ch27-08.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M February 14 is Velentine's Day. 情人节
  A lady gives candy to man she likes. 女生会送巧克力给喜欢的男生。巧克力也算 candy 的一种
  Let's prepare some chocolate for Dad.  
D I'll buy some chocolate to give to my friends.  
  This chocolate is for Jinhong.  
  I received some candy from my friends.  
M March 14 is White Day. 3月14日是白色情人节。
  Boys give candy to girls they like.  
  It's only celebrated in Korea, Japan, and Taiwan. 只有韩国、日本和台湾这样过。
Tip: 情人节

在西方的情人节，父母、朋友和恋人之间都会互相赠送礼物。跟一般上只是女生对喜欢的男生表示情感的情人节是不同的。如果是平时就敬仰的人，也会边告白边在卡片上写 a secret admirer 来开玩笑。家中有小孩子的父母则会为小孩准备要送给同班同学的糖果，小孩子则在卡片上写上 Happy Valentine!

儿童节（ch27-09.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
D Yay! Children's Day is coming soon! 儿童节要到了！
M What present do you want on Children's Day? 儿童节想要什么礼物？
D I want a new Lego set / a Barbie doll. 乐高玩具和芭比娃娃
  I want to go to an amusement park. 去游乐园
M Grandpa sent you a big present.  
  Your aunt and uncle sent some money to you. 给你寄钱
  Call Grandpa and say thank you.  
D Do we have any special plans, Mom? 有什么特别计划
M Well, let's just eat some good food and have fun. have fun: 开心地玩
  Happy Children's Day!  
D I wish every day were Children's Day.  

圣诞节（ch27-10.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
S It's almost Christmas. 就要圣诞节了！
  Hooray! It's Christmas. 万岁
M Not yet, Honey. It's December 25. 还没有
S I wish for a white Christmas. 我希望是个白色圣诞节。
  Let's sing a Christmas carol. 唱圣诞歌
  I love Christmas the most.  
M Let's put up our Christmas tree. 架起圣诞树
  Shall we decorate the Christmas tree, too? 装饰圣诞树
  Let's put a star on the top. 在顶端放颗星星
  That's a great-looking tree we made this year! 今年我们也做了一棵很好看的圣诞树。
  We made a wonderful tree for Christmas this year, too. 今年我们也做了一棵很好看的圣诞树。
S Did you read my Christmas card? 圣诞卡
M Your Christmas card is very touching. Thank you, Honey. touching: 感人的
  It's Christmas tomorrow. Go to sleep early. 早点去睡
S Oops, I forgot to put up the stockings. 挂上袜子
M Put them next to the Christmas tree. 挂在圣诞树旁边
  Have you been a good child for the entire year? Santa only visits good kids.  
S Look! Santa put a present under the tree.  
  I want to open my present.  
  Santa gave me the gift I wanted.  
S Mom, does Santa really exist? 真的有圣诞老人吗？
  Of course. That's how you got his present.  

Chapter 28: 和家人在社区散步

去公园散步（ch28-01.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Let's go for a walk. 去散步
  Want to go for a walk to exercise? 去散步运动一下
  Let's go out to play in the park. 去公园玩
  Want to ride our bikes at the park? 去公园骑脚踏车
S Wow! There are a lot of people at the park. 公园有好多人。
M Say "hi" to our neighbors. 跟邻居打招呼。
  Want to hold hands? 手牵手
  Make sure you follow me, Honey. 一定跟着我
  Don't throw trash on the ground. 不要把垃圾丢在地上。
  Don't pick the flowers. 不要摘花。
  Don't break the branches. 不要折树枝。
  Don't step on the grass. 不要踩草地。
  It's great weather for a walk. 这个天气很适合散步。
  The breeze is really nice.  
D Mom, let's rest for a little. 休息一下
  Mom, my legs hurt. 腿疼
M I think we came too far. 我们走太远了
  Want to go back now? 现在要回去了吗？
D I want to stay longer. 多呆一会儿
M I know, but it's getting late. 越来越晚了
D Mom, I have to go to the restroom. Where is it? 上厕所
M The restroom is over there. 在那边
  Want to use this exercise machine? 运动器材
S I want to ride it, too, Mom.  
M Try the one over there. Nobody is using it.  

公厕（ch28-02.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Let's wait in line. 排队
  Knock on the door before going into the restroom. 进厕所前先敲门
  Don't spit. 不要吐痰。
  Don't draw on the wall of the restroom.  
  Flush the toilet after you're done.  
  Wash your hands well. 好好洗手。

超市（ch28-03.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Mommy needs to go grocery shopping. 妈妈要去买菜。
  Go get a cart. 拉一台购物车。
  Let's see the grocery list. 购物清单
  Let's go to the produce corner first. 先去农产品区。produce: 农产品
  Let's buy some fruit. 买水果
  How much is it? 这个多少钱？
  Give me 1kg of it. 给我一公斤。
  I'll take this. 我要这个。
  Put it in the cart. 放进购物车
  Do you know where I can find the fish? 知道鱼在哪儿买吗？
  The meat's really cheap / expensive. 很便宜/贵
  The pack of ramen is on sale. 整袋装的拉面在打折。on sale: 在打折
  Let's have fish for dinner. 晚饭吃鱼
  Tonight's dinner is sauteed octopus. 今天的晚饭是（快）炒章鱼。
  Check if we forgot anything. 确认一下我们没有忘记什么。
  The cart is full. 推车满了
S Can we get some snacks? 买零食
  I want some meat. Buy some meat, Mom!  
  Can I try some bread in the tasting corner? tasting corner: 试吃区
M Let's go to the checkout counter. 去结账。checkout corner: 收银台
  Get the groceries on the counter. 把食物都放在柜台上。
  Can I get a bag? 我可以要一个袋子吗？
  Let's put it in the bag. 放进袋子

餐厅用餐（ch28-04.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Can we get a menu? 可以给我们菜单吗？
  Choose what you want to eat. 选你想吃的。
  Did you choose what you want? 选好想吃的了吗？
S I want zajangmian and sweet and sour pork. 炸酱面和糖醋肉
M Hello. May I order now? 现在我可以点餐了吗？
  Get me some water, please. 请给我些水。
  Can you get it quickly? 可以快点上菜吗？
  How long do I have to wait till the dishes come out? 需要等多久才能上菜？
  Can you set the spoons and chopsticks? 能摆一下餐具吗？
  Don't goof around in the restaurant. 不可以在餐厅胡闹。
  You have food on your lips. Mom will clean it off for you. 你嘴巴上沾了食物，妈妈帮你擦掉。
  Want some more? 还要多一点吗？
  Mine's good, too. Want to try some? 我的也很好吃，你要尝一下吗？
  Mommy will eat the leftovers. 剩下的食物给妈妈吃。leftover: 剩下的食物
S Mom, I spilled my water. 水剪出来
M Can you pack the rest, please? 打包
  Can we get the check, please? 给我结账单
  The dish was too salty / bland. 菜太咸/太淡

美容室（ch28-05.mp3）

在家
Role Sentence Notes
M I want my hair done now. 我想现在就做头发。
  Your hair's too long. Let's go to a beauty shop. 你的头发太长了。我们去美容室吧。
  It's been a while since your last trim, and your hair is getting long. 离上一次剪头发已经有一段时间了。你的头发长长了。
S I don't want to go to the hair shop. 我不想去理发店。
M Your friends will make fun of you if your hair's messy.  
  Since it's hot, do you want your hair short? 天气很热，你要剪短头发吗？
  Want to get a perm? 要烫头发吗？
在美容室
Role Sentence Notes
Man How do you want your hair done? 你想怎样做头发？
  How can I help you?  
M I want my hair cut. 我想剪头发。
  I want my hair permed. 烫头发
  I want my hair straight. 拉直头发
Man How do you want it cut? 你想怎样剪？
M I want it short. 剪短
  Just trim it a little. 稍微修剪一下
  Don't cut it too short. 不要剪太短
  Just trim my bangs. 只要修剪刘海
  I want my hair dyed. 染头发
  Please highlight this part. 挑染这一块。highlight: 局部染发，挑染
  Sit still so we can cut it nice. 坐好，这样才能剪的好看。
  Don't move! 不要动。
  Will you tilt your head down? 低头
  Hair will git in your mouth if you talk. 头发跑进嘴巴里
  Do you like your haircut? 喜欢这个发型吗？
  You look like a prince / princess after your haircut. 你剪发后看起来像个王子
  My son looks different.  
  You look cool! Sorry we didn't cut it earlier. 真可惜我们没有早点来剪头发。
  There are a lot of people today. 今天有很多人。
  Want to come next time? 下次还要来吗？

桑拿浴（ch28-06.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Let's go to the sauna. 去洗桑拿
  Clean up first and then go into the sauna. 先洗干净，再进去桑拿浴。
  Go with Daddy since you're a big boy.  
  Put on your sweatsuit. sweatsuit: 桑拿浴的浴袍；运动套装
  Want to go in there? 想去那里吗？
D I can't breathe, Mom.  
  I'll go outside for a little. 我要出去外面一会儿。
M Let's cool down for a few minutes. 我们冷却一会儿吧。
  You're sweating a lot. 你留了很多汗。
  Make sure to drink plenty of water. 充足饮水
D I want to drink some water.  
  Can you buy me some boiled egges and a drink? boiled egg: 水煮蛋
M I'm going to lie down here. 我要唐在这里。
  It's not good to stay for too long. 呆太久也不好。
D How long will we stay? 要呆多久？
  When do we go home? 什么时候回家？
M That feels good. 感觉真不错。
  Let's clean up and go home. 洗好回家

电影院（ch28-07.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
S Let's go to watch a movie. 去看电影
M What do you want to see? 想看什么？
  What movies are on? 有什么电影正在上映？
S I want to watch a 3D movie. 看3D电影
M What time should we watch the movie? 要看几点的电影？
  Let's watch a matinee. 看下午场。
  Let me buy the tickets beforehand. 订票
  Let me reserve the movie tickets. 订票
  I'll get the tickets. 我去买票。
  It's already sold out. 已经都卖完了。
  We have about 10 minutes till the movie starts. 离电影开始还有10分钟。
  Go to the bathroom before the movie starts. 电影开始前先先去上个洗手间
S Cann I get popcorn and a drink? 可以买爆米花和饮料吗？
  Did you reserve the tickets, Mom? 你订票了吗？
  Did you buy the tickets ahead of time, Mom? 你订票了吗？
  Did you receive the tickets from the box office? 你在售票处拿到票了吗？
M Wait here in line and go in. 在这里排队进取。
S Can you find our seats?  
M It's dark inside. Watch your steps. 里面好黑。小心脚下。
S Mom, did you set your phone to vibrate? 手机调振动
  I can't wait. 我等不及了。
  I can't see because the couple is blocking my view. 那两个人挡住我的视线了。
M Don't kick the seat in front of you. 不要踢你前面的椅子。
  Hush! Be quiet in the theater. 在电影院里要安静。
  Was the movie fun? 这部电影有趣吗？
S Let's watch another movie later, Mom! 下次再来看电影

书店（ch28-08.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Want to go to the bookstore? 要去书店吗？
  Are there any books you wanted to read?  
  There are a lot of interesting books here.  
  Look at all the science magazines. 看这些科学杂志。
  Pick what you want to read? 选你想要读的。
  These are all new books. 这些都是新书。
  Which one looks fun to you? 那一本看起来有趣？
  Want to go over there? 要去那边吗？
  Here are the books you wanted!  
  Want to read this?  
D Where are the dinosaur books?  
  Can you find me the book? 能帮我找出那本书吗？
  Can I read this book here?  
  This is the 4th book in the series. 这是这个系列的第4本。
  Can I get this book? 我可以买这本吗？
M Do you want a cartoon book again? 你又要买漫画书吗？
  Let's buy a few English storybooks. 英文故事书

图书馆（ch28-09.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Today's the day we go to the library.  
  Let's apply for a library card. 申请借书证
  Want to find some books with a computer? 用电脑找书
S How many books can I borrow? 我可以借几本书？
M We can only get 4 books. 只能借4本
  Don't rush. Take your time. 不用急，慢慢来。
S Mom, read me this book.  
  Can I sit here and read?  
M Don't be loud in the library. 不可以在图书馆喧哗
  Be quiet in the library.  
  You should not read the books out loud. read sth. out loud: 大声读出来
  You should not eat in the library.  
  You should not tear the books. 不可以把书撕破
  Did you choose all the books? 选好书了吗？
S I found a good book.  
  I want to read it immediately.  
M Let's check them out. 借书；check out: 借出
  Give the librarian the card first. 先把借书卡给图书馆员
  Read here until Mom chooses a book.  
  Did you get all the books we need to return? 你准备好我们要还的书了吗？
  The books are due on Wednesday. 这些书周三逾期。
  The library is closed today. 图书馆今天闭馆。

银行（ch28-10.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
D What is a bank for? / What does a bank do for us? 银行是干什么的？
  What do you do at the bank? 你在银行干什么？
M We keep money in the bank. 把钱保管在银行
  Let's open an account for you. 开立账户
  Get a number. 取个号
  We need to fill out the form. 填好表格
D I want to save 10,000 to the bank. 存10000元到银行
  I want to take out 10,000 here. / I will withdraw 10,000 here. 取1万元
Man Did you bring your account book and seal? 你带存折和印章了吗？account book: 存折
D What time does the bank open? 银行几点开门？
M It opens at 9:00 AM. 9点开门。
D After I fill my piggy bank, I'll bring it to the bank. 等我装满扑满，我就拿去银行。

消防局（ch28-11.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Can 119 when there is a fire. 发生火灾要打119
  Firefighers help put out fires. 消防员帮忙灭火。
  Don't ever prank call the fire department. prank call: 打恶作剧电话
  Cars need to move out of the way when a fire truck is coming. 消防车来的时候，所有的车都要让路。
S I want to be firefigher when I grow up. 我长大了想当消防员。
  We can see firefighters and fire trucks at the fire department. fire depeartment: 消防局; fire truck: 消防车

警察局（ch28-12.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
D Wow, there's a police car.  
  The police uniform is cool. 警察制服很帅气。
  I feel safe because we have a police station in town. 镇上有警察局; police station: 警察局
  I want to be a police officer when I grow oup. 我长大了要当警察。
M You need to be brave if you want to be a police officer.  
D Do you know the number of the police station? 你知道警察局的电话吗？
M It's 110.  
  The police protects people's lives and property. 警察保护人民的生命和财产。

Chapter 29: 去旅行

爬山（ch29-01.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
S Let's go hiking. 去徒步吧。
Dad The air is fresh. 空气很新鲜。
  It's great to go up to a mountain. 爬山很好。
S The mountain is too high. 山太高了。
Dad Go up / down carefully. 小心上去/下来。
S My legs hurt.  
Dad Let's rest for a little bit. 我们休息一下吧。
  Want to drink some water from the fountain. 去饮水器哪里喝点水。fountain: 喷泉式饮水器
M We're finally at the top. 我们终于到达山顶了。
Dad We came all the way up here. 我们从大老远来到这里。
  Shout hooray! 来呐喊一下万岁！
M It was hard at first, but it feels good here at the top. 刚开始很累，但是来到山顶 后，感觉很棒。

海边旅行（ch29-02.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Let's go on a trip to the sea. 去海边旅行
D Wow, it's the sea! 是海耶
M The beach is very clean.  
D The waves are too high! 海浪太高了！
  The sand keeps getting in my shoes. 沙子跑进鞋子里
M Take off your shoes and go into the sea. 脱鞋进海
D The water's too cold / salty.  
Dad Want to set up the tent here? 搭帐篷
  Let's set a fire. 生火
  Go sleep in the tent. 进帐篷睡

游泳池（ch29-03.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Shower before you go in the pool. 进泳池前先冲一下身体。
  Clean up and change into your swimming suit. 换上泳装
  Don't forget your swim cap and goggles, either. 不要忘记泳帽和蛙镜。
  Go to the restroom before getting into the pool. 进泳池前先上厕所。
  Did you stretch? 做伸展运动
  I'll inflate your inner tube. 给游泳圈充气
  Be careful since the floor is slippery. 地板很滑，要小心。
Dad Don't go into the deep end of the pool. 不要去深水区
  Please don't dive. 不要跳水。
  Try not to splash water on others. 不要让水溅到别人。
  Don't goof around in the pool. 不要在泳池内胡闹。
  Don't make loud noises in the pool. 制造噪音
  Don't swim right after you eat. 刚吃完饭，不要马上游泳。
  Go in a little later. 等一下再进去。
  Don't stay in the water for too long. 不要在水里呆太久。
M Your lips are blue. Stay warm for a minute. 你的嘴唇变紫了，先暖一下身体。
  Let me dry you off with a towel. 用毛巾擦干
  Mom will stick around in the pool area. 妈妈会在泳池附近。stick around: 停留于
  The sun's rays are very strong. Put some sunscreen on. 阳光太强，擦些防晒霜。
S Do I have to put on sunscreen? 擦防晒霜
  I don't want to put any sunscreen on.  
  It's sticky. 粘粘的。
M Let's remove the air from your inner tube. 给游泳圈放气
  Dry yourself off before you go into the changing room. 进更衣室之前，先擦干身体。

游乐园（ch29-04.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Let's go to the amusement park. 去游乐园
  Let's buy tickets for all of the rides. 买自由使用所有游乐设施的票; ride: 游乐设施，乘坐的工具
  I'll get the tickets. Wait here. 我去拿票。等在这儿。
  Wait in line. 排队等。
  Want to ride this. 要坐这个吗？
D I want to ride this, Mom.  
  That looks too scary. 看起来太可怕了
M You're too short to ride this. 太矮不能坐这个
  Let's go and watch the parade. 去看游行
  The line's too long. Shall we ride something else? 队太长了。我们去坐其他的吧。
D I want to ride the merry-go-round. 坐旋转木马
  Let's ride the Ferris wheel. 坐摩天轮
  I'm going to ride the roller coaster. 坐过山车
  I like the viking ride the most. / The Viking Ride is the most fun. 海盗船最有趣了。
  I'm dizzy. I think I'm going to throw up. 我头晕。我想我要吐了。
M Let's rest in the shade. 在阴影下休息
D I want to ride it again.  
  Can I ride it again?  
  I don't want to ride alone. 我不想一个人坐。
M Want to ride with Mom?  
  It's time to close. 要关门了。
S All of the rides are so fun. 所有的游乐设施都很好玩。
Tip: 跟游乐园相关的表达

游乐园的英文是 amusement park，也可以说 theme park。amusement park 特指具备各种游乐设施的公园，而 theme park 是指设计成海、电影等特定主题的公园。其他的话，如水上乐园或海洋世界也可以叫做 water park。

游乐设施（ride）的种类：

merry-go-round 旋转木马
roller coaster 过山车
swing ride 旋转秋千
pirate ship 海盗船
Ferris wheel 摩天轮
drop tower 自由落体
water ride 水上游乐设施

博物馆/美术馆（ch29-05.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M There's a motor show going on today. 今天有个汽车展
  I heard the Snoopy Exhibition is coming up next month. 下个月有史努比展览会
  Let's go to the dinosaur museum today. 去恐龙博物馆
  A museum is a place where historic things are displayed. 博物馆展出有历史意义的物品
  Let's go to the art museum today. 美术馆
  An art museum displays many works of art. works of art: 艺术品
  Whose work of art is this? 这是谁的作品？
  What do you think of this work? 你觉得这个作品如何？
S I want to draw something this cool. 我也想画出这么棒的画。
M Read the descriptions here. 嘟嘟这里的说明。
  Listen to what the guide says. 好好听导游的讲解。
  Don't touch that. Just look at it. 不要碰，看就好。
  You are not allowed to take photoes in the museum. 博物馆禁止照相。be not allowed to do sth.
  You should be quiet in the showrooms. 在展区要保持安静。showroom: 展区

照相（ch29-06.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Let's take a picture here. 拍张照
  Want to take a picture with your friend? 要照相吗
  Stand next to your friend. 站在你的朋友旁边。
  Move back a bit. 退后一点。
  Step ahead a little. 往前站一点。
  Move to the left / right a little. 往左/右一点。
  Everyone, squeeze together. 各位靠在一起吧。
  Say cheese!  
  Smile for the camera. 对着镜头微笑。
  Make a big smile, please. 给我一个大大的微笑。
  You look nervous.  
  Try to look good. 摆出帅气的样子。
  Will you pose for my camera? 摆个姿势
D Mom, take a picture of Jina and me. 帮我们照个相
  I'll take it this time. 这次我来拍照。
  I don't want to take a picture of myself, Mom. 我不想照相。
  I don't want my picture taken, Mom. 我不想照相。
M The camera was shaking. Let's take another picture. 相机晃了一下。我们再拍一张。
  Wow, it looks great. 这张看起来很棒。
  My daughter is photogenic. / My girl looks great in a photo. 我女儿很上相。
D Show me the picture. 给我看照片。
