  The picture looks good / bad. 拍得很好/不好
M I'm not much of a photographer. 我不太会照相。
  Let's take a family photo. 照个全家福
  Let's ask someone to take a picture of us. 请其他人帮我们照相
  Excuse me, but could you take a picture of us? 可以请您帮我们拍照吗？

Chapter 30: 交通工具

走路（ch30-01.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Will you walk to the library today? 走路去图书馆
S How long does it take by walking? 走路要多久？
M About 20 minutes. 20分钟左右。
S I'm going to walk today.  
  It's too far to walk. 走路太远了。
M Hold my hand and walk. 牵着我的手走。
  Don't goof around on the street. 不要在街上胡闹。
  We're late. Let's walk faster. 我们晚了，快点走。
S I'm breathless. 我喘不过气。
  We walked too much. Let's rest for a little. 我们走太多了。休息一下吧。
  My legs hurt. 腿疼
M It's nice to walk, isn't it? 走路很好
  Let's walk our dog, too. 遛狗
  We can be healthy if we walk. 走路更健康
  It seems like we came pretty far. 走了相当远
  Want to sing while we walk? 边走边唱
  Want to drink something since it's hot? 好热哦，要喝点什么吗？

过马路（ch30-02.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Always be careful of cars when crossing. 过马路时要小心车子。
  You should cross at the crosswalk. 过马路要走斑马线
  Stop in front of the crosswalk. 停在斑马线前面
  Don't run in the crosswalk. 不要在斑马线上跑。
S Mom, the light is green. Let's go. 绿灯了，我们走吧。
M Look to both sides and walk when the light turns green. 变绿灯时，要看一下路两边再走。
  Hold your hand up when you cross. 过马路时举起你的手。
  Stop when the green light is flickering. 绿灯闪的时候要停下来。
  Let's wait for the next light. 等下一个信号灯吧。
  Don't jaywalk! 不可随意穿越马路。jaywalk
  There are no lights here. 这里没有信号灯。
  Look carefully where there aren't any lights. 没有信号灯的地方一定要小心。
  There is an underpass. 有地下通道。
  Let's cross on the overpass. 过天桥
D Mom, that car's running the red light. 闯红灯
M The police will arrest the driver since he didn't follow the rules. 不遵守规则

坐车（ch30-03.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Let's get in the car. 上车
  Who wants to get in first? 谁要先上车？
  Check before opening the door. 开门前先确认一下
  See if there are any cars comming. 看看是否要哦iu其他车过来。
  Fasten your seatbelt. 系上安全带。
  Did you buckle up? 扣上安全带了吗？
S I don't want to buckle up.  
M You need to buckle up when you're in a car.  
S I don't want to ride in the car seat. 坐儿童座椅。car seat
  It makes me look like a baby.  
M It's safer to sit in it, though. 但坐在里面更安全。
S The door's not opening. Please open it for me. 门打不开。请帮我开门。
  Can I ride in the front seat? 坐前排座位
M The front seat's dangerous, so kids shouldn't sit there. 前座很危险，所以小孩子不可以坐。
  Get the dirt off your shoes and get in the car. 把鞋子上的泥土弄掉后上车。
  Sit back on your bottom. 屁股往后坐。
  Sit still in the car. Okay? 乖乖坐好
  Check if you left anything before we move. 出发前确认一下是否落下东西。
  Say "Go!"  
S Go! / Move! 出发!

在车内（ch30-04.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Be quiet. You're distracting Dad. 安静。你分散了爸爸的注意力。
  Don't put your hand out the window. 不要把手伸出窗外。
S It's too hot. Roll down the window. 摇下车窗
  Can I play my portable video game?  
M For only 30 minutes. 只能玩30分钟。
  Your eyesight will get bad if you play the game in the car. 视力变差
  Reading books in a car is bad for your eyes. 车内读书对眼睛不好。
  Sing a song for Daddy to keep him awake. 让爸爸保持清醒
S Dad, you're speeding. 你超速了。
  I want to go to the restroom. 我要去洗手间。
  Let's stop at the rest area. 在休息区停一下。
M Want me to play a CD?  
  If you're tired, sleep a little. 如果累了就休息一下
  I'll wake you up when we get there. 到了叫醒你
S Are we there yet? 我们已经到了吗？
  How far should we go? 要开多远？
  How much more do we have to go? 还要开多远？
  I feel I'm getting carsick. 我觉得晕车了。

公车（ch30-05.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Let's take a bus today. 搭公车
  The bus stop is over there.  
  Let's check the route. 看一下路线图
D What number bus do we need to take? 要乘第几路车？
M We can take the number 5538 or 571 bus.  
  We should cross the street to take the bus. 过马路去乘公车
  How come the bus isn't coming? 公交车怎么还没来？
  What number bus is that? 那是几路公交车？
  The bus is here. Let's get in. 公交车来了。上车吧。
  Grab the handle. 抓住把手。
  Go sit in an empty seat. 去坐在空位上。
  Please give your seat to this lady. 把位子让给别人
D Sit here, ma'am / sir. （给年纪大的人让座）
M Keep your voice down and behave. 小声点，坐好。
  Don't play with your feet. 不要玩你的脚。
  You should not be loud inside the bus. 公交车内不可以大声讲话。

计程车（ch30-06.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Let's take a taxi. 坐出租车
  Let's just take a cab since we're in a rush. 因为我们很赶，所以乘出租车吧。
  Just the base fare will be charged. 收起步费
  Taxi fares depend on the distance traveled. 出租车费根据行车距离计算。
  The fare turned out to be expensive. 结果车费很贵。

地铁（ch30-07.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Let's take the subway to visit your aunt. 乘地铁
S Which subway line do we need to take? 乘几号线
M We need to take the number one line. 乘一号线
S Mom, the train is coming. 车来了。
  Is that the train we need to take? 是这趟车吗？
M Right. Step behind the safety line. 退到安全线后。
  Get on the subway train after people get off. 人们下车后我们再上去。
  Hurry! Get in! 上车
  Watch your step when you get on. 上车时注意脚下。
S Mom, there's an empty seat. 有空位
  Hand me the bag. I'll hold it. 把包给我，我来拿。
  How many more stops are left? 还有几站？
M Three stops from here. 还有三站。
  Don't jump around in the subway train. 不要在地铁里跳。

Part 7: 教孩子英文时所需要的英文表达

Chapter 31: 教授的基本表现

颜色（ch31-01.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Let's say the name of colors in English.  
  What color is the fire truck? 消防车是什么颜色？
  What color is this shirt?  
D The color of the shirt is blue. 衬衫是蓝色的。
M What is your favorite color? 你最喜欢什么颜色？
D My favorite color is red.  
  Mom, what color is this? 这是什么颜色？
M That is dark / light brown. 深褐色/浅褐色
  What color will we get if we mix yellow and blue? 如果我们把蓝色和黄色混合在一起，会出现什么颜色？
  Right! It turns green when we mix yellow and blue. 变成绿色
  What color feels warm / cold? 暖色/冷色
D White, black, and gray are not colorful. 白色、黑色和灰色都不鲜艳。
  White, black, and gray have no hue. 白色、黑色和灰色都不鲜艳。
  I like the colors of the rainbow. 我喜欢彩虹的颜色。
M Red, yellow, and blue are the three primary colors. 三原色
  Can you find something purple in your house? 紫色的东西
  What color do you want this to be? 你想要把这个涂成什么颜色？
  What color do you want for this? 你想要把这个涂成什么颜色？
D I want to color this pink. 把这个涂成粉色

数字（ch31-02.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Let's learn numbers in English.  
  Let's read up to ten. 数到十
  Can you count from one to ten? 从一数到十
  Can you count after / more than 10? 数十以上的数字
  Let's count by tens. 以十为单位数数
  Wow, you know how to say "100" in English? 怎么用英文说…
  How many eyes does Mom have?  
S You have two eyes.  
M How many apples are on the plates?  
S There are five apples.  
M Let's see who has more marbles. 谁的弹珠多。marble: 弹珠
S I have more. / I'm the one who has more.  
  I have seven marbles, and Jina has five.  
M The numbers are different when counting the order. 数顺序时，数字的形式是不一样的。
  We use ordinal numbers to see which comes first. 使用序数
  The desk has five drawers, right?  
  Open the third drawer of the dresser. 打开梳妆台的第三个抽屉。

圆形（ch31-03.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M What shape is a book? 书是什么形状？
D It's a rectangle.  
M What shape is a coat hanger? 衣架
D It's a triangle.  
M What shape is colored paper? 彩色纸是什么形状？
D It's a square.  
M What shape is a button?  
D It's a circle. 是圆形。
M A circle has no points and no sides. 圆形没有端点，也没有边。
  Can you see something round in the room? 你能在房间内看到圆形的东西吗？
D The clock is round.  
M A can is in the shape of a cylinder. 罐头是圆柱形。
  A ball is a sphere. 球是球体。
  What shape is an ice cream cone?  
D It's a cone. 圆锥体
M A dice is a cube. 立方体
Tip: 图形的名称
circle 圆形
square 正方形
rectangle 长方形
triangle 三角形
cone 圆锥体
cube 立方体
cylinder 圆柱，圆筒
pyramid 角锥体
plane figure 平面图形
solid figure 立体图形

大小（ch31-04.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M The elephant is big, but the bunny is little.  
  Dad is big, but you are small.  
S The pencil is long, but the eraser is short.  
M The building is high, but the house is low. 大楼很高，但平房很矮。
  Who is taller, you or Daddy?  
  My sweet baby is smaller than his dad.  
  Mom's hand is bigger than yours.  
  My desk is larger than our desk.  
  This street is narrower / wider than that one.  
  Let's see how long this is. Use this ruler. 用这把尺子量。

身体（ch31-05.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Do you know the body parts in English? 身体各部位的英文名称
  This is the head, and this is the face.  
  What do we have on our faces? 我们的脸上有什么？
D We have a nose, mouth, eyes, and ears.  
M We also have eyebrows, eyelashes, a chin, and cheeks. 眉毛、眼睫毛、下巴和脸颊
  Show me your arms and legs. 给我看你的手臂和腿。
D Mom, look at my fingers and toes. 看我的手指和脚趾。
M Where's your tummy and belly button? tummy: （儿童用语）肚子 = belly
  Turn your arms around. 转动一下你的手臂。
  Where is your elbow?  
  Stretch out your legs. 伸出你的双腿。
  Bend your knees and sit on the floor. 弯下膝盖坐在地上。
  Stomp your foot like this. 像这样跺脚。
  Shake your hips, Honey. 摇动屁股
D Mom's hips are huge!  
Tip: 屁股的英文是什么？

日常生活中，把屁股叫做 bottom。关系较亲密的可以说 butt，但一不小心很容易变成辱骂，所以还是使用 bottom 比较方便保险。

动物/植物（ch31-06.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M There are two kinds of animals: plant eaters and meat eaters. 草食性和肉食性
  Human beings are animals, too.  
  Tigers, rabbits, and dogs are mammals. 哺乳动物
  They give birth to babies and breast-feed them. 生小孩。喂奶。
  Birds have wings and lay eggs. 生蛋
  Fish have gills and live in the water. 鱼有腮
  Reptiles like alligators are covered with scales and lay eggs. 全身覆盖鳞片
  Frogs and toads are amphibians. 两栖类
  They live both in water and on land. 住在水里及陆地
  Animals with wings and six legs are called insects.  
  Insects like beetles, flies, and cicadas are animals, too. 甲虫、苍蝇和蝉
  What is the difference between an animal and a plant? 动植物的区别是什么？
S Animals move, but plants do not move.  
M Yes, that's right. Animals can move by themselves, but plants can't do that.  
  Aniamals and plants are living things. 动植物都是生物。
S Mom, what about worms? Are they animals, too? 虫子呢？
M Worms also move, so they are animals.  
  Trees and flowers are called plants.  
  Plants have three parts: roots, stems, and leaves.  
  The roots hold the plant strongly in the soil. 根在土里紧紧地抓住植物。
  Plants make food in their leaves. 植物用叶子制造养分。
  Plants need sunlight and water to grow. 植物需要阳光和水才能成长。

日期（ch31-07.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M The calendar shows the date. 日历显示日期。
  There are 12 months in a year.  
  A month has 30 or 31 days.  
  Today is the sixth of August.  
  Then what was the date of yesterday? 那么昨天是几号？
D It was August fifth.  
M Then what will be the date tomorrow? 那么明天是几号？
D It will be August seventh.  
M What date will it be five days from today? 五天后是几号？
  What did you do the day before yesterday? 前天你做了什么？
  We have dinner plans the day after tomorrow. 后天我们有晚餐的计划。
  There are two types of calendars: the lunar calendar and the western calendar. 阴历，西历（阳历）
  February 7 is your birthday on the western calendar. 阳历生日
Tip: 说说日期
月

January, February, March, April, May, June, July, August, September, October, November, December

年度的读法
  • 1994: nineteen ninety-four
  • 2011: two thousand eleven
日期的读法
  • 3月3日: March third / the third of March

星期（ch31-08.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M There are 7 days in a week. 一周有七天
  From Monday to Friday are the weekdays. 工作日
  We call Saturday and Sunday the weekend. 周六和周日叫做周末。
  What day is it today? 今天是周几？
S Today is Thursday.  
  Yesterday was Wednesday.  
  Tomorrow will be Friday.  
M What day comes after Monday? 周一之后是周几？
S It's Tuesday.  
  I like Friday the most because I can rest the next day. 我最喜欢周五，因为隔天我就可以休息了。
  Monday is the busiest day. 周一最忙。

时间（ch31-09.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M There are 24 hours in a day. 一天有二十四小时。
  The clock shows only 12 hours.  
  So the hour hand goes around two times a day. 因此时针一天跑两圈。
  The short hand tells you the hour on the clock. 短针告诉你几点。
  The long hand tells you the minutes. 长针告诉你几分。
  When the hour hand points to 1 and the minute hand points to 12, it's 1 o'clock.  
  1 hour is 60 minutes. 一小时有60分钟。
  1 represents 5 minutes, and 2 represents 10 minutes. 1代表5分钟，2代表10分钟。
  It's like skip counting by 5s. 这好像以每五分钟来简略计算。
  One second is equal to one blink of an eye. 一秒钟跟眨一下眼的时间差不多。
  60 seconds are equal to 1 minutes. 60秒就是1分钟。
  AM is the morning, and PM is the midday and evening. AM 是早上，PM 是下午和晚上。
S What time is it now? 现在几点？
M It's four forty-five. 4点45分。
  It's fifteen to three. 还有15分钟3点。

季节（ch31-10.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Which season do you like the most?  
D I love spring the most.  
M We have four seasons in a year. 一年有四季。
  In spring, the flowers bloom, and the green sprouts bud. 春天花会开，种子会发芽。
  Summer is hot, and the trees are thick with leaves. 树叶茂密
  Storms and the rainy season come during summer. 暴风和雨季
  During fall, trees change their colors to red, yellow, and orange.  
  Winter is cold, and sometimes snow falls.  
  It's August. What season are we in? 我们在哪个季节？
D The season is summer. 现在是夏天。
M Not all countries have four seasons. 不是所有国家都有四季。
D School starts in the spring. 学校秋天开学。
  We all go on vacation in the summer. 夏天放假。
  My school has a sports day in the fall. 在秋天举办运动会
  I love the long vacation in the winter. 我喜欢冬天的长假。
Tip: 美国的运动会

美国的运动会叫做 Sports Day 或 Track and Field Day，因此只进行赛跑。有个人的长跑、短跑，套袋赛跑（sack race）、接力赛（relay），两人三足跑（three-legged race）等等。最后会发给印有名次的带子，这是增强体力并兼具趣味性的活动。

位置（ch31-11.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M There is a ball under the table.  
  There is a cup on the desk.  
  There is an eraser inside the pencil case. 铅笔盒
  The doghouse is outside the house. 狗屋在房子外面。
  Your cell phone is in front of your bag. 手机在包前面。
  Your cell phone is under the book.  
  Look at the bottom right of the book. 书的右下端
  Look at the top left on the screen. 屏幕左上端
  There is a big department store across the street. 街对面有一家大型百货公司。
D There is a stationery store near our school. 学校附近有文具店
  The supermarket is next to the hair salon. 超市在美容院旁边。
  The supermarket is between the bank and the bookstore. 超市在银行和书店之间。
  There is the police station to the right of the library. 图书馆的右边是警察局。
  There is a bakery to the left of the school entrance. 学校正门左边是面包店。

职业（ch31-12.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
S What do you do, sir? 你是做什么的？
Man I'm a firefighter. 消防员
  I'm a doctor.  
  I'm a dentist.  
  I'm a policeman.  
  I'm a mail carrier, so I deliver letters. 送信
M Your grandfather was a fisherman. 渔夫
  Your uncle is a farmer. 农夫
  There are a lot of different jobs in the world. 世界上有很多不一样的职业。
  Every job is important.  
Tip: 职业的种类
bank teller 银行工作人员
teacher  
clerk 店员
store owner 店长
taxi driver  
nurse  
vet (=veterinarian) 兽医
scientist  
pilot 飞机驾驶员
secretary  
singer  
actor / actress  
photographer  
painter 画家
astronaut 太空人
student  
principal 校长
public servant 公务员

Chapter 32: 各科目的基础表现

英文发音（ch32-01.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Look at all these letters of the alphabet! 看这些英文字母
  Let's sing the alphabet song together.  
  Each letter has a different sound. 每个字幕都有不同的发音。
  When we put some letters together, we can make words.  
  See? I have a "c", "a", and "t". What is this?  
D It's "CAT."  
M t, t, t… The letter "t" sounds like t. 字母 t 的发音是 /t/。
  How does the letter "a" sound? 字母 a 的发音是什么？
  Let's listen to a short "a" sound.  
  I'll say a long "a", and you say it after me. 你跟我念
  What letter should come between "c" and "t" to make "cat"?  
  If we change the "c" to "b", what word do we have?  
D It's "BAT."  
M Let's read the work on the back of the card. 念一下卡片背后的字
  Let's find the word with the ee sound from the cards.  
  Sometimes two letters make just one sound.  
  The "s" and "h" make a ss sound like in "ship".  
  But this single letter has two different sounds.  
  The letter "g" sounds like the g in "go" or the 3 in "gel".  
  Look for the words that begin with the same sound. 找找开头发音相同的单词
  Let's look for the word that starts with an e sound.  
  Why don't you look for some words that rhyme with each other. 找出彼此押韵单词

数学（ch32-02.mp3）

加法
Role Sentence Notes
M What's 3 plus 2? 3加2等于几？
S 3 plus 2 equals 5. 3加2等于5. equal = be equal to
M Look! 2 more birds came. How many birds are there in all? 一共有多少只鸟？in all: 总共
S There were 3 birds already. So there are 5 birds all together. 原本有3只，所以共有5只鸟。
M If we write it in a number sentence, it's 3+2=5. number sentence: 数学公式
  5 is 2 more than 3. 5比3大2。
减法
Role Sentence Notes
  What's 5 minus 2? 减
D 5 minus 2 equals 3.  
M There were 5 birds, but 3 birds flew away. How many birds are left? 还剩几只鸟？
D I'll take away 3 from 5. 2 birds are left now. 从5中拿走3
M Let's write it in a number sentence. It's 5-3=2.  
  I took away 2 apples from 5 apples. How many are left?  
  I will give you three more apples. How many do you have now? 现在有多少个？
  By what number is 2 smaller than 5? 2比5小多少？
  What is 3 less than 5? 3比5小多少？
D 2 is 3 less than 5. 2比5小3.
乘法
Role Sentence Notes
M What's 3 times 2? 3乘2是多少？
  Read this multiplication sentence. 乘法公式
D 3 times 2 equals 6.  
M I have 2 sets of 3 pencils. How many pencils do I have? 我有两组三支铅笔的套装。
D Six pencils. It's the same as 3 plus 3. 这和3加3是一样的。
除法
Role Sentence Notes
M What's 6 divided by 2? 6除以2是多少？
  Read this division sentence. 除法公式
S 6 divided by 2 equals 3. 6除以2等于3
M Two kids will share 6 pencils equally. How many pencils can each have? 把6支铅笔平均分给两个小朋友，每个人可以有几支？
S Each kid can have 3 pencils because 6 is divided by 2. 把6除以2的话
分数
Role Sentence Notes
M If 1 is equally divided by 3, each part is called one third. 把1平均分成3份，每份叫做三分之一。
  It's read one fourth. 这个读作四分之一。
D Is it smaller than 1? 这个比1小吗？
M Let's cut this bread into 3 pieces. What do you call one piece. 把面包切成三块，一块叫什么？
D One part is one third.  
M The fraction sentence looks like this.  
D It's three fifths. 这是五分之三。
分数的念法

用英文读分数，要先读分子，再读分母。分子用基数读，分母用序数读。分子大于一时，分母后面要加上 -s。

科学（ch32-03.mp3）

天体
Role Sentence Notes
M It's midday. How do you know that? 现在是正午。你怎么知道呢？
D Because the sun is in the sky. 因为天上有太阳。
M The sun gives us light and heat. 太阳带给我们光和热。
  Whitout the sun, no living things could live. 没有太阳就没有生命。
  It's dark at night. What do you see in the sky? 晚上很暗
S We can see the moon in the night sky. night sky: 夜空
M Let's see how the moon changes its shape. 看看月亮怎样变化形状。
  There are full moon, a half moon, and a crescent moon. 满月，半月，新月
  What else can we see in the night sky?  
S We can see lots of stars. 我们能看到许多星星。
M Why don't we try finding the Big Dipper? 试着找找北斗七星吧。Big Dipper: 北斗七星
环境
Role Sentence Notes
D Mom, what's recycling? 什么是回收？
M It's when we try to use old things again. 回收就是我们试着再利用旧的东西。
  We can recycle glass bottles to use them again. 回收玻璃瓶再次使用
  Don't use too much shampoo. 不要用太多洗发精。
  It is said that we're running out of clean water. 有人说干净的水快被我们消耗光了。run out of
  You're wasting too much water.  
  We should save water by trying to use less. 通过少用水来节省水资源
  It's not easy to breathe in the city. 在城市里连呼吸都不容易。
  Smoke from cars is polluting the air. 汽车排放的黑烟污染了空气。
D Bikes don't pollute the air. 脚踏车不会污染
M When we ride our bikes, we can reduce our carbon footprint. 我们骑脚踏车的话，就可以减少碳足迹。carbon footprint
  The Earth is sick now. We need to protect it. 地球病了，我们要保护她。

社会（ch32-04.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Let's talk about our town.  
D There are houses, streets, and lots of buildings.  
M Let's draw a map of our town. 画地图
  Tell the others something nice about our town. 跟别人说说我们镇的优点。
  What do we need more of for our town? 我们的城镇还需要什么呢？more of
  What are some differences between the city and the country? 城乡的差异是什么？
D There are many people living in the city. 城市里住着很多人。
M What is nice about living in the country / city? 住在乡下/城市的好处是什么？
  What are some problems with living in the city / countryside? 住在城市/乡下的话会有什么问题？
  Can you remember when you went to the countryside?  
  What are some jobs that are found in the city? 在城市里可以找到哪些工作？
D My uncle is a farmer who lives in the countryside.  
  A fisherman catches fish and then sends them to the city.  
M Miners are getting smaller in number. 矿工的人数越来越少。in number: 数量上

体育（ch32-05.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Let's have our PE class now. 上体育课。PE: physical education, 体育
  You'd better wear your gym clothes in PE class. 'd (=had) better: 最好做…
S I also want to wear my running shoes. running shoes: 慢跑鞋
  Cool! Everyone, come out to the field! 去运动场
M We will start with some warmup exercises. 从暖身运动开始
  Stretch your arms and legs like this. 像这样伸展手臂和腿。
  We will divide into two teams and play a game. 我们分成两队进行比赛。
S Let's have a race. 赛跑
M Line up at the starting line. 站在起跑线上。
  Run around the field one time. 跑运动场一周。
  I will record your running time. 我会记录你跑的时间。
  Try your best. 尽力。
  We do cool-down exercises at the end of PE. 体育课结束时，我们来做放松运动。

Chapter 33: 要不要读英文故事书

选英文童话书（ch33-01.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Okay, so what are we going to read today?  
S I want to choose it by myself. 我想自己选。
  I want you to pick for me, Mommy. 我想要你帮我选。
M Bring any book that you want to read. 把你想读的书拿过来。
  How many books are we going to read?  
S Mom, I want you to read to me tonight.  
M Why don't we take turns? 轮流; take turns; why don't we: 何不
  I will read one book to you, and you read one book to me.  
S Can I read this book instead of an English book?  
M Then I will read you one English book and two books.  
S Mom, I like the drawings in this book. 我喜欢这本书的插图。drawing
M I like books by this author very much. 我喜欢这个作者的书。by = written by
D There are too many words in this book. 字数太多
  I never get tired of reading this book. 这本书再怎么读也不会烦。get tire of doing sth.: 厌烦
M You have read that book too many times. 读太多次了
  Why don't you try to read some other books, too? 试着读一些其他书
D It's fun every time I read it. 每次读都觉得很有趣
  This book looks fun. 这本书看起来很有趣。
  Wow, the cover looks pretty. How about this book? 封面很漂亮
M That book again? 又是那本书？
  Is this book that much fun? 这本书那么有趣吗？
  You chose a book that Mommy really likes.  
D This book is too hard / difficult.  
M Hmm, this book is for babies. Why don't you choose another one? 这是给小婴儿读的书
  Look at all the books that you brought! 看你拿了这么多的书！
  I'm going to lose my voice. 我快失声了。

讲故事（ch33-02.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Now I am going to tell you the story of this book.  
S What is the title? 书名是什么？
M This book's title is The Elves and the Shoemaker. 小精灵和鞋匠
  The authors are the brothers Grimm, and the illustrator is Hannah. the brothers Grimm: 格林兄弟
  Let's look at the cover first. What do you see?  
S I see an old man, some shoes, and elves, too.  
M So what do you think will happen in the story? Let's find out! 你觉得会发生什么故事呢？让我们找出来吧。
  Look more closely at the pictures. 看图更仔细一些
S I know that story. 我知道那个故事。
M Let's check if this story is one you already know. 我们来确认一下这个故事你是不是已经知道了。
  What will happen on the next page? 下一页会发生什么事呢？
  Look at the picture. What do you think is happening? 你觉得正在发生什么事情呢？
S I think the bird will fly away. 鸟要飞走了。
M Really? I'll read and see if your guess is correct. 我来看看你的猜测对不对。
  Bingo! What you said is actually right. 你说的是正确的。
  Now, we are done with reading the book. Did you guys like it? 我们读完这本书了。你们喜欢吗？
S Yes. Read it again, please!  
M Which part is the most interesting? 哪一部分最有趣呢？
S It was so fun / sad / boring. 太有趣/伤感/无聊了。
  I like when the Paper Bag Princess kicked the prince. 我喜欢纸袋公主踢王子的那一段。

大声朗读（ch33-03.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Let's try reading it out loud. 大声念出来
  You can read it slowly. 慢慢念
  I will read this page, and you read the other side. 我读这一页，你念另一面。
D I think I have a sore throat from reading. 我读得喉咙痛。
M Your voice does not have to be very loud. 不需要太大声
  As long as you can hear yourself, it's fine. 只要你自己能听得到就好。
  I can't hear you at all. at all: 根本
  It's okay if you get it wrong. I will help you. 错了也没关系
  I want you to repeat after me as I read line by line. 跟着读
D I don't know how to read this word. 不知道这个字怎么念。
  I can't really pronounce it. 我发不出这个音。
M Try to sound it out. It starts with an "l." 试着发音
  I will record it and let you listen to it. 录下来听
  If you keep practicing, you will get better for sure. 持续练习会变得更好
  Practice makes perfect. 持续练习臻于完美
D If I can't read, I want you to help me.  

安静阅读（ch33-04.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
S I don't want to read the book out loud. 不想要朗读这本书
M Well, then today you can read silently. 默读
  But you still have to read it thoroughly. 读完
S Mom, I want the house to be quiet. 希望房间保持安静
  Mom, I finished reading one book already. 读完一本书
M Wow, you read that fast? 你读得那样快？
  Is there anything you didn't understand while you were reading? 读的时候有什么不懂的地方吗？
  You can always ask me. 随时问我
  Even if you don't know some words, just keep on reading. 就算有些字你不认识，也要继续读下去。
  At the beginning, you might find it hard to read silently. 一开始获取会发现默读很难
  You will get used to it very soon. 很快就会习惯
  Pay attention to the pictures, too. They all look interesting. 好好看图，它们看起来都很有趣。
  Think about what the story is about as you are reading the book. 读的时候要想想这个故事讲了些什么。what A is about: A 跟什么有关
  It seems like you're not paying attention. 你好像没有集中精神。

理解单词的意思（ch33-05.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Is there any word that you don't know on this page?  
  Do you remember this word?  
D I remember seeing this word in another book. 我记得在其他书中看到过这个字
  Oh! I know that word! I've heard it. 我曾经听过。
M Is this your first time to see this word? 这是你第一次看到这个字吗？
  Let's take a look at the new words once more. 再看一次新的单词
  Should we mark the words that you learned today? 标记一下今天学的单词
  Mommy will write the words on the blackboard. blackboard: 黑板
D What does it mean in the story, Mom? 它们在故事里是什么意思？
M Try to guess its meaning. 试着猜测它的意思。
  Let's look it up in the dictionary. 用字典查一下。look sth. up: (在字典等里)查
  Do you want to look it up in the dictionary?  
  The word means "strong."  
  Try to think about what the word might mean one more time. 再想想这个单词可能是什么意思。
D Mom, its meaning is different from what I learned before. 那个意思跟我之前学的不一样。
M The word has several meanings. 这个单词有几种意思。

描述故事情节（ch33-06.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Who is the main character of the story? 这个故事的主人公是谁？main character
S The main characters are Hansel and Gretel.  
M What is the kid doing, and where is he doing it? 做什么，在哪里做？
  Why did he act that way? 为什么他那样做？
  What happened in the beginning? 刚开始发生了什么？
  Why did that happen? 为什么会发生那样的事？
  What happened in the middle of the story? 故事中间发生了什么？
  Now let's see the results of that action. 现在来看看那样做的结果。
  How would he have felt in this situation? 这种情况下，他的心情如何？
  What would you have done if that were you? 如果是你的话，你会怎么做？
S I don't think I would have done that if I were him. 如果我是他，我想我不会那样做。
M After that, what happened? 接下来发生了什么？
  What do you think will happen in the end? 你觉得最后会怎样发展？
  What happened at the end of the story? 故事最后发生了什么？
  How would you like the story to end? 你希望故事怎样结束？
  How is the problem solved? 问题是如何解决的？
S The main character overcame the difficulty / challenge. 主人公克服了困难/挑战。
  The problem was solved when they found the lost key.  
  I'm so relieved that the story ended happily. 很欣慰是个快乐的结局

谈谈登场人物（ch33-07.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Let's see what characters are in this book. 看看这本书有什么角色。
  An animal is the main character of this book.  
  What is the girl doing?  
  Why was the boy mad in this part? 这一段为什么男孩生气了？
  What kind of person is he? 他是个怎样的人？
  Who do you like the most? / Who is your favorite character?  
D I like Kipper the most.  
  How old is Arthur?  
  Mom, Nate always eats pancakes. pancake: 薄煎饼
  How come the fly talk? 苍蝇为何能说话？
M Well, in books, animals can talk with one another. 在书中动物可以彼此交谈。
D Mom, I think this boy is really silly. 我觉得这男孩真傻。
  Mom, where is the child's mother?  
  Does he / she live alone?  
  How come the princess is so ugly? 公主怎么会那么丑呢？
M There are several main characters in this book.  
D I think DW is more like the main character than Arthur. 我想 DW 比 Arthur 更像主人公。
M What does the main character look like? 主角看起来像什么？
  What did the main character do? 主角做了什么？
  Where and with whom, does the main character live? 主角在哪里、和谁住在一起？
  How did his feelings change throughout the book? 随着故事的发展，他的心情是怎么变化的？

听CD（ch33-08.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Please listen carefully. 请仔细听。
  Concentrate and listen to the story. 集中精神听故事。
  You will hear a story from the CD.  
  Look at the words as you are listening to it. 一边听一边看这些单词。
  You can point to the words with your finger while listening. 边听边用手指指着这些单词
  Okay, I'll play the CD then.  
  Think about the story while your are listening. 边听边想想这是什么故事。
S I want to listen to it one more time. 再听一次
  Can you play the last few seconds again? / Can you play that last minute again? 能把最后几秒再播放一遍吗？
  Can you go back and play the last track? 倒回去播放上一节
  Mom, can you stop the CD for a minute?  
  I don't know where to read because the person is speaking too fast.  
M Turn the page. It's on the middle part. 翻这一页。这是中间的部分。
  It's the 5th line from the bottom / top. 从下面/上面开始数第五行
S The voice sounds really funny. Haha! 那个声音真的很好笑
  It's too difficult. I want to listen to a different one.  
  I want you to read the book to me.  
M Do you want me to put headphones on you? 想要我帮你戴耳机吗？
  Are you doing fine listening to the story? 你在好好听故事吗？
  Mommy finds this part to be the most fun, too. 妈妈也觉得这部分最有趣。
  You missed that part. 你错过了那部分。

阅读后的活动（ch33-09.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M How was the book? 这本书如何？
D It was moving / fun / just okay. 感动/有趣/一般般
M Was it too difficult for you? 对你来说太难了吗？
D I understood most of it. 我几乎都理解了。
  I don't know what the story is about. 我不知道故事内容是什么。
M Do you want to talk about the story with Mommy? 想跟妈妈讲讲这个故事吗？
  Let's summerize the story together. 一起对这个故事做个简短总结
D Mom, let me tell you what the story is about. 我来告诉你这个故事在讲什么。
M Do you want to try writing a book report? 试着写读书心得
  Let's write a letter to the main character. 给主人公写信
  Why don't you and I do the role-playing activity together? 玩角色扮演
  Write in your reading log since you're done reading. 记读书日志
D I've read 200 books so far. 到目前为止，我堵了200本书。

Chapter 34: 观赏英文影片

选英文影片（ch34-01.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
S Mom, it's time to watch a DVD!  
  Mom, can I watch a DVD?  
M What DVD do you want to watch today?  
  Want to watch the new one that we recently bought?  
  Why don't you pick one by yourself?  
S Please play Caillou.  
  I want to watch the Magic School Bus.  
M Do you want me to choose it for you? 要我帮你选吗？
  You have watched it too many times. 看过很多次
  Why don't you try to choose another one? 试着选其他
S Can I see 2 DVDs today?  
M Well, you know that watching too much TV is not good for you. 看太多电视对你不好
S Can I watch it again?  
  I want to watch the one that I saw yesterday.  
  It's my turn to chhoose the DVD because Minsu picked his favorite yesterday. 这次轮到我来选DVD了。
M We'll watch the DVD for 30 minutes only. Okay? 只看30分钟DVD
S I like the Disney animations the most. 我最喜欢迪士尼的卡通。
  I want the English subtitles. 我要英文字幕。
  Can I watch it with the subtitles on? 可以打开字幕看吗？
M Let's watch it without any subtitles. 看没有字幕的。
  You can watch it this time only. 只能看这一次。
  Well, let's stop here today. 今天就到这儿吧。

播放DVD（ch34-02.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
D Mom, how do I play the DVD? 怎么播放DVD？
M I will show you how, so watch carefully. 示范；仔细看好。
  Let's try to control it with the remote control. 遥控器，简称 remote
  Place the DVD into the player. 把DVD放入播放器。
  Handle it by inserting your index finger into the center hole. 把食指放入中间的洞来拿着。handle: 拿
  If DVDs get scratched, they can be broken. 如果DVD被刮伤了，它们会坏。
D Mom, I want to play the DVD by myself.  
M Okay, sure. Give it a try. 好，可以。你试试！
  Put the lid back and push the play button. 盖上盖子后，按下播放键。
  Change the TV into "outside input" mode. 把电视机转换到『外部输入』模式。
D Mom, it does not work. / it's not working. 它不动/不工作。
  I saw this part already. Please skip the movie to the next part. 跳到下一部分
M It's too loud. Please turn it down. 声音太大了，请调低声音。
  Don't you think the sound is already too loud? 不觉得声音已经太大了吗？
D I think this will be just right. 这样刚刚好
  Can you please turn the volume up a little? 把音量调大一点
M Do you want me to turn up the volume a little bit? 要我把音量调大一点吗？
  If you listen to it that loud, your ears will get hurt. 如果你听得那么大声，你的耳朵会受伤的。get hurt: 受伤
  Press the stop button.  
  When the disc stops spinning, we'll take it out. 当光碟停止转动，我们就把它拿出来。
  When you are finished, be sure to turn the TV and audio off. 当你看完时，一定要把电视和音响关掉。
  Put the DVD back into the case carefully. 把DVD小心放入盒子里。

Chapter 35: 英文日记/读书心得

英文读书心得（ch35-01.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
S The title of the book is Thank You, Mr. Falker. 书名是
  The author of the book is Patricia Polacco. 作者是
  The ilustrator is Amanda Smith. 插画家是
  The main character of the story is Trisha. 故事的主人公是
  The main characters are Trisha and Mr. Falker.  
  The setting of the story is the 1950s. 故事的背景是1950年代。
  I like the story because Mr. Falker is a great teacher. 我喜欢这个故事，因为…
  My favorite part is when Trisha learns how to read with Mr. Falker. 我最喜欢的部分是

英文日记（ch35-02.mp3）

好心情
Role Sentence Notes
S I will write a journal in English. 用英文写日记
  I was so excited today.  
  Playing tag is really fun. 玩捉迷藏真的很有趣。
  Today is such a fantastic day. 今天是这么棒的一天！
  I hope every day will be like today. 我希望每天都像今天这样。
  I am so happy my mom bought me new pants.  
  I was so happy that I jumped up and down. 蹦蹦跳跳
  I will never forget today. 我绝对忘不了今天。
  I'm very happy because I got a perfect score on my test. 考试考了满分
  I was laughing to death. 我笑死了。to death: 极度的，非常
  It was my first time to ride on a train, and I felt amazing. 第一次乘火车；感到惊奇
坏心情
Role Sentence Notes
D I feel terrible. 心情很差
  I'm really distressed. 伤心；distressed
  I fought with my friend. 和朋友打架
  I lost my money. 丢了钱
  I got annoyed at everything. 对所有事都感到很烦
  The toy that I like the most is broken. 玩具坏了
  I am worried that I might not be able to get it fixed. 担心修不好；get A fixed
  A big kid hit me in the back at school. 在学校有个高大的小孩打我的后背。
  I had to force myself not to cry. / I tried not to cry very hard. 强迫自己不要哭/不要哭太大声
  I feel sorry for my brother because I got mad at him. 我对弟弟感到抱歉，因为我对他发脾气了。get made at: 对…发脾气
  I am very depressed because I got scolded by Mom. 我非常郁闷，因为我被妈妈责备了。depressed: 郁闷的
  I was very sad because my friend moved away. move away: 搬家
  I feel bad and sad about not winning the prize. 没有得奖我感到又伤心又难受
  I wanted to hit my sister so much. 我真的很想打我的姐姐。
  I could not go out today because of the rain. 因为下雨不能出门
  So many bad things kept happening today. 今天一直发生很多坏事。
  My heart was aching so much because my fish died. 我的心很痛，因为我的鱼死了。

Part 8: 年龄别英文表现：从出生到小学

Chapter 36: 孩子即将出生

宣布怀孕的消息（ch36-01.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M I have some really good news for you. 有个好消息要告诉你
  Mom is having a baby! 妈妈有小宝宝了！
  Mommy has a baby here.  
  You will have a baby brother or sister soon. 你很快就有弟弟或妹妹了。
  You're going to be a big sister. 你要当姐姐了。
  The baby will look exactly like you. 小孩会看起来和你很像。look like: 和…像
D Wow, am I going to be a big sister now? 我现在要当姐姐了吗？
  Now I have a baby brother!  
  Now I have a baby sister!  
  I have always envied my friends who have younger brothers / sisters. 我一直很羡慕有弟弟/妹妹的朋友。
M Are you going to play well with your baby brother or sister? 和弟弟或妹妹好好玩
D I will be nice to the baby. 我会对小宝宝很好的。
  I will share my toys with my brother or sister. 把玩具分给弟弟或妹妹玩
M Let's call Grandma and tell her the good news.  

是妹妹？还是弟弟？（ch36-02.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
S What's the baby's name? 宝宝的名字是什么？
M We haven't decided yet. Let's just call it Rabbit for now. 还没决定。先叫他 Rabiit吧。
  The baby's pre-birth name is Button. 胎名是Button。pre-birth name = fetal name
  Do you want a baby sister or brother? 你想要妹妹还是弟弟？
S I want a pretty baby sister.  
M What do you like for your baby brother's name? 你想要你的弟弟叫什么名字？
S I think Wensu will be a good name. 我想Winsu是个好名字。
  I want to call him Wensu. 我想叫他Wensu。
  Make sure you don't only love the new baby. Okay? 保证不可以只疼小宝宝
M Both of you are our children, so I will love both of you equally. 你们两个我都 一样爱
  Of course! Mom loves Songjin the most. The baby is the next. 妈妈最爱你，然后才是小宝宝。
S Is there a baby inside Mommy's tummy? 妈妈肚子里有小宝宝吗？
M The baby will be growing in my tummy for the next ten months? 接下来的十个月小宝宝会在妈妈肚子里长大。
  So I need help from you from now on. 从现在起我需要你的帮助
S Don't worry, Mom. I will help you out with all the hard work. 不用担心。我会帮你做所有辛苦的事情。

谈预产期（ch36-03.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M I have to see my doctor for a regular checkup today. regular checkup: 定期检查
D When is the baby due?  
  How many days are left till the due date? 离预产期还有多少天？due date: 预订日，期满日
  Why isn't the baby coming out yet? 为什么小宝宝还没出来？
M Well, it's still far away. 还早呢。
  You have to wait a long time. 你还要等一段时间。
  It seems like he's / she's not ready to see the world. 看起来他还没有做好来看世界的准备。
  The baby will be born in a month. 小宝宝会在一个月后出生。
  Fifteen days are left till the baby's due date. 离预产期还有15天。
  In a week or so, the baby will come out. 再过一周小宝宝就要出来了。
  It's almost time for the baby to come. 小宝宝的出生时间快到了。
  In a few days, you will meet your baby brother.  
  Tomorrow is the due date for the baby. 明天就是宝宝的预产日了。
  Well, the due date has passed, but the baby is still not coming out. 预产期都过了，小宝宝还是没出来。
D I can't wait to see my baby brother. 我等不及要见我的弟弟了。

对肚子内的小宝宝说话（ch36-04.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Hi, baby, this is your Mommy.  
  Sweetie, do you hear Mommy's voice?  
  Mommy and Daddy are so happy to have you.  
  Whenever I think of you, I feel so happy.  
  You are Mommy and Daddy's gift and joy. 你是爸爸妈妈的礼物和喜悦。
  Mommy and Daddy can't wait to see you.  
  You can't also wait to see Mommy and Daddy?  
  Mommy is going to sing you a song.  
  This is Mommy's favorite song. Listen to it.  
  Mommy will read you a story.  
  Oh, Sweetie, you're kicking now! Wow, look at how strong you are. 看你多强壮啊！
  Mommy is eating the delicious strawberries for you. Aren't they delicious?  
  Mommy is listening to some beautiful songs now. Can you hear them?  
S My dear baby brother, I can't wait to see you, too.  
  When we meet, let's play soccer and some games together. 当我们见面后，一起踢足球和玩游戏吧。
  I will take good care of you. I promise. 我会好好照顾你。
  When you come out, I will play with you every day.  
  Don't give Mommy a hard time. Okay? 不要让妈妈太辛苦，好吗？
  Be nice to Mommy, dear brother! 好好对妈妈。
  I look forward to seeing you very much! 我非常期待见到你！look forward to doing: 期待…

小宝宝的出生（ch36-05.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M I'm going to have our baby today. / I'm going to give birth today. 生小宝宝
  Hi, my baby. I'm your mommy.  
  Did you have a hard time coming to see the world? 为了来看世界你辛苦了吧？have a hard time doing sth.: 做…很辛苦
  You really, really did a good job. 你真的做得很好。
  Mommy is very proud of you, Sweetie. 以你为荣
  You look so much prettier than Mommy imagined. 你比妈妈想象的漂亮多了。
  You have no idea how much we were waiting to see you. 你不知道我们等了多久才见到你。
  Mommy and Daddy are so happy that you are a healthy baby.  
D I really want to see you, my baby brother.  
  I'm your big sister.  

双胞胎（ch36-06.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M The babies are identical twins. 同卵双胞胎
  The babies are fraternal twins. / The twins look different from each other. 异卵双胞胎; fraternal: 友爱的，兄弟的
D Their eyes, noses, and lips all look the same.  
  Both of them are so adorable. 很可爱
  I can't tell who's who. 我分不清谁是谁。
M Who do you think the younger one is? 谁是弟弟
  The baby who was born first is the older brother / sister.  
  We will need two of everything. 每样东西我们都要双份
  Mommy will have twice as hard a time taking care of the twins. 妈妈照顾双胞胎会加倍辛苦。
  It will be really nice if Jina can help Mommy. 如果Jina能帮助妈妈那就太好了。
D One of my friends is a twin, too.  
M Let's celebrate the birth of the twins! 庆祝双胞胎出生
  We are now one family. 我们是一家人了。

Chapter 37: 孩子，有你真好（0~12个月）

喂牛奶（ch37-01.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M It's time for some milk. 该喝牛奶了。
  Are you hungry? Do you want some milk, Sweetie?  
  Okay, okay. Mommy will feed you very soon. 马上喂你
  Mommy will mix a bottle. Just wait for a second. Okay?  
  Mommy will nurse you soon. nurse: 喂奶, 照顾
  It looks that you prefer the breast to the bottle. 比起来用奶瓶，你更喜欢母乳。
  Were you hungry? Drink the milk and grow well. 喝奶快快长大哦。
  Oh, that hurts. Don't bite Mommy!  
  Is it hard to suck Mom's breast? 吸母乳很难吧？
  Okay. We'll take a break for a second. 休息一下
  Look at you! You are eating very well! 你很会吃哦。
  Why don't you have a little bit more? 为什么你不多吃一点呢？
  Oh, you want to stop? Are you full now? 你不吃了吗？你饱了吗？
  Is too much milk coming out? You are coughing. 太多母乳出来了吗？你在咳嗽。
  The mild won't come out well? Sorry. My breast milk is not enough. 母乳出来得不顺吗？抱歉，我的母乳不太足。
  See how Mommy nurses our baby. 看妈妈怎么喂宝宝。
  You were just like this years ago. 几年前你也是这样。
  Okay, baby, now you need to burp. 现在你需要打嗝。
  Let me help you burp. 帮你打嗝
  Mommy will gently pat your back. 轻轻拍背
  Wow, you did it! 你做到了！
  Gosh, you threw up! 哎呀，你吐了！

换尿布（ch37-02.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Oops! Your diaper is wet. 尿布湿了
  Did you wet your diaper?  
  Okay, baby, it's time to change your diaper. 换尿布
  Let's see. Hmm… Is it wet?  
  Oh, the diaper is still okay. 尿布还好。
  Wow, you pooed a lot. 你拉了好多便便。poo (=poop) 幼儿用语，大便
  Oh, you even made some poo-poo. It stinks! 你还便便了，好臭！
  Your poop looks too watery. Was your tummy sick? 便便看起来好稀。你肚子疼吗？
  Mommy didn't know you peed / pooed.  
  Eeek! Let me take off the dirty diaper. 啊！让我拿掉脏尿布。
  Okay, stay still. 不要动
  Let's clean your hips with baby wipes. Wishy-washy! 用湿纸巾擦屁屁。轻轻地擦。baby wipes: 婴儿湿巾
  We also have to put some powder on. 扑点粉
  So, how do you feel now, Sweetie? Feel dry and fresh? 现在感觉如何？有没有感觉很干净清爽？
  Okay, now put your pretty hips upward. 太高屁股
  You want Mommy to massage your legs, Honey? 按摩腿部
  Stretch~ stretch! Mommy will give you a massage. 伸开，伸开。妈妈帮你按摩。
  Okay, now bend your knees. Then, stretch them up. 玩下膝盖。把脚伸开。
  Now let's put your pretty legs up toward to the sky. 把腿朝天抬起
  Now, let's put on a new diaper. 穿上新尿布
  Yay! Your diaper has been changed. Feel great? 尿布换好了。感觉很棒吧？

洗澡（ch37-03.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Hey, Sweetie, it's time for a bath. 要洗澡了
  Now, let's get rid of your clothes and your diaper, too. 脱下衣服和尿布
  Let's get into the tub. 进浴缸
  Doesn't the water feel nice and warm? Or is it not warm enough? 水是不是又好又暖呢？还是不够热？
  Let's play with the toy duck. Quack, quack!  
  Why don't you paddle your feet? Splash! Splash! 用脚划水。滑呀，滑呀。
  Let's wash your hair first. 洗头
  Mommy will make some bubbles with the shampoo. 把洗发水揉成泡泡
  Let's wash it with some clean water. 用干净的水来洗
  This slippery thing is called soap. 这个滑滑的东西叫肥皂。
  Now, let's wash your face and rub your body. 洗脸和身体
  Do your eyes hurt? 眼睛疼吗？
  Mommy will rinse it off quickly. 冲掉
  Okay, now let's wash off all the soap. 洗掉肥皂
  It's all done. Let me dry you off with a towel. 都洗好了。我用毛巾把你擦干。
  You are even prettier / more handsome after a bath. 洗完澡后你更漂亮了。even: 放在比较级前面表示『更加』
  Do you feel clean, baby? 你觉得干净吗？
  Now that we have taken a bath, how do you feel? 现在我们洗完澡了，你觉得如何？

抱/背（ch37-04.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Do you want me to hold you? 要我抱你吗？
  Do you want me to give you a piggy-back ride? 要我背你吗？
  Come here, Sweetie. Let me give you a piggy-back ride.  
  Mommy will bring the baby strap. 拿婴儿背带。baby strap
  Mommy will hold you with the baby carrier. 用婴儿背带背；baby carrier
  How is it? Are you comfortable? 怎么样？你觉得舒服吗？
  Is there anything that's bothering you? 有什么东西让你觉得不舒服吗？
  Just lean on Mommy. 靠着妈妈就好。
  Sweetie, do you like riding on Mommy's back? 喜欢让妈妈背吗？
  Why don't you sleep on Mommy's back? 在妈妈背上睡觉
  Can you hear Mommy's heartbeat? 听到心跳
  Do you want to come down now? 下来
  Why don't you come down? Mommy's arms hurt. 为什么不下来？妈妈的手臂疼了。
  Want to stay on Mommy's back for a little longer?  
  Okay, let me put you down now. 放你下来
Tip: 婴儿用品的名称
baby carrier 婴儿背带，可以把婴儿固定在前面或后面
baby sling 西式婴儿背巾
baby car seat 婴儿汽车安全座椅（包括婴儿安全篮）
crib 婴儿床
baby stroller 婴儿推车
baby swing seat 婴儿用的摇摇椅

哄宝宝睡觉（ch37-05.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M It's time for a nap. 该睡午觉了。nap: 午觉
  Why are you crying? Are you sleepy? 你困了吗？
  You are starting to whine. 你开始哀哀叫了。
  Are you tired? I think it's time to sleep.  
  Come here. Mommy will put you to sleep. put A to sleep: 让/哄…入睡
  Do you want to lie beside Mom and sleep together? 躺在妈妈旁边
  Want to ride piggy-back while you try to sleep? 想趴在妈妈背上睡吗？
  Do you want to ride in the stroller as you try to sleep? 要坐在婴儿推车上睡吗？
  Sleep tight for a while, Sweetie. 睡个好觉。
  Do you want me to sing you a lullaby? 唱摇篮曲
  Go to dreamland as you listen to Mommy's lullaby? 进入梦乡
  A good girl / boy never gets peevish before sleeping. peevish: 抱怨的，易怒的
  You're so cranky tonight. cranky: 烦躁的
  Here's your pacifier. pacifier: 安慰奶嘴
  You have to sleep so that you can grow. 睡觉才能长大
  Sweetie, close your eyes now and sleep tight. 闭上眼睛好好睡觉
  The more you sleep, the more you grow.  
  You can meet Mommy in your dreams, Sweetie.  
  Wow, you sleep like an angel. 你睡觉的样子像个天使。

牙牙学语（ch37-06.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Hey, you started babbling. 你开始学说话了。babble: 牙牙学语
  You've been cooing all day long. 你一整天都在小声说话。coo: 婴儿、鸽子等发出小小的咯咯声
  You keep gurgling. Are you feeling good? 心情好；gurgle: 流水等发出咯咯声
  Right. That's right. 那样就对了。
  Oh, sweet baby, do you want to talk? 你想说话吗？
  You will be able to talk soon. 你很快就会说话了。
  Look at Mommy and keep talking.  
  What are you saying? What do you mean? 你在说什么？ / 那是什么意思？
  Here we have a chatty baby. chatty: 多话的
  Oh my, stop cooing now. 喔，现在不要再嘀咕了。
  Stop cooing and eat, Sweetie.  
  Yay! It seems like you're feeling great. 看起来心情很好
  Arms waving. Legs kicking. Are you that happy? 你那么开心吗？
  You look so excited. I'm excited to see you.  

哄正在哭的小孩（ch37-07.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Why do you keep on crying? What's bothering you? keep on doing: 持续…
  What's wrong, Honey? 有什么问题吗？
  I wonder what's going on. 我想知道发生什么事了。
  Okay, okay, Sweetie. Mommy's here. 妈妈在这里。
  Stop! Stop crying, Sweetie. 不要哭了。
  Is your diaper wet? 尿布湿了吗？
  Are you sleepy? Do you want to take a nap? 困了吗？想睡午觉吗？
  Are you hungry? Is that why you are crying? 那是为什么你哭的原因吗？
  Do you want some milk? 要喝奶吗？
  Do you want me to give you a bottle? 要奶瓶吗？
  Please stop whining, baby. 不要再哀嚎了。
  You're such a demanding baby. 你真是个难搞的宝贝。demanding: 要求多的，不容易满足的
  If you keep on crying, a scary monster will come and get you. 如果你还一直哭的话，可怕的怪物就会来把你抓走。

翻身（ch37-08.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M You don't want to lie on your back? lie on one's back: 仰卧
  Do you want to roll over? roll over: 翻身
  Are you going to turn over and move around? turn over: 翻身；move around: 移动
  Look at you! You are trying to turn yourself over. 努力翻身
  Okay, you are almost there. Try a little bit harder. 你几乎快做到了。再努力一点点。
  Wow, you finally turned over by yourself!  
  Wow, you made it, baby! 你做到了。make it: 成功，做到
  It was pretty tough, wasn't it, Sweetie? 这很辛苦，不是吗？
  Oh, no! Don't turn over while I am chaning your diaper. 不要在换尿布时翻身

坐（ch37-09.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Do you want to sit up? 你想坐起来吗？sit down: 坐下
  Oh, you might fall down. Be careful! 摔倒；小心！
  Now straighten your back and hold it strongly. 挺直你的背；用力撑住
  You are sitting, sitting… sitting… 坐起来…坐起来…坐起来…
  Ah, you were almost there! 喔，你几乎做到了。
  Wow, finally, you sat up! 你终于做起来了！
  Are you tired now? Do you want to lie down again?  
  Will you sit in the baby walker? 坐学步车。baby walker: 学步车

爬行（ch37-10.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M It's time for tummy time. 该趴一下了。
  Oh my! You can push yourself up on your tummy. 天呀！你能趴着用手把自己撑起来了。
  Now you have learned how to crawl! 你学会了爬行！
  Do you want to crawl?  
  Want to crawl to the front / back? 往前/后爬
  Put a little more effort into it. There you go! 再努力一点，就是那样。
  You are using your knees to crawl. 用膝盖爬
  You are crawling with your knees up. 抬起膝盖爬
  Crawl over to Mommy. 爬向妈妈。
  Okay, put more effort into it. Come to Mommy.  
  You are crawling so well. 你爬得很好。
  You're crawling all over the house. 满屋子爬
  Oh no! This crawling baby touches everything. 到处乱摸
Tip: Tummy Time

指让醒着的小孩趴着的时间。这样做的话，孩子就可以在地板上玩玩具，还可以练习抬脖子，也是开始翻身的第一步。因此，边说 It's your tummy time 边让小孩趴一会儿。注意婴儿趴着的时候大人一定要看着。

长牙齿的时候（ch37-11.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Let me look in your mouth. 看看嘴巴里面
  Don't your gums feel itchy? / Your gums must be itching. 牙床痒
  Here's your teether. teether: 小孩长牙齿时咬的玩具
  It seems like your baby teeth will come out. 乳牙要长出来了。
  Congratulations! You're about to get your first teeth. 你的第一颗牙齿要长出来了。
  Finally, your baby teeth are coming out! 乳牙长出来了！
  Hey, baby, you have teeth now!  
  I see two front teeth on the bottom. 下面有两颗门牙
  I think you will have two front upper teeth soon. 上面的门牙
  Mommy will brush your teeth, Sweetie. 刷牙
  Mommy will massage your gums. 按摩牙床
  Oh my! You drool too muc. Honey. 流口水
  You've gotten a rash from all that drooling. 你流了这么多口水，都长疹子了。

抓着走路（ch37-12.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Let's try standing up. 试着站起来。
  Do you think you can stand up now, baby?  
  Hold on to Mommy's hands. 抓住妈妈的手。
  Okay, now we're standing up.  
  Don't give up. You are almost there! 不要放弃，你快做到了。
  That's right. You are doing great! 对，你做的很好！
  Don't let go of Mommy's hands. 不要放开妈妈的手。
  Be careful. You might fall down. 可能会摔倒
  Oops, you fell down.  
  Desn't it hurt? Are you okay? 不疼吗？你还好吗？
  Don't cry. It's all right. We'll try one more time. 不要哭，没事的。我们再试一次。
  Now you are standing up! 站起来了。

喂辅食（ch37-13.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M It's time for your meal, Sweetie. 该吃饭了。
  You must be hungry. Let's eat now.  
  What will we have to eat today? 今天要吃什么呢？
  It is very delicious vegetable porridge. 美味的蔬菜粥；porridge: 粥
  Hmm. It smells nice, right? 闻起来很棒。
  Look! Isn't the color so pretty? 颜色很漂亮吧？
  Say "Ah." Delicious, isn't it?  
  Enjoy your meal, Honey. 享受饭饭
  Don't forget to chew before you swallow. 吞下去之前不要忘记咀嚼
  Wow, you can chew really well.  
  You spilled some. 流出了一些
  You got food all over your face. Let me wipe it off for you. 你满脸都是食物，我帮你擦掉。
  No, no! Don't eat food that has fallen on the floor. 不要吃掉在地上的食物。
  Come on. Spit it out. 来，吐出来。
  Why don't you have one more bite? 要不要多吃一口？
  You want some more? 想要多吃一点吗？
  You don't want to eat anymore? Are you full now? 不想再吃了吗？觉得饱了吗？
  You've spilled more food than you've actually eaten. 流掉的食物比吃下去的还多。
  My lovely baby is such a good eater! 吃得很好
  It seems like you've eaten enough. 看起来已经吃够了

Chapter 38: 一天一天地长大（13~36个月）

学走路（ch38-01.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Okay, Sweetie, let's try walking now. 试着走路
  Hold Mommy's hands.  
  Okay, now take one step. 跨出一步
  Now one foot. Now the other. 一只脚，另一只脚。
  Good! You are doing really well. 做得很好
  Now Mommy will let go of your hands. 妈妈要放开你的手了。let go of sth.: 放开…
  Do you think you can walk by yourself? 你觉得可以自己走吗？
  It's okay to fall down. 摔倒也没关系。
  Mommy will hold you. 妈妈会抓住你的
  Can you walk alll the way up to Mommy? 你能一直走到妈妈这边吗？all the way: 一直到；up to: 到…
  Easy! Easy does it. 慢一点！慢慢来！
  Oops, you fell down.  
  Don't cry. It's all right. We can try one more time. 不要哭，没关系，我们可以再试一次。
  You will walk very well if you practice a little bit more.  
  Let's stop here for today. 今天到此为止。
  Yay! My Minsu is finally walking. 我的Minsu终于走路了。

排便训练（ch38-02.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Do you want to pee / poop? poop = poo
  Do you want to go to the bathroom? 去厕所
  Don't you feel like peeing? 想要小便吗？feel like doing: 想要…
  It's time to go pee with Mom. 跟妈妈一起去小便
  Pull down your underpants and sit on the potty. 落下内裤，坐在马桶上。potty: 幼儿用马桶
  Since you are a boy, you have to stand when you pee. 站着尿尿
  Did you pee on your pants? 尿在裤子上
  Did you need to go that badly? 有必要那么着急吗？
  You should not hold it. You should go to the potty. 不应该忍着。应该去上马桶。
  If you pee anywhere, Mom will have a very hard time. 如果你到处尿的话，妈妈会很辛苦。
  It's all right. You will do better next time. 没关系，下次你会做得更好。
  When you feel like peeing, just call me. 当你想小便，叫我。
  You peed in the potty. Very good! 你尿在马桶里了。非常好！
  You'll have to poop in this potty from now on. 从现在开始必须在这个马桶里便便。
  You have to sit here when you poo. 一定要坐在这里便便。
  Are you finished? 你好了吗？
  Let me wipe it off. Turn your butt toward Mommy. 我来把它擦掉。把屁屁转向妈妈。butt: 屁股
  Pull up your underwear first. Then, pull up your pant. 先拉上内裤，再拉上裤子。
  Good! You did really well.  
  You're done with diapers, Sweetie! 你戒掉尿布了。
  No more diapers anymore. 不再使用尿布了。

戒掉奶瓶（ch38-03.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M From now on, you have to eat meals instead of drinking milk. 用吃饭代替喝奶
  Crying won't do anything. 哭也没有用。
  Bottles are for babys lying in bed. 奶瓶是给躺在床上的婴儿使用的。
  Mommy already got rid of all the baby bottles. 把所有奶瓶都丢掉了。get rid of
  The bottles are all gone since you're a big boy. 奶瓶都不见了。
  Let's say bye to the baby bottles now.  
  Let's drink milk from a cup. 用杯子喝牛奶
  This is a really pretty cup. 这真是个漂亮的杯子
  I will pour the milk into a cup with a straw. 把牛奶倒入有吸管的杯子
  Try drinking milk like Mom. 试着像妈妈一样喝牛奶。
  You need meals to grow. 吃饭才能长大
  I bought a plate and a spoon for you.  
  Do you want some delicious food here? 你想在这儿放些美味的食物吗？
  My baby uses a spoon like Mom and Dad.  

舔手指头的习惯（ch38-04.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M No, no. You should not put your finger into your mouth. 不可以把手指头放进嘴巴里。
  Take out your finger now. 现在把手指拿出来。
  There's a lot of dirt on your finger. 手指上有很多脏东西。
  If you lick it, your tummy will hurt. 舔手指会肚子痛。
  Your finger will get ugly, too. 手指头会变丑。
  Look at what you are doing. 看看你在做什么。
  Your finger is in your mouth again.  
  Does it even taste good? 那是好吃的东西吗？
  Your hand is now all covered with your saliva. 现在你满手都是口水。saliva: 口水
  Mommy will wipe it off for you. 妈妈帮你擦掉。
  I don't know how to stop you from sucking your fingers. 我不知道怎么做才能让你不吸手指头。
  Mommy really wants you to stop sucking your finger. 妈妈真的希望你不要再吸手指头了。

带婴儿出门（ch38-05.mp3）

婴儿推车
Role Sentence Notes
M Let's get into the stroller now. 现在我们要坐婴儿推车了。
  Put your legs through here. 把你的脚穿过这里。
  How is it? Is it comfortable? 怎么样？舒服吗？
  Let's put on the sunshade, too. 把遮阳罩戴上。
  The belt is too loose / tight. 安全带太松/紧。
  Vroom, vroom. Here we go! 我们走吧！
  Hold on tightly to the handle. 抓紧把手。
  It will rattle, so hold on tightly. 这边有点不平，一定要抓紧。rattle: 咯咯作响
  Lean your body backwards. 身体往后靠。backwards: 往后
婴儿安全座椅
Role Sentence Notes
M This is your seat from now on.  
  Sweetie, let me help you to sit in the car seat. 我帮你坐进婴儿座椅。
  Why? Don't you want to sit there? 怎么了？你不想坐那里吗？
  Place your back all the way to the backrest. 把你的后背紧紧靠在椅背上。backrest: 椅背
  Do you feel at home there? 你觉得那里象在家里一样吗？at home: 如在家般的舒适
  It is safe to sit in the car seat. 坐在婴儿座椅里才安全。
  You can look out the window better from the car seat. 你从婴儿座椅可以更容易看到窗外。
  Okay, we are going! 好，我们出发！
  Everyone, get out of the way! 各位，请让路！
  You are getting cranky again in the car seat. 闹脾气
  Hold on for a second. We are almost there. 再忍一下，我们快到了。

拒绝给点心（ch38-06.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Do you want a snack again?  
  They are all gone. You already ate them up. 都没有了。你已经都吃完了。
  This is the last snack of the day. 这是今天最后的点心了。
  Your searching for snack won't help. 你再怎么找点心也是没用的。
  It's not there. You won't find it. 不在那儿，你找不到的。
  You can't find it anywhere. 你在哪里都找不到。
  I said no more. Okay? 我说过不能再吃，知道吗？
  Eat your meal first. 先吃饭。
  You should eat a snack after your meal. 先吃饭再吃点心。
  Once you are done with the meal, I will give you something. 吃完饭；be done with sth.: 完成…
  If you eat a snack first, you will lose your appetite for the meal. 如果先吃点心，就没有胃口吃饭。
  If you keep on whining, I won't tell you where the candy is. 如果你还哭哭唧唧，我就不告诉你糖在哪里。
  It's no use crying, Honey. 哭也没用。It's no use doing: 做…没用
  We've eaten all the snacks already. Let's wait till tomorrow. 我们已经吃完点心了，等明天吧。

性别的疑惑（ch38-07.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
D Why do only girls wear skirts? 为什么只有女生穿裙子？
M Men and women are different.  
D Mom, why are your breasts big? 为什么你的胸很大？
M It's because I'm a woman.  
D Is there mild inside your breasts?  
M Yes. There used to be milk to feed you. used to: 以前做过…
  Women pee sitting down because we don't have peanuts. 女生坐着小便，因为我们没有小鸡鸡。peanuts: （幼儿用语）小鸡鸡
S Mom, why do I have a peanut? 为什么我有小鸡鸡？
  Why doesn't a girl have one? 为什么女生没有呢？
M Men and women have different bodies. 男女生的身体不一样。
  Men have willies while women don't have them. willie: （幼儿用语）小鸡鸡
  Men are big while women are small. 男生块头大，而女生体型小。
S I want to be strong like my dad. 我想变得和爸爸一样强壮。
Tip: 『小鸡鸡』的各种称呼

男人的性器官是 penis。小孩子的则是 willie。在说小孩子的性器官时，也有人很可爱地称之为 peanut。不过，用 peanut 来表达的话，难免有些俗气，因此也有人直接称之为 penis。

男孩/女孩会说的话（ch38-08.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
D Mom, I like skirts.  
  I don't like clothes that aren't pink.  
  I want to marry Daddy.  
  I love playing with dolls.  
  Mom, will you play house with me?  
  Dress me like a princess. 把我打扮成公主。
  Women have long hair.  
  I want to wear dress shoes like you. dress shoes: 礼服鞋
S I want to have the newst car.  
  Mom, buy me the dinosaur book.  
  I love playing with robots very much. 我非常喜欢玩机器人。
  Can you take me outside and play with me? 能带我出去玩吗？
  Why do girls cry so often? 为什么女生总是哭？
  I don't cry because I am a man.  
  Men are taller than women.  
  I run faster than girls.  
  Only girls wear skirts and dresses.  
M You have to be nice to girls. 好好对待女生
  Only a dummy hits a girl. 只有傻瓜才会打女生。

Chapter 39: 有弟弟妹妹了

疼弟弟妹妹的时候（ch39-01.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Look at who's here! This is our new baby!  
D Wow, I'm a big sister now!  
M How do you feel about having a baby sister? 有了妹妹你觉得如何？How do you feel about doing: 对…感觉如何？
D I'm really happy to have her.  
  She is so cute! 她好可爱！
  Her hands are so small and cute.  
  She is better looking than me. 她比我好看。good looking -> better looking
  She looks the best when she smils like this. 她这样笑的时候最好看。
  She is the cutest baby in the world!  
M You are very cute, too!  
S He is cuter than Minsu's brother.  
  I want to pinch him because he is so adorable! pinch: 捏；adorable: 可爱的
  She looks like a pretty doll.  
M I'm so glad you love y our brother so much.  
  Your brother likes y ou just as much as you like him. 你的弟弟也会跟你爱他一样地爱你。

讨厌弟弟妹妹的时候（ch39-02.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
D I don't like my brother.  
M Who do you not like him? 为什么你不喜欢他？
D He bothers me too much. 他老是烦我。
  He is a troublemaker. troublemake: 捣蛋鬼
  He is too mischievous. mischievous: 调皮的
  He keeps messing up my work. 他总是把我的事情弄得很糟。mess up sth.: 弄糟…
  He licks my toys. It's gross! gross: 讨厌的，令人恶心的
  I want you to give him away to another family. 我希望你把他送去别人家里。
  I wish that he was gone. 我希望没有他。
M You should not say that. 你不可以那样说。
  Your brother will be sad if he hears that. 如果你弟弟听到的话，他会很伤心的。
  You should love your brother.  
  You do not know how much Jinsu loves you. 你不知道 Jinsu 有多爱你。
D He just keeps crying very loudly. 一直大声哭闹。
M Well, you were just like him when you were a baby. 当你是个婴儿时，也跟他一样。
D I tell him to stop touching my things, but he does not listen. …，他就是不听。
M Okay, then I'm going to give hime away. 好，那么我把他送走。
D Come to think of it, he might be very sad. 想一想，他可能会很伤心。Come to think of sth.: 想一想…
  I'll get along well with the baby. 和宝宝好好相处；get along with sb.

吃醋的时候（ch39-03.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
S Why do you only like Minsuo?  
M What do you mean? I love you just as much as I love him. 那是什么意思？我爱你跟爱他一样多。
  You and your brother are both important to me. 你和你弟弟对我来说都很重要。
S But you only hold Minsu. 你只抱 Minsuo。
M Well, Minsuo is a baby. That's why I'm holding him often. 所以我才会经常抱他。that's why …
S I want you to hold me, too. 我也想要你抱我。
  Please feed me like you feed the baby. 和喂宝宝一样喂我。
  Give me a piggy-back ride. My legs hurt.  
  Let me sleep with you in your bed. 让我去你的床上和你一起睡。
M Well, I held you a lot when you were a baby.  
  Come here, and I'll give you a hug. 给你个拥抱。
  You don't know how much Mommy loves you. 你不知道妈妈有多么爱你。
S But you only praise Minsuo.  
  And you always scold me. 你总是责备我。
  I scolded you because you did something wrong. 因为你做错事，我才责备你。
  Minsuo is only a baby. He still does not know anything. 他还什么都不知道。
  So you think that Mommy only loves Minsuo?  
  That's why you were sad. 那就是你为什么伤心。
  I'm just helping him more because he is a baby. 我帮他更多，因为他还是个婴儿。
  Both of you mean a lot to Mommy. / You are both so precious to me. 你们两个对妈妈来说都很重要。mean a lot: 意义非凡
  I love you both the same. 我对你们两个的爱是一样的。
  You are the first present from God to us. 你是神给我们的第一个礼物。
  I love you more than anyone else in the whold world. 在这个世界上，我爱你胜过任何人。

Chapter 40: 上幼儿园

幼儿园入学（ch40-01.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Finally, you are going to kindergarten. 终于，你要上幼儿园了。
  I can't believe that you are already in kindergarten. 我不敢相信你已经上幼儿园了。
  Doesn't this book bag look nice? 这个书包不是很漂亮吗？
  You will carry this backpack when you go to school. 背着书包
S Mommy, I don't want to go. 我不想去。
M Why not? Kindergarten is such a fun place. 幼儿园是那么好玩的地方。
  If you go there, you will have a great teacher and a lot of friends.  
S Mom, what do I do at school? 我在学校要做什么？
M Well, you play and study with your friends.  
  There is a big playground there. 那里有很大的游乐场。
  You'll see many toys and games that you don't have at home. 你会看到很多家里没有的玩具和游戏。
  The school will server a wonderful lunch every day. serve lunch: 提供午餐
  This is the kindergarten that you will be going to. 这里就是你要去的幼儿园。
S I'm so glad to have a teacher and new friends.  
Tip: 美国的幼儿园

幼儿园虽然叫做 kindergarten，其实是以满5岁为对象的公立学校。更小的小孩子去的教育场所是 preschool，那些都是家庭式的教育。进 kindergarten 之前没有另外的入学典礼，只是花一周的时间，每天把4-5名学生召集在一起，进行一天的学校生活训练。一周之后，所有的学生就正式开始上学。preschool 的话，只要有空缺，随时都可以去。

班级/老师的分配（ch40-02.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M You are in the class called Yellow. 你是黄色班。
  There are 12 students in Class Yellow. 黄色班有12名学生。
  This is the classroom for Yellow.  
D But I don't like yellow. Can I be in Class Pink?  
  I want to transfer to Class Pink. 我想转去粉色班。transfer: 移动，转移
  I want to be in the same class with Yejiu. 我想跟Jejiu同班。
  I'm glad Yejiu is in our class. 我很高兴Jejiu就在我们班。
M Well, Class Pink is for 7 year olds. 粉红色班是7岁小朋友上的。
  You are six, and six year olds go to Class Yellow.  
D Who is my teacher?  
M Miss Wu is the teacher of Class Yellow.  
D Wow, my teacher is really pretty.  
  I like my teacher the most.  
  The teacher looks scary / strict. 老师看起来很可怕/严厉。
M Shall we go and say hello to your teacher? 我们应该去跟老师打招呼吧？
  Your teacher is like your mother when you are at school. 在学校的时候，老师就像是你的妈妈。
Tip: 老师的称呼

在西方国家，不对老师称 teacher，而是以 Ms. Kay, Mr. Brown 这样的方式称呼。

伙食（ch40-03.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
S Mom, what's for luch today? 今天午餐是什么？
  The teacher gave me the menu for the school lunch.  
M Well, I don't know, but it must be good as usual. 一定跟平常一样好吃。
  Well, I guess I have to take a look at the menu. 我想我一定要看一下菜单。take a look at
  It seems like you will have a lot of delicious food.  
  I'm glad you're not picky about food at school. 我很高兴你在学校不挑食。
  A special luch will be served because there is a party today. 因为今天有派对，所以会提供特别午餐。
S Yay! I will eat chicken and cakes, too!  
M What did you have for luch today? 今天午餐吃了什么？
  Was your luch delicious? 午饭好吃吗？
S I had my favorite food – fried potatoes. 油炸马铃薯
  It was really good. 真的很好吃。
  The noodles were terrible today. 今天的面条很糟糕。
M Did you eat a lot of kimchi? 你吃了很多泡菜吗？
  Did you eat everything without leaving anything left over? 你一点都不剩地吃完了吗？
S I left some food on my plate because I was too full.  
M Try to finish all of your food so that you can be healthier. 试着把食物都吃光，那样你才会更健康。
S My teach will scold me if I don't finish my lunch. 如果我没有吃完，老师会责备我。

收集贴纸（ch40-04.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
D The teacher gave me a sticker today.  
M How can you receive a praise sticker? praise sticker: 嘉奖贴纸
D She gives one whenever we do something nice / good.  
  You can get one when you answer a question correctly. 正确回答问题
  If you follow the rules, you can get stickers. 守规矩
  If you help a friend who is sick, you can get three stickers.  
M Wow, that is a really pretty sticker!  
  Let's stick it in the sticker book. 贴在粘贴簿上
D Look at the stickers I've got!  
M Wow, you have collected a lot of stickers! 收集了很多贴纸
D The person with the most stickers will be rewarded. 贴纸最多的人将得到奖励。
  If I collect 20 stickers, the teacher will give me a big present.  
M Oh, really? Then you should try hard to get the stickers. try hard: 努力
  So, who has the most stickers? 谁的贴纸最多？
D Jina does.  
  I've got only 10 stickers so far. 到现在为止我只收集了10张。
M When you collect 100 stickers, I'll give you a good present.  
  If you read 3 stickers a day, I'll give you 5 stickers.  

放假/升级（ch40-05.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Your vacation begins today! 假期今天开始
S Mom, what is a vacation? 放假是什么？
M Vacation means no school. 放假的意思是不用上学。
S No waking up early! Hooray! 不用早起，太好了！
  I don't want vacation then. I want to go to kindergarten.  
  The vacation is too long.  
  I can't wait to go back to kindergarten. 我想快点回去幼儿园。
  I don't like vacation, Mommy.  
  I miss my teacher and my friends.  
  How many days are left until I go back to school? 还有几天我才能回学校？
M You have to wait for ten more days. 还要等十天。
S I won't go back to kindergarten after the vacation.  
  I like staying home with you.  
M You'll go to the older kids' class after vacation. 去高年级班
S Well, then I'll be in Class Pink soon.  
M Your classroom and teacher will change, too.  
S What about my classmates? 我的同学们呢？
M There will be some old faces, but there will also be some new students. 会有旧面孔，也会有新同学。
S I don't want to be in a different class than Minsuo's. 我不想和Minsuo不同班。

才艺表演（ch40-06.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
D We are going to have a talent show next week. talent show: 才艺表演
  Our class will do a puppet dance. 表演木偶舞
  Our class will do a play. 表演戏剧
  Our class will form a choir. / Our class will sing as a choir at the show. 表演合唱
M Tomorrow is your graduation day. 明天是你的毕业典礼。
  I can't believe that you are already graduating! 我不敢相信你已经要毕业了。
  You will become an elementary school student. 变成一个小学生
  You've been really good at school. I'm so proud of you, Sweetie. 在学校表现好
D I don't want to graduate. 不想毕业
  I want to keep going to kindergarten. 继续上幼儿园
  Will I be able to see my teacher if I graduate?  
M Well, you can always visit when you want to. 只要你想，任何时候都可以去拜访。
  Sit still during the graduation ceremony. 毕业典礼时要乖乖坐好。
  Mom will be standing at the back of the classroom. 站在教室后面
  Congratulations! 恭喜你！
D I got a good behavior award. 获得模范奖
M Let's take some pictures with your friends and teacher.  
  Let's go and say thank you to your teacher. 去跟老师说谢谢
D I will miss my friends and teacher so much.  
M This is your graduation gift from Mommy. 这是妈妈给你的毕业礼物。
  The graduation photos came out really well. 毕业照拍得很好。

Chapter 41: 当上小学生

入学/去上学（ch41-01.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M I can't believe that you're a student already!  
  You'll go to an elementary school from now on. 上小学
  Hurry up. We need to go to the opening ceremony. 参加开学典礼
  Congratulations for starting elementary school! 恭喜你开始上小学。
  Now you're a big boy / girl and not a baby anymore.  
  Are you excited about going to school? 要去学校了，你会兴奋吗？
S Well, I'm excited, but I'm kind of scared, too. kind of: 有点，多少
M What class should my son go to? 去哪个班？
S I'm in Class 4 in the 1st grad. 一年四班
M You have to wear the indoor shoes in the classroom. indoor shoes: 室内鞋
  Put your shoe bag on the shoe shelf. 把鞋袋放在鞋架上。
  Mommy will take you to school. 妈妈会带你去学校。
S We have to be at school at 8:30 AM. 早上8:30之前要到学校。
  But the teacher said that we have to be there by 10 minutes before 8:30 AM. 提前10分钟
  My bag is very heavy because we have a lot of classes today. 今天有很多课
M You can leave your textbooks in your cubby. 把教科书放在置物柜里; cubby: 没有上锁，类似书架的置物柜
  Put the things inside your locker if you always use them at school. 如果都是在学校使用的物品的话，就放进置物柜里。
S Lunchtime for our class is 12 o'clock. 午餐时间是…
  Mom, did you wash my classroom shoes? classroom shoes: 教室用鞋
M Listen carefully to the teacher at school. 在学校要仔细听老师的话。
  You need to listen carefully to your teacher.  
  Get along well with your friends. 和朋友好好相处
  Have a good day!  
  At what time will your school be over today? 今天学校几点放学？
  I'll be waiting for you at the school gate. 在学校门口等你

自我介绍（ch41-02.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
D Let me introduce myself. 自我介绍
  My name is Jina Ji.  
  I'm 8 years old.  
  I live in ABC Apartment.  
  There are four people in my family: my dad, mom, my younger brother, and me.  
  My height is 130cm, and my weight is 25kg. 身高，体重
  My favorite food is chocolate.  
  I like reading books very much. 我非常喜欢阅读。
  I have a pet dog. 我养了一只狗当宠物。
S I'm Minsu Li. I'm in the first grade in class 3. 一年三班
  My nickname is Lightfoot because I'm a fast runner. 我的绰号是飞毛腿，因为我跑得快。
  I like sports although I'm not really good at them. 虽然我不太擅长运动，但我很喜欢。
  I want to be good griends with all of you. 我希望跟大家成为好朋友。
  I want to be a soccer player when I grow up.  
  My dream is to be a doctor when I grow up. 我的梦想是长大后当一名医生。
  I want to be a scientist and create the best robot in the world.  
  I will study hard to be a great person. 我会努力学习成为伟大的人。

换座位（ch41-03.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
D We change seats once a week. 一周换一次座位
Teacher Let's decide on seatmates by drawing lots. 抽签决定谁跟谁坐在一起
D Minji, you are my seatmate this time. 这次你和我同桌
  You are my seatmate again.  
  I'm really happy to be your seatmate!  
  We are made for each other! / We are just meant to be! 我们很合得来。
  Sir, please change our seats. 请帮我们换座位。
  Can we stay in our seats? We don't want to change seats. 呆在原位
M Who is your seatmate?  
  Would you prefer a girl seatmate or a boy seatmate? 你喜欢跟女生同桌还是男生？
D I like both. 两个我都喜欢。
  I want to sit with Minsuo. 我想和Minsuo坐在一起。
M Where is your seat this time?  
D I'm sitting in the 3rd row of the first column. 第一排第三个位置
  Do you like your seatmate?  
D Well, not really. 没有很喜欢。
  I don't know yet. 我还不知道。
  Sir, I want to sit at the front because I cannot see clearly. 我想坐到前面，因为我看不大清楚。
Teacher You need to sit in the back because you are very tall. 因为你很高，所以必须坐在后面。

课程（ch41-04.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M How many classes do you have today? 今天有几节课？
S I have five classes today.  
  School ends early today. 今天学校提早放学了。
M The school hours are shortened today. 今天学校上学时间缩短了。
  What is your favorite class / subject? 你最喜欢的课程是什么？
S I like PE class the most.  
M How long does each class last? 每堂课上多久？
S It lasts for 40 minutes. 一堂课40分钟。
M What do you do during your break time? break time: 休息时间
S I play picture card games with friends during recess. recess: 休息时间
M What did you learn at school today? 今天你在学校学了什么？
S The teacher told us a very funny story.  
M What did your teacher ask?  
  Did you answer the question with a loud voice? 大声回答问题
  Did you participate in class today? 好好上课
  Did you make a good presentation today?  
S I constantly raised my hand during the class, but I didn't get a chance to answer. 举手
  All of today's classes are my favorite ones. 今天所有的课都是我喜欢的。
  Today's class was not fun at all. 今天的课一点都不有趣。
  I was very tired at school. 在学校觉得很累。
  I kept on falling asleep during my classes. 上课打瞌睡
  We had a class in the lab / music room / art room. 实验室，音乐教室，美术教室

作业/准备物品/提醒单（ch41-05.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Why don't you finish your homework first? 先完成家庭作业
S We don't have any homework today.  
  I can't remember today's homework.  
M Check your homework reminders. 看一下你的作业提醒单。
S I have to finish up to page 23 in my workbook. 我要完成一直到23页的内容。
M Are you done with your homework? 做完作业
S I'm still working on it. 还在做
  I'm not done yet. 还没做好。
  I left my assignment notebook at school. 把作业簿放在学校了。
M What do you need for tomorrow's class? 你明天的课程需要什么？
S Watercolors, a palette, and brushes. 水彩，调色盘，还有画笔。
  Mom, I need to buy some materials for my class. 上课用的材料
M I will go to the stationery store to buy some school supplies. 去文具店买些学校用品
  Don't forget to bring the materials for tomorrow's class!  
  Carefully see if there is anything missing. 仔细看看有没有任何遗漏。
  Call your friend to ask him about what you need to bring tomorrow.  
D Mom, there are two handouts today. handout: 通知单，传单
  Mom, read the announcement letter from the school. 读读学校的通知信
  Mom, can you please sign my school planner? 在学校计划簿上签名
M Okay, bring me your school panner then.  
  Write more neatly when you write on your agenda. 在计划簿上写东西时要写得更整齐些。
Tip: 提醒单

英语系国家中，没有『提醒单』这个概念。小学高年级的老师会让学生在 school planner 或 agenda 中记下每天要做的事情，还有作业等注意事项。父母也籍此知道儿女的学校生活。同时，老师也会透过寄家庭通知信给父母来通知主要作业和准备物品。

做作业（ch41-06.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Do you have any homework today?  
D Yes. I have to do an oral report on some daily sentences. 用日常用语做口头报告。oral report; on daily sentences
  The homework is due tomorrow.  
M Do your homework together with me.  
  I'll help you then. 那么我来帮你。
  Try to do your homework by yourself.  
  Bring your language notebook to practice it. 把语言笔记本拿来练习
  Are you still working on your homework? 还在做作业
D Mom, the homework is too hard for me.  
  I've got too much homework today. 今天作业太多
M Look at how well you do your homework! 看你把家庭作业做得多好！
D I like my homework. It's so fun! 很有趣
  My teacher told us not to forget about the homework. 不要忘记作业
  If I do my homework, my teacher wil give me a sticker.  
  I have to bring my homework on Thursday.  
  I've worked enough at school. Why should I do work at home?  
M Your homework helps you review what you learned. 复习所学知识
  Without homework, you could forget what you learned.  

迟到/早退/缺席（ch41-07.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M You will be late for school. 上学要迟到了。
S I will never be late for school again.  
  I think I might be late for school. Can you give me a ride? 你能载我去吗？
M If you're late one more time, you will be in trouble. 你会挨骂的。be in trouble
S Phew, I made it without being late! 我及时赶到没有迟到
  I don't think I can go to school today because I'm sick. 我不舒服，今天不能去学校了。
M I think you should just skip school today. 今天不用去上学了。skip school
  Take a rest at home. 在家休息。
  Let me call your teacher and tell her you'll miss school. miss school: 学校缺席
  If it's too hard for you to stay in school, just tell your teacher. 如果呆在学校觉得很不舒服
S Can I go home early today, Sir? 可以早点回家吗？
Teacher You can leave early today. Just stay home and take a rest. 今天可以早退。在家好好休息。
  Jina is absent because she is sick. 缺席

课后活动（ch41-08.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M What do you want to study after school? 下课后你想学什么？
D I want to learn the violin. 学小提琴
  The Chinese character lession should be fun. 应该很有趣
  The ballet lessions are scheduled for twice a week. 芭蕾课一周两节。
  The robot class is the most popular after-school program. 最热门的课外课程
  Here's the brochure for the after-school lessons. 课外课程的介绍册子
M The art lession overlaps with the piano lession according to the schedule. 课程时间重叠
  You can't do everything that you want to do, so just choose two.  
  Do you want to learn origami? origami: 折纸
  Where do you take your violin lesson? 在哪上课？
D It's in classroom 3 of the 2 grade. 二年级三班教室
M You have to come home straight after those lessons. 课程结束后马上回家; straight: 马上
  All of your after-school programs are over. 所有课外课程都结束了。

星期六的活动（ch41-09.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M You don't have to go to school on Saturday.  
S Why do we have that day?  
M So that you can experience a lot of things outside school with your family. 那是为了让你和家人一起体验很多课外的事。
S Then what about this week?  
M What do you want to do on Saturday?  
S What are we dooing this Saturday?  
M We will go to a museum.  
S I want to go to an art museum this time. 这次我想去美术馆。
  Can't we own a weekend farm so that we can grow vegetables? 有个可以种蔬菜的周末农场
  My teacher told us to write a report about our experience this Saturday. 写一份有关这周六经历的报告
  I'm so happy because tomorrow is a No-School Saturday!  
  I wish that every day were a No-School Saturday.  
M Well, I hope every Saturday is just a school day. 上学的日子
S Next Saturday we go to school, so I will only have Sunday to rest. 只有周日可以休息。

管理零用钱（ch41-10.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
S Mom, I want an allowance. allowance: 零用钱
  How much are you going to give me?  
M How much do you want?  
  Well, I will give you 100 a week.  
S That's too little. 太少了。
M I think that is just about right. 我想那应该刚刚好。
  You don't really have much to spend money on anyway. 反正你又没有什么花钱的地方。
  What are you going to spend your allowance on? 你要把零用钱花在什么地方？
  Try not to waste your money. 不要浪费钱
S Mom, please raise my allowance. 增加零用钱
M By how much? 增加多少？
S By 50.  
M I think it's too much. I will raise it by 5.  
  If you keep on asking for a raise, I won't give you one. 如果你一直要求的话，我就不给了。
  Do not forget to keep a good record of the money you spend. 记录支出
  Did you already spend all of your allowance? 花完所有零用钱
S Mom, my allowance is too tight for me. 零用钱吃紧
  If I do errands, will you give me a bigger allowance? 帮你做事
  I will wash the dishes, so give me some money for it.  
  I will save my leftover allowance. 把剩余的零用钱存起来

Chapter 42: 交到朋友了

同班同学（ch42-01.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M How many students are in your class? 班里有几名学生？
D We have thirty.  
M How many girls are there? 女生有几名？
D We have fourteen girls and sixteen boys.  
  I like all of my classmates.  
M Who do you like the most among your classmates? 同学中你最喜欢谁？
D I like Suwa the most.  
M Do you know all of your classmates' names? 你知道所有同学的名字吗？
D I'm trying to memorize them. 我正努力背起来。
  There is a friend who has the same name as me. 同名
  We have two kids whose names are Minji.  
  We have twins in your class. 我们班上有双胞胎。
  Jina lives in our appartment complex. Jina住在我们的公寓社区。
  Minjiu lives in our appartment building. 公寓大楼
M Great! You can both go to school together in the morning. 你们早上可以一起上学。

介绍朋友（ch42-02.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
S Mom, this is my classmate Minsu.  
M Oh, hello. I'm Jinhong's mother.  
  I've heard a lot about you. 听到许多有关你的事情。
S My classmate named Suhong is really nice. 叫Suhong的同学
  Hajin from my class always gets scolded by the teacher. 总是被老师责备。
  Junsuo from my class is really smart.  
  Minhou is such a good student.  
  Jiwong is such a troublemaker in our class. 捣蛋鬼
  I want to get closer to Minsuo from my class. get closer to sb.: 变得更亲近
M Do you? Why don't we invite him over? invite sb. over: 请…过来; why don't we …: 我们…吧 = let's
S There is a new student in my class.  
M Oh, what's his name?  
  Where did he transfer from? 他从哪里转来的？
S I want to get closer to Jisu, but Jisu only plays with Hajin.  
M Well, then the three of you can play together. 你们三个人
S I will go to school together with Hajin from tomorrow. 从明天开始
  Suhong and I ride the same bus back home. 乘同一趟公交车回家

朋友的问题（ch42-03.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
D I got in a fight with my friend. get in a fight with: 打架，争吵
M Why did you fight?  
D We both wanted the same toy.  
  He took my toys away. take away: 拿走，抢走
M You should take turns. 你们应该轮流玩。take turns: 轮流
  I thought you two were getting along. 我还以为你们处的很好。
  You need to learn how to play together.  
D I'm upset because of my friend. 我因为朋友而感到伤心。
  He keeps making fun of me. 取笑
  He keeps hitting me. 打人
  He keeps saying bad things. 说脏话
  He keeps annoying me. 他一直烦我。
M You must be upset. 你一定很难过。
  You shouldn't act the same way as your friend. 不可以做同样的行为
  Say "No," clearly. 清楚地说『不』。
  Be nice to your friends. 要对朋友好。
  Try to understand your friend. 试着了解你的朋友。
  Try to get along with your friends. 和朋友好好相处
  Don't tell on your friends to the teacher though. 即使那样也不要去跟老师告朋友的状。tell on A to B: 向 B 告 A 的状
  They might call you a tattletale. tattletale: 告密者，说闲话的人
D I want to make friends with Jina. 跟Jina做朋友; make friends with sb.
  Some kids pick on me. pick on sb.: 欺负
  I feel like they are bullying me. 我觉得他们在霸凌我。bully: 霸凌
M You need to learn how to defend yourself. 保护自己; defend oneself
  You guys could become good friends after fighting. 打架后有可能变成更好的朋友
  There are manners to keep even among close friends. 即使是好朋友，也要保持礼貌。keep manners: 保持礼貌
  I am glad you're such a sociable child. sociable: 善于交际的

集体霸凌（ch42-04.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Does anyone from your class pick on you? 你们班有人欺负你吗？
S Jihou keeps bullying me.  
M How does he bully you?  
S He keeps hitting me.  
  He keeps teasing me. tease: 嘲笑
  He says bad stuff about me to my other friends. 他跟我的朋友说我的坏话。
  He yells and swears at me. 他用脏话对我大喊大叫。
  I don't want to go to school because of him. 因为他我不想上学了。
  I want to transfer to another school. 我想转到其他学校。
M Since when did he do that? 他从什么时候开始的？
S From the start of the school year. 从学期开始。
M Don't worry, Sweetie. Mommy will help you.  
  Let's talk to your teacher about it. 告诉老师这件事
  It must've been hard for you to deal with. 对你来说应付这个太难了。
S My friends keep picking on Jina.  
M That's not very nice. You should not do that. Okay.  
  Why don't you stop your friends from picking on her? stop A from doing sth.: 阻止A做某事

去朋友家玩（ch42-05.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
D I want to go and play at Jina's house. 去Jina家玩
  Mom, can I go and play at my friend's house?  
  Today is the day I am going to play at Jisu's house, right?  
  I promised to go and play at Minjiu's house.  
M Do I know her? 我认识她吗？
  Go and play after you finish your homework. 做完作业再去。
  Really? Does Minjiu's mom know about that? 她的妈妈知道吗？
  Mommy will call her house. 给她家打电话
  Suwa said she does not have time today. 今天没时间
  Go and play for two hours. 玩两个小时就回来。
  I'll come and pick you up in two hours.  
  Come home by 5 c'clock. 五点之前回家。
D Can I play for one more hour? 可以多玩一小时吗？
M You shouldn't stay at someone else's house for too long. 不可以在其他人家里呆太久。
  Come home before dinner. 晚饭之前回家。
  Don't fight with Mina and play nicely. 好好玩
  Listen to Mina's mom. 听Mina妈妈的话。
  Be polite to Mina's parents. 对Mina的爸妈要有礼貌。
  Give me your friend's number. 给我你朋友的电话号码。
  Clean up after you play there. 玩过后要整理干净。
  Invite her to our house next time. 下次邀请她来我们家。
