  Don't make a mess at her house. 不要把她家弄脏乱。make a mess: 弄得脏乱
  Behave yourself. 注意你的行为举止。
D Mom, can I take this? 我可以带这个去吗？
M Take this and eat it with your friend. 带这个去和你的朋友一起吃。
D Bye. See you later.  
  Mom, can you take me there? 你能代我去那里吗？
M Sure, I will take you. 当然，我带你去。
D Please come to pick me up later. 等一下来接我。

在朋友家睡（ch42-06.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
S Can I sleep over at Minsu's house on Saturday? sleep over: 去朋友家过夜
  I'm invited to a sleepover on Saturday. sleepover: 过夜派对，睡衣派对
M Wow, a pajama party!  
  Did you get his parents' permission? 你得到他父母的许可了吗？
S His parents invited me.  
M Did you prepare alll the things you need? 你把需要的东西都准备好了吗？
  Can you sleep without Mommy? 没有妈妈你睡得着吗？
S Mom, I'm a grown-up now. grown-up: 成人
M It's your first sleepover at your friend's house.  
  Did you prepare your toothbrush and underwear already? 准备好牙刷和内衣
  Try not to bother Minsu's parents. Okay? 不要打扰Minsu的父母
  Don't be too noisy. 不要太吵。
  You should not sleep in. sleep in: 晚起
  Be sure to brush your teeth before you go to bed. 睡觉之前一定要刷牙。
  Have a fun sleepover! 好好享受睡衣派对！
S I think it's going to be really fun. 我想这将会很有趣。
  I can't wait! I'm so excited. 好像快点去！真的好兴奋！
  I'll see you tomorrow, Mom!  
M If there's something wrong, just call me. 如果有什么事就打我电话。

Chapter 43: 学校课业

学习（ch43-01.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M It's time to study!  
  Study ahead for tomorrow's lesson. 预习明天要学的功课。
  Why don't you review today's lesson? 复习今天的功课
  Listen to your teacher intensively during class. 认真听讲; intensively: 集中地
  You should not keep putting off your studies. 不可以一直拖延学习; put off: 拖延，延迟
  Did you finish the workbook? 作业本都写完了吗？
  You should not be looking at the answer key.  
S I don't want to study.  
  Can I get some rest first and then study? 先休息一下再学习
  Can I take a break?  
  I think I studies too much today. 今天学得太多
M Studying needs consistency! 学习需要坚持不懈！consistency: 持续，一贯
S I find studying to be interesting. / I enjoy studying. 学习很有趣。
  I think I need to solve the math problems one more time. 解数学题
M Check over the questions that you got wrong. 检查做错的题目。get wrong: 做错
S Mom, I don't understand this one.  
M Okay, Mommy will help you.  
  So, do you understand it now?  
  Why do you keep getting the same question wrong? 为很么一直做错相同的问题？
  I know it's hard to keep on studying. 持续学习
  I'm very proud to see you studying hard. 看到你努力学习，我很自豪。

考试（ch43-02.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M When is your test? 什么时候考试？
  Did you know the test range? 考试范围
  You should not cram when studying for an exam. 准备考试不要死记硬背。cram: 死记硬背
D The midterm / final exam will begin next week. 期中考试，期末考试
  This week is the midterm / final period. 这周是期中/期末考试的期间。
M Study hard for your exam. 认真准备考试。
D The test covers too many chapters. 考试范围太广了。
  I'm very nervous about taking the test. 对于考试我很紧张。
  We had a quiz / chapter test today. 小考，单元考试
M Did you do well on your test? 考的好吗？
D I think I did well on the exam. 考得不错
  I don't think I did well. 考得不好
  It was a little hard. 有点难。
  It was easy, but I made a mistake.  
  I did not have enough time. 我没有足够的时间。
  I got two questions wrong by mistake. 不小心做错题。get sth. wrong: 做错; by mistake: 不小心
M You shouldn't miss a question you know. 不应该做错知道的题目
  Let's go over the questions you missed. 检讨做错的题目
  Review your answers carefully. 仔细检查答案
  Check over the answers to make double sure. make double sure: 再次确认
  Your test score will reflect how much you studies. 成绩反映学了多少
  You get what you deserve. 得到应得的
  Don't be so disappointed. You can do better next time.  
  You'll do better next time. 下次会做得更好。
  If you did your best, that's what counts. 如果已经尽力，那才是重要的。
  How come you keep on playing around when you have a test tomorrow? 明天就要考试了，你怎么还一直在玩？

成绩（ch43-03.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M How is your report card? 成绩如何？report card: 成绩单
S I am number one in my class / grade. 班级第一，年级第一
  I am in the top 10 of my class. 班级前十
  I don't think I can make it into the top 10. 我不认为我可以进入前十名。make it: 做到，成功
M What score did you get on the test? 考试多少分？
  What's your average / total score? 平均成绩，总成绩
  What do you think your grade will be? 你觉得你会考多少分？
S My average / total score is 82.  
  I got a 90 in math. 数学考了90分。(说分数的时候，只要写出数字，加上不定冠词)
  Jina's grade was higher / lower than mine. 分数比我高/低
  My grade went up / down. 分数提高/降低
  Compared to before, my grade went up / down by 10 points. 跟之前相比，我的分数提高/降低了10分。
  My grade is ruined because of my score on the math test. 我的成绩因为数学考砸了。
  I got a perfect score in every subject. 每科都得到很好的分数
  I got a one hundred in math. 数学考了100分
  I think I will get the highest / lowest score in my class. 我想我会得到全班最高/最低分。
M Don't be too upset. 不要太难过。
  Don't compare yourself with your friends. 不要把自己跟朋友做比较。compare A with B
  If you tried your best, then that's all that matters. 如果你尽力了，那才是最重要的。
  Your studying habits may be wrong. 有可能你的学习方法错了。
S I'm going to be the top student in my class on the next exam. 下次考试我要考全班第一。
  Well, I tried my best this time. 这次我已经尽全力了。
  I'm sorry. Did I make you disappointed? 我让你失望了吗？
M Well, your score is actually pretty good. 事实上你的成绩不错。
  I'm sure you can do better next time, right? 下次会做得更好
  You studied so hard, and now look what you got on your test! 你这么努力，现在来看看你考了多少分。
  Your grades improved a bit. 分数好了一点
  It seems like you've made a lot of progress. 看起来你进步了很多。
  I'm veru glad that you improved a lot this time. 我很高兴你这次的考试进步了很多。
  I think you need to try harder. 你要更努力
  Don't be too proud of yourself. 不要太自满。
  If you try hard, you can get good grades. 努力就能考出好成绩
  You need to focus when you're taking a test. 考试时要集中注意力
  You've done well in class, but you did badly on the test. 你认真听课，但考得很差。
S Just because I got a few questions wrong, does that ake me a lazy student?  
  That's not fair. 那是不公平的。
M That's why you need to pay attention to each problem. 那就是为什么你每个题目都要很小心。
  Whatever the result, I love you, Honey. 不过结果如何，我都爱你。
S I'll try hard. 我会努力的。
  I didn't do well on the test. 考得不好
  I won't make any mistakes next time. 我下次不会再犯错了。

得奖（ch43-04.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
S I received an award. 得奖
  I got the grand prize / second prize. 大奖，次奖
  I got an award for being a class / school representative. 因为当了班/学校代表而得奖
  The principal gave out the award during the school assembly. 校长在全校集会上颁奖给我。assembly: 会议
  I stood in front of the whole school and got an award.  
M Did you go up to the front to get the award? 你到前面去领奖吗？
S I am on the honor roll this semester. 这学期我在优等生的名单上。honor roll: 优等生的名单
  I was so happy because I got the award.  
  I got a certificate for the award and a medal / trophy. 奖状，奖章，奖品
  I want to receive an award, too.  
  I will try my best to get an award. 尽全力去得奖
  They even give me a scholarship. scholarship: 奖学金
  It's an award given to only two students in our class. 我们班只有两位学生得奖。
  You're happy because I got the award, aren't you?  
M I can't tell you how happy I am, Honey! 我高兴得说不出话了。
S This is the award that I really wanted.  
  I wanted the gold medal.  
  I wasn't satisfied a bit by receiving the bronze medal. 得了铜牌我有点不太满意。
M Let's put the certificate for the award up on the wall. 把奖状挂在墙上
  I'm really proud of you. 以你为荣

放假（ch43-05.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M When does your summer / winter vacation begin? 暑假/寒假什么时候开始？
  Do you have any place that you want to visit? 你有什么想去旅行的地方吗？
  What do you think is good to do during vacation? 你认为放假期间做什么好呢？
  For how long does your vacation last? 你的假期持续多久呢？
D It's over a month. 超过一个月。
  I want to learn swimming during the vacation. 放假期间学游泳
M Let's visit your grandma's house since it's vacation. 去奶奶家
  You should not oversleep just because you don't go to school. 睡懒觉
  Let's make a day planner for your vacation. 订生活计划表
  You should not put off your homework. 拖延作业; put off
D I just want to rest for the whole vacation. 整个假期我只想休息。
  The vacation is too short.  
M What's your vacation homework? 假期作业
D I have to keep a diary, read some books, write a letter, and write some book reports. 写日记；写读后感
M When does school start again? / When do you go back to school? 什么时候开学？
D I don't want school to start again. 不想开学。
M Are you finished with all of your vacation homework? 做完假期作业
  School will start after a few weeks.  
D I'm not finished with it yet. 我还没做完。
M I told you not to put it off. 我告诉过你不可以拖延。

Chapter 44: 学校活动

郊游/校外教学（ch44-01.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
S How many days are left till the field trip day? 离去郊游还有几天？field trip: 郊游，校外教学
M You only have two more days to go. 还有两天就要去了。
S Yay! I'm going on a field trip in two days. 再过两天我就要去郊游了。
M You must be really happy! 你一定很开心吧？
  When is your field trip? 郊游是什么时候？
S We are going next Friday. 下周五去。
M Where are you going for your field trip? 要去哪里郊游？
S We are going to the zoo. 去动物园
  We'll be going to Central Park. 去中央公园
  I can't wait to go on the field trip! 我好像快点去郊游。
  I want the field trip day to come faster. 我希望郊游的那天快点到来。
M What do you want for your lunch? 带什么便当？
S Mom, please make me some fried potatoes. 帮我准备些炸薯条
  Mom, can you make lunch for my teacher, too? 为…准备午餐
M What do you want for a snack? 带什么零食？
S I want some grapes and cookies.  
  I want to share my food with my friends, so please pack a lot. 跟朋友们分享食物；打包多一些
  What if it rains? 下雨怎么办？
M Don't worry. The weather will be nice, they say. 不用担心。他们说天气会很好。
S My teacher told me to wear my gym clothes on the field trip day. 郊游那天穿运动服
  I have to practice for a talent show. 为才艺表演做练习
M What are you going to do at the talent show? 你要为才艺表演表演什么？
  Did you finish packing for your field trip? / Did you put everything in your backpack? 打包准备好郊游的行李/背包
  You should take a pill for nausea before riding on the bus. 坐公交车之前吃一粒晕车药
  Make sure you follow your teacher all the time. 一定要一直跟着老师。
  Be sure to listen to your teacher and behave well. 一定要好好听老师的话，守规矩。
  It will be sunny, so be sure to wear a cap. 会出太阳，一定要戴帽子。
  When do you arrive back at your school? 什么时候回到学校？
  I will wait for you there. 我去那儿等你。
  How was your field trip? Was it fun? 郊游如何？好玩吗？
S I want to go again!  
  Mom, the seaweed rolls were so delicious. seaweed: 海苔

运动会（ch44-02.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M Are you on the blue or the white team? 你在蓝队还是白队？
D I'm on the white team. 我是白队。
  The white team should wear white shirts.  
M How did you divide up the teams? 如何分组; divide up: 分
D The teams are grouped by classes. 按班级分组
  I'm the class representative for a relay. 我是接力赛的班级代表。
  Mom, you have to cheer for me. 为我加油
M What kind of sporting events will be played on field day? 运动会会有什么比赛呢？
D We'll be playing tug-of-war. tug-of-war: 拔河
  We'll also have a running race and a hula hoop rolling race. 赛跑，呼啦圈比赛
M I will participate in tug-of-war. 参加拔河比赛
D Mom, you have to win.  
M What game was the most fun for you? 对你来说什么比赛最好玩？
  I liked tug-of-war the most.  
D Hooray! We won!  
  Mom, I won the running race. 我赛跑赢了。
M Congratulations!  
D The blue team won this year.  
  I'm sad because our team lost.  
M But you ran really well. 你跑的很好。
  It would have been nicer if you had won, but it's okay to lose. 如果你赢了就更好，但是输了也没关系。
  You should be able to congratulate the winners. 你应该有能力去恭喜赢家。
D Even after you lose to them? 即使你输给了他们？

健康检查（ch44-03.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
S The school told me to get a medical examination. 学校要我们做健康检查。medical examination
  I have to do it by next week. 下周之前一定要去。
M Today is the day of your medical examination. 今天是你要做健康检查的日子。
S What hospital should we go to? 要去哪一家医院？
  Do I get a shot when I get the medical examination? get a shot: 打针
M We'll have just a simple checkup. 我们只做简单的检查。
  Wow, my boy / girl has grown up a lot. 长高很多
  You've grown 5cm more. 长高了5厘米。
  You've gained 5kg. 增加了5公斤。
  You have to get a detal / physical / an eye checkup. 做牙齿/身体/眼睛的检查。
  You have to go to the dentist because your back tooth has a cavity. 臼齿有蛀洞
  Since your eyesight is bad, you need to wear glasses. 因为视力不好，你需要戴眼镜。
S Mom, what's my blood type? 什么血型？
M Your blood type is A. 你是A型。
  Let me fill out your medical record for you. 我来帮你填检查记录。fill out: 填表格; medical record: 检查记录
  The nurse will take your body temperature. 护士会帮你量体温。
  The nurse will take your blood pressure, too. 量血压
  You need to fill this cup with urine. Can you do it? 用这个杯子装尿; urine: 小便
S Mom, is everything normal with me? 我一切都正常吗？
M Absolutely! You are a healthy child. 健康的小孩
  They will let you know if there's anything wrong with you. 如果有什么异常，他们会告诉你的。

观摩教学（ch44-04.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
D There is an observation class on next Wednesday. observation class: 观摩教学
  Here's the announcement letter about it. announcement letter: 通知信
  You have to be in the auditorium first. 你必须要在旁听席。auditorium: 观众席
M I can't wait to see the class.  
  I'm really sorry, but I don't think I can make it. 我想我去不了。
D Mom, please come on time. 请准时到。on time: 准时
  Mom, how did I do? Did I do well? 我怎么样？我做得好吗？
  I was so excited / nervous during the class because you were there.  
M I was so proud of you, Sweetie. You were so well spoken! 说的太好了。well spoken: 说得很好
  I would have missed the scene if I hadn't been there. 如果我没去，就会错过这个场面了。
D I was sad that you couldn't come. 你不能来我感到很伤心。
M I promise that I will go next time. 我答应你艾糍我一定去。

各种竞赛（ch44-05.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
S I want to participate in the English-speaking competition. 参加英文演讲比赛
  I'm competing in the math competition. 我正在数学大赛与人竞争。
M Great! It's a great honor to be chosen for that. 被选上真的是件光荣的事。
  How's the preparation for the competition going? 比赛准备进行得如何？
S I have to work on some workbooks designed for the contest. 我必须去做为比赛所设计的题库。
  There is a drawing competition. The drawing should be about the books I read. 要画的是我读过的书。
M What book would your drawing be about? 你要画有关什么书的画？
S I'm the class / school representative in the essay contest. 我代表班上/学校去参加作文比赛。essay contest: 作文比赛
  I won the gold medal / first prize. 得了金牌/第一名
M Congratulations! Let me see the medal. 让我看看奖牌。
S There was an awards ceremony for the competition. awards ceremony: 颁奖典礼
  I went up to the front and got a prize as the representative. 我以代表的身份走到前面去领奖。
  I don't want to participate in the contest this time.  
  I don't think I'm prepared enough. 准备不充分
M Participating itself is a meaningful effort! 参与本身就很有意义。

家长会谈（ch44-06.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
S There's a parent-teacher conference tomorrow. parent-teacher conference: 家长会谈
  You can come to the classroom by 1 o'clock. 一点之前到教室就可以了。
M I'm going to ask about how you're doing at school. 我要问问你在学校的表现如何。
S Be sure to look pretty tomorrow, Mom!  
  I wonder what the teacher will say to you. 我想知道老师会跟你说什么。
  Where should I wait while you have a talk with my teacher?  
M Why don't you go and stay in the library while I talk to your teacher?  
S Mom, what did the teacher say?  
M The teacher told me that my son is such a model student. model student: 模范生
  I was happy to hear that you're getting along with your friends very well.  
  She said that you concentrate well in class. 上课时很认真
  It's such a relief to hear that you're doing great in school. 听说你在学校表现不错，我就很安心了。
  She told me that you are always very active and enthusiastic. 积极和热心
  Your teacher is very nice. 你的老师很好。
  She told me a lot of nice things. 她跟我说了很多好话。
  She said a lot of nice things about you. 她说了你很多好话。
  The teacher told me that you need more confidence. 你需要更多的自信。
  She said you are likely to get distracted during class. 上课的时候有点分心; be likely to: 好像
  She was worried that you often argue with your friends. 你经常跟朋友吵架。
S I'm sorry. I will try not to fight again. 我会试着不再争吵。

校庆（ch44-07.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M When is the school's foundation day? 校庆是什么时候？
D It's September 5.  
  Tomorrow is our school foundation day.  
  What is a school's foundation day?  
M It's the date when your school first opened.  
  You don't go to school on the school's foundation day. 校庆那天你不用去学校。
D I hope tht every day is a foundation day. 我希望天天都是校庆日。
M How old is your school? 你们学校成立多久了？
D Since it's the 20th anniversary of your school, it's twenty years old now.  
M It's been twenty years since your school was founded. 创校至今，已经过了20年。

毕业（ch44-08.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
M It's already graduation. 已经是毕业的时候了。
  I can't believe that my son is already graduating! 我真不敢相信我儿子已经要毕业了。
  Time flies. 时间过的真快。
  It feels like yesterday when you were born. 感觉你出生就在昨天。
  Congratulations on your graduation! / Happy graduation! 恭喜毕业！
  What time does the ceremony start? 典礼几点开始？
  Your grandma and grandpa will come to your graduation ceremony. 爷爷奶奶会去参加你的毕业典礼。
  Since it's your graduation day, you have to look great. 因为是你毕业的日子，你要穿的帅一些。
  Please give these flowers to your teacher.  
  Don't forget to say thank you to your teacher.  
  I think I should say thank you to your teacher, too.  
S I almost cried during the graduation ceremony. 毕业典礼的时候，我差点哭了。
  I think I will miss my friends / my school a lot.  
M Here are some flowers for you. 这是送给你的花。
  Let me take a picture of you with your friends. 帮你跟朋友们照相。
  Why don't we go to eat some delicious food? It's a special day!  
  Wow, now you are a middle school student! 现在你是中学生了。
  You've done a great job in school. 你在学校表现得不错。
  I really appreciate your hard work. 我真的很感谢你付出的努力。

我们不知道的美国派对

婚前排队 Wedding Shower

为结婚前的新娘举办的派对。主要由和新娘很亲近的人来主办，邀请一些好朋友。被邀请的人带来新娘所需要的礼物，主办人则准备丰盛的食物，大家一起来谈天说笑。

最近，为了避免礼物重复或者不是新娘需要的，新娘普遍都会去百货公司等地方登记结婚用品（wedding registry）后，再告知朋友们。朋友们就可以各自负责一个礼物。

孕妇派对 Baby Shower

为生产前的妈妈举办的派对。由和孕妇很亲密的人来主办，被邀请的人们带来幼儿所需要的用品作为礼物。除了享受派对的美食，也会玩一些包尿布、把大人打扮成小孩子等等跟幼儿相关的好玩游戏。

如 wedding shower 一样，为了避免礼物重复，孕妇会去百货公司登记幼儿用品（baby gift registry）。这是个既实用又好玩的风俗。

Part 9: 和外籍老师的沟通

Chapter 45: 英文幼稚园/补习班

经常使用的教室英文（ch45-01.mp3）

老师经常使用的表达
Role Sentence Notes
T Hello, everyone! 大家好！
  How was your weekend? 周末过的怎么样？
  Shall we introduce ourselves? 我们来自我介绍一下吧？
  Let me take attendance. 我要点名了。take attendance; attendance: 出席，参加
  It's time to call the roll. call the roll: 点名
  Did anyone forget to bring their books? 有人忘了带课本吗？
  Where did we stop last time? 我们上次学到哪儿了？
  Okay, let's turn to page 10. 我们翻到第十页。
  What do we call it in English? 这个在英文里叫做什么呢？
  Anyone who knows the answer, please raise your hands. 知道答案的人请举手。
  So who wants to share his / her opinion? 那么谁想分享他的意见呢？
  Who wants to go first? 谁要先说呢？
  Repeat after me. 跟着我念一次。
  Listen carefully. 仔细听。
  Is everything clear? 都清楚了吗？
  Did you guys understand everything? 你们都懂了吗？
  What do you think? 你怎么想？
  Did you do your homework? 你做功课了吗？
  Please turn in your homework. 请交作业。turn in: 交，提出
  Please submit your homework by Friday. 请在周五之前交出你的作业。
  Please pass around the worksheets. 请把练习题传下去。worksheet: 练习题
  Will you pass out the handouts to everyone? 你能把讲义分发给所有人吗？handout: 讲义, 传单
  Please pass this along to the next person. 请把这个传给下一个人。
  Please take one and pass the rest back. 请拿一张，然后把其他的往后传。
  Let's play a game. 玩游戏吧。
  Group yourselves into 4. / Make groups of 4, please. 四个人组成一队。
  So, whose turn is it now? 现在轮到谁了？
  Okay, this is for today's lesson. 今天的课就上到这里。
  Let's stop here for today. 今天就到此结束。
  See you next time. 下次见。
  Please speak in English. 请用英文讲话。
学生们常用的表达
Role Sentence Notes
B I forgot to bring the book. 我忘记把书带来了。
  I haven't finished my homework yet. 我还没有完成作业。
  I can't see it clearly. 我看不清楚。
  I have a question. 我有疑问。
  Sir / Ma'am, I need your help. 老师，请帮我。
  Me, me! I want to go first. 我想先回答。
  This is too difficult / easy.  
  I can't come to school on Monday. / I have to miss school on Monday. 我星期一不能来上学。
  Can I go to the bathroom? 我可以去厕所吗？
  Can I speak in Chinese? 我可以用中文回答吗？
  How do I say this? 这个怎么说？（用英语怎么说）
  I don't know what this is. 我不知道这个是什么。
  Can I get a sticker? 我可以得到一张贴纸吗？

英文名字（ch45-02.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
T What is your English name? 你的英文名是什么？
G My name is Kelly.  
  I got this name from the main character of my favorite story. 我根据我最喜欢故事的主角取了这个名字。
  I don't have an English name. 我没有英文名。
  My name is easy to say. 我的名字很好发音。
  Foreigners can say my name easily. 外国人能很轻松地叫我的名字。
T Your name is hard to pronounce. 你的名字很难发音。
G My name is Jennifer, but you can call me Jenny. 你可以叫我 Jenny。
  Call me Sophia.  
T Wow, it's the name of a famous actress. 那是知名女星的名字。
  How do you spell it? 你的名字怎么拼？
G It's spelled S, O, P, H, I, A. 它是这么拼的：…

年龄（ch45-03.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
T How old are you? 你几岁了？
B I'm 6 years old.  
T You are very tall for your age. 你比同年龄的人高很多。for one's age: 跟年龄相比
  In what year were you born? 你是哪一年出生的？
B I was born in the year 2005. 我是2005年出生的。
  I was born in February 2003. 我是2003年2月出生的。
  I was born in the year of the monkey. 我是猴年生的。
  He / She is the same age as me. 他和我同龄。
  I'm a year younger than he / she. 我比他小一岁。
T What grade are you in? 你是几年级？
B I'm in the second grade. 我是二年级。
  I'm still 7 years old although I'm already in the first grade. 我只有7岁，但已经读一年级了。
  I was enrolled in elementary school a year early. 我提早一年上小学。

老师指示行动（ch45-04.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
T Be quiet, please.  
  No talking, please. 不要说话。
  Concentrate, please. / Pay attention, please. 集中注意力。
  Sit properly, please. 请坐好。
  Do not joke around. / Stop playing around. 不要捣蛋。
  Do not swear. 不要说脏话。
  Please talk in a quiet voice. 请小声说话。
  No chatting with the person sitting next to you. 不要跟旁边的人聊天。
  Do not play with your hands, please. 不要玩你的手。
  Try not to make any noise with your chairs. 不要让椅子发出噪音。
  It's very dangerous to play around in the stairway. 在楼梯上玩是非常危险的。
  No running in the hallway! / Do not run in the hallway. 不要在走廊上跑！hallway: 走廊
  Say hello to an adult in a polite way. 对大人要有礼貌地打招呼。
  Please spit out the gum. 请把口香糖吐出来。
  You should raise your hand before you talk. 发言之前先举手。
  First come, first served. 先到先用。
  Who raised his / her hand first? Let's follow the order. 谁先举手的？我们按顺序来。
  Do not interrupt your friend while he /she is talking. 朋友发言时，不要打断。
  Please stand in line. 请排队/站成一排。
  I will give you a warning for hitting your friends. 如果你打人，我会给你警告。
  Please do not waste school supplies. 不要浪费学校用品。
  You should speak politely. / You should speak in a polite way. 说话要有礼貌。
  Please behave well. 表现好点。
  Let's put the trash in the trash can. 把垃圾放进垃圾桶。
  Let's conserve our resources and energy. 节约资源和能源。

Chapter 46: 和外籍老师相谈

老师（ch46-01.mp3）

夸奖学生的优点
Role Sentence Notes
T Minsu concentrates well during class. Minsu上课时很专心。
  He is smart / intelligent. 他很聪明。
  He participates well in class. 他在课堂上积极参与。
  He is passionate about studying. 他对学习很有热情。
  He loves learning. 他很爱学习。
  He has a good memory. 他记忆力很好。
  He is very active and enthusiastic in everything he does. 他做任何事情都很积极和热心。
  He adapts well to a new environment. 他在新的环境适应得很好。
  He has a lot of perseverance. 他很会忍耐。
  He has a lot of curiosity. 他好奇心很强。
  He is diligent. 他很勤奋。
  He works hard at everything. / He is a hard worker. 他做任何事都很努力。
  He is ahead of other kids his age in everything. 他在任何方面都领先于同龄的小孩。
  He is very friendly / kind to others. 他对其他人很亲切。
  He is very thoughtful and considerate of others. 他对其他人都相当细心和体贴。considerate: 体贴的; thoughtful: 考虑周到的
  He is humble / modest. 他很谦虚。
  He is very active. / He is full of energy. 他很活泼。
  He is very positive. 他很积极。
  He is very responsible. 他很有责任感。
  He has a great personality. 他的性格很好。
  He gets along well with everyone. 他跟大家都处得很好。
  He has a lot of friends around him. 他有很多朋友在身边。
  He is more mature than his age. 他比他的年纪要成熟。
指出学生的缺点
Role Sentence Notes
T She is stubborn. 很倔强
  She is very shy. 容易害羞
  She is easily frightened. 容易受到惊吓
  She is timid. 胆小
  She is not very patient. 不是很有耐心
  She is impatient. 没耐心
  She gets tired / bored of things very easily. 很容易感到厌烦
  She is passive at everything. 做任何事都很消极
  She is afraid of new environment. 害怕新环境
  She does not get along with her friends. 没有和朋友们好好相处
  She gets anxious / nervous when her mother is not around. 妈妈不在身旁，他会很焦虑
  She has some difficulty with math. 对数学有学习障碍
  She doesn't seem to be interested in class. 对上课不感兴趣
  She gets easily upset. 容易不开心
  She easily gets mad at even small things. 在小事上容易生气
  She does not show respect to adults. 不尊重大人; show respect to sb.
  She tends to talk a lot. / She is talkative. 话很多
  She is too reserved. reserved: 沉默寡言的
  She often hits others. 经常打人
  She is not considerate of others. 不会体谅别人; considerate of sb.: 体谅某人
  She has trouble waiting for her turn. 不会遵守次序
  She is easily distracted. 容易分心
  She doesn't concentrate well. 不能专心
  She has trouble staying focused. 没办法保持注意力
  She has a hard time staying on task. 没办法长时间持续做一件事
  She does not like simple repeating tasks. 不喜欢简单重复的事情
  She often cries. 经常哭
  She is picky about food. 挑食

父母（ch46-02.mp3）

询问上课态度
Role Sentence Notes
M How is his behavior in class? 他的上课态度如何？
  I was wondering if he listens to you. 我想知道他是否听你的话。
  Does he often speak up during class? 上课时他经常发言吗？
  Does he participate actively during class time? 他有积极参与上课吗？
  Does he ever disrupt the class? 他曾妨碍你上课吗？
  Does he understand the lessons well? 听懂上课内容
  Does he follow the school rules? 遵守学校规定
  Is there anything that he needs to improve on? 有什么地方是他需要去改善的？improve on sth.
  Which part of his school life does he need to work on? 有哪一部分是他应该多花些心思的？work on sth.: 花心思在…
  Does he understand you well? 他很了解你的教法吗？
  In your opinion, in which field does he show any interest? 在您看来，哪个领域是他感兴趣的？
  Does he eat well during luchtime? 午餐时间他有好好吃饭吗？
  I want to know if he answers your questions well. 好好回答问题
  Does he concentrate in class? 他上课时专心吗？
  Doesn't he talk with his seatmate too much? 他跟同桌同学没有说太多话吗？
询问成绩
Role Sentence Notes
M I'd like to talk about her report card with you. 我想跟你谈谈她的成绩单。
  Is she showing any progress these days? 最近她有进步的表现吗？
  Is she studying hard in class? 她上课时努力学习吗？
  Which subject does she need more effort in? 哪一个科目他需要更努力？
  I'm not sure if her English is good. 我不知道她的英文好不好。
  Should she improve her reading and writing skills? 增进阅读和写作能力
  In which level has she been placed? / In which level does she belong? 他属于哪一个等级？
  How is her English proficiency? 他的英文能力如何？proficiency: 精通，熟练
  Can she read well? 读得好
  I want to help her read at home. What should I do? 我想在家里帮组她读书，我该怎么做？
  Did she do well on her tests? 考试考得好吗？
  Does this score qualify her in the top part of her class? 这样的成绩能让她在班上排名前段吗？
  Compared to her classmates, how well did she do? 跟同班同学相比，他做到哪个程度了？
  What is her weakest part? 他最弱的是哪一部分？
  Does she fall behind her classmates? 他落后于他的同学们吗？fall behind sb.: 落在后面
  Does she find it hard to work in this class? 他上这堂课很辛苦吗？
  She seems to have some difficulty with the classwork. 他对课业好像感到很困难。
  I was wondering if you grade homework. 我想知道作业是否也算成绩。
  Do you think she has the potential to be in the top group? 你认为他有进资优班的潜能吗？
询问交友状况
Role Sentence Notes
M Who is he especially close to? 他跟谁特别亲近？
  He talks a lot about Minsuo at home. 经常谈Minsuo的事情
  How is his relationship with others? 他和其他人的关系如何？
  Does he get along with his friends? 相处得很好
  Does he interact with his friends well? 互动得好
  Does he talk well with his friends? 他跟朋友谈得来吗？
  Does he ever bully his classmates? 欺负同学
  Does he not hit his classmates? 打同学
  Has he ever fought with his other friends? 跟朋友打架
  He said that Minsuo bullies him a lot. Minsuo经常欺负他
  I was wondering if you're aware that someone is bullying my child. 欺负小孩; be aware that: 发觉
  I was wondering if you're aware that some kids are picking on m child. 欺负小孩
  Are there any new students? 班上有新同学吗？
  Has any students left school recently? 最近有学生转学了吗？
  He once told me that he had a fight with Jiwang. 和…打架
  Did they make up with each other? 他们和好了吗？make up with sb.: 和好
  He is only hanging around with Jina. 他只跟Jina一起玩。hang around: 到处玩
  Please help him make friends with his other classmates. 请帮助他跟其他的同学做朋友。
询问准备物品
Role Sentence Notes
M Are there any materials needed for tomorrow's class? 明天的课程需要什么物品吗？
  Does she need to bring anything for Monday's class?  
  Should she wear gym clothes every Wednesday? 每周三她都要穿运动服吗？
  Please write down what my child needs to bring to her class. 请写下来我的小孩需要带什么东西去上课。
  What does she need to bring for her field trip? 郊游需要带什么？
  I brought the supplies that she forgot to bring this morning. 我把她早上忘记拿的准备物品带来了。
  I sent the materials with her. Please check if everything is there. 送走她时我让她带着东西了。请确认是否齐全。
  If you let me know about the materials meeded for tomorrow's class, I will make sure that she brings everything. 如果你告诉我明天的课都需要什么，我会确认她都带齐了。

感谢信（ch46-03.mp3）

妈妈的信
______ 老师，

您好。我是 ______ 的妈妈。

感谢您这段时间教导我的小孩。

在老师的照顾与支持下，小孩表现了极大的进步。

因为他很喜欢您，所以 ______ 很喜欢去幼儿园。

感谢您对我的小孩付出真诚的爱心。

我不会忘记老师对我们温暖的微笑。

希望您明年也健健康康，一切顺利。


                ______ 妈妈 谨上


Dear Ms. ______, 

Hello! I'm _______'s mother.

Thank you for teaching and guiding my child so far.

He has shown great progress under your excellent care and support.

______ enjoyes going to kindergarten because he loves you.

Thank you for your sincere love for my child.

I will never forget your warm smile for us.

I wish you all the best and good health in the next year.

Sincerely, 

______
小孩的信
亲爱的 ______ 老师，

感谢您一年来对我的教导。

老师在任何事情上都很亲切地帮助我。

我很喜欢去有老师在的学校。

再次感谢您。

         ______ 谨上


Dear Mr. ______,

Thank you for teaching me for the entire year.

You helped me in everything very kindly.

I loved to go to school because of you.

Thank you again.

Love,

______

信件用语（ch46-04.mp3）

Role Sentence Notes
P Thank you for taking good care of my child. 感谢您把我的小孩照顾得很好。
  Thank you for loving my child.  
  I think you for all the wonderful work you have done with Jina. 感谢您为Jina所做的一切美好的事情。
  Have a very fun and happy vacation. 祝您 有个有趣且愉快的假期。
  It was all because of your help and support. 一切都是因为有老师的帮助和支持。
  Thank you for working hard for the entire school year. 谢谢您整个学年的辛苦付出。
  I brought a small gift as a sign of appreciation. 我带了个小礼物，以表我的感谢之意。
  I wish you good health and happiness. 希望您健康幸福。
  My child will miss you a lot.  
  I'm always grateful for your effort. 我会永远感谢您的努力。
  I think that my child is really lucky to have you as a teacher. 有您做他的老师，我想我的小孩真的很幸运。
  Thank you very much for all your work. 非常感谢您做的一切。
  Because of you, my child could feel at home at school. 托您的福，我的小孩才能自在地上学。feel at home: 如在家般自在
  Because of you, his English skills improved a lot. 托您的福，他的英文实力提升了许多。
  I really appreciate the way you helped him learn. 我真的很欣赏您帮助他学习的方法。
  I thank for encouraging him to participate in the class. 感谢您鼓励他参与上课。
  Minsu is really enjoying his school because of you. 托您的福，Minsu真的很享受他的学校生活。
  I feel bad for not having talked enough with you because of my limited English. 因为我的英文能力有限，不能和老师聊很多，我感到很可惜。
  I didn't even have a chance to thank you because my English is not that good. 因为我的英文不好，所以没能好好地表达出我的感谢。
  I wish you all the best in your future endeavors. 希望您未来所做的事情都很顺利。

祝贺信（ch46-05.mp3）

教师节
Role Sentence Notes
  Happy Teacher's Day!  
  Congratulations and best wishes to you on this special day.  
  It's nice that there is Teacher's Day because it allows me to show my appreciation to you. 让我对您表达感激之情
  I know it's too late to say this, but I'm always thankful for your work. 我知道有点晚了，但是我一直很感谢您的付出（教师节过后寄出的感谢信）
圣诞节/新年
Role Sentence Notes
  Have a very merry Christmas! 圣诞节快乐！
  Wishing you peace, love, and joy this Christmas! 希望你的这个圣诞节充满和平、爱和喜乐。
  Wishing you and your family a wonderful Christmas! 希望您和您的家人有个很棒的圣诞节。
  May the Christmas season bring only happiness and joy to you and your loved ones. 希望这个圣诞节带给您和所爱的人幸福喜乐。
  May the joy and happiness of Christmas last throughout the new year! 希望圣诞节的欢乐和愉快一直延续到新的一年。
  I hope that everything goes well in the new year. 希望您在新的一年万事顺利。
  Best wishes for a happy and prosperous new year. 祝您有一个幸福丰盛的新年。prosperous: 繁荣的，昌盛的
道歉信
Role Sentence Notes
  I'm writing to apologize for my child's misbehavior. 我为小孩的无礼给您写信道歉。
  I'm sorry about the things he said yesterday.  
  I'm sorry for his mistakes. 我对他犯的错误感到抱歉。
  I'm sorry for the wrongdoing that my child committed. 我对小孩所犯的错感到很抱歉。wrongdoing: 坏事
  I'm sorry for any trouble that my child may have caused you. 对于我的小孩可能造成的麻烦，我很抱歉。
  I apologized to you because she obviously did a poor job. 因为她确实做错了，我向您道歉。
  I found out that she lied to you, I would like to apologize for that. 我发现她对您说谎，我要对此道歉。
  I'll have her apologize to you for that. 我会让她为此事向您道歉。
  I promise I won't let this happen again. 我保证不会让这种事再发生。

英语系国家经常使用的单位

温度 Temperature

摄氏度 Celsius

美国使用华氏（Fahrenheit）。

  • Celsius C = (Fahrenheit - 32) x 5 / 9
  • Fahrenheit F = (Celsius x 1.8) + 32
长度 Length

长度用英寸（inch），英尺（feet），码（yard），英里（mile）来表示。

  • 1 in (inch) = 2.54 cm
  • 1 ft (feet) = 30.48 cm
  • 1 yd (yard) = 3 ft = 91.44 cm
  • 1 mi (mile) = 1,760 yd = 1.6 km
容积 Volume
  • 1 gal (gallon) = 3.8 liters
面积 Area
  • 1 sq ft (square feet) = 929 sq cm = 约 1/36 坪
  • 1 sq yd (square yard) = 9 sq ft = 约 1/4 坪
  • 1 acre = 4,047 sq m = 约 1,227 坪

美国生活中经常使用的单位

鞋子的尺寸 Shoe Size

台湾用公分来表示鞋子大小，美国则是需要知道 Size。

男生
  • size 6 = 24 cm
  • size 7 = 25 cm
  • size 8 = 26 cm
  • size 9 = 27 cm
女生
  • size 5 = 22 cm
  • size 6 = 23 cm
  • size 7 = 24 cm
  • size 8 = 25 cm
衣服的大小 Clothing Size
男生

裤子的尺寸用两个数字表示，前面的数字是腰的尺寸，后面的数字则表示裤子长度。例如 28-30, 34-32。

T恤则用 small, medium, large, extralarge 等来表示。

女生

女生的衣服用 size 表示。（B = 胸围，W = 腰围，H = 臀围）

  • Size 2 = B32.5, W24.5, H35 in
  • Size 4 = B33.5, W25.5, H36 in
  • Size 6 = B34.5, W26.5, H37 in
  • Size 8 = B35.5, W27.5, H38 in
  • Size 10 = B36.5, W28.5, H39 in
  • Size 12 = B38, W30, H40.5 in
  • Size 14 = B39.5, W31.5, H42 in
  • Size 16 = B41, W33, H43.5 in
T恤

用 extrasmall, small, medium, large 等代替 size 来表示。和 size 的关系如下：

  • XS = size 2
  • S = size 4 ~ size 6
  • M = size 8 ~ size 10
  • L = size 12 ~ size 14
  • XL = size 16
小孩的衣服
  • 未满两岁，用 M (month) 来表示，例如 8M 指 8个月小孩的衣服
  • 满两岁用 T (Toddler) 表示。每个品牌都会有些不同，但大致差不了多少。例如 3T，4T

Author: fengyz
